   1  member obj Q5F6;
   2  
   3  trigger use {
   4  	Q5F6 = NULL();
   5  	systemMessage(user, "What would you like to add?");
   6  	targetObj(user, this);
   7  	return(0x00);
   8  }
   9  
  10  trigger targetobj {
  11  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
  12  		return(0x00);
  13  	}
  14  	if (Q5F6 == NULL()) {
  15  		Q5F6 = usedon;
  16  		systemMessage(user, "What would you like to add " + getName(usedon) + " to?");
  17  		targetObj(user, this);
  18  	} else {
  19  		string Q5FA;
  20  		if (hasObjVar(this, "objVarListSetName")) {
  21  			Q5FA = getObjVar(this, "objVarListSetName");
  22  			int Q4Q1 = addToObjVarListSet(usedon, Q5FA, Q5F6);
  23  		}
  24  		if (hasObjVar(this, "objVarObjName")) {
  25  			Q5FA = getObjVar(this, "objVarObjName");
  26  			setObjVar(usedon, Q5FA, Q5F6);
  27  		}
  28  	}
  29  	return(0x00);
  30  }

#2 alchemy.m 5 members

Source — alchemy.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member list Q5K3;
   4  
   5  member list Q5JY;
   6  
   7  member int Q5LP;
   8  
   9  member int Q4R3;
  10  
  11  member obj Q4FQ;
  12  
  13  function int is_vowel(string Q4B8) {
  14  	if ((Q4B8 == "a") || (Q4B8 == "A") || (Q4B8 == "e") || (Q4B8 == "E") || (Q4B8 == "i") || (Q4B8 == "I") || (Q4B8 == "o") || (Q4B8 == "O") || (Q4B8 == "u") || (Q4B8 == "U")) {
  15  		return(0x01);
  16  	}
  17  	return(0x00);
  18  }
  19  
  20  function void fill_bottle(obj Q4NO, obj user) {
  21  	int result;
  22  	Q4R3 = 0x00;
  23  	obj backpack = getBackpack(user);
  24  	int potion_type = Q5K3[0x00];
  25  	string potion_name = Q5K3[0x01];
  26  	string article;
  27  	if (is_vowel(potion_name[0x00])) {
  28  		article = "an ";
  29  	} else {
  30  		article = "a ";
  31  	}
  32  	concat(article, potion_name);
  33  	concat(article, " potion");
  34  	obj potion = createGlobalObjectOn(bottle, potion_type);
  35  	if ((getQuantity(bottle) > 0x01) && (!isInContainer(bottle))) {
  36  		if (canHold(backpack, bottle)) {
  37  			result = putObjContainer(bottle, backpack);
  38  			systemMessage(user, "You put the remaining empty bottles in to your backpack.");
  39  		} else {
  40  			result = teleport(bottle, getLocation(user));
  41  			systemMessage(user, "You put the remaining empty bottles at your feet.");
  42  		}
  43  	}
  44  	int power = Q5JY[0x02];
  45  	setObjVar(potion, "power", power);
  46  	set_look_at_text(potion, article);
  47  	string script_name = Q5JY[0x03];
  48  	if (script_name == "") {
  49  		script_name = potion_type;
  50  	}
  51  	attachScript(potion, script_name);
  52  	destroyOne(bottle);
  53  	return();
  54  }
  55  
  56  function void consume_reagent_and_start_grinding() {
  57  	int Q5L0 = Q5JY[0x00];
  58  	if (Q5L0 > getGeneric(Q4FQ, Q5LP)) {
  59  		systemMessage(Q4FQ, "You ran out of " + getNameByType(Q5LP) + ".");
  60  		Q4FQ = NULL();
  61  		return();
  62  	}
  63  	destroyGeneric(Q4FQ, Q5LP, Q5L0);
  64  	actionBark(Q4FQ, 0x22, "*You start grinding some " + getNameByType(Q5LP) + " in the mortar.*", "*" + getName(Q4FQ) + " starts grinding some " + getNameByType(Q5LP) + " in a mortar.*");
  65  	sfx(getLocation(Q4FQ), 0x0242, 0x00);
  66  	shortCallback(this, 0x0B, 0x5A);
  67  	return();
  68  }
  69  
  70  trigger callback(0x5A) {
  71  	Q4R3++;
  72  	if (Q4R3 < 0x03) {
  73  		actionBark(Q4FQ, 0x22, "*You continue grinding.*", "*" + getName(Q4FQ) + " continues grinding.*");
  74  		sfx(getLocation(Q4FQ), 0x0242, 0x00);
  75  		shortCallback(this, 0x0B, 0x5A);
  76  		return(0x00);
  77  	}
  78  	int success = testAndLearnSkill(Q4FQ, 0x00, Q5JY[0x01], 0x32);
  79  	if (success > 0x00) {
  80  		obj Q4NO = mobileContainsObjType(Q4FQ, 0x0F0E);
  81  		if (Q4NO == NULL()) {
  82  			scriptTrig(this, 0x17, Q4FQ);
  83  		} else {
  84  			actionBark(Q4FQ, 0x22, "*You pour the completed potion into a bottle.*", "*" + getName(Q4FQ) + " pours the completed potion into a bottle.*");
  85  			fill_bottle(Q4NO, Q4FQ);
  86  			sfx(getLocation(Q4FQ), 0x0240, 0x00);
  87  			Q4R3 = 0x00;
  88  		}
  89  	} else {
  90  		actionBark(Q4FQ, 0x22, "*You toss the failed mixture from the mortar, unable to create a potion from it.*", "*" + getName(Q4FQ) + " tosses out the contents of the mortar.*");
  91  		Q4R3 = 0x00;
  92  	}
  93  	Q4FQ = NULL();
  94  	return(0x00);
  95  }
  96  
  97  trigger use {
  98  	if (Q4R3 == 0x03) {
  99  		obj Q4NO = mobileContainsObjType(user, 0x0F0E);
 100  		if (Q4NO == NULL()) {
 101  			systemMessage(user, "Where is an empty bottle for your potion?");
 102  			targetObj(user, this);
 103  		} else {
 104  			actionBark(user, 0x22, "*You pour the mixture into an empty bottle.*", "* " + getName(user) + " pours the mixture into an empty bottle.*");
 105  			fill_bottle(Q4NO, user);
 106  		}
 107  		return(0x00);
 108  	}
 109  	if (Q4FQ != NULL()) {
 110  		if (Q4FQ == user) {
 111  			actionBark(Q4FQ, 0x22, "*You stop mixing and empty the mortar.*", "*" + getName(Q4FQ) + " stops mixing and empties the mortar.*");
 112  			Q4R3 = 0x00;
 113  			Q4FQ = NULL();
 114  			removeCallback(this, 0x5A);
 115  			return(0x00);
 116  		}
 117  		systemMessage(user, "Someone else is using that.");
 118  		return(0x00);
 119  	}
 120  	systemMessage(user, "What reagent would you like to make the potion out of?");
 121  	targetObj(user, this);
 122  	return(0x00);
 123  }
 124  
 125  trigger typeselected(0x2B) {
 126  	if (listindex == 0x00) {
 127  		return(0x00);
 128  	}
 129  	listindex--;
 130  	int Q65M = Q5K3[(listindex * 0x02)];
 131  	string name = Q5K3[(listindex * 0x02 + 0x01)];
 132  	clearList(Q5K3);
 133  	Q5K3 = Q65M, name;
 134  	int Q5LR = Q5JY[(listindex * 0x04)];
 135  	int Q4IB = Q5JY[(listindex * 0x04 + 0x01)];
 136  	int power = Q5JY[(listindex * 0x04 + 0x02)];
 137  	string Q5OM = Q5JY[(listindex * 0x04 + 0x03)];
 138  	clearList(Q5JY);
 139  	Q5JY = Q5LR, Q4IB, power, Q5OM;
 140  	Q4FQ = user;
 141  	consume_reagent_and_start_grinding();
 142  	return(0x00);
 143  }
 144  
 145  trigger targetobj {
 146  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
 147  		return(0x00);
 148  	}
 149  	if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(user), getLocation(usedon)) > 0x02) {
 150  		systemMessage(user, "You are too far away to do that.");
 151  		return(0x00);
 152  	}
 153  	if (Q4R3 < 0x03) {
 154  		if (isMobile(usedon)) {
 155  			systemMessage(user, "That's not something you can grind with a mortar and pestle!");
 156  			return(0x00);
 157  		}
 158  		if ((usedon == this) && (numInList(Q5K3) > 0x00)) {
 159  			Q4FQ = user;
 160  			consume_reagent_and_start_grinding();
 161  			return(0x00);
 162  		}
 163  		Q5LP = getObjType(usedon);
 164  		int Q65M = 0x00;
 165  		clearList(Q5K3);
 166  		switch(Q5LP) {
 167  		case 0x0F7A
 168  			Q5K3 = 0x0F0B, "Refresh", 0x0F0B, "Total Refreshment";
 169  			Q5JY = 0x01, 0x00, 0xFA, "", 0x05, 0x01F4, 0x03E8, "";
 170  			break;
 171  		case 0x0F7B
 172  			Q5K3 = 0x0F08, "Agility", 0x0F08, "Greater Agility";
 173  			Q5JY = 0x01, 0x0190, 0x0A, "", 0x03, 0x0258, 0x14, "";
 174  			break;
 175  		case 0x0F8D
 176  			Q5K3 = 0x0F06, "Nightsight";
 177  			Q5JY = 0x01, 0x00, 0x00, "";
 178  			break;
 179  		case 0x0F85
 180  			Q5K3 = 0x0F0C, "Lesser Heal", 0x0F0C, "Heal", 0x0F0C, "Greater Heal";
 181  			Q5JY = 0x01, 0x00, 0x64, "", 0x03, 0x0190, 0xC8, "", 0x07, 0x0320, 0x012C, "";
 182  			break;
 183  		case 0x0F86
 184  			Q5K3 = 0x0F09, "Strength", 0x0F09, "Greater Strength";
 185  			Q5JY = 0x02, 0x01F4, 0x0A, "", 0x05, 0x02BC, 0x14, "";
 186  			break;
 187  		case 0x0F88
 188  			Q5K3 = 0x0F0A, "Lesser Poison", 0x0F0A, "Poison", 0x0F0A, "Greater Poison", 0x0F0A, "Deadly Poison";
 189  			Q5JY = 0x01, 0xC8, 0x01, "", 0x02, 0x0190, 0x02, "", 0x04, 0x0320, 0x03, "", 0x08, 0x047E, 0x04, "";
 190  			break;
 191  		case 0x0F84
 192  			Q5K3 = 0x0F07, "Lesser Cure", 0x0F07, "Cure", 0x0F07, "Greater Cure";
 193  			Q5JY = 0x01, 0x96, 0x2D, "", 0x03, 0x01F4, 0x4B, "", 0x06, 0x0384, 0x64, "";
 194  			break;
 195  		case 0x0F8C
 196  			Q5K3 = 0x0F0D, "Lesser Explosion", 0x0F0D, "Explosion", 0x0F0D, "Greater Explosion";
 197  			Q5JY = 0x03, 0x012C, 0x0A, "", 0x05, 0x0258, 0x14, "", 0x0A, 0x0384, 0x28, "";
 198  			break;
 199  		default
 200  			systemMessage(user, "That is not a magic reagent.");
 201  			return(0x00);
 202  		}
 203  		int Q5E8 = numInList(Q5K3) / 0x02;
 204  		int Q5DF = 0x00;
 205  		for (int i = 0x00; i < Q5E8;) {
 206  			int remove = 0x00;
 207  			int Q5L0 = Q5JY[(i * 0x04)];
 208  			if (Q5L0 > getGeneric(user, Q5LP)) {
 209  				remove = 0x01;
 210  				if (i == 0x00) {
 211  					Q5DF = 0x01;
 212  				}
 213  			}
 214  			int Q4IB = Q5JY[(i * 0x04 + 0x01)];
 215  			if (getSkillSuccessChance(user, 0x00, Q4IB, 0x32) <= 0x00) {
 216  				remove = 0x01;
 217  			}
 218  			if (remove) {
 219  				removeItem(Q5K3, i * 0x02);
 220  				removeItem(Q5K3, i * 0x02);
 221  				removeItem(Q5JY, i * 0x04);
 222  				removeItem(Q5JY, i * 0x04);
 223  				removeItem(Q5JY, i * 0x04);
 224  				removeItem(Q5JY, i * 0x04);
 225  				Q5E8--;
 226  			} else {
 227  				i++;
 228  			}
 229  		}
 230  		if (Q5E8 == 0x00) {
 231  			if (Q5DF) {
 232  				systemMessage(user, "The weakest " + getNameByType(Q5LP) + " potion requires more than you have.");
 233  			} else {
 234  				systemMessage(user, "You are not good enough to make anything out of that.");
 235  			}
 236  			return(0x00);
 237  		}
 238  		if (Q5E8 == 0x01) {
 239  			Q4FQ = user;
 240  			consume_reagent_and_start_grinding();
 241  			return(0x00);
 242  		}
 243  		selectType(user, this, 0x2B, "Choose a formula.", Q5K3);
 244  		return(0x00);
 245  	} else {
 246  		if (getObjType(usedon) == 0x0F0E) {
 247  			actionBark(user, 0x22, "*You pour the completed potion into the bottle.*", "*" + getName(user) + " pours the completed potion into a bottle.*");
 248  			fill_bottle(usedon, user);
 249  		} else {
 250  			systemMessage(user, "That is not an empty bottle.");
 251  		}
 252  	}
 253  	return(0x00);
 254  }

#3 amnesty4.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4ID int → was_criminal
Source — amnesty4.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member int Q4ID;
   4  
   5  trigger creation {
   6  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
   7  		if (getNotoriety(this) < 0x00) {
   8  			setNotoriety(this, 0x00);
   9  			Q4ID = 0x01;
  10  			callback(this, 0x01, 0x76);
  11  		} else {
  12  			if (getNotoriety(this) > 0x00) {
  13  				setNotoriety(this, 0x00);
  14  				Q4ID = 0x00;
  15  				callback(this, 0x01, 0x76);
  16  			}
  17  		}
  18  	} else {
  19  		if (getFameLevel(this) < 0x00) {
  20  			setFame(this, 0x00);
  21  			Q4ID = 0x01;
  22  			callback(this, 0x01, 0x76);
  23  		} else {
  24  			if (getFameLevel(this) > 0x00) {
  25  				setFame(this, 0x00);
  26  				Q4ID = 0x00;
  27  				callback(this, 0x01, 0x76);
  28  			}
  29  		}
  30  	}
  31  	return(0x01);
  32  }
  33  
  34  trigger callback(0x76) {
  35  	if (Q4ID) {
  36  		barkTo(this, this, "You have been granted amnesty for your crimes.  --Lord British.");
  37  	} else {
  38  		barkTo(this, this, "Let no good deed go unpunished!  --Lord Blackthorn");
  39  	}
  40  	return(0x01);
  41  }

#4 atkbonus.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride

Source — atkbonus.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q688;
   4  
   5  member int Q471;
   6  
   7  trigger equip {
   8  	list Q57J = 0x0F4F, 0x0F50, 0x13B1, 0x13B2, 0x13FC, 0x13FD;
   9  	int weapon = getObjType(this);
  10  	for (int Q624 = 0x00; Q624 < numInList(Q57J); Q624++) {
  11  		int Q4GB = Q57J[Q624];
  12  		if (Q4GB == weapon) {
  13  			Q688 = 0x01;
  14  		}
  15  	}
  16  	int mod;
  17  	if (Q688 == 0x01) {
  18  		mod = modifySkillMod(equippedon, 0x1F, Q471);
  19  	} else {
  20  		mod = modifySkillMod(equippedon, 0x1B, Q471);
  21  	}
  22  	return(0x01);
  23  }
  24  
  25  trigger unequip {
  26  	int mod;
  27  	if (Q688 == 0x01) {
  28  		mod = modifySkillMod(unequippedfrom, 0x1F, (0x00 - Q471));
  29  	} else {
  30  		mod = modifySkillMod(unequippedfrom, 0x1B, (0x00 - Q471));
  31  	}
  32  	return(0x01);
  33  }

   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member obj Q66W;
   4  
   5  trigger use {
   6  	if (isAtHome(this)) {
   7  		systemMessage(user, "You can't use that, it belongs to someone else.");
   8  		return(0x00);
   9  	}
  10  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {

  12  		return(0x01);
  13  	} else {
  14  		setObjVar(this, "inUse", 0x01);
  15  		attachscript(this, "removeinuse");
  16  		callback(this, 0x1E, 0x1B);
  17  	}
  18  	Q66W = user;
  19  	systemMessage(user, "Select a loom to use that on.");
  20  	targetObj(user, this);
  21  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
  22  		removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
  23  	}
  24  	return(0x01);
  25  }
  26  
  27  trigger targetobj {
  28  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
  29  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
  30  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
  31  		}
  32  		return(0x00);
  33  	}
  34  	int Q66P = getObjType(usedon);
  35  	loc location = getLocation(user);
  36  	obj Q48P;
  37  	loc Q66N = getLocation(usedon);
  38  	obj Q550;
  39  	loc Q5FR;
  40  	int Q5UA = getHue(this);
  41  	int Q4Q1;
  42  	switch(Q66P) {
  43  	case 0x105F
  44  		Q550 = usedon;
  45  		break;
  46  	case 0x1060
  47  		Q5FR = Q66N;
  48  		changeLoc(Q5FR, 0x00, 0x01, 0x00);
  49  		Q550 = getFirstObjectOfType(Q5FR, 0x105F);
  50  		break;
  51  	case 0x1061
  52  		Q5FR = Q66N;
  53  		changeLoc(Q5FR, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
  54  		Q550 = getFirstObjectOfType(Q5FR, 0x1062);
  55  		break;
  56  	case 0x1062
  57  		Q550 = usedon;
  58  		break;
  59  	case 0x1063
  60  		Q550 = usedon;
  61  		break;
  62  	case 0x1064
  63  		Q5FR = Q66N;
  64  		changeLoc(Q5FR, 0x00, 0x01, 0x00);
  65  		Q550 = getFirstObjectOfType(Q5FR, 0x1063);
  66  		break;
  67  	case 0x1065
  68  		Q5FR = Q66N;
  69  		changeLoc(Q5FR, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
  70  		Q550 = getFirstObjectOfType(Q5FR, 0x1066);
  71  		break;
  72  	case 0x1066
  73  		Q550 = usedon;
  74  		break;
  75  	default
  76  		systemMessage(user, "Try using that on a loom.");
  77  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
  78  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
  79  		}
  80  		return(0x00);
  81  		break;
  82  	}
  83  	transferResources(Q550, this, 0x0A, "cloth");
  84  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
  85  		removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
  86  	}
  87  	int Q53W;
  88  	Q4Q1 = getResource(Q53W, Q550, "cloth", 0x03, 0x02);
  89  	if (Q53W > 0x31) {
  90  		int Q4QY = 0x0F95;
  91  		obj Q47G = getBackpack(user);
  92  		Q48P = createNoResObjectIn(Q4QY, Q47G);
  93  		systemMessage(user, "You create some cloth and put it in your backpack.");
  94  		transferAllResources(Q48P, Q550);
  95  		setHue(Q48P, Q5UA);
  96  	} else {
  97  		string Q47R;
  98  		if (Q53W > 0x00) {
  99  			Q47R = "The bolt of cloth has just been started.";
 100  		}
 101  		if (Q53W > 0x0A) {
 102  			Q47R = "The bolt of cloth needs quite a bit more.";
 103  		}
 104  		if (Q53W > 0x14) {
 105  			Q47R = "The bolt of cloth needs a little more.";
 106  		}
 107  		if (Q53W > 0x1E) {
 108  			Q47R = "The bolt of cloth is almost finished.";
 109  		}
 110  		barkTo(Q550, Q66W, Q47R);
 111  	}
 112  	int Q5KY = getQuantity(this);
 113  	int Q55P;
 114  	Q4Q1 = getResource(Q55P, this, "cloth", 0x03, 0x02);
 115  	if ((Q5KY == 0x01) && (Q55P < 0x01)) {
 116  		deleteObject(this);
 117  	}
 118  	return(0x00);
 119  }

  10  
  11  function void activate_gate(obj gate, int it) {
  12  	setType(gate, 0x01);
  13  	doLocAnimation(getLocation(gate), 0x1FCB, 0x09, 0x20, 0x00, 0x00);
  14  	callback(gate, 0x01, 0x63);
  15  	callback(gate, 0x04, it);
  16  	return();
  17  }
  18  
  19  function void close_black_gate__MAYBE(obj gate) {
  20  	doLocAnimation(getLocation(gate), 0x1FCB, 0x09, 0x20, 0x01, 0x00);
  21  	setType(gate, 0x01);
  22  	Q66A = 0x00;
  23  	return();
  24  }
  25  
  26  trigger creation {
  27  	Q66A = 0x00;
  28  	Q5U4 = 0x00;
  29  	Q63R = 0x00;
  30  	Q533 = 0x03;
  31  	callback(this, 0x01, 0x60);
  32  	return(0x01);
  33  }
  34  
  35  trigger enterrange(0x09) {
  36  	if (isPlayer(target)) {
  37  		systemMessage(target, "A sense of great foreboding overtakes you.");
  38  	}
  39  	return(0x01);
  40  }
  41  
  42  trigger enterrange(0x00) {
  43  	if (Q66A) {
  44  		if (isMobile(target)) {
  45  			int Q65M = getObjType(target);
  46  			if (Q65M != 0x09) {
  47  				int Q4XB = getCurHP(target) + 0x01;
  48  				loseHP(target, Q4XB);
  49  			}
  50  		}
  51  	}
  52  	return(0x00);
  53  }
  54  
  55  trigger callback(0x61) {
  56  	loc there = getLocation(this);
  57  	int Q69L = random(0x00, 0x05) - 0x02;
  58  	int Q69V = random(0x00, 0x05) - 0x02;
  59  	setX(there, getX(there) + Q69L);
  60  	setY(there, getY(there) + Q69V);
  61  	int find = findGoodSpotNear(there, 0x04, 0x10, 0x01);
  62  	obj daemon = NULL();
  63  	if (find) {
  64  		daemon = createGlobalNPCAt(0x07C5, there, 0x00);
  65  	}
  66  	if (daemon != NULL()) {
  67  		Q63R++;
  68  		Q5U4++;
  69  	}
  70  	if (Q5U4 >= Q533) {
  71  		close_black_gate__MAYBE(this);
  72  		int time = random(0x0A, 0x3C);
  73  		callback(this, time, 0x60);
  74  		Q5U4 = 0x00;
  75  	} else {
  76  		int Q5DO = random(0x01, 0x03);
  77  		callback(this, Q5DO, 0x61);
  78  	}
  79  	return(0x01);
  80  }
  81  
  82  trigger callback(0x60) {
  83  	activate_gate(this, 0x61);
  84  	return(0x01);
  85  }
  86  
  87  trigger callback(0x63) {
  88  	setType(this, 0x1FD3);
  89  	Q66A = 0x01;
  90  	return(0x01);
  91  }
  92
#7 blacksmith.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q62D obj → crafter
Q5NZ list → recipe_indices
Source — blacksmith.m 
   1  inherits itemmanip;
   2  
   3  forward void Q555();
   4  
   5  forward void cleanup();
   6  
   7  forward void craft_item();
   8  
   9  member obj Q62D;
  10  
  11  member list Q5NZ;
  12  
  13  function void collect_metals_from_container(list metal, obj Q57Q) {
  14  	clearList(metal);
  15  	for (int metal_type_id = 0x1BEF; metal_type_id <= 0x1BF4; metal_type_id++) {
  16  		getObjectsOfTypeIn(metal, container_obj, metal_type_id);
  17  	}
  18  	return();
  19  }
  20  
  21  function int count_metal(obj Q57Q) {
  22  	int total = 0x00;
  23  	list metal;
  24  	clearList(metal);
  25  	collect_metals_from_container(metal, container);
  26  	for (int num = numInList(metal); num > 0x00; num--) {
  27  		int amount;
  28  		int result = getResource(amount, metal[0x00], "metal", 0x03, 0x02);
  29  		total = total + amount;
  30  		removeItem(metal, 0x00);
  31  	}
  32  	return(total);
  33  }
  34  
  35  function void transfer_metal_to_item(obj Q4F0, obj Q62D, int Q571) {
  36  	int total;
  37  	list metal;
  38  	clearList(metal);
  39  	collect_metals_from_container(metal, source);
  40  	for (int num = numInList(metal); num > 0x00; num--) {
  41  		int metal_qty;
  42  		obj metal_obj = metal[0x00];
  43  		int result = getResource(metal_qty, metal_obj, "metal", 0x03, 0x02);
  44  		if (amount >= metal_qty) {
  45  			transferResources(item, metal_obj, metal_qty, "metal");
  46  			deleteObject(metal_obj);
  47  			removeItem(metal, 0x00);
  48  			amount = amount - metal_qty;
  49  		} else {
  50  			transferResources(item, metal_obj, amount, "metal");
  51  			result = getResource(metal_qty, metal_obj, "metal", 0x03, 0x02);
  52  			if (metal_qty < 0x01) {
  53  				deleteObject(metal_obj);
  54  			}
  55  			break;
  56  		}
  57  	}
  58  	clearList(metal);
  59  	return();
  60  }
  61  
  62  function int check_material_requirements(int Q5NY, int metal, int Q55Z) {
  63  	if (getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x04, recipe_index) > metal) {
  64  		return(0x00);
  65  	}
  66  	if (getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x05, recipe_index) > required_skill) {
  67  		return(0x00);
  68  	}
  69  	return(0x01);
  70  }
  71  
  72  function void open_crafting_menu(obj user, string Q636) {
  73  	list recipe_list;
  74  	clearList(recipe_list);
  75  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5NZ); i++) {
  76  		int recipe_index = Q5NZ[i];
  77  		append(recipe_list, getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x00, recipe_index));
  78  		append(recipe_list, getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x01, recipe_index));
  79  		append(recipe_list, getArrayStrElem(0x00, 0x02, recipe_index));
  80  	}
  81  	selectTypeAndHue(user, this, 0x00, callback_name, recipe_list);
  82  	return();
  83  }
  84  
  85  function int Q4DY(int metal, int Q55Z, int Q5VT, int Q5VN) {
  86  	int Q5NY = Q5VT;
  87  	while (Q5NY < 0x3D) {
  88  		int Q4HG = getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x03, Q5NY);
  89  		if (Q4HG > Q5VN) {
  90  			int Q4NT = numInList(Q5NZ);
  91  			int Q4NV = Q4DY(metal, Q55Z, Q5NY + 0x01, Q5VN + 0x01);
  92  			int Q5C8 = numInList(Q5NZ) - Q4NT;
  93  			if (Q5C8 > 0x01) {
  94  				truncateList(Q5NZ, Q4NT);
  95  				append(Q5NZ, Q5NY);
  96  			}
  97  			Q5NY = Q4NV;
  98  		} else {
  99  			if ((Q4HG < Q5VN) || (getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x01, Q5NY) == 0x36)) {
 100  				break;
 101  			}
 102  			if (check_material_requirements(Q5NY, metal, Q55Z)) {
 103  				append(Q5NZ, Q5NY);
 104  			}
 105  			Q5NY++;
 106  		}
 107  	}
 108  	return(Q5NY);
 109  }
 110  
 111  function int build_item_list(int Q5NY, int Q4HG, list Q65O) {
 112  	int debug_enabled = hasObjVar(this, "debugSkillInfo");
 113  	while (numInList(available_recipes)) {
 114  		setArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x00, recipe_index, available_recipes[0x00]);
 115  		setArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x03, recipe_index, skill_level);
 116  		obj sample_item = createNoResObjectAt(available_recipes[0x00], getLocation(this));
 117  		int required_resources = 0x00;
 118  		int Q4Q1 = getResource(required_resources, sample_item, "metal", 0x03, 0x00);
 119  		setArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x04, recipe_index, required_resources);
 120  		int val;
 121  		if (isReallyWeapon(sample_item)) {
 122  			val = required_resources + (getWeaponSpeed(sample_item) * getAverageDamage(sample_item) / 0x0C);
 123  		} else {
 124  			val = required_resources + (getMaxArmorClass(sample_item) * 0x02);
 125  		}
 126  		setArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x05, recipe_index, val);
 127  		string description = getNameByType(available_recipes[0x00]);
 128  		toUpper(description, 0x00, 0x01);
 129  		if (debug_enabled) {
 130  			description = description + ". $" + val + ", " + required_resources + " metal";
 131  		} else {
 132  			description = "Build " + description + ", " + required_resources + " metal.";
 133  		}
 134  		setArrayStrElem(0x00, 0x02, recipe_index, description);
 135  		deleteObject(sample_item);
 136  		removeItem(available_recipes, 0x00);
 137  		recipe_index++;
 138  	}
 139  	return(recipe_index);
 140  }
 141  
 142  function void init_recipe_table() {
 143  	if (hasObjVar(this, "debugSkillInfo")) {
 144  		deleteArray(0x00);
 145  	}
 146  	if (isArrayInit(0x00)) {
 147  		return();
 148  	}
 149  	list row = 0x00, 0x01, "COL_NAME", 0x03, 0x04, 0x05;
 150  	initArray(0x00, 0x06, 0x3D, row);
 151  	int idx = 0x00;
 152  	row = 0x0FAF, 0x00, "Repair an Item", 0x00;
 153  	setArrayElems(0x00, 0x00, idx, row);
 154  	idx++;
 155  	row = 0x13ED, 0x36, "Build Armor", 0x01;
 156  	setArrayElems(0x00, 0x00, idx, row);
 157  	idx++;
 158  	row = 0x13EC, 0x36, "Build Ring Armor", 0x02;
 159  	setArrayElems(0x00, 0x00, idx, row);
 160  	idx++;
 161  	row = 0x13EB, 0x13EF, 0x13F0, 0x13EC;
 162  	idx = build_item_list(idx, 0x02, row);
 163  	row = 0x13BF, 0x36, "Build Chain Armor", 0x02;
 164  	setArrayElems(0x00, 0x00, idx, row);
 165  	idx++;
 166  	row = 0x13BB, 0x13BE, 0x13BF;
 167  	idx = build_item_list(idx, 0x02, row);
 168  	row = 0x1415, 0x36, "Build Plate Armor", 0x02;
 169  	setArrayElems(0x00, 0x00, idx, row);
 170  	idx++;
 171  	row = 0x1408, 0x36, "Build Helmets", 0x03;
 172  	setArrayElems(0x00, 0x00, idx, row);
 173  	idx++;
 174  	row = 0x140A, 0x140C, 0x140E, 0x1408, 0x1412;
 175  	idx = build_item_list(idx, 0x03, row);
 176  	row = 0x1413, 0x1414, 0x1410, 0x1411, 0x1415, 0x1C04;
 177  	idx = build_item_list(idx, 0x02, row);
 178  	row = 0x1B74, 0x36, "Build Shields", 0x01;
 179  	setArrayElems(0x00, 0x00, idx, row);
 180  	idx++;
 181  	row = 0x1B73, 0x1B72, 0x1B7B, 0x1B78, 0x1B74, 0x1B76;
 182  	idx = build_item_list(idx, 0x01, row);
 183  	row = 0x0F45, 0x36, "Build Weapons", 0x01;
 184  	setArrayElems(0x00, 0x00, idx, row);
 185  	idx++;
 186  	row = 0x0F61, 0x36, "Build Blades", 0x02;
 187  	setArrayElems(0x00, 0x00, idx, row);
 188  	idx++;
 189  	row = 0x0F51, 0x1441, 0x13FF, 0x1401, 0x13B6, 0x0F5E, 0x0F61, 0x13B9;
 190  	idx = build_item_list(idx, 0x02, row);
 191  	row = 0x13FB, 0x36, "Build Axes", 0x02;
 192  	setArrayElems(0x00, 0x00, idx, row);
 193  	idx++;
 194  	row = 0x0F47, 0x0F49, 0x0F45, 0x1443, 0x0F4B, 0x13FB, 0x13B0;
 195  	idx = build_item_list(idx, 0x02, row);
 196  	row = 0x0F4D, 0x36, "Build Pole Arms", 0x02;
 197  	setArrayElems(0x00, 0x00, idx, row);
 198  	idx++;
 199  	row = 0x1403, 0x0F62, 0x1405, 0x0F4D, 0x143F;
 200  	idx = build_item_list(idx, 0x02, row);
 201  	row = 0x1407, 0x36, "Build Bludgeoning Weapons", 0x02;
 202  	setArrayElems(0x00, 0x00, idx, row);
 203  	idx++;
 204  	row = 0x0F5C, 0x143B, 0x1407, 0x1439, 0x143D;
 205  	idx = build_item_list(idx, 0x02, row);
 206  	debugMessage("BlackSmithing Loaded:  Allocated Rows= " + 0x3D + " Computed Rows:" + idx);
 207  	int min_val = 0x000F4240;
 208  	int max_val = 0x00;
 209  	int i;
 210  	int val;
 211  	int min_type;
 212  	int max_type;
 213  	for (i = 0x01; i < idx; i++) {
 214  		if (getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x01, i) != 0x36) {
 215  			val = getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x05, i);
 216  			if (max_val < val) {
 217  				max_val = val;
 218  				max_type = getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x00, i);
 219  			}
 220  			if (min_val > val) {
 221  				min_val = val;
 222  				min_type = getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x00, i);
 223  			}
 224  		}
 225  	}
 226  	debugMessage("Min Value=" + min_val + " (" + min_type + ") Max Value=" + max_val + " (" + max_type + ")");
 227  	int range = max_val - min_val;
 228  	for (i = 0x01; i < idx; i++) {
 229  		if (getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x01, i) != 0x36) {
 230  			val = getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x05, i);
 231  			int norm_val = (val - min_val) * 0x03E8 / range;
 232  			setArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x05, i, norm_val);
 233  		}
 234  	}
 235  	return();
 236  }
 237  
 238  trigger creation {
 239  	init_recipe_table();
 240  	return(0x01);
 241  }
 242  
 243  trigger objectloaded {
 244  	init_recipe_table();
 245  	return(0x01);
 246  }
 247  
 248  function int check_anvil_and_forge(obj user) {
 249  	int has_anvil = 0x00;
 250  	int has_forge = 0x00;
 251  	list nearby_objects;
 252  	clearList(nearby_objects);
 253  	getObjectsInRange(nearby_objects, getLocation(user), 0x03);
 254  	int object_count = numInList(nearby_objects);
 255  	for (int i = 0x00; i < object_count; i++) {
 256  		int object_type = getObjType(nearby_objects[i]);
 257  		switch(object_type) {
 258  		case 0x0FAF
 259  		case 0x0FB0
 260  			has_anvil = 0x01;
 261  			break;
 262  		case 0x0FB1
 263  			has_forge = 0x01;
 264  			break;
 265  		}
 266  		if (object_type >= 0x197A) {
 267  			if (object_type <= 0x19A9) {
 268  				has_forge = 0x01;
 269  			}
 270  		}
 271  	}
 272  	if (!has_anvil) {
 273  		string error_message = "You are not near an anvil";
 274  		if (!has_forge) {
 275  			error_message = error_message + " or a forge.";
 276  		} else {
 277  			error_message = error_message + ".";
 278  		}
 279  		systemMessage(user, error_message);
 280  	} else {
 281  		if (!has_forge) {
 282  			systemMessage(user, "You are not near a forge.");
 283  		}
 284  	}
 285  	return(has_anvil && has_forge);
 286  }
 287  
 288  trigger targetobj {
 289  	cleanup();
 290  	if (is_feature_disabled(user, "The blacksmith skill", 0x00)) {
 291  		return(0x00);
 292  	}
 293  	if (!check_anvil_and_forge(user)) {
 294  		return(0x00);
 295  	}
 296  	if (isWeapon(usedon) && hasResource(usedon, resourceTypeToId("metal"))) {
 297  		if (isInContainer(usedon)) {
 298  			obj container = getTopmostContainer(usedon);
 299  			if (isMobile(container)) {
 300  				if (container != user) {
 301  					systemMessage(user, "You can't work on that item.");
 302  					return(0x00);
 303  				}
 304  			}
 305  		}
 306  		int Q4G6 = getWeaponCurHP(usedon);
 307  		int Q56H = getWeaponMaxHP(usedon);
 308  		if ((Q56H == 0x00) || (Q4G6 >= Q56H)) {
 309  			systemMessage(user, "That is already in full repair.");
 310  			return(0x00);
 311  		}
 312  		int Q5MK = (Q56H - Q4G6) * 0x04E2 / Q56H - 0xFA;
 313  		int Q4Q1;
 314  		int success = testAndLearnSkill(user, 0x07, Q5MK, 0x32);
 315  		Q56H--;
 316  		Q4G6--;
 317  		if (Q4G6 < 0x01) {
 318  			systemMessage(user, "You destroyed the item.");
 319  			deleteObject(usedon);
 320  		} else {
 321  			if (success > 0x00) {
 322  				Q4G6 = Q56H;
 323  				systemMessage(user, "You repair the item.");
 324  			}
 325  			Q4Q1 = setWeaponMaxHP(usedon, Q56H);
 326  			Q4Q1 = setWeaponCurHP(usedon, Q4G6);
 327  		}
 328  		if (consume_item_durability(user, this)) {
 329  			deleteObject(this);
 330  		}
 331  		return(0x00);
 332  	}
 333  	systemMessage(user, "You can't repair that.");
 334  	return(0x00);
 335  }
 336  
 337  trigger use {
 338  	if (is_feature_disabled(user, "The blacksmith skill", 0x00)) {
 339  		return(0x00);
 340  	}
 341  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 342  		systemMessage(user, "That is being used by someone else.");
 343  		return(0x00);
 344  	} else {
 345  		setObjVar(this, "inUse", 0x00);
 346  		callBack(this, 0x3C, 0x1B);
 347  	}
 348  	Q62D = user;
 349  	systemMessage(user, "What would you like to do?");
 350  	loc Q66U = getLocation(user);
 351  	int Q4Q1;
 352  	list Q5FD;
 353  	int Q5E6;
 354  	int Q620;
 355  	int i;
 356  	if (check_anvil_and_forge(user)) {
 357  		int Q5TE = getSkillLevelReal(user, 0x07);
 358  		int Q56Z = count_metal(user);
 359  		clearList(Q5NZ);
 360  		int Q5Z4 = Q4DY(Q56Z, Q5TE + 0xFA, 0x00, 0x00);
 361  		open_crafting_menu(user, "What would you like to do?");
 362  	} else {
 363  		cleanup();
 364  	}
 365  	return(0x00);
 366  }
 367  
 368  trigger typeselected(0x00) {
 369  	if (is_feature_disabled(user, "The blacksmith skill", 0x00)) {
 370  		return(0x00);
 371  	}
 372  	removeCallback(this, 0x4A);
 373  	if (listindex == 0x00) {
 374  		cleanup();
 375  		return(0x00);
 376  	}
 377  	listindex--;
 378  	if (listindex >= numInList(Q5NZ)) {
 379  		cleanup();
 380  		return(0x00);
 381  	}
 382  	int Q5NY = Q5NZ[listindex];
 383  	if (Q5NY == 0x00) {
 384  		systemMessage(user, "Select item to repair.");
 385  		targetObj(user, this);
 386  		return(0x00);
 387  	}
 388  	clearList(Q5NZ);
 389  	if (getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x01, Q5NY) != 0x36) {
 390  		append(Q5NZ, Q5NY);
 391  		shortCallback(this, 0x01, 0x4A);
 392  		return(0x00);
 393  	}
 394  	int Q4HG = getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x03, Q5NY);
 395  	int Q56Z = count_metal(user);
 396  	int Q5TE = getSkillLevelReal(user, 0x07);
 397  	int Q5Z4 = Q4DY(Q56Z, Q5TE + 0xFA, Q5NY + 0x01, Q4HG);
 398  	open_crafting_menu(user, getArrayStrElem(0x00, 0x02, Q5NY));
 399  	return(0x00);
 400  }
 401  
 402  trigger callback(0x1B) {
 403  	cleanup();
 404  	return(0x00);
 405  }
 406  
 407  trigger callback(0x4A) {
 408  	int Q4Q1;
 409  	sfx(getLocation(this), 0x2A, 0x00);
 410  	int Q5L6 = random(0x00, 0x05);
 411  	if (Q5L6) {
 412  		shortCallback(this, Q5L6, 0x4A);
 413  	} else {
 414  		craft_item();
 415  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 416  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 417  		}
 418  	}
 419  	return(0x00);
 420  }
 421  
 422  function void craft_item() {
 423  	int result;
 424  	int metal_count = count_metal(Q62D);
 425  	int recipe_index = Q5NZ[0x00];
 426  	int required_metal = getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x04, recipe_index);
 427  	if (required_metal > metal_count) {
 428  		systemMessage(Q62D, "The amount of metal changed since you started smithing the ingots.");
 429  		cleanup();
 430  		return();
 431  	}
 432  	int newType = getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x00, recipe_index);
 433  	int success = testAndLearnSkill(Q62D, 0x07, getArrayIntElem(0x00, 0x05, recipe_index), 0x32);
 434  	obj new_item;
 435  	if (success <= 0x00) {
 436  		int metal_lost = required_metal * (0x00 - success) / 0x03E8 + 0x01;
 437  		metal_count = metal_count - metal_lost;
 438  		new_item = createNoResObjectIn(newType, Q62D);
 439  		transfer_metal_to_item(new_item, Q62D, metal_lost);
 440  		deleteObject(new_item);
 441  		systemMessage(Q62D, "You lost some metal.");
 442  		cleanup();
 443  		return();
 444  	}
 445  	new_item = createNoResObjectAt(newType, getLocation(Q62D));
 446  	transfer_metal_to_item(new_item, Q62D, required_metal);
 447  	obj backpack = getBackpack(Q62D);
 448  	if (canHold(backpack, new_item)) {
 449  		int put_result = putObjContainer(new_item, backpack);
 450  		systemMessage(Q62D, "You create the item and put it in your backpack.");
 451  	} else {
 452  		systemMessage(Q62D, "You create the item and put it at your feet.");
 453  	}
 454  	int quality_pct = 0x64;
 455  	if (success >= 0x0258) {
 456  		systemMessage(Q62D, "Due to your exceptional skill, it's quality is higher than average.");
 457  		quality_pct = 0x78;
 458  	} else {
 459  		if (success < 0x012C) {
 460  			systemMessage(Q62D, "You were barely able to make this item.  It's quality is below average.");
 461  			quality_pct = 0x50;
 462  		}
 463  	}
 464  	if (quality_pct != 0x64) {
 465  		result = setWeaponMaxHP(new_item, getWeaponMaxHP(new_item) * quality_pct / 0x64);
 466  		result = setWeaponCurHP(new_item, getWeaponCurHP(new_item) * quality_pct / 0x64);
 467  		result = setMaxArmorClass(new_item, getMaxArmorClass(new_item) * quality_pct / 0x64);
 468  		int avg_damage = getAverageDamage(new_item);
 469  		if (avg_damage > 0x00) {
 470  			int damage_modifier = avg_damage * (quality_pct - 0x64) / 0x64;
 471  			add_weapon_class_modifiers(this, 0x00, 0x00, damage_modifier, 0x00);
 472  		}
 473  	}
 474  	cleanup();
 475  	if (consume_item_durability(Q62D, this)) {
 476  		deleteObject(this);
 477  	}
 478  	return();
 479  }
 480  
 481  function void cleanup() {
 482  	clearList(Q5NZ);
 483  	Q62D = NULL();
 484  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 485  		removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 486  	}
 487  	return();
 488  }
 489
#8 bldsprtsbase.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4E1 loc → summon_loc
Q57L obj → caster
Source — bldsprtsbase.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member loc Q4E1;
   4  
   5  member obj Q57L;
   6  
   7  function obj summon_spirit(loc location, obj Q5UY, obj caster) {
   8  	obj spirit = createGlobalNPCAt(0x023E, location, 0x00);
   9  	if (spirit != NULL()) {
  10  		copyControllerInfo(spirit, caster);
  11  		attachScript(spirit, "bspiritai");
  12  		attachScript(spirit, "destcrea");
  13  		setObjVar(spirit, "summonDifficulty", 0x01F4);
  14  		callback(spirit, 0x78, 0x08);
  15  		if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
  16  			report_crime_at_location(spirit, location, 0x02, 0x00);
  17  		}
  18  		int result = doNPCHandleStates(spirit);
  19  	}
  20  	return(spirit);
  21  }
  22  
  23  function int summon_blood_spirit(obj user, loc place) {
  24  	int success = 0x00;
  25  	int damage;
  26  	loc user_loc = getLocation(user);
  27  	faceHere(user, getDirectionInternal(user_loc, place));
  28  	list objects_at_loc;
  29  	getObjectsAt(objects_at_loc, place);
  30  	if (numInList(objects_at_loc) == 0x00) {
  31  		doLocAnimation(place, 0x3728, 0x0A, 0x0A, 0x00, 0x00);
  32  		Q57L = user;
  33  		Q4E1 = place;
  34  		if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
  35  			report_crime_at_location(user, place, 0x02, 0x00);
  36  		}
  37  		obj spirit = summon_spirit(Q4E1, this, user);
  38  		if (isValid(spirit)) {
  39  			success = 0x01;
  40  		}
  41  	} else {
  42  		barkTo(user, user, "That location is blocked.");
  43  	}
  44  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  45  	return(success);
  46  }
  47
#9 bountyboard.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4GP list → bounty_list
Source — bountyboard.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member list Q4GP;
   4  
   5  function void register_board_with_master() {
   6  	list args;
   7  	multiMessageToLoc(getMasterObjLoc(0x00), "registerBoard", args);
   8  	return();
   9  }
  10  
  11  trigger callback(0x2F) {
  12  	register_board_with_master();
  13  	return(0x01);
  14  }
  15  
  16  trigger objectloaded {
  17  	callback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
  18  	list Q4E4;
  19  	getContents(Q4E4, this);
  20  	for (int i = numInList(Q4E4); i; i--) {
  21  		deleteObject(Q4E4[0x00]);
  22  		removeItem(Q4E4, 0x00);
  23  	}
  24  	return(0x00);
  25  }
  26  
  27  trigger creation {
  28  	register_board_with_master();
  29  	return(0x01);
  30  }
  31  
  32  trigger lookedat {
  33  	list Q4E4;
  34  	getContents(Q4E4, this);
  35  	int count = 0x00;
  36  	for (int i = numInList(Q4E4); i; i--) {
  37  		if (hasObjVar(Q4E4[0x00], "killer")) {
  38  			count++;
  39  		}
  40  		removeItem(Q4E4, 0x00);
  41  	}
  42  	barkTo(this, looker, "a bounty board with " + count + " posted bounties");
  43  	return(0x00);
  44  }
  45  
  46  forward void postKillerToBB(list args);
  47  
  48  trigger message("clearBounties") {
  49  	list Q4E4;
  50  	getContents(Q4E4, this);
  51  	for (int i = numInList(Q4E4); i; i--) {
  52  		deleteObject(Q4E4[0x00]);
  53  		removeItem(Q4E4, 0x00);
  54  	}
  55  	return(0x01);
  56  }
  57  
  58  trigger message("setBounty") {
  59  	postKillerToBB(args);
  60  	return(0x01);
  61  }
  62  
  63  function string get_hair_color_description(int Q4XG) {
  64  	if (!hair_hue_offset) {
  65  		return("");
  66  	}
  67  	hair_hue_offset = hair_hue_offset - 0x044C;
  68  	switch(hair_hue_offset) {
  69  	case 0x00
  70  		return("indeterminate color");
  71  		break;
  72  	case 0x01
  73  	case 0x02
  74  	case 0x03
  75  		return("white");
  76  		break;
  77  	case 0x04
  78  	case 0x05
  79  	case 0x06
  80  		return("graying");
  81  		break;
  82  	case 0x07
  83  	case 0x08
  84  		return("black hair");
  85  	case 0x09
  86  	case 0x0A
  87  	case 0x0B
  88  		return("copper");
  89  		break;
  90  	case 0x0C
  91  	case 0x0D
  92  	case 0x0E
  93  	case 0x0F
  94  		return("brown");
  95  		break;
  96  	case 0x10
  97  		return("reddish brown");
  98  		break;
  99  	case 0x11
 100  	case 0x12
 101  	case 0x13
 102  		return("blonde");
 103  		break;
 104  	case 0x14
 105  	case 0x15
 106  	case 0x16
 107  		return("light brown");
 108  		break;
 109  	case 0x17
 110  	case 0x18
 111  		return("golden brown");
 112  		break;
 113  	case 0x19
 114  	case 0x1A
 115  	case 0x1B
 116  		return("golden");
 117  		break;
 118  	case 0x1C
 119  	case 0x1D
 120  	case 0x1E
 121  		return("bronze");
 122  		break;
 123  	case 0x1F
 124  	case 0x20
 125  		return("dark brown");
 126  		break;
 127  	case 0x21
 128  	case 0x22
 129  		return("sandy");
 130  		break;
 131  	case 0x23
 132  	case 0x24
 133  	case 0x25
 134  		return("honey-colored");
 135  		break;
 136  	case 0x26
 137  	case 0x27
 138  	case 0x28
 139  		return("red");
 140  		break;
 141  	case 0x29
 142  	case 0x2A
 143  	case 0x2B
 144  		return("nut brown");
 145  		break;
 146  	case 0x2C
 147  	case 0x2D
 148  	case 0x2E
 149  		return("rich brown");
 150  		break;
 151  	case 0x2F
 152  	case 0x30
 153  		return("very dark brown");
 154  		break;
 155  	}
 156  	return("outlandishly colored");
 157  }
 158  
 159  function string get_hair_description_from_type(int Q65M) {
 160  	string hair_desc;
 161  	switch(hair_type_id) {
 162  	case 0x2049
 163  		hair_desc = "hair in two pigtails";
 164  		break;
 165  	case 0x2047
 166  		hair_desc = "curly hair";
 167  		break;
 168  	case 0x2046
 169  		hair_desc = "hair tied in buns";
 170  		break;
 171  	case 0x204A
 172  		hair_desc = "shaved head and topknot";
 173  		break;
 174  	case 0x203C
 175  		hair_desc = "hair worn long";
 176  		break;
 177  	case 0x2044
 178  		hair_desc = "a mohawk hairstyle";
 179  		break;
 180  	case 0x203D
 181  		hair_desc = "hair tied back";
 182  		break;
 183  	case 0x2045
 184  		hair_desc = "pageboy hair";
 185  		break;
 186  	case 0x2048
 187  		hair_desc = "receding hairline";
 188  		break;
 189  	case 0x203B
 190  		hair_desc = "hair worn short";
 191  		break;
 192  	default
 193  		hair_desc = "bald";
 194  		break;
 195  	}
 196  	return(hair_desc);
 197  }
 198  
 199  function string get_skin_color_description(int Q4XG) {
 200  	string skin_desc;
 201  	skin_hue_offset = skin_hue_offset - 0x03E8;
 202  	skin_hue_offset = skin_hue_offset - 0x8000;
 203  	switch(skin_hue_offset) {
 204  	case 0x0F
 205  	case 0x16
 206  	case 0x1D
 207  	case 0x1E
 208  	case 0x24
 209  	case 0x25
 210  		skin_desc = "pale";
 211  		break;
 212  	case 0x08
 213  	case 0x09
 214  	case 0x17
 215  	case 0x1F
 216  	case 0x2C
 217  	case 0x2D
 218  	case 0x01
 219  	case 0x02
 220  	case 0x10
 221  	case 0x11
 222  	case 0x12
 223  	case 0x2E
 224  		skin_desc = "fair";
 225  		break;
 226  	case 0x0A
 227  	case 0x0B
 228  	case 0x13
 229  	case 0x18
 230  	case 0x19
 231  	case 0x20
 232  	case 0x26
 233  	case 0x27
 234  	case 0x28
 235  	case 0x2F
 236  		skin_desc = "tanned";
 237  		break;
 238  	case 0x03
 239  	case 0x04
 240  	case 0x05
 241  	case 0x0C
 242  	case 0x1A
 243  	case 0x29
 244  	case 0x2A
 245  	case 0x30
 246  	case 0x38
 247  		skin_desc = "copper";
 248  		break;
 249  	case 0x06
 250  	case 0x07
 251  	case 0x0D
 252  	case 0x0E
 253  	case 0x14
 254  	case 0x15
 255  	case 0x1B
 256  	case 0x1C
 257  	case 0x21
 258  	case 0x22
 259  	case 0x23
 260  	case 0x2B
 261  	case 0x31
 262  	case 0x32
 263  	case 0x39
 264  		skin_desc = "dark";
 265  		break;
 266  	case 0x33
 267  	case 0x34
 268  	case 0x35
 269  		skin_desc = "yellow";
 270  		break;
 271  	default
 272  		skin_desc = "deathly";
 273  		break;
 274  	}
 275  	return(skin_desc);
 276  }
 277  
 278  function string get_random_murder_threat_phrase(int murderCount) {
 279  	list threat_phrase_list = "hath murdered one too many!", "shall not slay again!", "hath slain too many!", "cannot continue to kill!", "must be stopped.", "is a bloodthirsty monster.", "is a killer of the worst sort.", "hath no conscience!", "hath cowardly slain many.", "must die for all our sakes.", "sheds innocent blood!", "must fall to preserve us.", "must be taken care of.", "is a thug and must die.", "cannot be redeemed.", "is a shameless butcher.", "is a callous monster.", "is a cruel, casual killer.";
 280  	string threat_phrase = threat_phrase_list[random(0x00, numInList(threat_phrase_list) - 0x01)];
 281  	return(threat_phrase);
 282  }
 283  
 284  function string get_random_bounty_header_phrase(int bounty) {
 285  	list header_phrase_list = "  A bounty is hereby offered", "  Lord British sets a price", "  Claim the reward! 'Tis", "  Lord Blackthorn set a price", "  The Paladins set a price", "  The Merchants set a price", "  Lord British's bounty ";
 286  	string header_phrase = header_phrase_list[random(0x00, numInList(header_phrase_list) - 0x01)];
 287  	return(header_phrase);
 288  }
 289  
 290  function obj find_bounty_for_killer(obj Q47Z, obj Q521) {
 291  	obj current_item_in_contents;
 292  	obj killer;
 293  	obj unused_variable;
 294  	list container_contents_list;
 295  	getContents(container_contents_list, container_object);
 296  	int contents_item_count = numInList(container_contents_list);
 297  	for (int i = 0x00; i < contents_item_count; i++) {
 298  		current_item_in_contents = container_contents_list[i];
 299  		if (getObjType(current_item_in_contents) == 0x0EB0) {
 300  			if (hasObjVar(current_item_in_contents, "killer")) {
 301  				killer = getObjVar(current_item_in_contents, "killer");
 302  				if (killer == killer_object) {
 303  					return(current_item_in_contents);
 304  				}
 305  			}
 306  		}
 307  	}
 308  	return(NULL());
 309  }
 310  
 311  function void postKillerToBB(list args) {
 312  	debugMessage("postKillerToBB:  args=");
 313  	printList(args);
 314  	obj killer = args[0x00];
 315  	int bounty = args[0x01];
 316  	string Q522 = args[0x02];
 317  	list postText = Q522 + ":  " + bounty + "gold.                      ";
 318  	if (numInList(args) > 0x03) {
 319  		int murderCount = oprlist(args[0x03], 0x00);
 320  		int Q5RO = oprlist(args[0x03], 0x01);
 321  		int Q4UT = oprlist(args[0x03], 0x02);
 322  		int Q4UR = oprlist(args[0x03], 0x03);
 323  		int Q5TN = oprlist(args[0x03], 0x04);
 324  		obj Q58D = find_bounty_for_killer(this, killer);
 325  		if (Q58D == NULL()) {
 326  			Q58D = createNoResObjectIn(0x0EB0, this);
 327  		}
 328  		setObjVar(Q58D, "killer", killer);
 329  		string Q5Y5;
 330  		string Q5Y6;
 331  		string Q67E;
 332  		string Q67F;
 333  		switch(random(0x00, 0x05)) {
 334  		case 0x00
 335  			default
 336  			Q5Y5 = "Bounty for ";
 337  			Q5Y6 = "!";
 338  			break;
 339  		case 0x01
 340  			Q5Y5 = "";
 341  			Q5Y6 = " must die!";
 342  			break;
 343  		case 0x02
 344  			Q5Y5 = "A price on ";
 345  			Q5Y6 = "!";
 346  			break;
 347  		case 0x03
 348  			Q5Y5 = "";
 349  			Q5Y6 = " outlawed!";
 350  			break;
 351  		case 0x04
 352  			Q5Y5 = "Execute ";
 353  			Q5Y6 = "!";
 354  			break;
 355  		case 0x05
 356  			Q5Y5 = "WANTED: ";
 357  			Q5Y6 = "!";
 358  			break;
 359  		}
 360  		string Q4W4;
 361  		string Q4W6;
 362  		string Q4VJ;
 363  		if (Q5RO) {
 364  			Q4W4 = "her";
 365  			Q4W6 = "her";
 366  			Q4VJ = "she";
 367  		} else {
 368  			Q4W4 = "him";
 369  			Q4W6 = "his";
 370  			Q4VJ = "he";
 371  		}
 372  		int Q534 = wordWrap(postText, "The foul scum known as " + Q522 + " " + get_random_murder_threat_phrase(murderCount) + "  For " + Q4VJ + " is responsible for " + murderCount + " murders.  " + get_random_bounty_header_phrase(bounty) + " of " + bounty + " gold pieces for " + Q4W6 + " head!", 0x1C);
 373  		appendToList(postText, "  A description:");
 374  		if (Q4UR) {
 375  			appendToList(postText, "    - " + get_hair_color_description(Q4UR) + " hair");
 376  		}
 377  		appendToList(postText, "    - " + get_hair_description_from_type(Q4UT));
 378  		appendToList(postText, "    - " + get_skin_color_description(Q5TN) + " skin");
 379  		appendToList(postText, "If you kill " + Q4W4 + ", remove the");
 380  		appendToList(postText, "head, and give it to a guard");
 381  		appendToList(postText, "to claim your reward.");
 382  	} else {
 383  		appendToList(postText, "No information available.");
 384  	}
 385  	setObjVar(Q58D, "postText", postText);
 386  	setPostTime(Q58D);
 387  	return();
 388  }
 389
#10 bountyinfo.m 3 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q454 int → is_active
Q5XI string → killer_name
Q5XH list → descriptor_list
Source — bountyinfo.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member obj subject;
   4  
   5  member int bounty;
   6  
   7  member int Q454;
   8  
   9  member string Q5XI;
  10  
  11  member list Q5XH;
  12  
  13  trigger decay {
  14  	return(0x00);
  15  }
  16  
  17  function void setup_callback_timer() {
  18  	callbackAdvanced(this, 0x004F1A00, 0x01, 0x00);
  19  	return();
  20  }
  21  
  22  function void broadcast_bounty_update() {
  23  	if (!Q454) {
  24  		return();
  25  	}
  26  	list args = subject, bounty, Q5XI;
  27  	if (numInList(Q5XH) > 0x00) {
  28  		appendToList(args, Q5XH);
  29  	}
  30  	messageToRange(getMasterObjLoc(0x00), 0x01, "updateBounty", args);
  31  	return();
  32  }
  33  
  34  trigger lookedat {
  35  	if (!isEditing(looker)) {
  36  		return(0x00);
  37  	}
  38  	string Q452 = "(active)";
  39  	if (!Q454) {
  40  		Q452 = "(inactive)";
  41  	}
  42  	string Q520 = "???";
  43  	if (numInList(Q5XH) > 0x00) {
  44  		int Q523 = Q5XH[0x00];
  45  		Q520 = Q523;
  46  	}
  47  	barkTo(this, looker, "Bounty for " + Q5XI + " (" + objtoint(subject) + ") with " + Q520 + " kills and " + bounty + " gold. " + Q452);
  48  	return(0x00);
  49  }
  50  
  51  trigger creation {
  52  	subject = getObjVar(this, "subject");
  53  	removeObjVar(this, "subject");
  54  	return(0x01);
  55  }
  56  
  57  trigger destroyed {
  58  	if (subject == NULL()) {
  59  		return(0x01);
  60  	}
  61  	broadcast_bounty_update();
  62  	return(0x01);
  63  }
  64  
  65  function void send_bounty_info(obj recipient) {
  66  	list args = subject, bounty, Q5XI;
  67  	bark(this, "messaging via probe to (" + objtoint(recipient) + ").");
  68  	send_delayed_message(recipient, "bountyInfo", args);
  69  	return();
  70  }
  71  
  72  trigger message("setBountyActivity") {
  73  	if (subject != oprlist(args, 0x00)) {
  74  		return(0x01);
  75  	}
  76  	Q454 = oprlist(args, 0x01);
  77  	setup_callback_timer();
  78  	broadcast_bounty_update();
  79  	return(0x01);
  80  }
  81  
  82  trigger message("addBounty") {
  83  	debugMessage("addBounty args=");
  84  	printList(args);
  85  	if (subject != oprlist(args, 0x00)) {
  86  		return(0x01);
  87  	}
  88  	bounty = bounty + oprlist(args, 0x01);
  89  	if (args[0x02]) {
  90  		Q454 = 0x01;
  91  	}
  92  	if (Q5XI == "") {
  93  		Q5XI = args[0x03];
  94  	}
  95  	if (numInList(Q5XH) == 0x00) {
  96  		if (numInList(args) > 0x04) {
  97  			copyList(Q5XH, args[0x04]);
  98  		}
  99  	}
 100  	setup_callback_timer();
 101  	return(0x00);
 102  }
 103  
 104  trigger message("updateBountyDesc") {
 105  	if (subject != oprlist(args, 0x00)) {
 106  		return(0x01);
 107  	}
 108  	removeItem(args, 0x00);
 109  	Q5XH = args;
 110  	Q454 = 0x01;
 111  	broadcast_bounty_update();
 112  	return(0x01);
 113  }
 114  
 115  trigger message("consolidateBounty") {
 116  	if (this == sender) {
 117  		return(0x01);
 118  	}
 119  	if (subject != oprlist(args, 0x00)) {
 120  		return(0x01);
 121  	}
 122  	args = subject, bounty, Q454, "", Q5XH;
 123  	message(sender, "addBounty", args);
 124  	setDefaultReturn(0x01);
 125  	subject = NULL();
 126  	deleteObjectNoFall(this);
 127  	return(0x01);
 128  }
 129  
 130  trigger message("takeBounty") {
 131  	if (!Q454) {
 132  		return(0x01);
 133  	}
 134  	if (subject != oprlist(args, 0x00)) {
 135  		return(0x01);
 136  	}
 137  	bark(this, "(" + objtoint(args[0x01]) + ") is collecting this bounty for " + Q5XI);
 138  	send_bounty_info(args[0x01]);
 139  	setDefaultReturn(0x01);
 140  	bounty = 0x00;
 141  	deleteObjectNoFall(this);
 142  	return(0x00);
 143  }
 144  
 145  function void teleported() {
 146  	list args = subject;
 147  	messageToRange(getLocation(this), 0x01, "consolidateBounty", args);
 148  	broadcast_bounty_update();
 149  	callback(this, random(0x0E10, 0x0FA0), 0x2F);
 150  	return();
 151  }
 152  
 153  trigger message("teleported") {
 154  	teleported();
 155  	return(0x00);
 156  }
 157  
 158  trigger serverswitch {
 159  	teleported();
 160  	return(0x00);
 161  }
 162  
 163  trigger callback(0x2F) {
 164  	broadcast_bounty_update();
 165  	callback(this, random(0x0E10, 0x0FA0), 0x2F);
 166  	return(0x01);
 167  }
 168  
 169  trigger objectloaded {
 170  	callback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
 171  	return(0x00);
 172  }
 173
#11 bountymasterboard.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q490 list → bounty_list
Q48J list → registered_board_list
Source — bountymasterboard.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member list Q490;
   4  
   5  member list Q48J;
   6  
   7  trigger decay {
   8  	return(0x00);
   9  }
  10  
  11  trigger objectloaded {
  12  	clearList(Q490);
  13  	clearList(Q48J);
  14  	callback(this, 0x0A, 0x2F);
  15  	return(0x01);
  16  }
  17  
  18  function int calculate_bounty_list_start_index() {
  19  	int total_bounty_count = numInList(Q490);
  20  	int start = total_bounty_count - 0x14;
  21  	if (start < 0x00) {
  22  		start = 0x00;
  23  	}
  24  	return(start);
  25  }
  26  
  27  function int get_active_bounties_count() {
  28  	return(numInList(Q490));
  29  }
  30  
  31  trigger lookedat {
  32  	int start = calculate_bounty_list_start_index();
  33  	int Q4NR = get_active_bounties_count();
  34  	int Q55T = 0x00;
  35  	int Q576 = 0x00;
  36  	if (Q4NR > 0x00) {
  37  		Q55T = oprlist(Q490[Q4NR - 0x01], 0x01);
  38  		Q576 = oprlist(Q490[start], 0x01);
  39  	}
  40  	barkTo(this, looker, "" + Q4NR + " bounties starting at #" + start + " and ranging from " + Q576 + " to " + Q55T + " are posted on " + numInList(Q48J) + " bounty boards.");
  41  	return(0x00);
  42  }
  43  
  44  function void update_bounty_boards(int start, int Q4NR) {
  45  	if (hasCallback(this, 0x2F)) {
  46  		return();
  47  	}
  48  	for (int board_index = numInList(Q48J) - 0x01; board_index >= 0x00; board_index--) {
  49  		list args;
  50  		multiMessage(Q48J[board_index], "clearBounties", args);
  51  		for (int i = total_bounty_count - 0x01; i >= start; i--) {
  52  			debugMessage("updating board#" + board_index + " with bounty#" + i + ".");
  53  			multiMessage(Q48J[board_index], "setBounty", Q490[i]);
  54  		}
  55  	}
  56  	return();
  57  }
  58  
  59  trigger callback(0x2F) {
  60  	update_bounty_boards(calculate_bounty_list_start_index(), get_active_bounties_count());
  61  	return(0x01);
  62  }
  63  
  64  trigger message("registerBoard") {
  65  	appendToList(Q48J, sender);
  66  	return(0x01);
  67  }
  68  
  69  function int addBounty(list args) {
  70  	int bounty = args[0x01];
  71  	int Q5T8 = numInList(Q490);
  72  	for (int i = 0x00; i < Q5T8; i++) {
  73  		int Q4FD = oprlist(Q490[i], 0x01);
  74  		if (bounty <= Q4FD) {
  75  			break;
  76  		}
  77  	}
  78  	if (Q5T8 >= 0x32) {
  79  		if (i <= 0x00) {
  80  			return(0x00 - 0x01);
  81  		}
  82  		i--;
  83  		removeItem(Q490, 0x00);
  84  	}
  85  	insertInList(Q490, args, i);
  86  	return(i);
  87  }
  88  
  89  trigger message("updateBounty") {
  90  	obj subject = args[0x00];
  91  	int bounty = args[0x01];
  92  	int Q5T8 = numInList(Q490);
  93  	string name = args[0x02];
  94  	debugMessage("Bounty updating:  " + bounty + " gold for " + name + ".");
  95  	for (int i = 0x00; i < Q5T8; i++) {
  96  		obj Q4FO = oprlist(Q490[i], 0x00);
  97  		if (Q4FO == subject) {
  98  			break;
  99  		}
 100  	}
 101  	int Q45H;
 102  	int start;
 103  	if (i == Q5T8) {
 104  		if (bounty == 0x00) {
 105  			return(0x01);
 106  		}
 107  		Q45H = addBounty(args);
 108  		start = calculate_bounty_list_start_index();
 109  		if (Q45H < start) {
 110  			return(0x01);
 111  		}
 112  		update_bounty_boards(start, get_active_bounties_count());
 113  	} else {
 114  		int Q5FW = oprlist(Q490[i], 0x01);
 115  		debugMessage("updating existing bounty from " + Q5FW + " to " + bounty + ".");
 116  		if (Q5FW == bounty) {
 117  			return(0x01);
 118  		}
 119  		removeItem(Q490, i);
 120  		if (bounty > 0x00) {
 121  			Q45H = addBounty(args);
 122  			if (i < Q45H) {
 123  				i = Q45H;
 124  			}
 125  		}
 126  		start = calculate_bounty_list_start_index();
 127  		if (i < start) {
 128  			return(0x01);
 129  		}
 130  		update_bounty_boards(start, get_active_bounties_count());
 131  	}
 132  	return(0x01);
 133  }
 134
#12 bspiritai.m 5 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q67L list → target_list
Q67K list → target_score_list
Q5CD list → nearby_mob_list
Q5CC list → nearby_score_list
Q4G9 int → prev_target_count
Source — bspiritai.m 
   1  inherits bldsprtsbase;
   2  
   3  member list Q67L;
   4  
   5  member list Q67K;
   6  
   7  member list Q5CD;
   8  
   9  member list Q5CC;
  10  
  11  member int Q4G9;
  12  
  13  member obj trackee;
  14  
  15  forward void select_and_pursue();
  16  
  17  forward void pursue_victim(obj victim);
  18  
  19  forward void apply_spirit_attack(obj victim, int damage);
  20  
  21  forward void Q5GP();
  22  
  23  forward void remove_artifact_by_mode(int Q68Q);
  24  
  25  forward void remove_invalid_artifact_items();
  26  
  27  trigger creation {
  28  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
  29  	sfx(Q4VS, 0x0212, 0x00);
  30  	setMaxFatigue(this, 0x03E7);
  31  	setCurFatigue(this, 0x03E7);
  32  	enableBehaviors(this);
  33  	getMobsInRange(Q67L, Q4VS, 0x06);
  34  	for (int Q5GY; Q5GY < numInList(Q67L); Q5GY++) {
  35  		setItem(Q67K, 0x01, Q5GY);
  36  	}
  37  	remove_invalid_artifact_items();
  38  	int Q68Q = 0x00;
  39  	remove_artifact_by_mode(Q68Q);
  40  	if (0x00 < numInList(Q67L)) {
  41  		shortcallback(this, 0x03, 0x2F);
  42  		select_and_pursue();
  43  	} else {
  44  		shortcallback(this, 0x03, 0x2F);
  45  		shortcallback(this, 0x01, 0x35);
  46  	}
  47  	return(0x00);
  48  }
  49  
  50  function void remove_artifact_by_mode(int Q68Q) {
  51  	if (artifact_mode_flag == 0x00) {
  52  		if (0x00 < numInList(Q67L)) {
  53  			for (int item_index = 0x00; item_index < numInList(Q67L); item_index++) {
  54  				int checked_item_type_id = getObjType(Q67L[item_index]);
  55  				if (isValid(Q67L[item_index])) {
  56  					if (checked_item_type_id == 0x0336) {
  57  						removeItem(Q67L, item_index);
  58  						removeItem(Q67K, item_index);
  59  					}
  60  				}
  61  			}
  62  		}
  63  	} else {
  64  		if (0x00 < numInList(Q5CD)) {
  65  			for (item_index = 0x00; item_index < numInList(Q5CD); item_index++) {
  66  				if (!isValid(Q67L[item_index])) {
  67  					checked_item_type_id = getObjType(Q5CD[item_index]);
  68  					if (checked_item_type_id == 0x0336) {
  69  						removeItem(Q5CD, item_index);
  70  						removeItem(Q5CC, item_index);
  71  					}
  72  				}
  73  			}
  74  		}
  75  	}
  76  	return();
  77  }
  78  
  79  function void select_and_pursue() {
  80  	loc my_loc = getLocation(this);
  81  	int dist;
  82  	loc there;
  83  	remove_invalid_artifact_items();
  84  	if (0x00 == numInList(Q67L)) {
  85  		shortcallback(this, 0x01, 0x35);
  86  	}
  87  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q67L); i++) {
  88  		if (isValid(Q67L[i])) {
  89  			there = getLocation(Q67L[i]);
  90  			dist = getDistanceInTiles(my_loc, there);
  91  			if (dist == 0x00) {
  92  				dist = 0x01;
  93  			}
  94  			int strength = getStrength(Q67L[i]);
  95  			int skill = (getSkillLevel(Q67L[i], 0x1B) + getSkillLevel(Q67L[i], 0x1F));
  96  			int score = (strength + skill) / dist;
  97  			setItem(Q67K, score, i);
  98  		} else {
  99  			removeItem(Q67K, i);
 100  			removeItem(Q67L, i);
 101  		}
 102  	}
 103  	obj swap_mob;
 104  	int swap_score;
 105  	int tmp_int_a;
 106  	int tmp_int_b;
 107  	obj swap_mob_b;
 108  	int swap_score_b;
 109  	int tmp_int_c;
 110  	int count = numInList(Q67K);
 111  	string count_str = count;
 112  	for (int outer; outer < numInList(Q67K); outer++) {
 113  		for (int inner = 0x00; inner < count; inner++) {
 114  			if (outer < inner) {
 115  				if ((Q67K[outer]) < (Q67K[inner])) {
 116  					if (isValid(Q67L[outer])) {
 117  						swap_score = Q67K[outer];
 118  						swap_mob = Q67L[outer];
 119  						swap_score_b = Q67K[inner];
 120  						swap_mob_b = Q67L[inner];
 121  						setItem(Q67K, swap_score_b, outer);
 122  						setItem(Q67L, swap_mob_b, outer);
 123  						setItem(Q67K, swap_score, inner);
 124  						setItem(Q67L, swap_mob, inner);
 125  					}
 126  				}
 127  				if ((Q67K[outer]) == (Q67K[inner])) {
 128  					if (isValid(Q67L[outer])) {
 129  						loc loc_a = getLocation(Q67L[outer]);
 130  						loc loc_b = getLocation(Q67L[inner]);
 131  						int dist_a = getDistance(my_loc, loc_a);
 132  						int dist_b = getDistance(my_loc, loc_b);
 133  						if (dist_a > dist_b) {
 134  							swap_score = Q67K[outer];
 135  							swap_mob = Q67L[outer];
 136  							swap_score_b = Q67K[inner];
 137  							swap_mob_b = Q67L[inner];
 138  							setItem(Q67K, swap_score_b, outer);
 139  							setItem(Q67L, swap_mob_b, outer);
 140  							setItem(Q67K, swap_score, inner);
 141  							setItem(Q67L, swap_mob, inner);
 142  						}
 143  					}
 144  				}
 145  			}
 146  		}
 147  	}
 148  	Q4G9 = numInList(Q67L);
 149  	obj best_target = Q67L[0x00];
 150  	pursue_victim(best_target);
 151  	return();
 152  }
 153  
 154  function void pursue_victim(obj victim) {
 155  	loc my_loc = getLocation(this);
 156  	loc there = getLocation(victim);
 157  	trackee = victim;
 158  	int dist = getDistanceInTiles(my_loc, there);
 159  	if (dist < 0x01) {
 160  		dist = 0x01;
 161  		if (!isValid(victim)) {
 162  			return();
 163  		}
 164  		apply_spirit_attack(victim, 0x14);
 165  	} else {
 166  		walkTo(this, there, 0x0F);
 167  		shortcallback(this, dist, 0x34);
 168  	}
 169  	return();
 170  }
 171  
 172  function void apply_spirit_attack(obj victim, int damage) {
 173  	if (!isValid(victim)) {
 174  		return();
 175  	}
 176  	apply_typed_damage_clamped(this, victim, damage, 0x01, 0x00);
 177  	sfx(getLocation(this), 0x023B, 0x00);
 178  	if (is_valid_spell_target(victim)) {
 179  		attachScript(victim, "poisoned");
 180  		setObjVar(victim, "poison_strength", 0x02);
 181  	}
 182  	return();
 183  }
 184  
 185  function void remove_invalid_artifact_items() {
 186  	for (int item_index = 0x00; item_index < numInList(Q67L); item_index++) {
 187  		if (isValid(Q67L[item_index])) {
 188  			int item_type_id = getObjType(Q67L[item_index]);
 189  			if ((item_type_id == 0x0192) || (item_type_id == 0x0193)) {
 190  				removeItem(Q67L, item_index);
 191  				removeItem(Q67K, item_index);
 192  			}
 193  		}
 194  	}
 195  	return();
 196  }
 197  
 198  trigger callback(0x34) {
 199  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
 200  	loc there = getLocation(trackee);
 201  	int Q5R6 = getDistanceInTiles(Q4VS, there);
 202  	if (Q5R6 <= 0x01) {
 203  		if (!isValid(trackee)) {
 204  			return(0x00);
 205  		}
 206  		apply_spirit_attack(trackee, 0x07);
 207  		select_and_pursue();
 208  	} else {
 209  		getMobsInRange(Q5CD, Q4VS, 0x06);
 210  		for (int Q5GY; Q5GY < numInList(Q5CD); Q5GY++) {
 211  			setItem(Q5CC, 0x01, Q5GY);
 212  		}
 213  		int Q68Q = 0x01;
 214  		remove_artifact_by_mode(Q68Q);
 215  		if (0x00 < numInList(Q5CD)) {
 216  			for (int Q5CI; Q5CI < numInList(Q5CD); Q5CI++) {
 217  				int Q4XM = getObjType(Q5CD[Q5CI]);
 218  				if ((Q4XM == 0x0192) || (Q4XM == 0x0193)) {
 219  					removeItem(Q5CD, Q5CI);
 220  					removeItem(Q5CC, Q5CI);
 221  					return(0x00);
 222  				}
 223  				obj Q5C9 = Q5CD[Q5CI];
 224  				if (isInList(Q67L, Q5C9)) {
 225  					removeItem(Q5CD, Q5CI);
 226  					removeItem(Q5CC, Q5CI);
 227  				} else {
 228  					appendToList(Q67L, Q5C9);
 229  					appendToList(Q67K, 0x01);
 230  				}
 231  			}
 232  		}
 233  		if (Q4G9 == numInList(Q67L)) {
 234  			walkTo(this, there, 0x0F);
 235  			sfx(Q4VS, 0x023A, 0x00);
 236  			shortcallback(this, Q5R6, 0x34);
 237  			return(0x00);
 238  		}
 239  		if (numInList(Q67L) < 0x01) {
 240  			sfx(Q4VS, 0x023A, 0x00);
 241  			shortcallback(this, Q5R6, 0x35);
 242  			return(0x00);
 243  		}
 244  		select_and_pursue();
 245  	}
 246  	sfx(Q4VS, 0x023A, 0x00);
 247  	return(0x00);
 248  }
 249  
 250  trigger callback(0x35) {
 251  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
 252  	getMobsInRange(Q5CD, Q4VS, 0x06);
 253  	for (int Q5GY; Q5GY < numInList(Q5CD); Q5GY++) {
 254  		setItem(Q5CC, 0x01, Q5GY);
 255  	}
 256  	int Q68Q = 0x01;
 257  	remove_artifact_by_mode(Q68Q);
 258  	if (0x00 < numInList(Q5CD)) {
 259  		for (int Q5CI; Q5CI < numInList(Q5CD); Q5CI++) {
 260  			int Q4XM = getObjType(Q5CD[Q5CI]);
 261  			if ((Q4XM == 0x0192) || (Q4XM == 0x0193)) {
 262  				removeItem(Q5CD, Q5CI);
 263  				removeItem(Q5CC, Q5CI);
 264  				return(0x00);
 265  			}
 266  			obj Q5C9 = Q5CD[Q5CI];
 267  			if (isInList(Q67L, Q5C9)) {
 268  				removeItem(Q5CD, Q5CI);
 269  				removeItem(Q5CC, Q5CI);
 270  			} else {
 271  				appendToList(Q67L, Q5C9);
 272  				appendToList(Q67K, 0x01);
 273  			}
 274  		}
 275  		select_and_pursue();
 276  	} else {
 277  		shortcallback(this, 0x02, 0x35);
 278  	}
 279  	sfx(Q4VS, 0x023A, 0x00);
 280  	return(0x00);
 281  }
 282  
 283  trigger enterrange(0x04) {
 284  	if (!(isInList(Q67L, target))) {
 285  		appendToList(Q67L, target);
 286  		appendToList(Q67K, 0x00);
 287  	}
 288  	select_and_pursue();
 289  	return(0x01);
 290  }
 291  
 292  trigger enterrange(0x00) {
 293  	if (!isValid(target)) {
 294  		return(0x01);
 295  	}
 296  	apply_spirit_attack(target, 0x14)select_and_pursue();
 297  	return(0x01);
 298  }
 299  
 300  trigger callback(0x2F) {
 301  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
 302  	sfx(Q4VS, 0x023A, 0x00);
 303  	shortcallback(this, 0x03, 0x2F);
 304  	return(0x00);
 305  }

#13 butte.m 9 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride

Source — butte.m 
   1  inherits sndfx;
   2

   4  
   5  member int Q46V;
   6  
   7  member int Q46U;
   8  
   9  member int Q46T;
  10  
  11  member obj Q4FQ;
  12  
  13  member int Q4WC;
  14  
  15  member int Q57G;
  16  
  17  member obj Q5SV;
  18  
  19  member int Q5OJ;
  20  
  21  trigger creation {
  22  	Q46W = 0x00;
  23  	Q46V = 0x00;
  24  	Q46U = 0x00;
  25  	Q46T = 0x00;
  26  	Q4FQ = NULL();
  27  	Q5OJ = 0x00;
  28  	return(0x01);
  29  }
  30  
  31  trigger lookedat {
  32  	if (Q5OJ) {
  33  		bark(this, "an archery butte (score:" + Q5OJ + ")");
  34  		return(0x00);
  35  	}
  36  	return(0x01);
  37  }
  38  
  39  trigger ooruse {
  40  	if (isDead(user)) {
  41  		barkTo(user, user, "You're a ghost, and can't do that.");
  42  		return(0x01);
  43  	}
  44  	int Q49D = getObjType(this);
  45  	loc there = getLocation(this);
  46  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(user);
  47  	faceHere(user, getDirectionInternal(Q4VS, there));
  48  	if (Q4FQ != NULL()) {
  49  		barkTo(user, user, "Wait until it's clear!");
  50  		return(0x01);
  51  	}
  52  	if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(user), getLocation(this)) == 0x01) {
  53  		list Q4QJ;
  54  		getObjectsInRangeWithFlags(Q4QJ, getLocation(this), 0x00, 0x0800);
  55  		int Q5E0 = 0x00;
  56  		for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q4QJ); i++) {
  57  			if (getZ(getLocation(Q4QJ[i])) == getZ(getLocation(this))) {
  58  				int Q4Q1 = putObjContainer(Q4QJ[i], getBackpack(user));
  59  				Q5E0++;
  60  			}
  61  		}
  62  		Q46W = 0x00;
  63  		Q46V = 0x00;
  64  		Q46U = 0x00;
  65  		Q46T = 0x00;
  66  		Q5OJ = 0x00;
  67  		if (Q5E0 > 0x00) {
  68  			ebarkTo(user, user, "You gather the arrows and bolts.");
  69  			return(0x01);
  70  		}
  71  	}
  72  	int Q56E;
  73  	int Q476;
  74  	list Q5TL;
  75  	obj weapon = getWeapon(user);
  76  	if (!isRanged(weapon)) {
  77  		barkTo(this, user, "You must practice with ranged weapons on this.");
  78  		return(0x01);
  79  	}
  80  	int Q688 = getObjType(weapon);
  81  	int Q57N;
  82  	obj Q45X = NULL();
  83  	Q4WC = 0x0234;
  84  	if (Q688 == 0x13B1) {
  85  		Q57G = 0x0238;
  86  		Q57N = 0x0F42;
  87  		Q45X = mobileContainsObjType(user, 0x0F3F);
  88  	}
  89  	if (Q688 == 0x13B2) {
  90  		Q57G = 0x0238;
  91  		Q57N = 0x0F42;
  92  		Q45X = mobileContainsObjType(user, 0x0F3F);
  93  	}
  94  	if (Q688 == 0x0F4F) {
  95  		Q57G = 0x0239;
  96  		Q57N = 0x1BFE;
  97  		Q45X = mobileContainsObjType(user, 0x0F3F);
  98  	}
  99  	if (Q688 == 0x0F50) {
 100  		Q57G = 0x0239;
 101  		Q57N = 0x1BFE;
 102  		Q45X = mobileContainsObjType(user, 0x1BFB);
 103  	}
 104  	if (Q688 == 0x13FC) {
 105  		Q57G = 0x023A;
 106  		Q57N = 0x1BFE;
 107  		Q45X = mobileContainsObjType(user, 0x1BFB);
 108  	}
 109  	if (Q688 == 0x13FD) {
 110  		Q57G = 0x023A;
 111  		Q57N = 0x1BFE;
 112  		Q45X = mobileContainsObjType(user, 0x1BFB);
 113  	}
 114  	if (Q45X == NULL()) {
 115  		if (Q57N == 0x0F42) {
 116  			ebarkTo(user, user, "You do not have any arrows with which to practice.");
 117  		} else {
 118  			ebarkTo(user, user, "You do not have any crossbow bolts with which to practice.");
 119  		}
 120  		return(0x01);
 121  	}
 122  	string Q57I;
 123  	int Q5IW = getX(Q4VS);
 124  	int Q5IX = getY(Q4VS);
 125  	int Q49E = getX(there);
 126  	int Q49F = getY(there);
 127  	if (Q49D == 0x100A) {
 128  		if (Q5IW < Q49E) {
 129  			ebarkTo(user, user, "You would do better to stand in front of the archery butte.");
 130  			return(0x01);
 131  		}
 132  		if (Q5IX != Q49F) {
 133  			ebarkTo(user, user, "You aren't properly lined up with the archery butte to get an accurate shot.");
 134  			return(0x01);
 135  		}
 136  		if ((Q5IW - Q49E) > 0x06) {
 137  			ebarkTo(user, user, "You are too far away from the archery butte to get an accurate shot.");
 138  			return(0x01);
 139  		}
 140  		if ((Q5IW - Q49E) < 0x05) {
 141  			ebarkTo(user, user, "You are too close to the target.");
 142  			return(0x01);
 143  		}
 144  	}
 145  	if (Q49D == 0x100B) {
 146  		if (Q5IX < Q49F) {
 147  			ebarkTo(user, user, "You would do better to stand in front of the archery butte.");
 148  			return(0x01);
 149  		}
 150  		if (Q5IW != Q49E) {
 151  			ebarkTo(user, user, "You aren't properly lined up with the archery butte to get an accurate shot.");
 152  			return(0x01);
 153  		}
 154  		if ((Q5IX - Q49F) > 0x06) {
 155  			ebarkTo(user, user, "You are too far away from the archery butte to get an accurate shot.");
 156  			return(0x01);
 157  		}
 158  		if ((Q5IX - Q49F) < 0x05) {
 159  			ebarkTo(user, user, "You are too close to the target.");
 160  			return(0x01);
 161  		}
 162  	}
 163  	if (getItemAtSlot(user, 0x19) != NULL()) {
 164  		Q56E = 0x05;
 165  		Q476 = 0x1B;
 166  	} else {
 167  		Q476 = 0x12;
 168  	}
 169  	if (!isHuman(user)) {
 170  		Q56E = 0x04;
 171  		Q476 = random(0x04, 0x06);
 172  	}
 173  	animateMobile(user, Q476, Q56E, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
 174  	doMissile_Mob2Loc(user, there, Q57N, 0x05, 0x00, 0x00);
 175  	Q4FQ = user;
 176  	callback(this, 0x01, 0x19);
 177  	if (getQuantity(Q45X) > 0x01) {
 178  		Q5SV = createNoResObjectAt(getObjType(Q45X), getLocation(this));
 179  		transferGeneric(Q5SV, Q45X, 0x01);
 180  	} else {
 181  		Q4Q1 = teleport(Q45X, getLocation(this));
 182  		Q5SV = Q45X;
 183  	}
 184  	return(0x00);
 185  }
 186  
 187  trigger callback(0x19) {
 188  	obj user = Q4FQ;
 189  	Q4FQ = NULL();
 190  	int Q57K = Q4WC;
 191  	int Q493 = 0x00;
 192  	string Q57I;
 193  	if (getObjType(Q5SV) == 0x0F3F) {
 194  		Q57I = "arrow";
 195  	} else {
 196  		Q57I = "bolt";
 197  	}
 198  	int success = testAndLearnSkill(user, 0x1F, 0x00, 0x32);
 199  	if (success <= 0x00) {
 200  		ebarkTo(this, user, "You miss the target altogether.");
 201  		Q57K = Q57G;
 202  	} else {
 203  		string Q4W9;
 204  		int Q68K = random(0x00, 0x09C4 - success) / 0xC8;
 205  		switch(Q68K) {
 206  		case 0x00
 207  			Q4W9 = "bullseye!";
 208  			if (random(0x00, 0x0A) < Q46T) {
 209  				Q493 = 0x01;
 210  				Q5OJ = Q5OJ + 0x64;
 211  			} else {
 212  				Q46T++;
 213  				Q5OJ = Q5OJ + 0x32;
 214  			}
 215  			break;
 216  		case 0x01
 217  		case 0x02
 218  		case 0x03
 219  			Q4W9 = "inner ring!";
 220  			if (random(0x00, 0x0A) < Q46U) {
 221  				Q493 = 0x01;
 222  				Q5OJ = Q5OJ + 0x1E;
 223  			} else {
 224  				Q46V++;
 225  				Q5OJ = Q5OJ + 0x0A;
 226  			}
 227  			break;
 228  		case 0x04
 229  		case 0x05
 230  		case 0x06
 231  		case 0x07
 232  		case 0x08
 233  			Q4W9 = "middle ring.";
 234  			if (random(0x00, 0x0A) < Q46V) {
 235  				Q493 = 0x01;
 236  				Q5OJ = Q5OJ + 0x0F;
 237  			} else {
 238  				Q46V++;
 239  				Q5OJ = Q5OJ + 0x05;
 240  			}
 241  			break;
 242  		default
 243  			Q4W9 = "outer ring.";
 244  			if (random(0x00, 0x0A) < Q46W) {
 245  				Q493 = 0x01;
 246  				Q5OJ = Q5OJ + 0x05;
 247  			} else {
 248  				Q46W++;
 249  				Q5OJ = Q5OJ + 0x02;
 250  			}
 251  			break;
 252  		}
 253  		if (Q493) {
 254  			deleteObject(Q5SV);
 255  			barkTo(this, user, "Your " + Q57I + " robinhoods another in the " + Q4W9);
 256  		} else {
 257  			barkTo(this, user, "You hit the " + Q4W9);
 258  		}
 259  	}
 260  	sfx(getLocation(this), Q57K, 0x00);
 261  	return(0x01);
 262  }

  21  trigger use {
  22  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
  23  		systemMessage(user, "Someone else is using that.");
  24  		return(0x00);
  25  	} else {
  26  		setObjVar(this, "inUse", 0x00);
  27  		callback(this, 0x3C, 0x1B);
  28  	}
  29  	targetObj(user, this);
  30  	return(0x01);
  31  }
  32  
  33  trigger targetobj {
  34  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
  35  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
  36  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
  37  		}
  38  		return(0x00);
  39  	}
  40  	Q512 = 0x00;
  41  	Q62D = user;
  42  	Q62B = usedon;
  43  	int Q4Q1;
  44  	Q4Q1 = getResource(Q694, Q62B, "wood", 0x03, 0x02);
  45  	int Q62C = getObjType(Q62B);
  46  	switch(Q62C) {
  47  	case 0x1BD7
  48  	case 0x1BD8
  49  	case 0x1BD9
  50  	case 0x1BDA
  51  	case 0x1BDB
  52  	case 0x1BDC
  53  	case 0x1BDD
  54  	case 0x1BDE
  55  	case 0x1BDF
  56  	case 0x1BE0
  57  	case 0x1BE1
  58  	case 0x1BE2
  59  		if (isAtHome(usedon)) {
  60  			systemMessage(user, "You can't use that wood, it belongs to someone else.");
  61  			return(0x00);
  62  		}
  63  		if (hasObjVar(Q62B, "inUse")) {
  64  			barkTo(Q62B, Q62D, "Someone is using that wood.");
  65  			return(0x00);
  66  		} else {
  67  			setObjVar(Q62B, "inUse", 0x01);
  68  			attachscript(Q62B, "removeinuse");
  69  			callback(Q62B, 0x3C, 0x1B);
  70  		}
  71  		int Q5TE = testSkillReal(user, 0x0B);
  72  		if (Q5TE > 0x00) {
  73  			list carpentry = 0x0B56, "chairs", 0x0B7C, "tables", 0x0E42, "miscellaneous";
  74  			selectType(Q62D, this, 0x04, "choose a category", carpentry);
  75  		} else {
  76  			systemMessage(user, "Carpentry failed.");
  77  			if (hasObjVar(Q62B, "inUse")) {
  78  				removeObjVar(Q62B, "inUse")}
  79  			if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
  80  				removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
  81  			}
  82  			return(0x00);
  83  		}
  84  		break;
  85  	default
  86  		barkTo(Q62B, Q62D, "can't make anything from that");
  87  		break;
  88  	}
  89  	return(0x00);
  90  }
  91  
  92  trigger typeselected(0x04) {
  93  	switch(listindex) {
  94  	case 0x01
  95  		open_chair_selection_menu();
  96  		break;
  97  	case 0x02
  98  		open_table_selection_menu();
  99  		break;

 108  		}
 109  		return(0x00);
 110  		break;
 111  	}

 113  		removeObjVar(Q62B, "inUse")}
 114  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 115  		removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 116  	}

 118  }

 120  function void open_chair_selection_menu() {

 122  	selectType(Q62D, this, 0x05, "choose a chair", chairs);
 123  	return();
 124  }

 259  
 260  trigger targetloc {
 261  	if (!isInMap(place)) {
 262  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 263  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 264  		}
 265  		return(0x00);
 266  	}
 267  	if (Q512) {
 268  		Q512 = 0x00;
 269  		debugMessage("before canExistAt");
 270  		if (canExistAt(place, getTileHeight(Q5C5), 0x00) != 0x07) {
 271  			debugMessage("inside canExistAt");
 272  			systemMessage(user, "You cannot create that there.");
 273  			return(0x00);
 274  		}
 275  		if (getDistanceInTiles(place, getLocation(user)) > 0x03) {
 276  			systemMessage(user, "That is too far away.");
 277  			return(0x00);
 278  		}
 279  		int Q693 = 0x00;
 280  		int Q4Q1 = getResource(Q693, Q62B, "wood", 0x03, 0x02);
 281  		if (Q693 < (Q697 + 0x01)) {
 282  			systemMessage(user, "You don't have enough wood to make that.");
 283  			return(0x00);
 284  		}
 285  		obj Q4F0 = createNoResObjectAt(Q5C5, place);
 286  		transferResources(Q4F0, Q62B, Q697, "wood");
 287  		setObjVar(Q4F0, "chopable", 0x01);
 288  		switch(Q5C5) {
 289  		case 0x0E7D
 290  		case 0x0E7E
 291  			overloadWeight(Q4F0, 0x01);
 292  			break;
 293  		case 0x0B5E
 294  		case 0x0A2A
 295  		case 0x0B5A
 296  		case 0x0B56
 297  		case 0x0B4E
 298  		case 0x0B52
 299  		case 0x0B2F
 300  		case 0x0B33
 301  			overloadWeight(Q4F0, 0x01);
 302  			break;
 303  		case 0x0B2C
 304  		case 0x0B34
 305  		case 0x0B4A
 306  		case 0x0B7C
 307  		case 0x0B7D
 308  			overloadWeight(Q4F0, 0x01);
 309  			break;
 310  		case 0x0E3E
 311  		case 0x0E3C
 312  		case 0x0E42
 313  		case 0x0A9E
 314  		case 0x0A51
 315  		case 0x0A53
 316  			overloadWeight(Q4F0, 0x01);
 317  			break;
 318  		default
 319  			break;
 320  		}
 321  		switch(Q5C5) {
 322  		case 0x0E7D
 323  		case 0x0E42
 324  			if (testSkill(user, 0x25)) {
 325  				int Q634 = getSkillLevel(user, 0x25);
 326  				systemMessage(user, "Your tinker skill was sufficient to make the item lockable.");
 327  				attachScript(Q4F0, "locked");
 328  				setObjVar(Q4F0, "lockLevel", (Q634 * 0x02));
 329  				setObjVar(Q4F0, "playerMade", 0x01);
 330  				obj key = createNoResObjectIn(0x100E, Q4F0);
 331  				list Q665 = Q4F0;
 332  				setObjVar(key, "whatIUnlock", Q665);
 333  			}
 334  		}
 335  		obj kindling = createNoResObjectAt(0x0DE1, place);
 336  		transferResources(kindling, Q62B, 0x01, "wood");
 337  		int Q695;
 338  		Q4Q1 = getResource(Q695, Q62B, "wood", 0x03, 0x02);
 339  		if (Q695 < 0x01) {
 340  			deleteObject(Q62B);
 341  		}
 342  	}
 343  	if (hasObjVar(Q62B, "inUse")) {
 344  		removeObjVar(Q62B, "inUse")}
 345  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 346  		removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 347  	}
 348  	if (consume_item_durability(user, this)) {
 349  		deleteObject(this);
 350  	}
 351  	return(0x00);
 352  }
 353  
 354  trigger callback(0x1B) {
 355  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 356  		removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 357  	}
 358  	return(0x00);
 359  }
