#15 casting.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5UY obj → spell_obj
Source — casting.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member obj Q5UY;
   4  
   5  function void end_casting_sequence(obj it) {
   6  	setMobFlag(this, 0x02, 0x00);
   7  	detachScript(it, "casting");
   8  	return();
   9  }
  10  
  11  trigger creation {
  12  	Q5UY = getObjVar(this, "spellObj");
  13  	removeObjVar(this, "spellObj");
  14  	setMobFlag(this, 0x02, 0x01);
  15  	return(0x01);
  16  }
  17  
  18  trigger callback(0x80) {
  19  	list Q5A8;
  20  	appendToList(Q5A8, this);
  21  	message(Q5UY, "castspell", Q5A8);
  22  	end_casting_sequence(this);
  23  	return(0x00);
  24  }
  25  
  26  trigger callback(0x82) {
  27  	animate_spell_casting(this, 0x01);
  28  	shortcallback(this, 0x04, 0x82);
  29  	return(0x01);
  30  }
  31  
  32  trigger washit {
  33  	int Q4IB = (get_spell_circle(Q5UY) - 0x01) * 0x03E8 / 0x07;
  34  	Q4IB = Q4IB + damamt * 0x14;
  35  	int Q5NC = getSkillSuccessChance(this, 0x19, Q4IB, 0x28) - random(0x00, 0x03E7);
  36  	if (Q5NC <= 0x00) {
  37  		systemMessage(this, "Your concentration is disturbed, thus ruining thy spell.");
  38  		end_casting_sequence(this);
  39  		return(0x01);
  40  	}
  41  	return(0x01);
  42  }
  43
#16 chainltgbase.m 3 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5HT list → hit_targets
Q57L obj → caster
Q5NQ int → strike_count
Source — chainltgbase.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member list Q5HT;
   4  
   5  member obj Q57L;
   6  
   7  member int Q5NQ;
   8  
   9  function int apply_chain_lightning(obj user, loc place) {
  10  	int hit = 0x00;
  11  	loc caster_loc = getLocation(user);
  12  	faceHere(user, getDirectionInternal(caster_loc, place));
  13  	clearList(Q5HT);
  14  	list nearby_mobs;
  15  	getMobsInRange(nearby_mobs, place, 0x02);
  16  	int mob_count = numInList(nearby_mobs);
  17  	beginSequence();
  18  	Q57L = user;
  19  	Q5NQ = 0x00;
  20  	int crime_reported = 0x00;
  21  	for (int x = 0x00; x < mob_count; x++) {
  22  		obj mob = nearby_mobs[x];
  23  		if (is_valid_spell_target(mob)) {
  24  			if (hasScript(mob, "reflctor")) {
  25  				doLightning(user);
  26  				detachScript(mob, "reflctor");
  27  				int damage = apply_spell_damage(this, Q57L, Q57L, 0x02, 0x01);
  28  				if (!crime_reported) {
  29  					crime_reported = 0x01;
  30  					handle_pvp_crime_report(user, mob, 0x02, 0x00);
  31  				}
  32  			} else {
  33  				hit = 0x01;
  34  				doLightning(mob);
  35  				if (!crime_reported) {
  36  					crime_reported = 0x01;
  37  					handle_pvp_crime_report(user, mob, 0x02, 0x00);
  38  				}
  39  				callback(this, 0x01, 0x19);
  40  				appendToList(Q5HT, mob);
  41  			}
  42  		}
  43  	}
  44  	endSequence(0x01);
  45  	sfx(place, 0x29, 0x00);
  46  	trigger_mana_drain_if_enabled(this, hit);
  47  	return(hit);
  48  }
  49  
  50  trigger callback(0x19) {
  51  	int Q527 = apply_circle_damage(0x02, this, Q57L, Q5HT, 0x02);
  52  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  53  	return(0x00);
  54  }
  55
#17 cityguard.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q57A int → guard_state
Source — cityguard.m 
   1  inherits bountyclaim;
   2  
   3  member int Q57A;
   4  
   5  trigger message("armageddon") {
   6  	int Q52T = args[0x00];
   7  	if (Q52T >= 0x02) {
   8  		return(0x00);
   9  	}
  10  	return(0x01);
  11  }
  12  
  13  trigger creation {
  14  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
  15  	setBehavior(this, 0x02);
  16  	int time = random(0x0A, 0x14);
  17  	callback(this, time, 0x63);
  18  	setObjVar(this, "myGuardPost", Q4VS);
  19  	setLoiterMode(this, 0x01);
  20  	goLoiter(this, Q4VS, 0x03E8);
  21  	callBack(this, 0x64, 0x62);
  22  	return(0x00);
  23  }
  24  
  25  trigger callback(0x62) {
  26  	if (hasObjVar(this, "myGuardPost")) {
  27  		loc there = getObjVar(this, "myGuardPost");
  28  		walkTo(this, there, 0x15);
  29  	}
  30  	callBack(this, 0x64, 0x62);
  31  	return(0x01);
  32  }
  33  
  34  trigger pathnotfound(0x15) {
  35  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "myGuardPost")) {
  36  		return(0x00);
  37  	}
  38  	loc place = getObjVar(this, "myGuardPost");
  39  	int Q4Q1 = teleport(this, place);
  40  	return(0x00);
  41  }
  42  
  43  function void warn_suspicious_target(obj this, obj target) {
  44  	string warning_message;
  45  	list warning_message_list;
  46  	string guard_speech_line;
  47  	int direction_to_target;
  48  	string notoriety_or_karma_value;
  49  	int target_notoriety_or_karma;
  50  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
  51  		target_notoriety_or_karma = getNotoriety(target);
  52  	} else {
  53  		target_notoriety_or_karma = getKarma(target);
  54  	}
  55  	notoriety_or_karma_value = target_notoriety_or_karma;
  56  	int karma_level_value;
  57  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
  58  		karma_level_value = (0x00 - (getNotoriety(target) / 0x0A));
  59  	} else {
  60  		karma_level_value = getKarmaLevel(target);
  61  	}
  62  	warning_message_list = "Don't do anything foolish.", "We'll be keeping an eye on thee.", "I know thy type. Break not the laws, or else suffer punishment!", "Thou hast a suspicious look about thee.", "I trust thee not, nor should anyone. Thou art a ruffian.", "Faugh, another scoundrel to keep an eye on!", "I have heard of thee--keep thee to the straight and narrow whilst here!", "If I catch thee breaking laws, thy neck will be on the line.", "Thou hast an unsavory reputation--best that thou dost not prove that thou earnst it.", "Thou art known as a criminal. Do not draw the attention of the guards with thy deeds, or risk death!", "Mine eye is on thee, scoundrel. Break not the law.", "Thou art a scofflaw, but while here thou SHALT obey the laws, or suffer.", "Look thee who crawled out from under a rock! Well, thou shalt not do anything illegal whilst I am watching thee!", "The guards well know thee and thy nefarious ways! Be sure to behave thyself!", "Scum! Stay not overlong here, for thou art not welcome!", "I hope that thou art merely visiting, for we mislike knaves mingling with our citizens.", "Thou shouldst leave this city before any decide to lynch thee.", "I should arrest thee now, before thou dost something terrible. Thou art well known as a rogue of the worst kind.";
  63  	int selected_message_index = random(0x00, 0x0C) + (karma_level_value / 0x02);
  64  	warning_message = warning_message_list[selected_message_index];
  65  	guard_speech_line = getName(target) + "! " + warning_message;
  66  	direction_to_target = getDirectionInternal(getLocation(this), getLocation(target));
  67  	faceHere(this, direction_to_target);
  68  	bark(this, guard_speech_line);
  69  	setObjVar(target, "cityguardJustWarnedMe", 0x01);
  70  	return();
  71  }
  72  
  73  function void aggro_criminal_target(obj this, obj target) {
  74  	string threat_message;
  75  	list threat_message_list;
  76  	string guard_speech_line;
  77  	int direction_to_target;
  78  	string notoriety_or_karma_value;
  79  	int target_notoriety_or_karma;
  80  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
  81  		target_notoriety_or_karma = getNotoriety(target);
  82  	} else {
  83  		target_notoriety_or_karma = getKarma(target);
  84  	}
  85  	notoriety_or_karma_value = target_notoriety_or_karma;
  86  	threat_message_list = "Thou'rt wanted!", "Flee now before I behead thee, scum!", "How nice of thee to come to meet my blade.", "Stand back, everyone, a dastardly criminal approaches.", "Now, I shall kill thee.", "A warrant is outstanding for thy execution.", "Thou hast made a fatal mistake by showing thy filthy face.", "'Twill be a pleasure to dispatch a scoundrel such as thee.", "Beware, all, whilst I dispose of this evildoer.", "'Tis a shame that thou canst not reform, for now I shall have to kill thee.", "Thy sort is not welcome here. Thou hadst best run now.", "Get out of our city, scum!";
  87  	threat_message = threat_message_list[random(0x00, 0x0B)];
  88  	guard_speech_line = getName(target) + "! " + threat_message;
  89  	direction_to_target = getDirectionInternal(getLocation(this), getLocation(target));
  90  	faceHere(this, direction_to_target);
  91  	bark(this, guard_speech_line);
  92  	walkTo(this, getLocation(target), 0x11);
  93  	setObjVar(this, "guyToKill", target);
  94  	return();
  95  }
  96  
  97  trigger enterrange(0x06) {
  98  	if (isDead(target)) {
  99  		return(0x01);
 100  	}
 101  	if (!isHuman(target)) {
 102  		return(0x01);
 103  	}
 104  	if (hasObjVar(target, "cityguardJustWarnedMe")) {
 105  		return(0x01);
 106  	}
 107  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
 108  		if (getNotoriety(target) < (0x00 - 0x64)) {
 109  			bark(this, "You're evil, and must die!");
 110  			aggro_criminal_target(this, target);
 111  			return(0x01);
 112  		}
 113  		if (getNotoriety(target) < (0x00 - 0x14)) {
 114  			if (random(0x00, 0x0A) == 0x05) {
 115  				warn_suspicious_target(this, target);
 116  			}
 117  		}
 118  	} else {
 119  		if (isMurderer(target)) {
 120  			bark(this, "You're a murderer, and must die!");
 121  			aggro_criminal_target(this, target);
 122  			return(0x01);
 123  		}
 124  		if (isCriminal(target)) {
 125  			if (random(0x00, 0x0A) == 0x05) {
 126  				warn_suspicious_target(this, target);
 127  			}
 128  		}
 129  	}
 130  	return(0x01);
 131  }
 132  
 133  trigger leaverange(0x07) {
 134  	if (hasObjVar(target, "cityguardJustWarnedMe")) {
 135  		removeObjVar(target, "cityguardJustWarnedMe");
 136  	}
 137  	return(0x01);
 138  }
 139  
 140  trigger pathfound(0x11) {
 141  	if (hasObjVar(this, "guyToKill")) {
 142  		obj guyToKill = getObjVar(this, "guyToKill");
 143  		attack(this, guyToKill);
 144  	}
 145  	return(0x00);
 146  }
 147  
 148  trigger pathnotfound(0x11) {
 149  	bark(this, "Thou hast escaped me!");
 150  	if (hasObjVar(this, "guyToKill")) {
 151  		obj guyToKill = getObjVar(this, "guyToKill");
 152  		attack(this, guyToKill);
 153  	}
 154  	return(0x00);
 155  }
 156  
 157  trigger callback(0x63) {
 158  	int time = 0x00;
 159  	list Q5YQ;
 160  	getTargets(Q5YQ, this);
 161  	if (numInList(Q5YQ) > 0x00) {
 162  		time = random(0x1E, 0x3C);
 163  		callback(this, time, 0x63);
 164  		return(0x01);
 165  	}
 166  	string Q4D9 = "city";
 167  	loc Q5AH = getLocation(this);
 168  	int Q4YG = 0x00;
 169  	Q4YG = isInRegionWithPrefix(Q4D9, Q5AH);
 170  	if (!Q4YG) {
 171  		Q4D9 = "justice";
 172  		Q4YG = isInRegionWithPrefix(Q4D9, Q5AH);
 173  	}
 174  	if (!Q4YG) {
 175  		Q4D9 = "guard";
 176  		Q4YG = isInRegionWithPrefix(Q4D9, Q5AH);
 177  	}
 178  	if (!Q4YG) {
 179  		doLocAnimation(Q5AH, 0x3728, 0x0A, 0x0A, 0x00, 0x00);
 180  		sfx(Q5AH, 0x01FE, 0x00);
 181  		deleteObject(this);
 182  	}
 183  	time = random(0x0A, 0x14);
 184  	callback(this, time, 0x63);
 185  	return(0x01);
 186  }
 187  
 188  trigger give {
 189  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
 190  		return(0x01);
 191  	}
 192  	if (hasObjVar(givenobj, "nameVar")) {
 193  		if (!hasObjVar(givenobj, "controller")) {
 194  			int r = random(0x00, 0x03F2);
 195  			if (r >= 0x0A) {
 196  				switch((r - 0x0A) / 0x64) {
 197  				case 0x00
 198  					bark(this, "Er... thanks.");
 199  					break;
 200  				case 0x01
 201  					bark(this, "I really hope that wasn't intended as a bribe.");
 202  					break;
 203  				case 0x02
 204  					bark(this, "I'll just be keeping this.");
 205  					break;
 206  				case 0x03
 207  					bark(this, "How disgusting!  I'll dispose of this.");
 208  					break;
 209  				case 0x04
 210  					bark(this, "Er... thanks.");
 211  					break;
 212  				case 0x05
 213  					bark(this, "Er... thanks.");
 214  					break;
 215  				case 0x06
 216  					default
 217  					bark(this, "If this were the head of a murderer, I would check for a bounty.");
 218  					break;
 219  				}
 220  			} else {
 221  				switch(r) {
 222  				case 0x00
 223  					bark(this, "I shall place this on my mantle!");
 224  					break;
 225  				case 0x01
 226  					bark(this, "This tasteth like chicken.");
 227  					break;
 228  				case 0x02
 229  					bark(this, "This tasteth just like the juicy peach I just ate.");
 230  					break;
 231  				case 0x03
 232  					bark(this, "Ahh!  That was the one piece I was missing!");
 233  					break;
 234  				case 0x04
 235  					bark(this, "Somehow, it reminds me of mother.");
 236  					break;
 237  				case 0x05
 238  					bark(this, "It's a sign!  I can see Elvis in this!");
 239  					break;
 240  				case 0x07
 241  					bark(this, "Thanks, I was missing mine.");
 242  					break;
 243  				case 0x08
 244  					bark(this, "I'll put this in the lost-and-found box.");
 245  					break;
 246  				case 0x09
 247  					bark(this, "My family will eat well tonight!");
 248  					break;
 249  				}
 250  			}
 251  			deleteObject(givenobj);
 252  			return(0x00);
 253  		}
 254  		bark(this, "Ah, a head!  Let me check to see if there is a bounty on this.");
 255  		setObjVar(giver, "bountyGuardId", this);
 256  		string Q59F = getObjVar(givenobj, "nameVar");
 257  		setObjVar(giver, "bountyPlayerName", Q59F);
 258  		obj controller = getObjVar(givenobj, "controller");
 259  		list args;
 260  		appendToList(args, controller);
 261  		appendToList(args, giver);
 262  		multiMessageToLoc(getRelayLoc(controller), "takeBounty", args);
 263  		callback(giver, 0x0A, 0x8D);
 264  		deleteObject(givenobj);
 265  		return(0x00);
 266  	}
 267  	return(0x01);
 268  }
 269
#18 comcrystal.m 3 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q535 list → linked_crystals
Q454 int → is_active
Q55T int → max_charges
Source — comcrystal.m 
   1  member int charges;
   2  
   3  member list Q535;
   4  
   5  member int Q454;
   6  
   7  member int Q55T;
   8  
   9  function int get_link_count() {
  10  	return(numInList(Q535));
  11  }
  12  
  13  function int has_charges_available() {
  14  	if (charges != 0x00) {
  15  		return(0x01);
  16  	}
  17  	return(0x00);
  18  }
  19  
  20  function int get_current_charges() {
  21  	return(charges);
  22  }
  23  
  24  function void update_base_value(obj Q4XN) {
  25  	int value = 0x00;
  26  	if (hasObjVar(crystal, "mybasevalue")) {
  27  		value = getObjVar(crystal, "mybasevalue");
  28  	}
  29  	int cur_charges = get_current_charges();
  30  	int new_value = 0x00;
  31  	if (cur_charges < 0x00) {
  32  		new_value = 0x03E7;
  33  	} else {
  34  		new_value = 0x01 * cur_charges / 0x0A;
  35  	}
  36  	new_value = new_value + 0x05;
  37  	if (new_value != value) {
  38  		setObjVar(crystal, "mybasevalue", new_value);
  39  	}
  40  	return();
  41  }
  42  
  43  function void set_charges(int newcharges) {
  44  	charges = newcharges;
  45  	update_base_value(this);
  46  	return();
  47  }
  48  
  49  function void init_charges(int newcharges) {
  50  	set_charges(newcharges);
  51  	return();
  52  }
  53  
  54  function int adjust_charges(int Q463) {
  55  	charges = charges + delta;
  56  	update_base_value(this);
  57  	return(charges);
  58  }
  59  
  60  function int is_com_crystal(obj Q4XN) {
  61  	int result = hasObjVar(crystal_obj, "isComCrystal");
  62  	return(result);
  63  }
  64  
  65  function void set_crystal_state(obj it, int status) {
  66  	int newType = 0x1ECD;
  67  	if (status) {
  68  		newType = 0x1ED0;
  69  	}
  70  	if (getObjType(it) != newType) {
  71  		setType(it, newType);
  72  	}
  73  	return();
  74  }
  75  
  76  function void set_active_state(obj it, int status) {
  77  	Q454 = status;
  78  	set_crystal_state(it, Q454);
  79  	return();
  80  }
  81  
  82  function int toggle_active(obj user, obj Q4XN) {
  83  	if (Q454) {
  84  		set_active_state(crystal, 0x00);
  85  		systemMessage(user, "You turn the crystal off.");
  86  	} else {
  87  		set_active_state(crystal, 0x01);
  88  		systemMessage(user, "You turn the crystal on.");
  89  	}
  90  	return(Q454);
  91  }
  92  
  93  function int link_crystal_to_target(obj user, obj Q4XN) {
  94  	if (isInList(Q535, crystal_obj)) {
  95  		systemMessage(user, "This crystal is already linked with that crystal.");
  96  		return(0x00);
  97  	}
  98  	appendToList(Q535, crystal_obj);
  99  	systemMessage(user, "That crystal has been linked to this crystal.");
 100  	return(0x01);
 101  }
 102  
 103  function int check_usable(obj Q4XN, obj user) {
 104  	if (!has_charges_available()) {
 105  		systemMessage(user, "This crystal is out of charges.");
 106  		return(0x00);
 107  	}
 108  	return(0x01);
 109  }
 110  
 111  function int relay_speech(obj sender, obj speaker, string arg) {
 112  	if (!has_charges_available()) {
 113  		return(0x00);
 114  	}
 115  	list relay_args;
 116  	appendToList(relay_args, speaker);
 117  	string speaker_name = getName(speaker);
 118  	appendToList(relay_args, speaker_name);
 119  	int text_hue = getDefaultTextHue(speaker);
 120  	appendToList(relay_args, text_hue);
 121  	appendToList(relay_args, arg);
 122  	int num = numInList(Q535);
 123  	int i;
 124  	for (i = 0x00; i < num; i++) {
 125  		obj linked_crystal = Q535[i];
 126  		multimessage(linked_crystal, "comspeech", relay_args);
 127  		if (adjust_charges((0x00 - 0x01)) == 0x00) {
 128  			toggle_active(speaker, sender);
 129  			break;
 130  		}
 131  	}
 132  	return(i);
 133  }
 134  
 135  function void apply_pending_charges() {
 136  	if (hasObjVar(this, "newcharges")) {
 137  		int newcharges = getObjVar(this, "newcharges");
 138  		removeObjVar(this, "newcharges");
 139  		set_charges(newcharges);
 140  	}
 141  	return();
 142  }
 143  
 144  function string get_display_name() {
 145  	string name;
 146  	if (Q454) {
 147  		concat(name, "an active ");
 148  	} else {
 149  		concat(name, "an inactive ");
 150  	}
 151  	concat(name, "crystal of communication");
 152  	concat(name, " with ");
 153  	int charges = get_current_charges();
 154  	if (charges < 0x00) {
 155  		concat(name, "infinite");
 156  	} else {
 157  		name = name + charges;
 158  	}
 159  	concat(name, " charges");
 160  	int link_count = get_link_count();
 161  	if (link_count > 0x00) {
 162  		concat(name, " and ");
 163  		name = name + link_count;
 164  		concat(name, " links");
 165  	}
 166  	return(name);
 167  }
 168  
 169  function void refresh_display_name() {
 170  	string name = get_display_name();
 171  	setObjVar(this, "lookAtText", name);
 172  	return();
 173  }
 174  
 175  function int get_crystal_power_level(obj it) {
 176  	int item_type_id = getObjType(it);
 177  	int power = 0x00 - 0x01;
 178  	switch(item_type_id) {
 179  	case 0x0F25
 180  	case 0x0F15
 181  	case 0x0F23
 182  	case 0x0F24
 183  	case 0x0F2C
 184  		power = 0x01F4;
 185  		break;
 186  	case 0x0F0A
 187  	case 0x0F14
 188  	case 0x0F1A
 189  	case 0x0F1C
 190  	case 0x0F1D
 191  	case 0x0F2A
 192  	case 0x0F2B
 193  	case 0x0F18
 194  	case 0x0F1E
 195  	case 0x0F20
 196  	case 0x0F2D
 197  		power = 0x02EE;
 198  		break;
 199  	case 0x0F10
 200  	case 0x0F2F
 201  	case 0x0F11
 202  	case 0x0F12
 203  	case 0x0F19
 204  	case 0x0F1F
 205  	case 0x0F16
 206  	case 0x0F17
 207  	case 0x0F22
 208  	case 0x0F2E
 209  		power = 0x03E8;
 210  		break;
 211  	case 0x0F0F
 212  	case 0x0F1B
 213  	case 0x0F21
 214  		power = 0x04E2;
 215  		break;
 216  	case 0x0F26
 217  	case 0x0F27
 218  	case 0x0F28
 219  	case 0x0F29
 220  	case 0x0F30
 221  		power = 0x07D0;
 222  		break;
 223  	}
 224  	return(power);
 225  }
 226  
 227  function void destroy_item(obj it) {
 228  	destroyOne(it);
 229  	return();
 230  }
 231  
 232  function int try_recharge_with_item(obj it, obj user) {
 233  	obj container = getTopmostContainer(it);
 234  	if ((container != NULL()) && (container != user)) {
 235  		return(0x00);
 236  	}
 237  	int power;
 238  	power = get_crystal_power_level(it);
 239  	if (power <= 0x00) {
 240  		return(0x00);
 241  	}
 242  	if (get_current_charges() < 0x00) {
 243  		systemMessage(user, "This crystal can not be recharged.");
 244  		return(0x00);
 245  	}
 246  	if (get_current_charges() >= Q55T) {
 247  		systemMessage(user, "This crystal is already fully charged.");
 248  		return(0x00);
 249  	}
 250  	int num = charges + power;
 251  	if (num >= Q55T) {
 252  		num = Q55T;
 253  		systemMessage(user, "You completely recharge the crystal.");
 254  	} else {
 255  		systemMessage(user, "You recharge the crystal.");
 256  	}
 257  	set_charges(num);
 258  	destroy_item(it);
 259  	refresh_display_name();
 260  	return(0x01);
 261  }
 262  
 263  trigger creation {
 264  	Q55T = 0x07D0;
 265  	init_charges(0x01F4);
 266  	setObjVar(this, "isComCrystal", 0x01);
 267  	set_active_state(this, 0x00);
 268  	apply_pending_charges();
 269  	refresh_display_name();
 270  	attachScript(this, "speechrelay");
 271  	return(0x01);
 272  }
 273  
 274  trigger lookedat {
 275  	refresh_display_name();
 276  	string name = get_display_name();
 277  	barkTo(this, looker, name);
 278  	return(0x00);
 279  }
 280  
 281  trigger use {
 282  	targetobj(user, this);
 283  	return(0x01);
 284  }
 285  
 286  trigger targetobj {
 287  	if (!isValid(usedon)) {
 288  		return(0x00);
 289  	}
 290  	if (try_recharge_with_item(usedon, user)) {
 291  		return(0x00);
 292  	}
 293  	if (!check_usable(this, user)) {
 294  		return(0x00);
 295  	}
 296  	if (usedon == this) {
 297  		toggle_active(user, this);
 298  	} else {
 299  		if (is_com_crystal(usedon)) {
 300  			link_crystal_to_target(user, usedon);
 301  		} else {
 302  			systemMessage(user, "You can not use this crystal on that.");
 303  		}
 304  	}
 305  	return(0x01);
 306  }
 307  
 308  trigger message("speechrelayed") {
 309  	apply_pending_charges();
 310  	if (Q454) {
 311  		int Q527 = relay_speech(this, args[0x00], args[0x01]);
 312  		refresh_display_name();
 313  	}
 314  	return(0x00);
 315  }
 316  
 317  trigger message("comspeech") {
 318  	string Q5R1 = args[0x01];
 319  	int Q5R0 = args[0x02];
 320  	string Q5R5 = args[0x03];
 321  	string Q5CR;
 322  	obj Q4E2 = getTopmostContainer(this);
 323  	if ((Q4E2 != NULL())) {
 324  		if (isPlayer(Q4E2)) {
 325  			concat(Q5CR, "Crystal: ");
 326  		}
 327  	}
 328  	concat(Q5CR, Q5R1);
 329  	concat(Q5CR, " says ");
 330  	concat(Q5CR, Q5R5);
 331  	int Q5NC = 0x01;
 332  	if (Q4E2 == NULL()) {
 333  		Q5NC = superBark(this, Q5CR, Q5R0, 0x03, 0x07);
 334  	} else {
 335  		if (isPlayer(Q4E2)) {
 336  			Q5NC = textMessage(Q4E2, Q5CR, Q5R0, 0x03, 0x06);
 337  		} else {
 338  			Q5NC = superBark(Q4E2, Q5CR, Q5R0, 0x03, 0x07);
 339  		}
 340  	}
 341  	return(0x01);
 342  }
 343
#19 comprobe.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q56Q list → message_queue
Source — comprobe.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member obj recipient;
   4  
   5  member list Q56Q;
   6  
   7  trigger decay {
   8  	return(0x00);
   9  }
  10  
  11  trigger creation {
  12  	recipient = getObjVar(this, "recipient");
  13  	removeObjVar(this, "recipient");
  14  	return(0x01);
  15  }
  16  
  17  trigger callback(0x4E) {
  18  	deleteObjectNoFall(this);
  19  	return(0x00);
  20  }
  21  
  22  trigger lookedat {
  23  	if (!isEditing(looker)) {
  24  		return(0x00);
  25  	}
  26  	systemMessage(looker, "Messages for " + objtoint(recipient) + ":");
  27  	int Q5T8 = numInList(Q56Q);
  28  	printList(Q56Q);
  29  	for (int i = 0x00; i < Q5T8; i++) {
  30  		string Q56S = oprlist(Q56Q[0x00], 0x00);
  31  		systemMessage(looker, Q56S);
  32  	}
  33  	return(0x00);
  34  }
  35  
  36  function void process_message_queue() {
  37  	int message_queue_count = numInList(Q56Q);
  38  	for (int i = 0x00; i < message_queue_count; i++) {
  39  		list args;
  40  		copyList(args, Q56Q[0x00]);
  41  		string message_string = args[0x00];
  42  		removeItem(args, 0x00);
  43  		message(recipient, message_string, args);
  44  		removeItem(Q56Q, 0x00);
  45  	}
  46  	deleteObjectNoFall(this);
  47  	return();
  48  }
  49  
  50  trigger message("addMessage") {
  51  	appendToList(Q56Q, args);
  52  	callback(this, 0x00278D00, 0x4E);
  53  	return(0x00);
  54  }
  55  
  56  trigger message("consolidate") {
  57  	if (this == sender) {
  58  		return(0x01);
  59  	}
  60  	obj Q5R4 = args[0x00];
  61  	if (recipient != Q5R4) {
  62  		return(0x01);
  63  	}
  64  	int Q5T8 = numInList(Q56Q);
  65  	for (int i = 0x00; i < Q5T8; i++) {
  66  		message(sender, "addMessage", Q56Q[0x00]);
  67  		removeItem(Q56Q, 0x00);
  68  	}
  69  	setDefaultReturn(0x01);
  70  	deleteObjectNoFall(this);
  71  	return(0x01);
  72  }
  73  
  74  trigger message("collect") {
  75  	if (recipient != sender) {
  76  		return(0x01);
  77  	}
  78  	if (isValid(recipient)) {
  79  		process_message_queue();
  80  		return(0x01);
  81  	}
  82  	loc Q5XM = args[0x00];
  83  	if (!isInMap(Q5XM)) {
  84  		int Q4Q1 = teleportNoFall(this, Q5XM);
  85  	}
  86  	return(0x01);
  87  }
  88  
  89  function void teleported() {
  90  	loc Q4WK = getRelayLoc(recipient);
  91  	if (getLocation(this) == Q4WK) {
  92  		list args;
  93  		appendToList(args, recipient);
  94  		messageToRange(Q4WK, 0x01, "consolidate", args);
  95  		clearList(args);
  96  		multiMessage(recipient, "requestCollection", args);
  97  	} else {
  98  		if (isValid(recipient)) {
  99  			process_message_queue();
 100  		} else {
 101  			int Q4Q1 = teleportNoFall(this, Q4WK);
 102  		}
 103  	}
 104  	return();
 105  }
 106  
 107  trigger message("teleported") {
 108  	teleported();
 109  	return(0x01);
 110  }
 111  
 112  trigger objectloaded {
 113  	teleported();
 114  	return(0x01);
 115  }
 116  
 117  trigger serverswitch {
 118  	teleported();
 119  	return(0x01);
 120  }
 121
#20 cov1_gas_trap_daemon.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5XX loc → reset_loc
Q5DQ list → empty_args
Source — cov1_gas_trap_daemon.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member loc trapLocation;
   4  
   5  member loc Q5XX;
   6  
   7  member list Q5DQ;
   8  
   9  trigger creation {
  10  	trapLocation = 0x1539, 0x0759, 0x00;
  11  	Q5XX = 0x1533, 0x0753, 0x0D;
  12  	return(0x00);
  13  }
  14  
  15  trigger message("flipped") {
  16  	list Q5XW;
  17  	int Q5Y1 = 0x1092;
  18  	int Q5XT = 0x1091;
  19  	loc Q5XY = 0x1531, 0x0753, 0x0D;
  20  	loc Q5Y0 = 0x1532, 0x0753, 0x0D;
  21  	loc Q5XZ = 0x1533, 0x0753, 0x0D;
  22  	loc Q5XV = 0x1534, 0x0753, 0x0D;
  23  	loc Q5XU = 0x1535, 0x0753, 0x0D;
  24  	getObjectsAt(Q5XW, Q5XY);
  25  	if (hasObjVar(this, "working")) {
  26  		removeObjVar(this, "working");
  27  		shortCallback(this, 0x01, 0x24);
  28  		return(0x00);
  29  	}
  30  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5XW); i++) {
  31  		if (hasScript(Q5XW[i], "cov1_gas_trap_switch")) {
  32  			if (getObjType(Q5XW[i]) == Q5Y1) {
  33  				if (hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchOneDown")) {
  34  					removeObjVar(this, "covSwitchOneDown");
  35  				}
  36  			}
  37  			if (getObjType(Q5XW[i]) == Q5XT) {
  38  				if (!hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchOneDown")) {
  39  					setObjVar(this, "covSwitchOneDown", 0x01);
  40  				}
  41  			}
  42  		}
  43  	}
  44  	clearList(Q5XW);
  45  	getObjectsAt(Q5XW, Q5Y0);
  46  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5XW); i++) {
  47  		if (hasScript(Q5XW[i], "cov1_gas_trap_switch")) {
  48  			if (getObjType(Q5XW[i]) == Q5Y1) {
  49  				if (hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchTwoDown")) {
  50  					removeObjVar(this, "covSwitchTwoDown");
  51  				}
  52  			}
  53  			if (getObjType(Q5XW[i]) == Q5XT) {
  54  				if (!hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchTwoDown")) {
  55  					setObjVar(this, "covSwitchTwoDown", 0x01);
  56  				}
  57  			}
  58  		}
  59  	}
  60  	clearList(Q5XW);
  61  	getObjectsAt(Q5XW, Q5XZ);
  62  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5XW); i++) {
  63  		if (hasScript(Q5XW[i], "cov1_gas_trap_switch")) {
  64  			if (getObjType(Q5XW[i]) == Q5Y1) {
  65  				if (hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchThreeDown")) {
  66  					removeObjVar(this, "covSwitchThreeDown");
  67  				}
  68  			}
  69  			if (getObjType(Q5XW[i]) == Q5XT) {
  70  				if (!hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchThreeDown")) {
  71  					setObjVar(this, "covSwitchThreeDown", 0x01);
  72  				}
  73  			}
  74  		}
  75  	}
  76  	clearList(Q5XW);
  77  	getObjectsAt(Q5XW, Q5XV);
  78  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5XW); i++) {
  79  		if (hasScript(Q5XW[i], "cov1_gas_trap_switch")) {
  80  			if (getObjType(Q5XW[i]) == Q5Y1) {
  81  				if (hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchFourDown")) {
  82  					removeObjVar(this, "covSwitchFourDown");
  83  				}
  84  			}
  85  			if (getObjType(Q5XW[i]) == Q5XT) {
  86  				if (!hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchFourDown")) {
  87  					setObjVar(this, "covSwitchFourDown", 0x01);
  88  				}
  89  			}
  90  		}
  91  	}
  92  	clearList(Q5XW);
  93  	getObjectsAt(Q5XW, Q5XU);
  94  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5XW); i++) {
  95  		if (hasScript(Q5XW[i], "cov1_gas_trap_switch")) {
  96  			if (getObjType(Q5XW[i]) == Q5Y1) {
  97  				if (hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchFiveDown")) {
  98  					removeObjVar(this, "covSwitchFiveDown");
  99  				}
 100  			}
 101  			if (getObjType(Q5XW[i]) == Q5XT) {
 102  				if (!hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchFiveDown")) {
 103  					setObjVar(this, "covSwitchFiveDown", 0x01);
 104  				}
 105  			}
 106  		}
 107  	}
 108  	if ((hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchOneDown")) && (hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchThreeDown")) && (hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchFiveDown")) && (!hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchTwoDown")) && (!hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchFourDown"))) {
 109  		messageToRange(trapLocation, 0x0A, "cov_disarm", Q5DQ);
 110  		callback(this, 0x1E, 0x24);
 111  		setObjVar(this, "working", 0x01);
 112  	}
 113  	return(0x00);
 114  }
 115  
 116  trigger callback(0x24) {
 117  	if (hasObjVar(this, "working")) {
 118  		removeObjVar(this, "working");
 119  		if (hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchOneDown")) {
 120  			removeObjVar(this, "covSwitchOneDown");
 121  		}
 122  		if (hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchTwoDown")) {
 123  			removeObjVar(this, "covSwitchTwoDown");
 124  		}
 125  		if (hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchThreeDown")) {
 126  			removeObjVar(this, "covSwitchThreeDown");
 127  		}
 128  		if (hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchFourDown")) {
 129  			removeObjVar(this, "covSwitchFourDown");
 130  		}
 131  		if (hasObjVar(this, "covSwitchFiveDown")) {
 132  			removeObjVar(this, "covSwitchFiveDown");
 133  		}
 134  		messageToRange(trapLocation, 0x0A, "cov_reload", Q5DQ);
 135  		messageToRange(Q5XX, 0x0A, "cov_reset", Q5DQ);
 136  	}
 137  	return(0x00);
 138  }
 139  
 140  trigger message("unconditionalDisarm") {
 141  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "working")) {
 142  		messageToRange(trapLocation, 0x0A, "cov_disarm", Q5DQ);
 143  		callback(this, 0x1E, 0x24);
 144  		setObjVar(this, "working", 0x01);
 145  	}
 146  	return(0x00);
 147  }
 148
#21 cov3_spike_master.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q468 int → phase
Source — cov3_spike_master.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member int Q468;
   4  
   5  trigger creation {
   6  	setType(this, 0x01);
   7  	Q468 = 0x01;
   8  	callback(this, 0x01, 0x24);
   9  	return(0x00);
  10  }
  11  
  12  trigger objectloaded {
  13  	callback(this, 0x01, 0x24);
  14  	return(0x00);
  15  }
  16  
  17  trigger message("doAnimation") {
  18  	list Q67G;
  19  	doLocAnimation(getLocation(this), 0x111C, 0x02, 0x10, 0x00, 0x00);
  20  	getMobsInRange(Q67G, getLocation(this), 0x01);
  21  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q67G); i++) {
  22  		loseHP(Q67G[i], dice(0x14, 0x05));
  23  	}
  24  	return(0x00);
  25  }
  26  
  27  trigger callback(0x24) {
  28  	list Q5DQ;
  29  	loc Q5V2 = 0x15C3, 0x0754, 0x07;
  30  	loc Q5V1 = 0x15BF, 0x0754, 0x07;
  31  	if (Q468 == 0x01) {
  32  		messageToRange(getLocation(this), 0x02, "doAnimation", Q5DQ);
  33  	}
  34  	if (Q468 == 0x02) {
  35  		messageToRange(Q5V2, 0x02, "doAnimation", Q5DQ);
  36  	}
  37  	if (Q468 == 0x03) {
  38  		messageToRange(Q5V1, 0x02, "doAnimation", Q5DQ);
  39  	}
  40  	if (Q468 == 0x04) {
  41  		Q468 = 0x01;
  42  	} else {
  43  		Q468 = Q468 + 0x01;
  44  	}
  45  	callback(this, 0x01, 0x24);
  46  	return(0x00);
  47  }
  48

#23 curseatk.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q688 int → is_bow
Q472 int → skill_penalty
Source — curseatk.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q688;
   4  
   5  member int Q472;
   6  
   7  trigger equip {
   8  	list Q57J = 0x0F4F, 0x0F50, 0x13B1, 0x13B2, 0x13FC, 0x13FD;
   9  	int weapon = getObjType(this);
  10  	Q472 = 0xC8;
  11  	for (int Q624 = 0x00; Q624 < numInList(Q57J); Q624++) {
  12  		int Q4GB = Q57J[Q624];
  13  		if (Q4GB == weapon) {
  14  			Q688 = 0x01;
  15  		}
  16  	}
  17  	if (Q688 == 0x01) {
  18  		loseSkillLevel(equippedon, 0x1F, Q472);
  19  	} else {
  20  		loseSkillLevel(equippedon, 0x1B, Q472);
  21  	}
  22  	return(0x01);
  23  }
  24  
  25  trigger unequip {
  26  	Q472 = 0xC8;
  27  	if (Q688 == 0x01) {
  28  		addSkillLevel(unequippedfrom, 0x1F, Q472);
  29  	} else {
  30  		addSkillLevel(unequippedfrom, 0x1B, Q472);
  31  	}
  32  	return(0x01);
  33  }
  34
#24 darttrap.m 4 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5XS int → activated
Q4GO int → trap_type
Q68C loc → east_target
Q5DE loc → south_target
Source — darttrap.m 
   1  inherits sndfx;
   2  
   3  member int Q5XS;
   4  
   5  member int Q4GO;
   6  
   7  member loc Q68C;
   8  
   9  member loc Q5DE;
  10  
  11  member loc user_loc;
  12  
  13  member int poisoned;
  14  
  15  trigger creation {
  16  	setObjVar(this, "isTrapped", 0x01);
  17  	user_loc = getLocation(this);
  18  	Q4GO = getObjType(this);
  19  	switch(Q4GO) {
  20  	case 0x112F
  21  		Q68C = user_loc;
  22  		setX(Q68C, getX(user_loc) + 0x01);
  23  		break;
  24  	case 0x112B
  25  		Q5DE = user_loc;
  26  		setY(Q5DE, getY(user_loc) + 0x01);
  27  		break;
  28  	}
  29  	int Q4B1 = random(0x01, 0x64);
  30  	if (0x3C < Q4B1) {
  31  		poisoned = 0x01;
  32  	}
  33  	return(0x00);
  34  }
  35  
  36  trigger message("activate") {
  37  	Q4GO = getObjType(this);
  38  	Q5XS = 0x01;
  39  	if (hasObjVar(this, "disarmed")) {
  40  		switch(Q4GO) {
  41  		case 0x1130
  42  			setType(this, 0x112F);
  43  			break;
  44  		case 0x112C
  45  			setType(this, 0x112B);
  46  			break;
  47  		default
  48  			break;
  49  		}
  50  		callback(this, 0x64, 0x2F);
  51  	} else {
  52  		switch(Q4GO) {
  53  		case 0x112F
  54  			setType(this, 0x1130);
  55  			break;
  56  		case 0x112B
  57  			setType(this, 0x112C);
  58  			break;
  59  		default
  60  			break;
  61  		}
  62  		sfx(user_loc, 0x0223, 0x00);
  63  		shortcallback(this, 0x02, 0x44);
  64  	}
  65  	return(0x00);
  66  }
  67  
  68  trigger message("deactivate") {
  69  	return(0x00);
  70  }
  71  
  72  trigger enterrange(0x01) {
  73  	Q4GO = getObjType(this);
  74  	list Q67M;
  75  	int i;
  76  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "disarmed")) {
  77  		switch(Q4GO) {
  78  		case 0x112F
  79  			getMobsAt(Q67M, Q68C);
  80  			if (numInList(Q67M) > 0x00) {
  81  				setType(this, 0x1130);
  82  				for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q67M); i++) {
  83  					loseHP(Q67M[i], dice(0x01, 0x06));
  84  					if (0x00 < poisoned) {
  85  						setObjVar(Q67M[i], "poison_strength", random(0x01, 0x02));
  86  						attachScript(Q67M[i], "poisoned");
  87  					}
  88  				}
  89  				sfx(user_loc, 0x0223, 0x00);
  90  				shortcallback(this, 0x02, 0x24);
  91  			}
  92  			break;
  93  		case 0x112B
  94  			getMobsAt(Q67M, Q5DE);
  95  			if (numInList(Q67M) > 0x00) {
  96  				setType(this, 0x112C);
  97  				for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q67M); i++) {
  98  					loseHP(Q67M[i], dice(0x01, 0x06));
  99  					if (0x00 < poisoned) {
 100  						setObjVar(Q67M[i], "poison_strength", random(0x01, 0x02));
 101  						attachScript(Q67M[i], "poisoned");
 102  					}
 103  				}
 104  				sfx(user_loc, 0x0224, 0x00);
 105  				shortcallback(this, 0x02, 0x24);
 106  			}
 107  			break;
 108  		default
 109  			break;
 110  		}
 111  	} else {
 112  		callback(this, 0x64, 0x2F);
 113  	}
 114  	return(0x01);
 115  }
 116  
 117  trigger enterrange(0x00) {
 118  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "disarmed")) {
 119  		switch(Q4GO) {
 120  		case 0x112F
 121  			setType(this, 0x1130);
 122  			sfx(user_loc, 0x0223, 0x00);
 123  			loseHP(target, dice(0x01, 0x06));
 124  			if (0x00 < poisoned) {
 125  				setObjVar(target, "poison_strength", random(0x01, 0x02));
 126  				attachScript(target, "poisoned");
 127  			}
 128  			shortcallback(this, 0x01, 0x24);
 129  			break;
 130  		case 0x112B
 131  			setType(this, 0x112C);
 132  			sfx(user_loc, 0x0224, 0x00);
 133  			loseHP(target, dice(0x01, 0x06));
 134  			if (0x00 < poisoned) {
 135  				setObjVar(target, "poison_strength", random(0x01, 0x02));
 136  				attachScript(target, "poisoned");
 137  			}
 138  			shortcallback(this, 0x01, 0x24);
 139  			break;
 140  		default
 141  			break;
 142  		}
 143  	} else {
 144  		callback(this, 0x64, 0x2F);
 145  	}
 146  	return(0x01);
 147  }
 148  
 149  trigger callback(0x24) {
 150  	Q4GO = getObjType(this);
 151  	switch(Q4GO) {
 152  	case 0x1130
 153  		setType(this, 0x112F);
 154  		break;
 155  	case 0x112C
 156  		setType(this, 0x112B);
 157  		break;
 158  	default
 159  		break;
 160  	}
 161  	setObjVar(this, "disarmed", 0x01);
 162  	callback(this, 0x05, 0x2F);
 163  	return(0x00);
 164  }
 165  
 166  trigger callback(0x2F) {
 167  	removeObjVar(this, "disarmed");
 168  	return(0x00);
 169  }
 170
#25 dec1_brazier_sum.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q492 list → summon_types
Source — dec1_brazier_sum.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member list Q492;
   4  
   5  trigger objectloaded {
   6  	Q492 = 0x020A, 0x020F, 0x0210, 0x0211, 0x0212, 0x0213, 0x0214, 0x0215, 0x0216, 0x0217, 0x0218, 0x0219, 0x021D, 0x021E, 0x0220, 0x0221, 0x022B, 0x022C, 0x022F, 0x0230, 0x0231, 0x0232, 0x0235, 0x0242, 0x0243, 0x0244;
   7  	return(0x00);
   8  }
   9  
  10  trigger creation {
  11  	Q492 = 0x020A, 0x020F, 0x0210, 0x0211, 0x0212, 0x0213, 0x0214, 0x0215, 0x0216, 0x0217, 0x0218, 0x0219, 0x021D, 0x021E, 0x0220, 0x0221, 0x022B, 0x022C, 0x022F, 0x0230, 0x0231, 0x0232, 0x0235, 0x0242, 0x0243, 0x0244;
  12  	return(0x00);
  13  }
  14  
  15  trigger use {
  16  	loc Q53E = 0x1433, 0x0267, 0x00;
  17  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "beenUsed")) {
  18  		int Q53F = Q492[random(0x00, numInList(Q492) - 0x01)];
  19  		obj Q5BQ = requestCreateNPCAt(Q53F, Q53E, 0x04);
  20  		if (Q5BQ != NULL()) {
  21  			doLocAnimation(Q53E, 0x3709, 0x02, 0x38, 0x00, 0x00);
  22  		} else {
  23  			bark(this, "The brazier fizzes and pops, but nothing seems to happen.");
  24  		}
  25  		setObjVar(this, "beenUsed", 0x00);
  26  	} else {
  27  		bark(this, "The brazier fizzes and pops, but nothing seems to happen.");
  28  	}
  29  	return(0x00);
  30  }
  31  
  32  trigger time("hour:0") {
  33  	if (hasObjVar(this, "beenUsed")) {
  34  		removeObjVar(this, "beenUsed")}
  35  	return(0x00);
  36  }
  37  
  38  trigger enterrange(0x03) {
  39  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "beenUsed")) {
  40  		bark(this, "Heed this warning well, and use this brazier at your own peril.");
  41  	}
  42  	return(0x01);
  43  }
  44
#26 dec_orbmaster.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5GL list → phrases
Source — dec_orbmaster.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member list Q5GL;
   4  
   5  trigger creation {
   6  	clearList(Q5GL);
   7  	Q5GL = "The ghostly shadows have...";
   8  	return(0x00);
   9  }
  10  
  11  trigger use {
  12  	bark(this, Q5GL[random(0x00, numInList(Q5GL) - 0x01)]);
  13  	return(0x00);
  14  }
  15  
  16  trigger speech("*") {
  17  	appendToList(Q5GL, arg);
  18  	if (numInList(Q5GL) > 0x0A) {
  19  		removeItem(Q5GL, 0x00);
  20  	}
  21  	return(0x00);
  22  }
  23  
  24  trigger message("makeMeTalk") {
  25  	bark(sender, Q5GL[random(0x00, numInList(Q5GL) - 0x01)]);
  26  	return(0x00);
  27  }
  28  
  29  trigger message("newAddition") {
  30  	string Q45J = args[0x00];
  31  	appendToList(Q5GL, Q45J);
  32  	if (numInList(Q5GL) > 0x00) {
  33  		removeItem(Q5GL, 0x00);
  34  	}
  35  	return(0x00);
  36  }
  37
#27 dec_orbslave.m 2 members

Q5GM loc → master_loc

   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member obj Q5GO;
   4  
   5  member loc Q5GM;
   6  
   7  trigger creation {
   8  	Q5GM = 0x144F, 0x0261, 0x03;
   9  	list Q5GN;
  10  	getObjectsAt(Q5GN, Q5GM);
  11  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5GN); i++) {
  12  		if (hasScript(Q5GN[i], "dec_orbmaster")) {
  13  			Q5GO = Q5GN[i];
  14  		}
  15  	}
  16  	return(0x00);
  17  }
  18  
  19  trigger use {
  20  	list Q5DQ;
  21  	message(Q5GO, "makeMeTalk", Q5DQ);
  22  	return(0x00);
  23  }
  24  
  25  trigger speech("*") {
  26  	list args = arg;
  27  	message(Q5GO, "newAddition", args);
  28  	return(0x00);
  29  }

#33 des1_ankh_user.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5MZ int → creation_hour
Q5MY int → creation_day
Source — des1_ankh_user.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member int Q5MZ;
   4  
   5  member int Q5MY;
   6  
   7  trigger creation {
   8  	Q5MZ = getHour();
   9  	Q5MY = getDay();
  10  	return(0x00);
  11  }
  12  
  13  trigger time("hour:**") {
  14  	if ((getDay() != Q5MY) && (getHour() == Q5MZ) && (hasObjVar(this, "usedDespiseLevelOneAnkh"))) {
  15  		int Q4VO = getObjVar(this, "usedDespiseLevelOneAnkh");
  16  		if (Q4VO == 0x04) {
  17  			setCurHP(this, getMaxHP(this));
  18  			setCurMana(this, getMaxMana(this));
  19  			setCurFatigue(this, getMaxFatigue(this));
  20  			barkTo(this, this, "You feel completely rejuvinated!");
  21  		}
  22  		removeObjVar(this, "usedDespiseLevelOneAnkh");
  23  		detachScript(this, "des1_ankh_user");
  24  	}
  25  	return(0x00);
  26  }
  27
#34 dragonai.m 7 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q494 int → special_attack_active
Q4DJ int → melee_mode
Q49P int → special_attack_ready
Q421 int → action_delay_min
Q420 int → action_delay_max
Q57H int → pending_damage
Q57M obj → melee_trig_target
Source — dragonai.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member obj dragon;
   4  
   5  member obj victim;
   6  
   7  member loc user_loc;
   8  
   9  member loc there;
  10  
  11  member int Q494;
  12  
  13  member int Q4DJ;
  14  
  15  member int Q49P;
  16  
  17  member int Q421;
  18  
  19  member int Q420;
  20  
  21  member int Q57H;
  22  
  23  member obj Q57M;
  24  
  25  forward void adjust_projectile_position(obj me, int Q4OS);
  26  
  27  function void schedule_dragon_action(obj me) {
  28  	int time = random(Q421, Q420);
  29  	callback(me, time, 0x65);
  30  	return();
  31  }
  32  
  33  trigger creation {
  34  	Q494 = 0x00;
  35  	Q4DJ = 0x00;
  36  	Q49P = 0x01;
  37  	Q421 = 0x07;
  38  	Q420 = 0x0E;
  39  	schedule_dragon_action(this);
  40  	return(0x01);
  41  }
  42  
  43  function int dragon_special_attack(obj me, obj target) {
  44  	animateMobile(me, 0x0C, 0x05, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
  45  	sfx(user_loc, 0x016A, 0x00);
  46  	Q494 = 0x01;
  47  	shortcallback(me, 0x04, 0x2F);
  48  	return(0x01);
  49  }
  50  
  51  function int try_special_attack(obj me, obj target) {
  52  	if ((Q494 == 0x00) && (Q49P == 0x01)) {
  53  		victim = target;
  54  		there = getLocation(victim);
  55  		user_loc = getLocation(me);
  56  		if ((!isDead(victim)) && (canSeeLoc(me, there) == 0x01)) {
  57  			disableBehaviors(me);
  58  			faceHere(me, getDirectionInternal(user_loc, there));
  59  			dragon_special_attack(me, target);
  60  			Q49P = 0x00;
  61  			int time = random(Q421, Q420);
  62  			callback(me, time, 0x64);
  63  			return(0x01);
  64  		}
  65  	}
  66  	return(0x00);
  67  }
  68  
  69  trigger callback(0x2F) {
  70  	int damage = (getCurHP(this) / 0x0A);
  71  	int Q4OS = getFacing(this);
  72  	adjust_projectile_position(this, Q4OS);
  73  	if (Q4DJ == 0x00) {
  74  		int Q4AY = random(0x01, 0x64);
  75  		if (Q4AY > 0x21) {
  76  			doMissile_Loc2Mob(user_loc, victim, 0x36D4, 0x05, 0x00, 0x01);
  77  		} else {
  78  			loc there = getLocation(victim);
  79  			int Q5CG = getZ(there) + 0x06;
  80  			setZ(there, Q5CG);
  81  			doMissile_Loc2Loc(user_loc, there, 0x36D4, 0x05, 0x00, 0x01);
  82  		}
  83  		Q57H = damage;
  84  		callback(this, 0x01, 0x19);
  85  	} else {
  86  		enableBehaviors(this);
  87  		doDamageType(this, victim, damage, 0x04);
  88  		scriptTrig(Q57M, 0x07, this);
  89  		Q494 = 0x00;
  90  		Q4DJ = 0x00;
  91  	}
  92  	sfx(user_loc, 0x015E, 0x00);
  93  	return(0x00);
  94  }
  95  
  96  trigger callback(0x19) {
  97  	enableBehaviors(this);
  98  	doDamageType(this, victim, Q57H, 0x04);
  99  	scriptTrig(victim, 0x07, this);
 100  	Q494 = 0x00;
 101  	return(0x00);
 102  }
 103  
 104  function void adjust_projectile_position(obj me, int Q4OS) {
 105  	user_loc = getLocation(me);
 106  	switch(facing_dir) {
 107  	case 0x00
 108  		setY(user_loc, getY(user_loc) - 0x03)setZ(user_loc, getZ(user_loc) + 0x0C)break;
 109  	case 0x01
 110  		setX(user_loc, getX(user_loc) + 0x02);
 111  		setY(user_loc, getY(user_loc) - 0x01);
 112  		setZ(user_loc, getZ(user_loc) + 0x14)break;
 113  	case 0x02
 114  		setX(user_loc, getX(user_loc) + 0x03);
 115  		setZ(user_loc, getZ(user_loc) + 0x17)break;
 116  	case 0x03
 117  		break;
 118  	case 0x04
 119  		setX(user_loc, getX(user_loc) - 0x01);
 120  		setY(user_loc, getY(user_loc) + 0x02);
 121  		setZ(user_loc, getZ(user_loc) + 0x08)break;
 122  	case 0x05
 123  		setX(user_loc, getX(user_loc) - 0x02);
 124  		setY(user_loc, getY(user_loc) + 0x01);
 125  		setZ(user_loc, getZ(user_loc) + 0x07)break;
 126  	case 0x06
 127  		setX(user_loc, getX(user_loc) - 0x02);
 128  		setZ(user_loc, getZ(user_loc) + 0x0A)break;
 129  	case 0x07
 130  		setZ(user_loc, getZ(user_loc) + 0x14)break;
 131  	default
 132  		break;
 133  	}
 134  	return();
 135  }
 136  
 137  trigger enterrange(0x08) {
 138  	if (containedBy(this) == NULL()) {
 139  		if (areBehaviorsEnabled(this)) {
 140  			if (isHuman(target)) {
 141  				if (!isDead(target)) {
 142  					attack(this, target);
 143  				}
 144  			}
 145  		}
 146  	}
 147  	return(0x01);
 148  }
 149  
 150  trigger callback(0x64) {
 151  	Q49P = 0x01;
 152  	return(0x01);
 153  }
 154  
 155  trigger callback(0x65) {
 156  	schedule_dragon_action(this);
 157  	if (containedBy(this) == NULL()) {
 158  		if (getNumTargets(this) > 0x00) {
 159  			obj target = getFirstVisableTargetInRange(this, 0x09);
 160  			if (target != NULL()) {
 161  				try_special_attack(this, target);
 162  			}
 163  		}
 164  	}
 165  	return(0x01);
 166  }
 167
#35 dramaticentrance.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q62D obj → activating_user
Source — dramaticentrance.m 
   1  inherits sndfx;
   2  
   3  member obj Q62D;
   4  
   5  trigger use {
   6  	doLocAnimation(getLocation(user), 0x3709, 0x0A, 0x1E, 0x00, 0x00);
   7  	sfx(getLocation(user), 0x54, 0x05);
   8  	shortcallback(this, 0x04, 0x41);
   9  	Q62D = user;
  10  	return(0x00);
  11  }
  12  
  13  trigger callback(0x41) {

#36 duperfind.m 3 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5AC int → gold_total
Q5AM int → reagent_total
Q5AE int → item_total
Source — duperfind.m 
   1  inherits sk_table;
   2  
   3  member int Q5AC;
   4  
   5  member int Q5AM;
   6  
   7  member int Q5AE;
   8  
   9  forward int Q4CB(obj it, list Q514);
  10  
  11  function int is_gold_coin_type(obj Q68D) {
  12  	int item_type_id = getObjType(item_obj);
  13  	if (item_type_id == 0x0EED) {
  14  		return(0x01);
  15  	}
  16  	return(0x00);
  17  }
  18  
  19  function int is_item_type_in_range_0f78_0f91(obj Q68D) {
  20  	int item_type_id = getObjType(item_obj);
  21  	if ((item_type_id >= 0x0F78) && (item_type_id <= 0x0F91)) {
  22  		return(0x01);
  23  	}
  24  	return(0x00);
  25  }
  26  
  27  function int is_item_type_in_range_1be3_1bfa(obj Q68D) {
  28  	int item_type_id = getObjType(item_obj);
  29  	if ((item_type_id >= 0x1BE3) && (item_type_id <= 0x1BFA)) {
  30  		return(0x01);
  31  	}
  32  	return(0x00);
  33  }
  34  
  35  function int Q4CA(obj Q68D) {
  36  	if (is_item_type_in_range_0f78_0f91(Q68D)) {
  37  		Q5AM = Q5AM + getQuantity(Q68D);
  38  		if (Q5AM > 0x00013880) {
  39  			return(0x01);
  40  		}
  41  	}
  42  	if (is_gold_coin_type(Q68D)) {
  43  		Q5AC = Q5AC + getQuantity(Q68D);
  44  		if (Q5AC > 0x00061A80) {
  45  			return(0x01);
  46  		}
  47  	}
  48  	if (is_item_type_in_range_1be3_1bfa(Q68D)) {
  49  		Q5AE = Q5AE + getQuantity(Q68D);
  50  		if (Q5AE > 0x2710) {
  51  			return(0x01);
  52  		}
  53  	}
  54  	if (isContainer(Q68D)) {
  55  		list Q4E4;
  56  		getContents(Q4E4, Q68D);
  57  		if (Q4CB(Q68D, Q4E4)) {
  58  			return(0x01);
  59  		}
  60  	}
  61  	return(0x00);
  62  }
  63  
  64  function int Q4CB(obj it, list Q514) {
  65  	obj Q68D;
  66  	int num = numInList(Q514);
  67  	for (int i = 0x00; i < num; i++) {
  68  		Q68D = Q514[i];
  69  		if (Q4CA(Q68D)) {
  70  			return(0x01);
  71  		}
  72  	}
  73  	return(0x00);
  74  }
  75  
  76  function int Q4BM(obj it) {
  77  	if (isMobile(it)) {
  78  		list Q4O4;
  79  		getEquipment(Q4O4, it);
  80  		obj bank = getItemAtSlot(it, 0x1D);
  81  		if (bank != NULL()) {
  82  			appendToList(Q4O4, bank);
  83  		}
  84  		if (Q4CB(it, Q4O4)) {
  85  			return(0x01);
  86  		}
  87  	}
  88  	if (isContainer(it)) {
  89  		list Q4E4;
  90  		getContents(Q4E4, it);
  91  		if (Q4CB(it, Q4E4)) {
  92  			return(0x01);
  93  		}
  94  	}
  95  	if (!isMobile(it)) {
  96  		if (Q4CA(it)) {
  97  			return(0x01);
  98  		}
  99  	}
 100  	return(0x00);
 101  }
 102  
 103  function int is_character_stats_invalid(obj Q68S) {
 104  	int s = getRealStrength(target_player);
 105  	int d = getRealDexterity(target_player);
 106  	int i = getRealIntelligence(target_player);
 107  	int base_stats_total = abs(s) + abs(d) + abs(i);
 108  	int strength_mod_abs = abs(getStatMod(target_player, 0x00));
 109  	int dexterity_mod_abs = abs(getStatMod(target_player, 0x01));
 110  	int intelligence_mod_abs = abs(getStatMod(target_player, 0x02));
 111  	int stat_mods_total = strength_mod_abs + dexterity_mod_abs + intelligence_mod_abs;
 112  	if ((s < 0x00) || (d < 0x00) || (i < 0x00) || (s > 0x69) || (d > 0x69) || (i > 0x69) || (base_stats_total > 0xEB)) {
 113  		return(0x01);
 114  	}
 115  	if ((strength_mod_abs > 0x0F) || (dexterity_mod_abs > 0x0F) || (intelligence_mod_abs > 0x0F) || (stat_mods_total > 0x28)) {
 116  		return(0x01);
 117  	}
 118  	int cumulative_raw_skills = 0x00;
 119  	int cumulative_skill_mods = 0x00;
 120  	for (int skill_index = 0x00; skill_index < 0x2E; skill_index++) {
 121  		int raw_skill_value = getSkillLevelNoStatNoMod(target_player, skill_index);
 122  		int raw_skill_value_abs = abs(raw_skill_value);
 123  		int skill_modifier_value = getSkillMod(target_player, skill_index);
 124  		int skill_modifier_value_abs = abs(skill_modifier_value);
 125  		if ((raw_skill_value < 0x00) || (raw_skill_value > 0x041A) || (skill_modifier_value_abs > 0x012C)) {
 126  			return(0x01);
 127  		}
 128  		cumulative_raw_skills = cumulative_raw_skills + raw_skill_value_abs;
 129  		cumulative_skill_mods = cumulative_skill_mods + skill_modifier_value_abs;
 130  	}
 131  	if ((cumulative_raw_skills > 0x1BBC) || (cumulative_skill_mods > 0x01F4)) {
 132  		return(0x01);
 133  	}
 134  	return(0x00);
 135  }
 136  
 137  trigger creation {
 138  	if ((!isEditing(this)) && (!hasObjVar(this, "checked"))) {
 139  		string Q56O;
 140  		int Q4QI;
 141  		if (Q4BM(this)) {
 142  			Q4QI = 0x01;
 143  			Q56O = "autocheck: possible duper";
 144  		}
 145  		if (Q4QI) {
 146  			if (getGMCallStatus()) {
 147  				addHelpRequestToQueue(this, 0x01, 0x00, Q56O);
 148  			} else {
 149  				int Q450 = getAccountNum(this);
 150  				int Q4B9 = getCharacterNum(this);
 151  				string name = getName(this);
 152  				logEntry(Q450, Q4B9, this, name, "cheating", "cheater", Q56O);
 153  			}
 154  		}
 155  	}
 156  	detachScript(this, "duperfind");
 157  	return(0x01);
 158  }

#37 dye.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q66O obj → dye_tub
Source — dye.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member obj Q66O;
   4  
   5  function int is_dye_item(obj it) {
   6  	int item_type_id = getObjType(it);
   7  	if (item_type_id == 0x0FAB) {
   8  		return(0x01);
   9  	}
  10  	return(0x00);
  11  }
  12  
  13  trigger creation {
  14  	setObjVar(this, "usesLeft", 0x19);
  15  	return(0x01);
  16  }
  17  
  18  trigger use {
  19  	Q66O = NULL();
  20  	systemMessage(user, "Select the dye tub to use the dyes on.");
  21  	targetObj(user, this);
  22  	return(0x00);
  23  }
  24  
  25  trigger targetobj {
  26  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
  27  		return(0x00);
  28  	}
  29  	if (is_dye_item(usedon)) {
  30  		Q66O = usedon;
  31  		selectHue(user, this, 0x00, 0x0FAB);
  32  	} else {
  33  		Q66O = NULL();
  34  		systemMessage(user, "Use that on a dye tub.");
  35  	}
  36  	return(0x00);
  37  }
  38  
  39  trigger hueselected(0x00) {
  40  	if (!is_dye_item(Q66O)) {
  41  		Q66O = NULL();
  42  		return(0x00);
  43  	}
  44  	if (objhue < 0x02) {
  45  		objhue = 0x02;
  46  	}
  47  	if (objhue > 0x03E9) {
  48  		objhue = 0x03E9;
  49  	}
  50  	setHue(Q66O, objhue);
  51  	Q66O = NULL();
  52  	int usesLeft = getObjVar(this, "usesLeft");
  53  	if (usesLeft == 0x01) {
  54  		systemMessage(user, "You used up the dye.");
  55  		deleteObject(this);
  56  	} else {
  57  		setObjVar(this, "usesLeft", usesLeft - 0x01);
  58  	}
  59  	return(0x00);
  60  }

#38 earthqukbase.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q488 list → targets
Source — earthqukbase.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int count;
   4  
   5  member list Q488;
   6  
   7  function void earthquake_base_handler(obj Q486) {
   8  	return();
   9  }
  10  
  11  function int is_valid_quake_target(obj caster, obj victim) {
  12  	if (!is_valid_harm_target(caster, victim)) {
  13  		return(0x00);
  14  	}
  15  	if (isGuard(victim)) {
  16  		return(0x00);
  17  	}
  18  	return(0x01);
  19  }
  20  
  21  function int cast_earthquake(obj user) {
  22  	int success = 0x00;
  23  	loc user_loc = getLocation(user);
  24  	count = 0x00;
  25  	sfx(user_loc, 0x020D, 0x00);
  26  	clearList(Q488);
  27  	list mobs_nearby;
  28  	getMobsInRange(mobs_nearby, user_loc, 0x0A);
  29  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(mobs_nearby); i++) {
  30  		obj victim = mobs_nearby[i];
  31  		if (is_valid_spell_target(victim)) {
  32  			if (is_valid_quake_target(user, victim)) {
  33  				appendToList(Q488, victim);
  34  			}
  35  		}
  36  	}
  37  	obj victim;
  38  	int damage;
  39  	int dmg_result;
  40  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q488); i++) {
  41  		success = 0x01;
  42  		victim = Q488[i];
  43  		damage = getCurHP(victim) - (getMaxHP(victim) / 0x02);
  44  		if (isNPC(victim)) {
  45  			damage = damage / 0x04;
  46  		}
  47  		disableBehaviors(victim);
  48  		earthquake_base_handler(victim);
  49  		handle_pvp_crime_report(user, victim, 0x01, 0x00);
  50  		if (damage > 0x00) {
  51  			dmg_result = apply_spell_damage_typed(this, damage, user, victim, 0x08, 0x00);
  52  			success = 0x01;
  53  		}
  54  	}
  55  	shortcallback(this, 0x02, 0x36);
  56  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  57  	return(0x01);
  58  }
  59  
  60  trigger callback(0x36) {
  61  	obj Q692;
  62  	if (count < 0x03) {
  63  		for (int Q61N = 0x00; Q61N < numInList(Q488); Q61N++) {
  64  			Q692 = Q488[Q61N];
  65  			if (isValid(Q692)) {
  66  				earthquake_base_handler(Q692);
  67  			}
  68  		}
  69  		shortcallback(this, 0x02, 0x36);
  70  		count++;
  71  		return(0x00);
  72  	} else {
  73  		for (Q61N = 0x00; Q61N < numInList(Q488); Q61N++) {
  74  			Q692 = Q488[Q61N];
  75  			if (isValid(Q692)) {
  76  				enableBehaviors(Q692);
  77  			}
  78  		}
  79  	}
  80  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  81  	return(0x00);
  82  }

#39 ef_trig.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4W8 int → caster_hit
Source — ef_trig.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q4W8;
   4  
   5  trigger message("hitsomething") {
   6  	obj caster = get_spell_caster(this);
   7  	obj Q4U2 = args[0x00];
   8  	if (caster == Q4U2) {
   9  		Q4W8 = 0x01;
  10  	}
  11  	return(0x01);
  12  }
  13  
  14  function void apply_field_hit(obj Q4P2, obj target, int Q4GH) {
  15  	if (is_target_within_vertical_range(field, target)) {
  16  		sfx(getLocation(target), 0x0211, 0x00);
  17  		obj caster = get_spell_caster(field);
  18  		if ((Q4W8) || (target == caster)) {
  19  			caster = NULL();
  20  		} else {
  21  			list msg_args;
  22  			appendToList(msg_args, caster);
  23  			messageToRange(getLocation(this), 0x04, "hitsomething", msg_args);
  24  		}
  25  		scatter_npc(target);
  26  		int damage = apply_spell_damage_by_circle(NULL(), circle, this, target, 0x02, 0x00);
  27  	}
  28  	return();
  29  }
  30  
  31  trigger enterrange(0x00) {
  32  	apply_field_hit(this, target, 0x07);
  33  	callback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
  34  	return(0x01);
  35  }
  36  
  37  trigger callback(0x2F) {
  38  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
  39  	list Q5HR;
  40  	getMobsInRange(Q5HR, Q4VS, 0x01);
  41  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5HR); i++) {
  42  		obj target = Q5HR[i];
  43  		apply_field_hit(this, target, 0x03);
  44  	}
  45  	if (numInList(Q5HR) > 0x00) {
  46  		callback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
  47  	} else {
  48  		setObjVar(this, "defensive", 0x01);
  49  	}
  50  	return(0x01);
  51  }

#40 escort.m 5 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q65M int → escort_type
Q4O8 string → dest_code
Q48N list → dialogue_lines
Q4O7 string → dest_name
Q4DE int → poll_count
Source — escort.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member int Q65M;
   4  
   5  member string Q4O8;
   6  
   7  member list Q48N;
   8  
   9  member string Q4O7;
  10  
  11  member int Q4DE;
  12  
  13  forward string get_destination_display_name(string );
  14  
  15  function void select_escort_dialogue(int Q65M) {
  16  	switch(escort_type) {
  17  	default
  18  	case 0x00
  19  		Q48N = "  Greetings!", "  I am a poor healer who", "seeks a worthy escort. I", "can offer some small pay", "to any doughty warrior", "able to assist me. It is", "imperative that I reach my", "destination, or innocents", "may perish!";
  20  		break;
  21  	case 0x01
  22  		Q48N = "  'Tis a terrible thing", "to be a parent with an", "ungrateful child! Yet such", "is my situation.", "  Because of the poor", "behavior and lack of", "character of this offspring", "of mine, I am obliged to", "foster them away from", "home.", "  So now I am in need of", "an able escort of good", "character who might serve", "as role model, and who can", "ensure that my child", "reaches their destination", "safely.", "  I shall let my child", "post their whereabouts so", "that thou mayst meet with", "them and arrange terms.           ---";
  23  		break;
  24  	case 0x02
  25  		Q48N = "  I am so happy! I am to", "be married, and my life", "will finally be complete!", "  Alas, I am no warrior,", "and the wedding is not to", "take place here. I am in", "need of an escort, for the", "roads are treacherous and", "my future spouse would be", "sad indeed to hear that", "an ettin ate me before the", "wedding.";
  26  		break;
  27  	case 0x03
  28  		Q48N = "  Wizard seeks escort to a", "conference.";
  29  		break;
  30  	case 0x04
  31  		Q48N = "  Reputable merchant seeks", "able warriors to serve as", "mercantile escort. Pay is", "scale; we prefer to hire", "experienced mercenaries.";
  32  		break;
  33  	case 0x05
  34  		Q48N = "  I am one of Lord British's", "couriers, and I seek an able", "warrior to escort me safely,", "as the message I carry is of", "utmost importance to the", "realm!";
  35  		break;
  36  	case 0x06
  37  		Q48N = "  'Tis a bit of a problem to", "admit it, but our normally", "trustworthy household guard", "seem to have broken his leg!", "  If thou art able with a", "weapon, we are pleased to take", "applications for his", "replacement, to serve as", "guard and escort on our", "forthcoming journey.";
  38  		break;
  39  	case 0x07
  40  		Q48N = "  I've always wished for", "adventure! Now I can have it", "at last!", "  My weaponsmaster in school", "always said I was a dab hand", "with a blade, and I am afire", "with the love of adventure!", "  Plus I have money.", "  So if you are willing to", "hire on as my bodyguard and", "join me as we seek the deepest", "depths of the Abyss, and", "as we conquer dragons with", "the rapid flick of our sharp", "swords, disregarding all", "danger and ignorant of fear,", "seek me out!", "  Cowards need not apply!";
  41  		break;
  42  	}
  43  	return();
  44  }
  45  
  46  function void post_bulletin_board_notice(obj this) {
  47  	list scratch;
  48  	obj board = findClosestBBoard(getLocation(this));
  49  	obj post = createNoResObjectIn(0x0EB0, board);
  50  	loc unused_loc;
  51  	string unused_str;
  52  	string title;
  53  	list title_options = "Escort needed", "Guard needed", "I need an escort!", "Traveling companion?", "Seeking companion", "Now hiring", "Hiring a guard", "Hiring an escort", "Seeking escort";
  54  	title = title_options[random(0x00, numInList(title_options) - 0x01)];
  55  	list postText = title;
  56  	select_escort_dialogue(Q65M);
  57  	list location_lines = "  I can be found", getDistance(getLocation(board), getLocation(this)), getDirection(getLocation(board), getLocation(this)) + "", "of here. When thou dost find", "me, look at me close to accept", "the task of taking me to", get_destination_display_name(Q4O8) + ".", "    " + getName(this);
  58  	string blah;
  59  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q48N); i++) {
  60  		blah = Q48N[i];
  61  		appendToList(postText, blah);
  62  	}
  63  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(location_lines); i++) {
  64  		blah = location_lines[i];
  65  		appendToList(postText, blah);
  66  	}
  67  	setObjVar(post, "postText", postText);
  68  	setObjVar(this, "myBoardPost", post);
  69  	return();
  70  }
  71  
  72  function string get_destination_display_name(string Q5NW) {
  73  	if (location_code == "city_yew") {
  74  		return("the city of Yew");
  75  	}
  76  	if (location_code == "city_minoc") {
  77  		return("the city of Minoc");
  78  	}
  79  	if (location_code == "city_vesper") {
  80  		return("the city of Vesper");
  81  	}
  82  	if (location_code == "city_cove") {
  83  		return("the village of Cove");
  84  	}
  85  	if (location_code == "city_britain") {
  86  		return("the city of Britain");
  87  	}
  88  	if (location_code == "city_moonglow") {
  89  		return("the city of Moonglow");
  90  	}
  91  	if (location_code == "city_magincia") {
  92  		return("the city of Magincia");
  93  	}
  94  	if (location_code == "city_ocllo") {
  95  		return("the island of Ocllo");
  96  	}
  97  	if (location_code == "city_skara") {
  98  		return("Skara Brae");
  99  	}
 100  	if (location_code == "city_trinsic") {
 101  		return("Trinsic");
 102  	}
 103  	if (location_code == "city_nujelm") {
 104  		return("Nujel'm");
 105  	}
 106  	if (location_code == "city_serphold") {
 107  		return("Serpent's Hold");
 108  	}
 109  	if (location_code == "city_jhelom") {
 110  		return("the city of Jhelom");
 111  	}
 112  	if (location_code == "city_bucden") {
 113  		return("Buccaneer's Den");
 114  	}
 115  	if (location_code == "dungn") {
 116  		return("a dungeon");
 117  	}
 118  	return("somewhere");
 119  }
 120  
 121  function string Q5I5(obj this) {
 122  	list Q5JT = "city_bucden", "city_jhelom", "city_serphold", "city_nujelm", "city_trinsic", "city_skara", "city_ocllo", "city_magincia", "city_moonglow", "city_britain", "city_cove", "city_vesper", "city_minoc", "city_yew";
 123  	string dest = Q5JT[random(0x00, numInList(Q5JT) - 0x01)];
 124  	if (isInArea(dest, getLocation(this), 0x00)) {
 125  		dest = Q5I5(this);
 126  	}
 127  	return(dest);
 128  }
 129  
 130  function string Q5I6(obj this) {
 131  	list Q5JT = "dungn";
 132  	string dest = Q5JT[random(0x00, numInList(Q5JT) - 0x01)];
 133  	if (isInArea(dest, getLocation(this), 0x00)) {
 134  		dest = Q5I5(this);
 135  	}
 136  	return(dest);
 137  }
 138  
 139  trigger creation {
 140  	disableBehaviors(this);
 141  	setObjVar(this, "isWaitingForEscort", 0x01);
 142  	if (hasObjVar(this, "questEscortType")) {
 143  		Q65M = getObjVar(this, "questEscortType");
 144  	} else {
 145  		Q65M = random(0x00, 0x07);
 146  		setObjVar(this, "questEscortType", Q65M);
 147  	}
 148  	Q4O7 = get_destination_display_name(Q4O8);
 149  	switch(Q65M) {
 150  	default
 151  	case 0x00
 152  	case 0x01
 153  	case 0x02
 154  	case 0x03
 155  	case 0x04
 156  	case 0x05
 157  	case 0x06
 158  		Q4O8 = Q5I5(this);
 159  		break;
 160  	case 0x07
 161  		Q4O8 = Q5I6(this);
 162  		break;
 163  	}
 164  	post_bulletin_board_notice(this);
 165  	return(0x01);
 166  }
 167  
 168  trigger 0x64 enterrange(0x01) {
 169  	if (hasObjVar(this, "isWaitingForEscort")) {
 170  		bark(this, "I am waiting for my escort to " + get_destination_display_name(Q4O8) + ". If thou art interested, check the local bulletin board for details, or just say 'I will take thee.'");
 171  	}
 172  	return(0x01)}
 173  
 174  trigger speech("*") {
 175  	if (hasObjVar(this, "myEscort")) {
 176  		obj Q4O5 = getObjVar(this, "myEscort");
 177  		if (speaker == Q4O5) {
 178  			followNpc(this, speaker, 0x00);
 179  			string Q58D = "Lead on! Payment will be made when we arrive in " + get_destination_display_name(Q4O8) + ".";
 180  			bark(this, Q58D);
 181  		}
 182  	}
 183  	return(0x01);
 184  }
 185  
 186  trigger speech("I will take thee") {
 187  	if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(speaker), getLocation(this)) > 0x03) {
 188  		return(0x01);
 189  	}
 190  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "isWaitingForEscort")) {
 191  		if (hasObjVar(this, "myEscort")) {
 192  			bark(this, "I am already being led!");
 193  		} else {
 194  			bark(this, "I am sorry, but I do not wish to go anywhere.");
 195  			callback(this, 0x64, 0x7A);
 196  		}
 197  		return(0x01);
 198  	}
 199  	if (isDead(speaker)) {
 200  		return(0x01);
 201  	}
 202  	if (hasObjVar(this, "myBoardPost")) {
 203  		obj Q58F = getObjVar(this, "myBoardPost");
 204  		deleteObject(Q58F);
 205  	}
 206  	string Q58D = "Lead on! Payment will be made when we arrive in " + get_destination_display_name(Q4O8) + ".";
 207  	bark(this, Q58D);
 208  	removeObjVar(this, "isWaitingForEscort");
 209  	followNpc(this, speaker, 0x00);
 210  	setObjVar(this, "myEscort", speaker);
 211  	callback(this, 0x05, 0x01);
 212  	return(0x00);
 213  }
 214  
 215  trigger callback(0x01) {
 216  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "myEscort")) {
 217  		enableBehaviors(this);
 218  		callback(this, 0x64, 0x7A);
 219  		return(0x01);
 220  	}
 221  	obj escort = getObjVar(this, "myEscort");
 222  	if (!isInArea(Q4O8, getLocation(this), 0x00)) {
 223  		Q4DE = Q4DE + 0x01;
 224  		if (Q4DE > 0x06) {
 225  			Q4DE = 0x00;
 226  			if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(this), getLocation(escort)) > 0x1E) {
 227  				bark(this, "My escort seems to have abandoned me!");
 228  				enableBehaviors(this);
 229  				callback(this, 0x64, 0x7A);
 230  				return(0x01);
 231  			}
 232  		}
 233  		callback(this, 0x05, 0x01);
 234  		return(0x01);
 235  	}
 236  	stopFollowing(this);
 237  	removeObjVar(this, "myEscort");
 238  	string Q58D = "We have arrived! I thank thee, " + getName(escort) + "! I have no further need of thy services. Here is thy pay.";
 239  	bark(this, Q58D);
 240  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
 241  		if (getNotoriety(escort) < 0x7F) {
 242  			addNotoriety(escort, 0x01);
 243  		}
 244  	} else {
 245  		changeFame(escort, 0x03E8);
 246  	}
 247  	obj reward = requestCreateObjectAt(0x0EED, getLocation(escort));
 248  	int success;
 249  	if (reward != NULL()) {
 250  		success = requestAddQuantity(reward, random(0x64, 0x01F4));
 251  	}
 252  	if (!success) {
 253  		bark(this, "I fear that I lied about a reward, however. I lack any funds.");
 254  		deleteObject(reward);
 255  		enableBehaviors(this);
 256  		callback(this, 0x64, 0x7A);
 257  		return(0x01);
 258  	}
 259  	obj Q491 = getBackpack(escort);
 260  	success = putObjContainer(reward, Q491);
 261  	enableBehaviors(this);
 262  	callback(this, 0xC8, 0x7A);
 263  	return(0x01);
 264  }
 265  
 266  trigger callback(0x7A) {
 267  	deleteObject(this);
 268  	return(0x01);
 269  }

#41 explosonbase.m 3 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5NQ int → reflected
Q57L obj → caster
Q57M obj → target
Source — explosonbase.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q5NQ;
   4  
   5  member obj Q57L;
   6  
   7  member obj Q57M;
   8  
   9  function int apply_explosion(obj user, obj usedon, int Q5NM) {
  10  	int success = 0x00;
  11  	if (is_valid_spell_target(usedon)) {
  12  		success = 0x01;
  13  		int damage;
  14  		loc caster_loc = getLocation(user);
  15  		loc there = getLocation(usedon);
  16  		faceHere(user, getDirectionInternal(caster_loc, there));
  17  		doMobAnimation(usedon, 0x36BD, 0x14, 0x0A, 0x00, 0x00);
  18  		sfx(there, 0x0207, 0x00);
  19  		Q57M = usedon;
  20  		Q57L = user;
  21  		callback(this, 0x03, 0x19);
  22  		Q5NQ = reflected;
  23  		handle_pvp_crime_report(user, usedon, 0x02, reflected);
  24  	}
  25  	trigger_mana_drain_if_enabled(this, success);
  26  	return(success);
  27  }
  28  
  29  trigger callback(0x19) {
  30  	int Q527 = apply_spell_damage(this, Q57L, Q57M, 0x04, Q5NQ);
  31  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  32  	return(0x00);
  33  }

#42 ff_trig.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4W8 int → caster_hit
Source — ff_trig.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q4W8;
   4  
   5  trigger message("hitsomething") {
   6  	obj caster = get_spell_caster(this);
   7  	obj Q4U2 = args[0x00];
   8  	if (caster == Q4U2) {
   9  		Q4W8 = 0x01;
  10  	}
  11  	return(0x01);
  12  }
  13  
  14  trigger creation {
  15  	shortCallback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
  16  	return(0x01);
  17  }
  18  
  19  function void apply_fire_field_hit(obj Q4P2, obj target, int Q463) {
  20  	if (is_target_within_vertical_range(field, target)) {
  21  		sfx(getLocation(target), 0x0208, 0x00);
  22  		obj caster = get_spell_caster(field);
  23  		if ((Q4W8) || (target == caster)) {
  24  			caster = NULL();
  25  		} else {
  26  			list msg_args;
  27  			appendToList(msg_args, caster);
  28  			messageToRange(getLocation(this), 0x04, "hitsomething", msg_args);
  29  		}
  30  		scatter_npc(target);
  31  		int damage = apply_spell_damage_by_circle(NULL(), circle, this, target, 0x04, 0x00);
  32  	}
  33  	return();
  34  }
  35  
  36  trigger enterrange(0x00) {
  37  	apply_fire_field_hit(this, target, 0x04);
  38  	callback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
  39  	return(0x01);
  40  }
  41  
  42  trigger callback(0x2F) {
  43  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
  44  	list Q5HR;
  45  	getMobsInRange(Q5HR, Q4VS, 0x00);
  46  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5HR); i++) {
  47  		obj target = Q5HR[i];
  48  		apply_fire_field_hit(this, target, 0x02);
  49  	}
  50  	if (numInList(Q5HR) > 0x00) {
  51  		callback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
  52  	} else {
  53  		setObjVar(this, "defensive", 0x01);
  54  	}
  55  	return(0x01);
  56  }
  57
#43 find.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4QN list → scan_results
Q5E0 int → match_count
Source — find.m 
   1  member list Q4QN;
   2  
   3  member int Q5E0;
   4  
   5  function int filter_objects(list Q57R) {
   6  	int match_count = numInList(objects_to_filter);
   7  	if (hasObjVar(this, "findScript")) {
   8  		int previous_list_count = match_count;
   9  		match_count = 0x00;
  10  		string find_script_name = getObjVar(this, "findScript");
  11  		for (int i = 0x00; i < previous_list_count; i++) {
  12  			obj candidate = objects_to_filter[0x00];
  13  			removeItem(objects_to_filter, 0x00);
  14  			if (hasScript(candidate, find_script_name)) {
  15  				match_count++;
  16  				append(objects_to_filter, candidate);
  17  			}
  18  		}
  19  	}
  20  	if (hasObjVar(this, "findTemplate")) {
  21  		previous_list_count = match_count;
  22  		match_count = 0x00;
  23  		int find_template_id = getObjVar(this, "findTemplate");
  24  		for (i = 0x00; i < previous_list_count; i++) {
  25  			candidate = objects_to_filter[0x00];
  26  			removeItem(objects_to_filter, 0x00);
  27  			if (getTemplate(candidate) == find_template_id) {
  28  				match_count++;
  29  				append(objects_to_filter, candidate);
  30  			}
  31  		}
  32  	}
  33  	if (hasObjVar(this, "findObjVarInt")) {
  34  		previous_list_count = match_count;
  35  		match_count = 0x00;
  36  		string find_objvar_name = getObjVar(this, "findObjVarInt");
  37  		int objvar_min_value = getObjVar(this, "minValue");
  38  		int objvar_max_value = getObjVar(this, "maxValue");
  39  		for (i = 0x00; i < previous_list_count; i++) {
  40  			candidate = objects_to_filter[0x00];
  41  			removeItem(objects_to_filter, 0x00);
  42  			if (hasObjVar(candidate, find_objvar_name)) {
  43  				int val = getObjVar(candidate, find_objvar_name);
  44  				if ((val >= objvar_min_value) && (val <= objvar_max_value)) {
  45  					match_count++;
  46  					append(objects_to_filter, candidate);
  47  				}
  48  			}
  49  		}
  50  	}
  51  	if (hasObjVar(this, "findObjVarObj")) {
  52  		previous_list_count = match_count;
  53  		match_count = 0x00;
  54  		find_objvar_name = getObjVar(this, "findObjVarObj");
  55  		obj expected_objvar_value = getObjVar(this, "objValue");
  56  		for (i = 0x00; i < previous_list_count; i++) {
  57  			candidate = objects_to_filter[0x00];
  58  			removeItem(objects_to_filter, 0x00);
  59  			if (hasObjVar(candidate, find_objvar_name)) {
  60  				if (expected_objvar_value == getObjVar(candidate, find_objvar_name)) {
  61  					match_count++;
  62  					append(objects_to_filter, candidate);
  63  				}
  64  			}
  65  		}
  66  	}
  67  	if (hasObjVar(this, "findFame")) {
  68  		previous_list_count = match_count;
  69  		match_count = 0x00;
  70  		int fame_threshold = getObjVar(this, "findFame");
  71  		for (i = 0x00; i < previous_list_count; i++) {
  72  			candidate = objects_to_filter[0x00];
  73  			removeItem(objects_to_filter, 0x00);
  74  			if (getFame(candidate) >= fame_threshold) {
  75  				match_count++;
  76  				append(objects_to_filter, candidate);
  77  			}
  78  		}
  79  	}
  80  	return(match_count);
  81  }
  82  
  83  function void scan() {
  84  	clearList(Q4QN);
  85  	if (hasObjVar(this, "findMobiles")) {
  86  		getMobsInRange(Q4QN, getLocation(this), 0x1388);
  87  	} else {
  88  		if (hasObjVar(this, "findPlayers")) {
  89  			getPlayersInRange(Q4QN, getLocation(this), 0x1388);
  90  		}
  91  	}
  92  	Q5E0 = filter_objects(Q4QN);
  93  	return();
  94  }
  95  
  96  trigger use {
  97  	if (!isEditing(user)) {
  98  		systemMessage(user, "This is a GM only tool.");
  99  		return(0x01);
 100  	}
 101  	systemMessage(user, "Enter a search command:");
 102  	textEntry(this, user, 0x029A, 0x00, "Enter a search command:");
 103  	return(0x01);
 104  }
 105  
 106  trigger textentry(0x029A) {
 107  	if (!isEditing(sender)) {
 108  		systemMessage(sender, "This is a GM only tool.");
 109  		return(0x00);
 110  	}
 111  	if (text == "scan") {
 112  		scan();
 113  		systemMessage(sender, "" + Q5E0 + " matching mobiles were found.");
 114  		return(0x00);
 115  	}
 116  	int Q5FR = text;
 117  	if ((Q5FR < 0x00) || (Q5FR >= Q5E0)) {
 118  		systemMessage(sender, "Invalid mobile");
 119  		return(0x00);
 120  	}
 121  	int Q4Q1 = teleport(sender, getLocation(Q4QN[Q5FR]));
 122  	return(0x00);
 123  }
 124

   1  member list Q4QN;

   3  member int Q5E0;
   4  
   5  function int filter_objects_by_criteria(list Q57R) {
   6  	int match_count = numInList(objects_to_filter_list);
   7  	if (hasObjVar(this, "findScript")) {
   8  		int previous_list_count = match_count;
   9  		match_count = 0x00;
  10  		string find_script_name = getObjVar(this, "findScript");
  11  		for (int i = 0x00; i < previous_list_count; i++) {
  12  			obj candidate = objects_to_filter_list[0x00];
  13  			removeItem(objects_to_filter_list, 0x00);
  14  			if (hasScript(candidate, find_script_name)) {
  15  				match_count++;
  16  				append(objects_to_filter_list, candidate);
  17  			}
  18  		}
  19  	}
  20  	if (hasObjVar(this, "findTemplate")) {
  21  		previous_list_count = match_count;
  22  		match_count = 0x00;
  23  		int find_template_id = getObjVar(this, "findTemplate");
  24  		for (i = 0x00; i < previous_list_count; i++) {
  25  			candidate = objects_to_filter_list[0x00];
  26  			removeItem(objects_to_filter_list, 0x00);

  28  				match_count++;
  29  				append(objects_to_filter_list, candidate);
  30  			}
  31  		}
  32  	}
  33  	return(match_count);
  34  }
  35  
  36  function void scan() {
  37  	clearList(Q4QN);
  38  	if (hasObjVar(this, "findMobiles")) {
  39  		getMobsInRange(Q4QN, getLocation(this), 0x01F4);
  40  	} else {
  41  		if (hasObjVar(this, "findPlayers")) {
  42  			getPlayersInRange(Q4QN, getLocation(this), 0x01F4);
  43  		}
  44  	}
  45  	Q5E0 = filter_objects_by_criteria(Q4QN);
  46  	return();
  47  }
  48  
  49  trigger use {
  50  	if (!isEditing(user)) {
  51  		systemMessage(user, "This is a GM only tool.");
  52  		return(0x01);
  53  	}
  54  	systemMessage(user, "Enter a search command:");
  55  	textEntry(this, user, 0x029A, 0x00, "Enter a search command:");
  56  	return(0x01);
  57  }
  58  
  59  trigger textentry(0x029A) {
  60  	if (!isEditing(sender)) {
  61  		systemMessage(sender, "This is a GM only tool.");
  62  		return(0x00);
  63  	}
  64  	if (text == "scan") {
  65  		scan();
  66  		systemMessage(sender, "" + Q5E0 + " matching mobiles were found.");
  67  		return(0x00);
  68  	}
  69  	int Q5FR = text;
  70  	if ((Q5FR < 0x00) || (Q5FR >= Q5E0)) {
  71  		systemMessage(sender, "Invalid mobile");
  72  		return(0x00);
  73  	}
  74  	int Q4Q1 = teleport(sender, getLocation(Q4QN[Q5FR]));
  75  	return(0x00);
  76  }
