#46 fishing.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q686 list → water_tile_types
Source — fishing.m 
   1  inherits sndfx;
   2  
   3  member list Q686;
   4  
   5  trigger use {
   6  	if (isDead(user)) {
   7  		return(0x00);
   8  	}
   9  	if (getItemAtSlot(user, 0x19) != NULL()) {
  10  		bark(this, "You can't fish while riding!");
  11  		return(0x00);
  12  	}
  13  	if (hasScript(user, "userisfishing")) {
  14  		systemMessage(user, "You are already fishing.");
  15  		return(0x00);
  16  	}
  17  	Q686 = 0x1796, 0x1797, 0x1798, 0x1799, 0x179A, 0x179B, 0x179C, 0x179D, 0x179E, 0x179F, 0x17A0, 0x17A1, 0x17A2, 0x17A3, 0x17A4, 0x17A5, 0x17A6, 0x17A7, 0x17A8, 0x17A9, 0x17AA, 0x17AB, 0x17AC, 0x17AD, 0x346E, 0x346F, 0x3470, 0x3471, 0x3472, 0x3473, 0x3474, 0x3475, 0x3476, 0x3477, 0x3478, 0x3479, 0x347A, 0x347B, 0x347C, 0x347D, 0x347E, 0x347F, 0x3480, 0x3481, 0x3482, 0x3483, 0x3484, 0x3485, 0x3486, 0x3487, 0x3488, 0x3489, 0x348A, 0x348B, 0x348C, 0x348D, 0x348E, 0x348F, 0x3490, 0x3491, 0x3492, 0x3493, 0x3494, 0x3495, 0x3496, 0x3497, 0x3498, 0x3499, 0x349A, 0x349B, 0x349C, 0x349D, 0x349E, 0x349F, 0x34A0, 0x34A1, 0x34A2, 0x34A3, 0x34A4, 0x34A5, 0x34A6, 0x34A7, 0x34A8, 0x34A9, 0x34AA, 0x34AB, 0x34AC, 0x34AD, 0x34AE, 0x34AF, 0x34A6, 0x34B1, 0x34B2, 0x34B3, 0x34B4, 0x34B5, 0x34B6, 0x34B7, 0x34B8, 0x34B9, 0x34BA, 0x34BB, 0x34BD, 0x34BE, 0x34BF, 0x34C0, 0x34C2, 0x34C3, 0x34C4, 0x34C5, 0x34C7, 0x34C8, 0x34C9, 0x34CA;
  18  	systemMessage(user, "What water do you want to fish in?");
  19  	targetLoc(user, this);
  20  	return(0x00);
  21  }
  22  
  23  trigger targetobj {
  24  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
  25  		return(0x00);
  26  	}
  27  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(user);
  28  	loc there = getLocation(usedon);
  29  	if (getDistanceInTiles(Q4VS, there) > 0x04) {
  30  		systemMessage(user, "You need to be closer to the water to fish!");
  31  		return(0x00);
  32  	}
  33  	list Q5W2;
  34  	getStaticObjectsAt(Q5W2, getLocation(usedon));
  35  	if (numInList(Q5W2) > 0x01) {
  36  		systemMessage(user, "You can't reach the water there.");
  37  		return(0x00);
  38  	}
  39  	int t = getObjType(usedon);
  40  	int Q4QI = 0x00;
  41  	if (isInList(Q686, t)) {
  42  		Q4QI = 0x01;
  43  	}
  44  	if (!Q4QI) {
  45  		systemMessage(user, "You need water to fish in!");
  46  		return(0x00);
  47  	}
  48  	setObjVar(user, "targetType", "object");
  49  	setObjVar(user, "poleID", this);
  50  	attachScript(user, "userisfishing");
  51  	list args = this, there;
  52  	debugMessage("sending message");
  53  	message(user, "fish", args);
  54  	return(0x00);
  55  }
  56  
  57  trigger targetloc {
  58  	if (!isInMap(place)) {
  59  		return(0x00);
  60  	}
  61  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(user);
  62  	loc there = place;
  63  	if (getDistanceInTiles(Q4VS, there) > 0x04) {
  64  		systemMessage(user, "You need to be closer to the water to fish!");
  65  		return(0x00);
  66  	}
  67  	list Q5W2;
  68  	int t;
  69  	int Q4QI = 0x00;
  70  	getStaticObjectsAt(Q5W2, place);
  71  	if (numInList(Q5W2) > 0x01) {
  72  		systemMessage(user, "You can't reach the water there.");
  73  		return(0x00);
  74  	}
  75  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5W2); i++) {
  76  		t = Q5W2[i];
  77  		if (isInList(Q686, t)) {
  78  			Q4QI = 0x01;
  79  		}
  80  	}
  81  	if (!Q4QI) {
  82  		t = getTileAt(place);
  83  		if ((t > 0xA7) && (t < 0xAC)) {
  84  			Q4QI = 0x01;
  85  		}
  86  	}
  87  	if (!Q4QI) {
  88  		systemMessage(user, "You need water to fish in!");
  89  		return(0x00);
  90  	}
  91  	setObjVar(user, "targetType", "terrain");
  92  	setObjVar(user, "poleID", this);
  93  	attachScript(user, "userisfishing");
  94  	list args = this, there;
  95  	message(user, "fish", args);
  96  	return(0x01);
  97  }
  98  
  99  trigger wasdropped {
 100  	if (hasObjVar(this, "container")) {
 101  		removeObjVar(this, "container");
 102  	}
 103  	if (hasObjVar(this, "location")) {
 104  		removeObjVar(this, "location");
 105  	}
 106  	return(0x01);
 107  }
 108
#47 flamespurt.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5FI loc → spurt_loc
Q4PQ obj → fire_obj
Source — flamespurt.m 
   1  inherits sndfx;
   2  
   3  trigger 0x03E8 enterrange(0x03) {
   4  	if (isPlayer(target)) {
   5  		obj player = target;
   6  		loc Q5IZ = getLocation(player);
   7  
   8  member loc Q5FI = getLocation(this);
   9  
  10  member obj Q4PQ = requestCreateObjectAt(0x3709, Q5FI);
  11  		sfx(Q5FI, 0x011D, 0x011D);
  12  	}
  13  	return(0x01);
  14  }
  15  
  16  trigger 0x03E8 enterrange(0x01) {
  17  	if (isPlayer(target)) {
  18  		int damage = random(0x01, 0x0A);
  19  		loc Q5FI = getLocation(this);
  20  		obj player = target;
  21  		loc Q5IZ = getLocation(player);
  22  		doDamage(player, player, damage);
  23  		sfx(Q5IZ, 0x014C, 0x014C);
  24  		animateMobile(player, 0x14, 0x01, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
  25  	}
  26  	return(0x01)}
  27  
  28  trigger 0x03E8 enterrange(0x00) {
  29  	if (isPlayer(target)) {
  30  		int damage = random(0x01, 0x1E);
  31  		obj player = target;
  32  		loc Q5IZ = getLocation(player);
  33  		doDamage(player, player, damage);
  34  		sfx(Q5IZ, 0x014C, 0x014C);
  35  	}
  36  	return(0x00)}
  37  
  38  trigger 0x03E8 leaverange(0x03) {
  39  	deleteObject(Q4PQ);
  40  	return(0x01);
  41  }
  42
#48 flamstrkbase.m 3 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5NQ int → reflected
Q57L obj → caster
Q57M obj → target
Source — flamstrkbase.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q5NQ;
   4  
   5  member obj Q57L;
   6  
   7  member obj Q57M;
   8  
   9  function int apply_flame_strike(obj user, obj usedon, int Q5NM) {
  10  	int success = 0x00;
  11  	if (is_valid_spell_target(usedon)) {
  12  		success = 0x01;
  13  		loc caster_loc = getLocation(user);
  14  		loc there = getLocation(usedon);
  15  		faceHere(user, getDirectionInternal(caster_loc, there));
  16  		doMobAnimation(usedon, 0x3709, 0x0A, 0x1E, 0x01, 0x00);
  17  		sfx(there, 0x0208, 0x00);
  18  		Q57M = usedon;
  19  		Q57L = user;
  20  		handle_pvp_crime_report(user, usedon, 0x02, reflected);
  21  		callback(this, 0x01, 0x19);
  22  		Q5NQ = reflected;
  23  	}
  24  	trigger_mana_drain_if_enabled(this, success);
  25  	return(success);
  26  }
  27  
  28  trigger callback(0x19) {
  29  	int Q527 = apply_spell_damage(this, Q57L, Q57M, 0x04, Q5NQ);
  30  	scriptTrig(Q57M, 0x01, Q57L);
  31  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  32  	return(0x00);
  33  }
  34
#49 flourmill.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q66W obj → activating_user
Source — flourmill.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member obj Q66W;
   4  
   5  trigger creation {
   6  	int Q62A = getObjType(this);
   7  	switch(Q62A) {
   8  	case 0x1922
   9  	case 0x192E
  10  		returnResourcesToBank(this, 0x14, "flour");
  11  		break;
  12  	}
  13  	return(0x00);
  14  }
  15  
  16  trigger use {
  17  	Q66W = user;
  18  	int Q62A = getObjType(this);
  19  	int Q4Q1;
  20  	loc Q61U = getLocation(this);
  21  	loc Q54X = Q61U;
  22  	obj Q54Y;
  23  	int Q54Z;
  24  	int Q4PW;
  25  	switch(Q62A) {
  26  	case 0x1EBD
  27  		targetObj(user, this);
  28  		return(0x00);
  29  		break;
  30  	case 0x1921
  31  		changeLoc(Q54X, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
  32  		Q54Y = getFirstObjectOfType(Q54X, 0x1923);
  33  		break;
  34  	case 0x1923
  35  		Q54Y = this;
  36  		break;
  37  	case 0x1924
  38  		changeLoc(Q54X, 0x00 - 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
  39  		Q54Y = getFirstObjectOfType(Q54X, 0x1923);
  40  		break;
  41  	case 0x192D
  42  		changeLoc(Q54X, 0x00, 0x01, 0x00);
  43  		Q54Y = getFirstObjectOfType(Q54X, 0x192F);
  44  		break;
  45  	case 0x192F
  46  		Q54Y = this;
  47  		break;
  48  	case 0x1930
  49  		changeLoc(Q54X, 0x00, 0x00 - 0x01, 0x00);
  50  		Q54Y = getFirstObjectOfType(Q54X, 0x192F);
  51  		break;
  52  	default
  53  		break;
  54  	}
  55  	Q4Q1 = getResource(Q4PW, Q54Y, "flour", 0x03, 0x02);
  56  	if (Q4PW > 0x13) {
  57  		Q54Z = getObjType(Q54Y);
  58  		loc Q5BZ = Q54X;
  59  		obj Q5C4;
  60  		if (Q54Z == 0x1923) {
  61  			setType(Q54Y, 0x1926);
  62  			changeLoc(Q5BZ, 0x00 - 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
  63  			Q5C4 = getFirstObjectOfType(Q5BZ, 0x1921);
  64  			setType(Q5C4, 0x1925);
  65  			changeLoc(Q5BZ, 0x02, 0x00, 0x00);
  66  			Q5C4 = getFirstObjectOfType(Q5BZ, 0x1924);
  67  			setType(Q5C4, 0x1928);
  68  		}
  69  		if (Q54Z == 0x192F) {
  70  			setType(Q54Y, 0x1932);
  71  			changeLoc(Q5BZ, 0x00, 0x00 - 0x01, 0x00);
  72  			Q5C4 = getFirstObjectOfType(Q5BZ, 0x192D);
  73  			setType(Q5C4, 0x1931);
  74  			changeLoc(Q5BZ, 0x00, 0x02, 0x00);
  75  			Q5C4 = getFirstObjectOfType(Q5BZ, 0x1930);
  76  			setType(Q5C4, 0x1934);
  77  		}
  78  		callback(Q54Y, 0x05, 0x3B);
  79  	} else {
  80  		systemMessage(user, "You need more wheat to make a sack of flour.");
  81  	}
  82  	return(0x00);
  83  }
  84  
  85  trigger callback(0x3B) {
  86  	int Q62A = getObjType(this);
  87  	int Q5L6;
  88  	int Q4PY;
  89  	obj Q54Y = this;
  90  	obj Q5C4;
  91  	loc Q61U = getLocation(this);
  92  	loc Q4N8;
  93  	loc Q4EK;
  94  	obj flour;
  95  	if (Q62A == 0x1926) {
  96  		setType(Q54Y, 0x1922);
  97  		changeLoc(Q61U, 0x00 - 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
  98  		Q5C4 = getFirstObjectOfType(Q61U, 0x1925);
  99  		setType(Q5C4, 0x1920);
 100  		changeLoc(Q61U, 0x02, 0x00, 0x00);
 101  		Q5C4 = getFirstObjectOfType(Q61U, 0x1928);
 102  		Q4EK = Q61U;
 103  		setType(Q5C4, 0x1924);
 104  	}
 105  	if (Q62A == 0x1932) {
 106  		setType(Q54Y, 0x192E);
 107  		changeLoc(Q61U, 0x00, 0x00 - 0x01, 0x00);
 108  		Q5C4 = getFirstObjectOfType(Q61U, 0x1931);
 109  		setType(Q5C4, 0x192C);
 110  		changeLoc(Q61U, 0x00, 0x02, 0x00);
 111  		Q5C4 = getFirstObjectOfType(Q61U, 0x1934);
 112  		Q4EK = Q61U;
 113  		setType(Q5C4, 0x1930);
 114  	}
 115  	Q5L6 = random(0x00, 0x01);
 116  	if (Q5L6) {
 117  		Q4PY = 0x1039;
 118  	} else {
 119  		Q4PY = 0x1045;
 120  	}
 121  	if (findGoodSpotNearWithElev(Q4EK, getZ(Q4EK) - 0x08, getZ(Q4EK) + 0x10, 0x02, getTileHeight(Q4PY), 0x00)) {
 122  		flour = createNoResObjectAt(Q4PY, Q4EK);
 123  	} else {
 124  		loc Q66U = getLocation(Q66W);
 125  		flour = createNoResObjectAt(Q4PY, Q66U);
 126  	}
 127  	transferResources(flour, this, 0x14, "flour");
 128  	return(0x00);
 129  }
 130  
 131  trigger targetobj {
 132  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
 133  		return(0x00);
 134  	}
 135  	int Q66P = getObjType(usedon);
 136  	int Q54Z;
 137  	loc Q66N = getLocation(usedon);
 138  	obj Q54Y;
 139  	obj Q4WL;
 140  	loc Q54X = Q66N;
 141  	loc Q5BZ;
 142  	switch(Q66P) {
 143  	case 0x1920
 144  		changeLoc(Q54X, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
 145  		Q54Y = getFirstObjectOfType(Q54X, 0x1922);
 146  		break;
 147  	case 0x1922
 148  		Q54Y = usedon;
 149  		break;
 150  	case 0x192C
 151  		changeLoc(Q54X, 0x00, 0x01, 0x00);
 152  		Q54Y = getFirstObjectOfType(Q54X, 0x192E);
 153  		break;
 154  	case 0x192E
 155  		Q54Y = usedon;
 156  		break;
 157  	case 0x1921
 158  		changeLoc(Q54X, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
 159  		Q54Y = getFirstObjectOfType(Q54X, 0x1923);
 160  		break;
 161  	case 0x1923
 162  		Q54Y = usedon;
 163  		break;
 164  	case 0x192D
 165  		changeLoc(Q54X, 0x00, 0x01, 0x00);
 166  		Q54Y = getFirstObjectOfType(Q54X, 0x192F);
 167  		break;
 168  	case 0x192F
 169  		Q54Y = usedon;
 170  		break;
 171  	case 0x1924
 172  		changeLoc(Q54X, 0x00 - 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
 173  		Q54Y = getFirstObjectOfType(Q54X, 0x1922);
 174  		if (Q54Y == NULL()) {
 175  			Q54Y = getFirstObjectOfType(Q54X, 0x1923);
 176  		}
 177  		break;
 178  	case 0x1930
 179  		changeLoc(Q54X, 0x00, 0x00 - 0x01, 0x00);
 180  		Q54Y = getFirstObjectOfType(Q54X, 0x192E);
 181  		if (Q54Y == NULL()) {
 182  			Q54Y = getFirstObjectOfType(Q54X, 0x192F);
 183  		}
 184  		break;
 185  	default
 186  		return(0x00);
 187  		break;
 188  	}
 189  	Q5BZ = Q54X;
 190  	Q54Z = getObjType(Q54Y);
 191  	switch(Q54Z) {
 192  	case 0x1923
 193  	case 0x192F
 194  		transferResources(Q54Y, this, 0x0A, "flour");
 195  		break;
 196  	case 0x1922
 197  		transferResources(Q54Y, this, 0x0A, "flour");
 198  		setType(Q54Y, 0x1923);
 199  		changeLoc(Q5BZ, 0x00 - 0x01, 0x00, 0x00, );
 200  		Q4WL = getFirstObjectOfType(Q5BZ, 0x1920);
 201  		setType(Q4WL, 0x1921);
 202  		break;
 203  	case 0x192E
 204  		setType(Q54Y, 0x192F);
 205  		changeLoc(Q5BZ, 0x00, 0x00 - 0x01, 0x00, );
 206  		Q4WL = getFirstObjectOfType(Q5BZ, 0x192C);
 207  		setType(Q4WL, 0x192D);
 208  		transferResources(Q54Y, this, 0x0A, "flour");
 209  		break;
 210  	}
 211  	int Q4PX;
 212  	int Q4Q1;
 213  	Q4Q1 = getResource(Q4PX, this, "flour", 0x03, 0x02);
 214  	if (Q4PX == 0x00) {
 215  		deleteObject(this);
 216  	}
 217  	return(0x00);
 218  }

#50 gasspurt.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5FI loc → spawn_loc
Q4R7 obj → gas_effect
Source — gasspurt.m 
   1  inherits sndfx;
   2  
   3  trigger 0x03E8 enterrange(0x03) {
   4  	if (isPlayer(target)) {
   5  		obj player = target;
   6  		loc Q5IZ = getLocation(player);
   7  
   8  member loc Q5FI = getLocation(this);
   9  
  10  member obj Q4R7 = requestCreateObjectAt(0x11A6, Q5FI);
  11  		sfx(Q5FI, 0x0108, 0x0107);
  12  	}
  13  	return(0x01);
  14  }
  15  
  16  trigger 0xFA enterrange(0x01) {
  17  	if (isPlayer(target)) {
  18  		setPoisoned(target, 0x01);
  19  		attachScript(target, "poisoned");
  20  	}
  21  	return(0x01)}
  22  
  23  trigger 0x03E8 enterrange(0x01) {
  24  	if (isPlayer(target)) {
  25  		int damage = random(0x01, 0x0A);
  26  		loc Q5FI = getLocation(this);
  27  		obj player = target;
  28  		loc Q5IZ = getLocation(player);
  29  		doDamage(player, player, damage);
  30  		sfx(Q5IZ, 0x014C, 0x014C);
  31  		animateMobile(player, 0x14, 0x01, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
  32  	}
  33  	return(0x01)}
  34  
  35  trigger 0x03E8 enterrange(0x00) {
  36  	if (isPlayer(target)) {
  37  		int damage = random(0x01, 0x1E);
  38  		loc Q5IZ = getLocation(target);
  39  		obj player = target;
  40  		doDamage(player, player, 0x1E);
  41  		sfx(Q5IZ, 0x014C, 0x014C);
  42  		setPoisoned(player, 0x01);
  43  		attachScript(player, "poisoned");
  44  	}
  45  	return(0x00)}
  46  
  47  trigger 0x03E8 leaverange(0x03) {
  48  	deleteObject(Q4R7);
  49  	return(0x01);
  50  }

#51 housestuff.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5NG int → placement_z_offset
Source — housestuff.m 
   1  inherits multistuff;
   2  
   3  member int Q5NG;
   4  
   5  function int calculate_door_gump_id(int Q65M, int state) {
   6  	return(0x64 + (item_type_id * 0x02) + state);
   7  }
   8  
   9  function int set_house_state(obj Q5AK, int state) {
  10  	string unused_str;
  11  	int myhousetype = getObjVar(house, "myhousetype");
  12  	int gump_id = calculate_door_gump_id(myhousetype, state);
  13  	int result = recycleMulti(house, gump_id);
  14  	if (result > 0x00) {
  15  		setObjVar(house, "myhousestate", state);
  16  	}
  17  	return(result);
  18  }
  19  
  20  function obj place_house(int Q65M, loc place) {
  21  	Q5NG = (0x00 - 0x06);
  22  	int gump_id = calculate_door_gump_id(house_type, 0x00);
  23  	if (areMobilesInMultiArea(gump_id, place)) {
  24  		Q5NG = (0x00 - 0x09);
  25  		return(NULL());
  26  	}
  27  	obj house = makeMultiInstCheck(place, gump_id, 0x08, (0x00 - 0x03), Q5NG, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00);
  28  	if (house != NULL()) {
  29  		setObjVar(house, "myhousetype", house_type);
  30  		setObjVar(house, "myhousestate", 0x00);
  31  		string time_str;
  32  		getCurrentTimeStr(time_str);
  33  		setObjVar(house, "creationtime", time_str);
  34  	}
  35  	return(house);
  36  }
  37  
  38  function int change_house_state(obj Q5AK, int Q5CX) {
  39  	int current_state = getObjVar(house, "myhousestate");
  40  	if (new_state != current_state) {
  41  		return(set_house_state(house, new_state));
  42  	}
  43  	return(0x00);
  44  }
  45  
  46  function int get_house_base_value(int Q65M) {
  47  	int gump_id = calculate_door_gump_id(house_type, 0x00);
  48  	return(getNumInMultiType(gump_id) * 0xC8);
  49  }
  50  
  51  function loc adjust_placement_loc(int Q65M, loc place) {
  52  	loc min_extent;
  53  	loc max_extent;
  54  	int gump_id = calculate_door_gump_id(house_type, 0x00);
  55  	if (getMultiExtents(gump_id, min_extent, max_extent)) {
  56  		setY(place, getY(place) - getY(max_extent));
  57  	}
  58  	return(place);
  59  }
  60  
  61  function void mark_for_multi_delete(obj it) {
  62  	setObjVar(it, "multiDelete", 0x01);
  63  	return();
  64  }
  65
#52 inscribe.m 13 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q62D obj → caster
Q56M obj → scroll
Q5U9 obj → source_book
Q43Q obj → inscribed_scroll
Q5V0 list → spellbook_contents
Q4PF list → circle1_spells
Q5QM list → circle2_spells
Q61M list → circle3_spells
Q4QW list → circle4_spells
Q4P4 list → circle5_spells
Q5T7 list → circle6_spells
Q5RM list → circle7_spells
Q4NI list → circle8_spells
Source — inscribe.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member obj Q62D;
   4  
   5  member obj Q56M;
   6  
   7  member obj Q5U9;
   8  
   9  member obj Q43Q;
  10  
  11  member list Q5V0;
  12  
  13  member list Q4PF;
  14  
  15  member list Q5QM;
  16  
  17  member list Q61M;
  18  
  19  member list Q4QW;
  20  
  21  member list Q4P4;
  22  
  23  member list Q5T7;
  24  
  25  member list Q5RM;
  26  
  27  member list Q4NI;
  28  
  29  member int finished;
  30  
  31  forward void inscribe_spell(int Q5UT);
  32  
  33  forward void clear_all_spell_lists();
  34  
  35  function int show_inscription_menu(obj user, obj usedon) {
  36  	if (isAtHome(usedon)) {
  37  		systemMessage(user, "That scroll belongs to someone else.");
  38  		if (hasObjVar(usedon, "inUse")) {
  39  			removeObjVar(usedon, "inUse");
  40  		}
  41  		return(0x00);
  42  	}
  43  	obj spellbook = mobileContainsObjType(user, 0x0EFA);
  44  	if (isValid(spellbook)) {
  45  		int i;
  46  		int n;
  47  		obj scroll;
  48  		int spell_index;
  49  		int spell_circle;
  50  		int mana_cost;
  51  		int cur_mana = getCurMana(user);
  52  		int flag;
  53  		obj obj_ref;
  54  		int result;
  55  		list reagent_list;
  56  		int count;
  57  		int val;
  58  		list list_buf;
  59  		string spell_name;
  60  		loc user_loc = getLocation(user);
  61  		getContents(Q5V0, spellbook);
  62  		int Q5EA;
  63  		Q5EA = numInList(Q5V0);
  64  		sortList(Q5V0, 0x04);
  65  		for (i = 0x00; i < Q5EA; i++) {
  66  			scroll = Q5V0[i];
  67  			spell_index = get_spell_index_from_item(scroll);
  68  			spell_circle = get_spell_circle(scroll);
  69  			mana_cost = get_spell_mana_cost(spell_circle);
  70  			if (!can_attempt_spell(Q62D, spell_circle)) {
  71  				i++;
  72  				continue;
  73  			}
  74  			if (cur_mana < mana_cost) {
  75  				i++;
  76  				continue;
  77  			}
  78  			spell_name = get_spell_name_by_index(spell_index);
  79  			switch(spell_circle) {
  80  			case 0x01
  81  				appendToList(Q4PF, spell_index + 0x2080);
  82  				appendToList(Q4PF, spell_name);
  83  				break;
  84  			case 0x02
  85  				appendToList(Q5QM, spell_index + 0x2080);
  86  				appendToList(Q5QM, spell_name);
  87  				break;
  88  			case 0x03
  89  				appendToList(Q61M, spell_index + 0x2080);
  90  				appendToList(Q61M, spell_name);
  91  				break;
  92  			case 0x04
  93  				appendToList(Q4QW, spell_index + 0x2080);
  94  				appendToList(Q4QW, spell_name);
  95  				break;
  96  			case 0x05
  97  				appendToList(Q4P4, spell_index + 0x2080);
  98  				appendToList(Q4P4, spell_name);
  99  				break;
 100  			case 0x06
 101  				appendToList(Q5T7, spell_index + 0x2080);
 102  				appendToList(Q5T7, spell_name);
 103  				break;
 104  			case 0x07
 105  				appendToList(Q5RM, spell_index + 0x2080);
 106  				appendToList(Q5RM, spell_name);
 107  				break;
 108  			case 0x08
 109  				appendToList(Q4NI, spell_index + 0x2080);
 110  				appendToList(Q4NI, spell_name);
 111  				break;
 112  			default
 113  				break;
 114  			}
 115  		}
 116  		list circle_options;
 117  		if (numInList(Q4PF) > 0x00) {
 118  			appendToList(circle_options, 0x20C0);
 119  			appendToList(circle_options, "First Circle");
 120  		}
 121  		if (numInList(Q5QM) > 0x00) {
 122  			appendToList(circle_options, 0x20C1);
 123  			appendToList(circle_options, "Second Circle");
 124  		}
 125  		if (numInList(Q61M) > 0x00) {
 126  			appendToList(circle_options, 0x20C2);
 127  			appendToList(circle_options, "Third Circle");
 128  		}
 129  		if (numInList(Q4QW) > 0x00) {
 130  			appendToList(circle_options, 0x20C3);
 131  			appendToList(circle_options, "Fourth Circle");
 132  		}
 133  		if (numInList(Q4P4) > 0x00) {
 134  			appendToList(circle_options, 0x20C4);
 135  			appendToList(circle_options, "Fifth Circle");
 136  		}
 137  		if (numInList(Q5T7) > 0x00) {
 138  			appendToList(circle_options, 0x20C5);
 139  			appendToList(circle_options, "Sixth Circle");
 140  		}
 141  		if (numInList(Q5RM) > 0x00) {
 142  			appendToList(circle_options, 0x20C6);
 143  			appendToList(circle_options, "Seventh Circle");
 144  		}
 145  		if (numInList(Q4NI) > 0x00) {
 146  			appendToList(circle_options, 0x20C7);
 147  			appendToList(circle_options, "Eighth Circle");
 148  		}
 149  	} else {
 150  		systemMessage(user, "You don't have a spellbook.");
 151  		if (hasObjVar(usedon, "inUse")) {
 152  			removeObjVar(usedon, "inUse");
 153  		}
 154  		return(0x00);
 155  	}
 156  	if (numInList(circle_options) > 0x00) {
 157  		selectType(Q62D, this, 0x1C, "Choose a circle.", circle_options);
 158  		return(0x01);
 159  	} else {
 160  		systemMessage(user, "You can't inscribe any spells.");
 161  		if (hasObjVar(usedon, "inUse")) {
 162  			removeObjVar(usedon, "inUse");
 163  		}
 164  		return(0x00);
 165  	}
 166  	return(0x01);
 167  }
 168  
 169  function int copy_book_to_target(obj user, obj usedon) {
 170  	int item_type_id = getObjType(usedon);
 171  	if (isAtHome(usedon)) {
 172  		systemMessage(user, "That book belongs to someone else.");
 173  		if (hasObjVar(usedon, "inUse")) {
 174  			removeObjVar(usedon, "inUse");
 175  		}
 176  		return(0x00);
 177  	}
 178  	int source_book_page_count = getBookPages(usedon);
 179  	if (Q5U9 == NULL()) {
 180  		if (source_book_page_count == 0x00) {
 181  			systemMessage(user, "Can't copy an empty book.");
 182  			if (hasObjVar(usedon, "inUse")) {
 183  				removeObjVar(usedon, "inUse");
 184  			}
 185  			return(0x00);
 186  		}
 187  		Q5U9 = usedon;
 188  		systemMessage(user, "Select a book to copy this to.");
 189  		targetObj(user, this);
 190  	} else {
 191  		if (item_type_id == 0x0FEF) {
 192  			systemMessage(user, "Cannot write into that book.");
 193  			if (hasObjVar(Q5U9, "inUse")) {
 194  				removeObjVar(Q5U9, "inUse");
 195  			}
 196  			if (hasObjVar(usedon, "inUse")) {
 197  				removeObjVar(usedon, "inUse");
 198  			}
 199  			return(0x00);
 200  		}
 201  		if (item_type_id == 0x0FF0) {
 202  			systemMessage(user, "Cannot write into that book.");
 203  			if (hasObjVar(Q5U9, "inUse")) {
 204  				removeObjVar(Q5U9, "inUse");
 205  			}
 206  			if (hasObjVar(usedon, "inUse")) {
 207  				removeObjVar(usedon, "inUse");
 208  			}
 209  			return(0x00);
 210  		}
 211  		if (usedon == Q5U9) {
 212  			systemMessage(user, "Cannot copy a book onto itself.");
 213  			if (hasObjVar(Q5U9, "inUse")) {
 214  				removeObjVar(Q5U9, "inUse");
 215  			}
 216  			if (hasObjVar(usedon, "inUse")) {
 217  				removeObjVar(usedon, "inUse");
 218  			}
 219  			return(0x00);
 220  		}
 221  		int minimum_skill_level = 0x96;
 222  		int copy_failed_flag = 0x00;
 223  		if (testAndLearnSkill(user, 0x17, minimum_skill_level, 0x32) <= 0x00) {
 224  			copy_failed_flag = 0x01;
 225  		} else {
 226  			int copybook_result;
 227  			copybook_result = copybook(usedon, Q5U9);
 228  			sfx(getLocation(Q62D), 0x0249, 0x00);
 229  			if (copybook_result == 0x00) {
 230  				copy_failed_flag = 0x01;
 231  			}
 232  		}
 233  		if (hasObjVar(Q5U9, "inUse")) {
 234  			removeObjVar(Q5U9, "inUse");
 235  		}
 236  		if (hasObjVar(usedon, "inUse")) {
 237  			removeObjVar(usedon, "inUse");
 238  		}
 239  		Q5U9 = NULL();
 240  		if (copy_failed_flag) {
 241  			systemMessage(user, "You fail to make a copy of the book.");
 242  			return(0x00);
 243  		} else {
 244  			systemMessage(user, "You make a copy of the book.");
 245  		}
 246  	}
 247  	return(0x01);
 248  }
 249  
 250  trigger message("canUseSkill") {
 251  	return(0x00);
 252  }
 253  
 254  trigger callback(0x4D) {
 255  	if (!finished) {
 256  		systemMessage(this, "You have waited too long to make your inscribe selection, your inscription attempt has timed out.")}
 257  	detachScript(this, "inscribe");
 258  	clear_all_spell_lists();
 259  	return(0x00);
 260  }
 261  
 262  function void schedule_inscription_callback(obj it, int Q4MY) {
 263  	int callback_delay_ticks = 0x3C;
 264  	if (is_immediate_callback) {
 265  		callback_delay_ticks = 0x0A;
 266  		finished = 0x01;
 267  	}
 268  	callback(it, callback_delay_ticks, 0x4D);
 269  	return();
 270  }
 271  
 272  trigger message("useSkill") {
 273  	schedule_inscription_callback(this, 0x00);
 274  	systemMessage(this, "What would you like to inscribe?");
 275  	Q5U9 = NULL();
 276  	targetObj(this, this);
 277  	return(0x00);
 278  }
 279  
 280  function int handle_inscription_target(obj user, obj usedon) {
 281  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
 282  		return(0x00);
 283  	}
 284  	if (hasObjVar(usedon, "inUse")) {
 285  		systemMessage(user, "Someone else is inscribing that item.");
 286  		return(0x00);
 287  	}
 288  	int obj_type = getObjType(usedon);
 289  	switch(obj_type) {
 290  	case 0x0EF3
 291  	case 0x0E34
 292  		Q56M = usedon;
 293  		Q62D = user;
 294  		setObjVar(Q56M, "inUse", 0x00);
 295  		attachscript(Q56M, "removeinuse");
 296  		callback(Q56M, 0x3C, 0x1B);
 297  		return(show_inscription_menu(user, usedon));
 298  		break;
 299  	case 0x0FEF
 300  	case 0x0FF0
 301  	case 0x0FF1
 302  	case 0x0FF2
 303  		Q56M = usedon;
 304  		Q62D = user;
 305  		setObjVar(Q56M, "inUse", 0x00);
 306  		attachscript(Q56M, "removeinuse");
 307  		callback(Q56M, 0x3C, 0x1B);
 308  		return(copy_book_to_target(user, usedon));
 309  		break;
 310  	default
 311  		systemMessage(user, "Can't inscribe that item.");
 312  		if (hasObjVar(Q5U9, "inUse")) {
 313  			removeObjVar(Q5U9, "inUse");
 314  		}
 315  		if (hasObjVar(usedon, "inUse")) {
 316  			removeObjVar(usedon, "inUse");
 317  		}
 318  		return(0x00);
 319  		break;
 320  	}
 321  	return(0x01);
 322  }
 323  
 324  trigger targetobj {
 325  	if (!handle_inscription_target(user, usedon)) {
 326  		clear_all_spell_lists();
 327  		schedule_inscription_callback(this, 0x01);
 328  	} else {
 329  		schedule_inscription_callback(this, 0x00);
 330  	}
 331  	return(0x00);
 332  }
 333  
 334  function int handle_spell_selection(obj user, int listindex, int objtype) {
 335  	if (listindex == 0x00) {
 336  		return(0x00);
 337  	}
 338  	switch(objtype) {
 339  	case 0x20C0
 340  		selectType(Q62D, this, 0x1D, "Choose a first circle spell.", Q4PF);
 341  		break;
 342  	case 0x20C1
 343  		selectType(Q62D, this, 0x1E, "Choose a second circle spell.", Q5QM);
 344  		break;
 345  	case 0x20C2
 346  		selectType(Q62D, this, 0x1F, "Choose a third circle spell.", Q61M);
 347  		break;
 348  	case 0x20C3
 349  		selectType(Q62D, this, 0x20, "Choose a fourth circle spell.", Q4QW);
 350  		break;
 351  	case 0x20C4
 352  		selectType(Q62D, this, 0x21, "Choose a fifth circle spell.", Q4P4);
 353  		break;
 354  	case 0x20C5
 355  		selectType(Q62D, this, 0x22, "Choose a sixth circle spell.", Q5T7);
 356  		break;
 357  	case 0x20C6
 358  		selectType(Q62D, this, 0x23, "Choose a seventh circle spell.", Q5RM);
 359  		break;
 360  	case 0x20C7
 361  		selectType(Q62D, this, 0x24, "Choose a eighth circle spell.", Q4NI);
 362  		break;
 363  	default
 364  		return(0x00);
 365  		break;
 366  	}
 367  	if (hasObjVar(Q56M, "inUse")) {
 368  		removeObjVar(Q56M, "inUse");
 369  	}
 370  	return(0x01);
 371  }
 372  
 373  trigger typeselected(0x1C) {
 374  	if (!handle_spell_selection(user, listindex, objtype)) {
 375  		clear_all_spell_lists();
 376  		schedule_inscription_callback(this, 0x01);
 377  	} else {
 378  		schedule_inscription_callback(this, 0x00);
 379  	}
 380  	return(0x00);
 381  }
 382  
 383  function void handle_spell_type_selected(int listindex, int objtype) {
 384  	if (listindex != 0x00) {
 385  		inscribe_spell(objtype - 0x2080);
 386  	}
 387  	clear_all_spell_lists();
 388  	schedule_inscription_callback(this, 0x01);
 389  	return();
 390  }
 391  
 392  trigger typeselected(0x1D) {
 393  	handle_spell_type_selected(listindex, objtype);
 394  	return(0x00);
 395  }
 396  
 397  trigger typeselected(0x1E) {
 398  	handle_spell_type_selected(listindex, objtype);
 399  	return(0x00);
 400  }
 401  
 402  trigger typeselected(0x1F) {
 403  	handle_spell_type_selected(listindex, objtype);
 404  	return(0x00);
 405  }
 406  
 407  trigger typeselected(0x20) {
 408  	handle_spell_type_selected(listindex, objtype);
 409  	return(0x00);
 410  }
 411  
 412  trigger typeselected(0x21) {
 413  	handle_spell_type_selected(listindex, objtype);
 414  	return(0x00);
 415  }
 416  
 417  trigger typeselected(0x22) {
 418  	handle_spell_type_selected(listindex, objtype);
 419  	return(0x00);
 420  }
 421  
 422  trigger typeselected(0x23) {
 423  	handle_spell_type_selected(listindex, objtype);
 424  	return(0x00);
 425  }
 426  
 427  trigger typeselected(0x24) {
 428  	handle_spell_type_selected(listindex, objtype);
 429  	return(0x00);
 430  }
 431  
 432  function void inscribe_spell(int Q5UT) {
 433  	list reagents;
 434  	populate_spell_reagents(reagents, spell_index);
 435  	loc caster_loc = getLocation(Q62D);
 436  	if (!consume_spell_reagents(Q62D, reagents)) {
 437  		systemMessage(Q62D, "You lack the necessary reagents to inscribe this spell.");
 438  		return();
 439  	}
 440  	int circle = calculate_spell_difficulty(spell_index);
 441  	int mana_cost = get_spell_mana_cost(circle);
 442  	if (check_cast_conditions(Q62D, caster_loc, mana_cost)) {
 443  		loseMana(Q62D, mana_cost);
 444  		int failed = 0x00;
 445  		int cast_time = calculate_spell_cast_time_ms(calculate_spell_difficulty_variant(spell_index));
 446  		if (!can_attempt_spell(Q62D, calculate_spell_difficulty_variant(spell_index))) {
 447  			failed = 0x01;
 448  		}
 449  		if (!failed) {
 450  			if (testAndLearnSkill(Q62D, 0x17, cast_time, 0x32) <= 0x00) {
 451  				failed = 0x01;
 452  			}
 453  		}
 454  		if (failed) {
 455  			systemMessage(Q62D, "You fail to inscribe the scroll, and the scroll is ruined.");
 456  			destroyOne(Q56M);
 457  			return();
 458  		}
 459  		int scroll_type = get_spell_graphic_id(spell_index);
 460  		Q43Q = requestCreateObjectAt(scroll_type, getLocation(Q62D));
 461  		destroyOne(Q56M);
 462  		string scroll_script;
 463  		scroll_script = scroll_type;
 464  		attachscript(Q43Q, scroll_script);
 465  		int place_result;
 466  		obj backpack = getBackpack(Q62D);
 467  		if (canHold(backpack, Q43Q)) {
 468  			place_result = putObjContainer(Q43Q, backpack);
 469  			sfx(getLocation(Q62D), 0x0249, 0x00);
 470  			systemMessage(Q62D, "You inscribe the spell and put the scroll in your backpack.");
 471  		} else {
 472  			if (isValid(Q56M)) {
 473  				place_result = teleport(Q56M, getLocation(Q62D));
 474  			}
 475  			sfx(getLocation(Q62D), 0x0249, 0x00);
 476  			systemMessage(Q62D, "You inscribe the spell and put the scroll at your feet.");
 477  		}
 478  		if (isValid(Q56M)) {
 479  			if (hasObjVar(Q56M, "inUse")) {
 480  				removeObjVar(Q56M, "inUse");
 481  			}
 482  			if (hasScript(Q56M, "removeinuse")) {
 483  				detachScript(Q56M, "removeinuse");
 484  			}
 485  		}
 486  	} else {
 487  		systemMessage(Q62D, "You fail to inscribe the scroll, and the scroll is ruined.");
 488  		destroyOne(Q56M);
 489  		return();
 490  	}
 491  	return();
 492  }
 493  
 494  function void clear_all_spell_lists() {
 495  	clearList(Q5V0);
 496  	clearList(Q4PF);
 497  	clearList(Q5QM);
 498  	clearList(Q61M);
 499  	clearList(Q4QW);
 500  	clearList(Q4P4);
 501  	clearList(Q5T7);
 502  	clearList(Q5RM);
 503  	clearList(Q4NI);
 504  	if (hasObjVar(Q56M, "inUse")) {
 505  		removeObjVar(Q56M, "inUse");
 506  	}
 507  	if (hasScript(Q56M, "removeinuse")) {
 508  		removeObjVar(Q56M, "removeinuse");
 509  	}
 510  	return();
 511  }
 512  
 513  trigger callback(0x1B) {
 514  	if (hasObjVar(Q56M, "inUse")) {
 515  		removeObjVar(Q56M, "inUse");
 516  	}
 517  	if (hasObjVar(Q5U9, "inUse")) {
 518  		removeObjVar(Q5U9, "inUse");
 519  	}
 520  	return(0x01);
 521  }

#53 jailcheck.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5M6 int → was_jailed
Source — jailcheck.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member int Q5M6;
   4  
   5  trigger creation {
   6  	callback(this, 0x0708, 0x74);
   7  	return(0x01);
   8  }
   9  
  10  function int is_in_jail_location(obj Q4XN) {
  11  	loc jail_location = 0x14AB, 0x0496, 0x00;
  12  	loc character_location = getLocation(crystal_obj);
  13  	if (getDistanceInTiles(jail_location, character_location) < 0x32) {
  14  		return(0x01);
  15  	}
  16  	return(0x00);
  17  }
  18  
  19  function void teleport_to_unjail_location(obj Q4XN) {
  20  	loc unjail_location = 0x05E0, 0x05F9, 0x28;
  21  	if (hasObjVar(crystal_obj, "UnJailLoc")) {
  22  		unjail_location = getObjVar(crystal_obj, "UnJailLoc");
  23  		removeObjVar(crystal_obj, "UnJailLoc");
  24  	}
  25  	int teleport_result = teleport(crystal_obj, unjail_location);
  26  	return();
  27  }
  28  
  29  trigger callback(0x74) {
  30  	shortcallback(this, 0x01, 0x75);
  31  	if (is_in_jail_location(this)) {
  32  		Q5M6 = 0x01;
  33  		teleport_to_unjail_location(this);
  34  	}
  35  	return(0x01);
  36  }
  37  
  38  trigger callback(0x75) {
  39  	if (Q5M6) {
  40  		systemMessage(this, "You have been released from jail");
  41  	}
  42  	if (hasObjVar(this, "UnJailLoc")) {
  43  		removeObjVar(this, "UnJailLoc");
  44  	}
  45  	if (hasObjVar(this, "NoLogOut")) {
  46  		removeObjVar(this, "NoLogOut");
  47  	}
  48  	detachScript(this, "jailcheck");
  49  	return(0x01);
  50  }
  51

   5  	if (getX(getLocation(this)) == 0x143B) {
   6  		if (getY(getLocation(this)) == 0x024C) {
   7  			Q56T = 0x1430, 0x0248, 0x00;
   8  			messageToRange(Q56T, 0x01, "PPdisarm", Q5DQ);
   9  		}
  10  		if (getY(getLocation(this)) == 0x0249) {
  11  			Q56T = 0x1435, 0x0257, 0x00;
  12  			messageToRange(Q56T, 0x0A, "FSdisarm", Q5DQ);

  14  	}

  18  			messageToRange(Q56T, 0x01, "WTdisarm", Q5DQ);

  21  		if (getY(getLocation(this)) == 0x024C) {

  23  			messageToRange(Q56T, 0x02, "WSdisarm", Q5DQ);
  24  		}
  25  	}
  26  	return(0x00);
  27  }
  28  
  29  trigger leaverange(0x00) {
  30  	if (getX(getLocation(this)) == 0x143B) {
  31  		if (getY(getLocation(this)) == 0x0249) {
  32  			callback(this, 0x3C, 0x02);
  33  		}
  34  		if (getY(getLocation(this)) == 0x024C) {
  35  			callback(this, 0x3C, 0x04);
  36  		}
  37  	}
  38  	if (getX(getLocation(this)) == 0x1431) {
  39  		if (getY(getLocation(this)) == 0x0249) {
  40  			callback(this, 0x3C, 0x01);
  41  		}
  42  		if (getY(getLocation(this)) == 0x024C) {
  43  			callback(this, 0x3C, 0x03);
  44  		}
  45  	}
  46  	return(0x00);
  47  }
  48  
  49  trigger callback(0x01) {
  50  	loc Q56T = 0x1430, 0x0257, 0x00;
  51  	messageToRange(Q56T, 0x01, "WTreload", Q5DQ);
  52  	return(0x00);
  53  }
  54  
  55  trigger callback(0x02) {
  56  	loc Q56T = 0x1435, 0x0257, 0x00;
  57  	messageToRange(Q56T, 0x0A, "FSreload", Q5DQ);
  58  	return(0x00);
  59  }
  60

#55 lightngbase.m 3 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5NQ int → reflected
Q57L obj → caster
Q57M obj → target
Source — lightngbase.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q5NQ;
   4  
   5  member obj Q57L;
   6  
   7  member obj Q57M;
   8  
   9  function int cast_lightning(obj user, obj usedon, int Q5NM) {
  10  	int success = 0x00;
  11  	if (is_valid_spell_target(usedon)) {
  12  		int damage;
  13  		loc user_loc = getLocation(user);
  14  		loc there = getLocation(usedon);
  15  		faceHere(user, getDirectionInternal(user_loc, there));
  16  		doLightning(usedon);
  17  		sfx(there, 0x29, 0x00);
  18  		Q57M = usedon;
  19  		Q57L = user;
  20  		handle_pvp_crime_report(user, usedon, 0x02, reflected);
  21  		callback(this, 0x01, 0x19);
  22  		Q5NQ = reflected;
  23  		success = 0x01;
  24  	}
  25  	trigger_mana_drain_if_enabled(this, success);
  26  	return(success);
  27  }
  28  
  29  trigger callback(0x19) {
  30  	if (!isValid(Q57M)) {
  31  		return(0x00);
  32  	}
  33  	int Q527 = apply_spell_damage(this, Q57L, Q57M, 0x02, Q5NQ);
  34  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  35  	return(0x00);
  36  }

#57 mageclue.m 8 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4VK loc → loc_first
Q4VL loc → loc_second
Q453 int → sequence_step
Q5YF obj → speaker_first
Q5YG obj → speaker_second
Q46H obj → beacon_first
Q46I obj → beacon_second
Q4XY int → sequence_active
Source — mageclue.m 
   1  inherits sndfx;
   2  
   3  member loc Q4VK;
   4  
   5  member loc Q4VL;
   6  
   7  member int Q453;
   8  
   9  member obj marker;
  10  
  11  member obj subject;
  12  
  13  member obj Q5YF;
  14  
  15  member obj Q5YG;
  16  
  17  member obj Q46H;
  18  
  19  member obj Q46I;
  20  
  21  member int Q4XY;
  22  
  23  forward void start_sequence();
  24  
  25  trigger message("activate") {
  26  	list Q5Y2;
  27  	int i = 0x00;
  28  	marker = this;
  29  	getMobsAt(Q5Y2, getLocation(this));
  30  	subject = Q5Y2[i];
  31  	start_sequence();
  32  	return(0x00);
  33  }
  34  
  35  trigger callback(0x2F) {
  36  	if (isValid(Q46H)) {
  37  		deleteObject(Q46H);
  38  	}
  39  	switch(Q453) {
  40  	case 0x01
  41  		Q46H = createGlobalObjectAt(0x1EEC, Q4VK);
  42  		shortcallback(marker, 0x02, 0x2F);
  43  		Q453 = 0x02;
  44  		break;
  45  	case 0x02
  46  		Q5YF = createGlobalObjectAt(0x1EF3, Q4VK);
  47  		barkToHued(Q5YF, subject, 0x22, "Start as the sun and move with time. Consider A FEW before the elements are placed, for a lack of order can bring Relvinian's bane.");
  48  		Q453 = 0x03;
  49  		callback(marker, 0x09, 0x2F);
  50  		break;
  51  	case 0x03
  52  		deleteObject(Q5YF);
  53  		Q46I = createGlobalObjectAt(0x1EEC, Q4VL);
  54  		Q453 = 0x04;
  55  		shortcallback(marker, 0x02, 0x2F);
  56  		break;
  57  	case 0x04
  58  		deleteObject(Q46I);
  59  		Q5YG = createGlobalObjectAt(0x1EF3, Q4VL);
  60  		barkToHued(Q5YG, subject, 0x22, "Once thy decision has been made, proceed to the altar and between the flames pronounce the Master's name.");
  61  		Q453 = 0x05;
  62  		callback(marker, 0x09, 0x2F);
  63  		break;
  64  	case 0x05
  65  		deleteObject(Q5YG);
  66  		Q4XY = 0x00;
  67  		break;
  68  	default
  69  		break;
  70  	}
  71  	return(0x00);
  72  }
  73  
  74  function void start_sequence() {
  75  	Q4VK = 0x0469, 0x08B7, 0x1E;
  76  	Q4VL = 0x0469, 0x08B5, 0x1E;
  77  	Q453 = 0x01;
  78  	if (Q4XY == 0x00) {
  79  		Q4XY = 0x01;
  80  		shortcallback(marker, 0x01, 0x2F);
  81  	}
  82  	return();
  83  }
  84
#58 magehat.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4N4 int → str_dex_mod
Q66A int → int_mod
Source — magehat.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q4N4;
   4  
   5  member int Q66A;
   6  
   7  trigger creation {
   8  	Q4N4 = 0x00 - 0x05;
   9  	Q66A = 0x05;
  10  	setObjVar(this, "lookAtText", "a magical wizard's hat");
  11  	return(0x01);
  12  }
  13  
  14  trigger objectloaded {
  15  	Q4N4 = 0x00 - 0x05;
  16  	Q66A = 0x05;
  17  	return(0x01);
  18  }
  19  
  20  trigger equip {
  21  	for (int s = 0x00; s < 0x02; s++) {
  22  		modify_character_stat(equippedon, s, Q4N4);
  23  	}
  24  	modify_character_stat(equippedon, 0x02, Q66A);
  25  	return(0x01);
  26  }
  27  
  28  trigger unequip {
  29  	int Q5NN = 0x00 - Q4N4;
  30  	int Q5NP = 0x00 - Q66A;
  31  	for (int s = 0x00; s < 0x02; s++) {
  32  		modify_character_stat(unequippedfrom, s, Q5NN);
  33  	}
  34  	modify_character_stat(unequippedfrom, 0x02, Q5NP);
  35  	return(0x01);
  36  }

#59 magepuzzle.m 10 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5JJ loc → portcullis_loc_1
Q5JK loc → portcullis_loc_2
Q5HH loc → earth_loc
Q5HI loc → fire_loc
Q5HJ loc → wind_loc
Q5HK loc → water_loc
Q4WE obj → earth_marker
Q4WF obj → fire_marker
Q4WG obj → wind_marker
Q4WH obj → water_marker
Source — magepuzzle.m 
   1  inherits sndfx;
   2  
   3  member obj subject;
   4  
   5  member loc Q5JJ;
   6  
   7  member loc Q5JK;
   8  
   9  member loc Q5HH;
  10  
  11  member loc Q5HI;
  12  
  13  member loc Q5HJ;
  14  
  15  member loc Q5HK;
  16  
  17  member obj Q4WE;
  18  
  19  member obj Q4WF;
  20  
  21  member obj Q4WG;
  22  
  23  member obj Q4WH;
  24  
  25  forward int check_elements_placed();
  26  
  27  forward void open_portcullis();
  28  
  29  forward void spawn_daemon();
  30  
  31  trigger speech("Relvinian") {
  32  	list Q5HT;
  33  	setObjVar(speaker, "spokeName", 0x01);
  34  	getMobsAt(Q5HT, getLocation(this));
  35  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5HT); i++) {
  36  		if (hasObjVar(Q5HT[i], "spokeName")) {
  37  			removeObjVar(Q5HT[i], "spokeName");
  38  			subject = Q5HT[i];
  39  			callback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
  40  			return(0x00);
  41  		}
  42  	}
  43  	if (isValid(speaker)) {
  44  		removeObjVar(speaker, "spokeName");
  45  	}
  46  	return(0x00);
  47  }
  48  
  49  trigger speech("relvinian") {
  50  	list Q5HT;
  51  	setObjVar(speaker, "spokeName", 0x01);
  52  	getMobsAt(Q5HT, getLocation(this));
  53  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5HT); i++) {
  54  		if (hasObjVar(Q5HT[i], "spokeName")) {
  55  			removeObjVar(Q5HT[i], "spokeName");
  56  			subject = Q5HT[i];
  57  			callback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
  58  			return(0x00);
  59  		}
  60  	}
  61  	if (isValid(speaker)) {
  62  		removeObjVar(speaker, "spokeName");
  63  	}
  64  	return(0x00);
  65  }
  66  
  67  trigger speech("RELVINIAN") {
  68  	list Q5HT;
  69  	setObjVar(speaker, "spokeName", 0x01);
  70  	getMobsAt(Q5HT, getLocation(this));
  71  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5HT); i++) {
  72  		if (hasObjVar(Q5HT[i], "spokeName")) {
  73  			removeObjVar(Q5HT[i], "spokeName");
  74  			subject = Q5HT[i];
  75  			callback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
  76  			return(0x00);
  77  		}
  78  	}
  79  	if (isValid(speaker)) {
  80  		removeObjVar(speaker, "spokeName");
  81  	}
  82  	return(0x00);
  83  }
  84  
  85  trigger callback(0x2F) {
  86  	if (check_elements_placed() == 0x01) {
  87  		open_portcullis();
  88  	} else {
  89  		spawn_daemon();
  90  	}
  91  	return(0x00);
  92  }
  93  
  94  function int check_elements_placed() {
  95  	list nearby_objects;
  96  	int success = 0x00;
  97  	int obj_type;
  98  	Q5HH = 0x0470, 0x08B6, 0x14;
  99  	Q5HI = 0x046D, 0x08B9, 0x14;
 100  	Q5HJ = 0x046A, 0x08B6, 0x14;
 101  	Q5HK = 0x046D, 0x08B3, 0x14;
 102  	getObjectsAt(nearby_objects, Q5HH);
 103  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(nearby_objects); i++) {
 104  		obj_type = getObjType(nearby_objects[i]);
 105  		if (obj_type == 0x0F0E) {
 106  			obj earth = nearby_objects[i];
 107  			success++;
 108  		}
 109  	}
 110  	clearList(nearby_objects);
 111  	getObjectsAt(nearby_objects, Q5HI);
 112  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(nearby_objects); i++) {
 113  		obj_type = getObjType(nearby_objects[i]);
 114  		if (obj_type == 0x1F2B) {
 115  			obj fire = nearby_objects[i];
 116  			success++;
 117  		}
 118  	}
 119  	getObjectsAt(nearby_objects, Q5HJ);
 120  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(nearby_objects); i++) {
 121  		obj_type = getObjType(nearby_objects[i]);
 122  		if (obj_type == 0x19B8) {
 123  			obj wind = nearby_objects[i];
 124  			success++;
 125  		}
 126  	}
 127  	clearList(nearby_objects);
 128  	getObjectsAt(nearby_objects, Q5HK);
 129  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(nearby_objects); i++) {
 130  		obj_type = getObjType(nearby_objects[i]);
 131  		if (obj_type == 0x0FFA) {
 132  			obj water = nearby_objects[i];
 133  			success++;
 134  		}
 135  	}
 136  	if (success >= 0x04) {
 137  		deleteObject(earth);
 138  		Q4WE = createGlobalObjectAt(0x1ECD, Q5HH);
 139  		deleteObject(fire);
 140  		Q4WF = createGlobalObjectAt(0x1ECD, Q5HI);
 141  		deleteObject(wind);
 142  		Q4WG = createGlobalObjectAt(0x1ECD, Q5HJ);
 143  		deleteObject(water);
 144  		Q4WH = createGlobalObjectAt(0x1ECD, Q5HK);
 145  		return(0x01);
 146  	}
 147  	return(0x00);
 148  }
 149  
 150  function void open_portcullis() {
 151  	list portcullis;
 152  	Q5JJ = 0x33, 0x46, 0x00;
 153  	Q5JK = 0x33, 0x45, 0x00;
 154  	getObjectsAt(portcullis, Q5JJ);
 155  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(portcullis); i++) {
 156  		int obj_type = getObjType(portcullis[i]);
 157  		if (obj_type == 0x06F6) {
 158  			deleteObject(portcullis[i]);
 159  		}
 160  	}
 161  	clearList(portcullis);
 162  	getObjectsAt(portcullis, Q5JK);
 163  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(portcullis); i++) {
 164  		obj_type = getObjType(portcullis[i]);
 165  		if (obj_type == 0x06F6) {
 166  			deleteObject(portcullis[i]);
 167  		}
 168  	}
 169  	callback(this, 0x012C, 0x1B);
 170  	return();
 171  }
 172  
 173  trigger callback(0x1B) {
 174  	obj Q5JL = createGlobalObjectAt(0x06F6, Q5JJ);
 175  	obj Q5JM = createGlobalObjectAt(0x06F6, Q5JK);
 176  	deleteObject(Q4WE);
 177  	deleteObject(Q4WF);
 178  	deleteObject(Q4WG);
 179  	deleteObject(Q4WH);
 180  	return(0x00);
 181  }
 182  
 183  function void spawn_daemon() {
 184  	int delay;
 185  	loc spawn_loc = 0x2E, 0x4D, 0x00;
 186  	doLocAnimation(spawn_loc, 0x3728, 0x08, 0x14, 0x00, 0x00);
 187  	obj daemon = createGlobalNPCAt(0x022F, spawn_loc, 0x00);
 188  	sfx(spawn_loc, 0x0216, 0x00);
 189  	setType(daemon, 0x0A);
 190  	attachScript(daemon, "destcrea");
 191  	delay = 0x0384;
 192  	callback(daemon, delay, 0x08);
 193  	doDamage(subject, daemon, 0x00);
 194  	return();
 195  }
 196
#60 magicitem.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5HU list → seen_by
Source — magicitem.m 
   1  inherits identify;
   2  
   3  member list Q5HU;
   4  
   5  forward void track_looker(obj Q4GA);
   6  
   7  forward int has_seen_item(obj looker);
   8  
   9  trigger lookedat {
  10  	if (hasObjVar(this, "owner")) {
  11  		obj Q4GA = getObjVar(this, "owner");
  12  		track_looker(Q4GA);
  13  	}
  14  	string name;
  15  	name = get_item_description(this);
  16  	if (hasObjVar(this, "beenIdentified")) {
  17  		if (has_seen_item(looker) > 0x00) {
  18  			string Q54S = getObjVar(this, "MagicItemName");
  19  			name = Q54S;
  20  			if (hasObjVar(this, "charges")) {
  21  				int charges = getObjVar(this, "charges");
  22  				if (charges > 0x00) {
  23  					name = Q54S + "  charges: " + charges;
  24  				}
  25  			}
  26  		}
  27  	}
  28  	barkTo(this, looker, name);
  29  	return(0x00);
  30  }
  31  
  32  trigger creation {
  33  	setObjVar(this, "lookAtText", get_item_description(this));
  34  	return(0x00);
  35  }
  36  
  37  function void track_looker(obj Q4GA) {
  38  	if (isInList(Q5HU, player)) {
  39  		for (int list_index = 0x00; list_index < numInList(Q5HU); list_index++) {
  40  			obj current_player = Q5HU[list_index];
  41  			if (player == current_player) {
  42  				return();
  43  			}
  44  		}
  45  	} else {
  46  		appendToList(Q5HU, player);
  47  	}
  48  	if (numInList(Q5HU) > 0x04) {
  49  		removeItem(Q5HU, 0x05);
  50  	}
  51  	return();
  52  }
  53  
  54  function int has_seen_item(obj looker) {
  55  	for (int list_index = 0x00; list_index < numInList(Q5HU); list_index++) {
  56  		obj current_player = Q5HU[list_index];
  57  		if (looker == current_player) {
  58  			return(0x01);
  59  		}
  60  	}
  61  	return(0x00);
  62  }
  63
#61 mapmaking.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q60G obj → target_map
Source — mapmaking.m 
   1  inherits sk_table;
   2  
   3  member obj Q60G;
   4  
   5  trigger message("canUseSkill") {
   6  	return(0x00);
   7  }
   8  
   9  trigger callback(0x4D) {
  10  	detachScript(this, "mapmaking");
  11  	return(0x00);
  12  }
  13  
  14  trigger message("useSkill") {
  15  	callback(this, 0x0A, 0x4D);
  16  	systemMessage(this, "Select the map upon which to draw.");
  17  	targetObj(this, this);
  18  	return(0x00);
  19  }
  20  
  21  trigger targetobj {
  22  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
  23  		return(0x00);
  24  	}
  25  	list Q60H = 0x14EB, 0x14EC, 0x14ED, 0x14EE;
  26  	int Q4QI = 0x00;
  27  	for (int i = 0x00; i < 0x04; i++) {
  28  		int Q615 = getObjType(usedon);
  29  		int Q60Q = Q60H[i];
  30  		if (Q615 == Q60Q) {
  31  			Q4QI = 0x01;
  32  		}
  33  	}
  34  	if (!Q4QI) {
  35  		barkTo(usedon, user, "This is not a map.");
  36  		return(0x00);
  37  	}
  38  	if (hasObjVar(usedon, "wasHandMade")) {
  39  		barkTo(usedon, user, "You cannot overwrite this carefully hand-drawn map!");
  40  		return(0x00);
  41  	}
  42  	Q60G = usedon;
  43  	list Q55C = 0x196F, "A map of the local environs.", 0x1970, "A map suitable for cities.", 0x1971, "A moderately sized sea chart.", 0x1972, "A map of the world.";
  44  	selectType(user, this, 0x1A, "Attempt what scale of map?", Q55C);
  45  	return(0x00);
  46  }
  47  
  48  function void clear_map_vars(obj Q60G) {
  49  	if (hasObjVar(map, "stockmap")) {
  50  		removeObjVar(map, "stockmap");
  51  		if (hasObjVar(map, "lookAtText")) {
  52  			removeObjVar(map, "lookAtText");
  53  		}
  54  	}
  55  	return;
  56  }
  57  
  58  trigger typeselected(0x1A) {
  59  	bark(Q60G, "Making the map now.");
  60  	if (hasObjVar(Q60G, "valueless")) {
  61  		removeObjVar(this, "valueless");
  62  	}
  63  	if (!testSkill(this, 0x0C)) {
  64  		clear_map_vars(Q60G);
  65  		setMapProperties(Q60G, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00);
  66  		barkTo(Q60G, this, "Thy trembling hand results in an unusable map.");
  67  		if (random(0x00, 0x03) == 0x01) {
  68  			deleteObject(Q60G);
  69  		}
  70  		return(0x00);
  71  	}
  72  	int Q4OH;
  73  	int Q5OG;
  74  	int skill = getSkillLevel(this, 0x0C);
  75  	loc Q5ZU = getLocation(this);
  76  	switch(objtype) {
  77  	case 0x196F
  78  		Q5OG = 0x04;
  79  		break;
  80  	case 0x1970
  81  		Q5OG = 0x08;
  82  		break;
  83  	case 0x1971
  84  		Q5OG = 0x14;
  85  		break;
  86  	case 0x1972
  87  		Q5OG = 0x28;
  88  		Q5ZU = 0x0580, 0x0680, 0x00;
  89  		break;
  90  	default
  91  		Q5OG = 0x01;
  92  		break;
  93  	}
  94  	if (skill < 0x0A) {
  95  		skill = 0x0A;
  96  	}
  97  	Q4OH = ((skill * Q5OG) / 0x02) + 0x40;
  98  	int Q5T8 = Q4OH / 0x02;
  99  	if (Q5OG > 0x0A) {
 100  		Q5T8 = Q5T8 - (Q5T8 / 0x03);
 101  	}
 102  	if (Q5T8 < 0xC8) {
 103  		Q5T8 = 0xC8;
 104  	}
 105  	if (Q5T8 > 0x0190) {
 106  		Q5T8 = 0x0190;
 107  	}
 108  	if (Q5T8 > Q4OH) {
 109  		Q4OH = Q5T8;
 110  	}
 111  	int Q69M = Q5T8;
 112  	int Q69X = Q5T8;
 113  	int Q4AV = getX(Q5ZU);
 114  	int Q4AW = getY(Q5ZU);
 115  	int Q69G = Q4AV - Q4OH;
 116  	int Q69P = Q4AW - Q4OH;
 117  	int Q69I = Q4AV + Q4OH;
 118  	int Q69R = Q4AW + Q4OH;
 119  	if (Q69G < 0x00) {
 120  		Q69G = 0x00;
 121  	}
 122  	if (Q69I > 0x13FF) {
 123  		Q69I = 0x144F;
 124  	}
 125  	if (Q69P < 0x00) {
 126  		Q69P = 0x00;
 127  	}
 128  	if (Q69R > 0x0FFF) {
 129  		Q69R = 0x0FFF;
 130  	}
 131  	clear_map_vars(Q60G);
 132  	setMapProperties(Q60G, 0x00, Q69G, Q69P, Q69I, Q69R, Q69M, Q69X);
 133  	setObjVar(Q60G, "wasHandMade", 0x01);
 134  	barkTo(Q60G, this, "With great care, thou dost make a chart of the geography.");
 135  	return(0x00);
 136  }
 137
#62 mastercrier.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q641 list → crier_list
Source — mastercrier.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member list Q641;
   4  
   5  trigger message("towncrieradd") {
   6  	obj it = args[0x00];
   7  	if (!isInList(Q641, it)) {
   8  		appendToList(Q641, it);
   9  	}
  10  	return(0x01);
  11  }
  12  
  13  trigger message("towncrierremove") {
  14  	obj it = args[0x00];
  15  	if (isInList(Q641, it)) {
  16  		removeSpecificItem(Q641, it);
  17  	}
  18  	return(0x01);
  19  }
  20  
  21  function void broadcast_to_criers(string Q56W, list args) {
  22  	int num = numInList(Q641);
  23  	for (int i = 0x00; i < num; i++) {
  24  		obj it = Q641[i];
  25  		multiMessage(it, msg_key, args);
  26  	}
  27  	return();
  28  }
  29  
  30  trigger message("towncrieraddmessage") {
  31  	broadcast_to_criers("towncrieraddmessage", args);
  32  	return(0x01);
  33  }
  34  
  35  trigger message("towncrierremovemessage") {
  36  	broadcast_to_criers("towncrierremovemessage", args);
  37  	return(0x01);
  38  }
  39  
  40  trigger decay {
  41  	return(0x00);
  42  }
  43
#63 meteorbase.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5HT list → meteor_targets
Q57L obj → caster
Source — meteorbase.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member list Q5HT;
   4  
   5  member obj Q57L;
   6  
   7  function int apply_meteor_swarm(obj user, loc place) {
   8  	int hit = 0x00;
   9  	int damage;
  10  	loc caster_loc = getLocation(user);
  11  	faceHere(user, getDirectionInternal(caster_loc, place));
  12  	list nearby_mobs;
  13  	clearList(Q5HT);
  14  	int crime_reported = 0x00;
  15  	Q57L = user;
  16  	getMobsInRange(nearby_mobs, place, 0x02);
  17  	beginSequence();
  18  	for (int x = 0x00; x < numInList(nearby_mobs); x++) {
  19  		obj mob = nearby_mobs[x];
  20  		if (is_valid_spell_target(mob)) {
  21  			hit = 0x01;
  22  			if (hasScript(mob, "reflctor")) {
  23  				doMobAnimation(mob, 0x36B0, 0x0A, 0x0A, 0x00, 0x00);
  24  				int damage = apply_spell_damage(this, user, user, 0x04, 0x01);
  25  			} else {
  26  				int delay_ticks;
  27  				sfx(caster_loc, 0x0160, 0x00);
  28  				doMissile_Mob2Mob(user, mob, 0x36D4, 0x07, 0x00, 0x01);
  29  				if ((getDistanceInTiles(caster_loc, place)) > 0x06) {
  30  					delay_ticks = 0x02;
  31  				} else {
  32  					delay_ticks = 0x01;
  33  				}
  34  				callback(this, delay_ticks, 0x19);
  35  				appendToList(Q5HT, mob);
  36  				if (!crime_reported) {
  37  					crime_reported = 0x01;
  38  					handle_pvp_crime_report(Q57L, mob, 0x02, 0x00);
  39  				}
  40  			}
  41  		}
  42  	}
  43  	endSequence(0x01);
  44  	trigger_mana_drain_if_enabled(this, hit);
  45  	return(hit);
  46  }
  47  
  48  trigger callback(0x19) {
  49  	int Q527 = apply_circle_damage(0x02, this, Q57L, Q5HT, 0x04);
  50  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  51  	return(0x00);
  52  }
  53
#64 mindblstbase.m 4 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5NQ int → is_reflected
Q57L obj → damage_source
Q57M obj → damage_target
Q57H int → pending_damage
Source — mindblstbase.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q5NQ;
   4  
   5  member obj Q57L;
   6  
   7  member obj Q57M;
   8  
   9  member int Q57H;
  10  
  11  function int apply_mind_blast(obj user, obj usedon, int Q5NM) {
  12  	int success = 0x00;
  13  	if (is_valid_spell_target(usedon)) {
  14  		int damage;
  15  		loc user_loc = getLocation(user);
  16  		loc there = getLocation(usedon);
  17  		faceHere(user, getDirectionInternal(user_loc, there));
  18  		doMobAnimation(usedon, 0x374A, 0x0A, 0x0F, 0x00, 0x00);
  19  		sfx(there, 0x0213, 0x00);
  20  		int int_diff = (getIntelligence(user) - getIntelligence(usedon));
  21  		obj damage_target = usedon;
  22  		obj damage_source = user;
  23  		apply_damage_clamped(user, usedon, 0x00, is_reflected);
  24  		if (int_diff <= 0x00) {
  25  			int_diff = (getIntelligence(usedon) - getIntelligence(user));
  26  			doMobAnimation(user, 0x374A, 0x0A, 0x0F, 0x00, 0x00);
  27  			damage_target = user;
  28  			damage_source = usedon;
  29  		}
  30  		damage = int_diff / 0x04;
  31  		Q57M = damage_target;
  32  		Q57H = damage;
  33  		Q57L = damage_source;
  34  		callback(this, 0x01, 0x19);
  35  		handle_pvp_crime_report(user, usedon, 0x02, is_reflected);
  36  		Q5NQ = is_reflected;
  37  		success = 0x01;
  38  	} else {
  39  		bark(user, "This spell won't work on that!");
  40  		display_spell_fizzle_effect(user);
  41  	}
  42  	trigger_mana_drain_if_enabled(this, success);
  43  	return(success);
  44  }
  45  
  46  trigger callback(0x19) {
  47  	int Q527 = apply_spell_damage_typed(this, Q57H, Q57L, Q57M, 0x08, Q5NQ);
  48  	scriptTrig(Q57M, 0x01, Q57L);
  49  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  50  	return(0x00);
  51  }
  52
#65 multidecay.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4H2 int → decay_count
Source — multidecay.m 
   1  inherits multistuff;
   2  
   3  member int Q4H2;
   4  
   5  trigger decay {
   6  	obj Q5AK = getMultiSlaveId(this);
   7  	int Q4H6 = getobjvar_int(Q5AK, "decayvisits");
   8  	if (Q4H6 < 0x0B40) {
   9  		Q4H6 = Q4H6 + 0x01;
  10  		setObjVar(Q5AK, "decayvisits", Q4H6);
  11  		return(0x00);
  12  	}
  13  	resetMultiCarriedDecay(Q5AK);
  14  	int Q4H4 = 0x01;
  15  	intRet(Q4H4);
  16  	return(0x01);
  17  }

#66 nrgyboltbase.m 3 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5NQ int → is_reflected
Q57L obj → caster
Q57M obj → target
Source — nrgyboltbase.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q5NQ;
   4  
   5  member obj Q57L;
   6  
   7  member obj Q57M;
   8  
   9  function int launch_energy_bolt(obj user, obj usedon, int Q5NM) {
  10  	int success = 0x00;
  11  	if (is_valid_spell_target(usedon)) {
  12  		loc user_loc = getLocation(user);
  13  		loc there = getLocation(usedon);
  14  		faceHere(user, getDirectionInternal(user_loc, there));
  15  		doMissile_Mob2Mob(user, usedon, 0x379F, 0x07, 0x00, 0x01);
  16  		sfx(user_loc, 0x020A, 0x00);
  17  		Q57M = usedon;
  18  		Q57L = user;
  19  		callback(this, 0x01, 0x19);
  20  		handle_pvp_crime_report(user, usedon, 0x02, is_reflected);
  21  		Q5NQ = is_reflected;
  22  		success = 0x01;
  23  	}
  24  	trigger_mana_drain_if_enabled(this, success);
  25  	return(success);
  26  }
  27  
  28  trigger callback(0x19) {
  29  	int Q527 = apply_spell_damage(this, Q57L, Q57M, 0x02, Q5NQ);
  30  	if (isValid(Q57M)) {
  31  		scriptTrig(Q57M, 0x01, Q57L);
  32  	}
  33  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  34  	return(0x00);
  35  }
  36
#67 nrgyvrtxbase.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4E1 loc → summon_loc
Source — nrgyvrtxbase.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member loc Q4E1;
   4  
   5  function int summon_energy_vortex(obj user, loc place) {
   6  	int success = 0x00;
   7  	int damage;
   8  	loc user_loc = getLocation(user);
   9  	faceHere(user, getDirectionInternal(user_loc, place));
  10  	list objects_at_target;
  11  	getObjectsAt(objects_at_target, place);
  12  	if (numInList(objects_at_target) == 0x00) {
  13  		if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
  14  			report_crime_at_location(user, Q4E1, 0x02, 0x00);
  15  		}
  16  		Q4E1 = place;
  17  		obj vortex = createGlobalNPCAt(0x023D, Q4E1, 0x00);
  18  		if (vortex != NULL()) {
  19  			success = 0x01;
  20  			copyControllerInfo(vortex, user);
  21  			attachScript(vortex, "vortexai");
  22  			attachScript(vortex, "destcrea");
  23  			setObjVar(vortex, "summonDifficulty", 0x0320);
  24  			sfx(Q4E1, 0x0212, 0x00);
  25  			callback(vortex, 0x5A, 0x08);
  26  			int state_result = doNPCHandleStates(vortex);
  27  		}
  28  	} else {
  29  		barkTo(user, user, "That location is blocked.");
  30  	}
  31  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  32  	return(success);
  33  }
  34
#68 opengate.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4OG loc → dest_loc
Q5FU int → is_active
Source — opengate.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member loc Q4OG;
   4  
   5  member int Q5FU;
   6  
   7  trigger creation {
   8  	setX(Q4OG, getObjVar(this, "xPoint"));
   9  	setY(Q4OG, getObjVar(this, "yPoint"));
  10  	setZ(Q4OG, getObjVar(this, "zPoint"));
  11  	return(0x00);
  12  }
  13  
  14  function void prompt_moongate_confirmation(obj me, obj player) {
  15  	list menu_options;
  16  	appendToList(menu_options, 0x00);
  17  	appendToList(menu_options, "Yes");
  18  	appendToList(menu_options, 0x01);
  19  	appendToList(menu_options, "No");
  20  	selectType(player, me, 0x2C, "Dost thou wish to step into the moongate?", menu_options);
  21  	return();
  22  }
  23  
  24  function int teleport_player_to_dest(obj me, obj player) {
  25  	teleport_followers(player, Q4OG);
  26  	if (teleport(player, Q4OG)) {
  27  		sfx(getLocation(player), 0x01FE, 0x00);
  28  		return(0x01);
  29  	}
  30  	return(0x00);
  31  }
  32  
  33  function int exits_justice_region(obj me, obj player) {
  34  	if ((inJusticeRegion(getLocation(me))) && (!inJusticeRegion(Q4OG))) {
  35  		return(0x01);
  36  	}
  37  	return(0x00);
  38  }
  39  
  40  function int can_player_use_gate(obj gate, obj it) {
  41  	if (!Q5FU) {
  42  		return(0x00);
  43  	}
  44  	if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(gate), getLocation(it)) > 0x01) {
  45  		return(0x00);
  46  	}
  47  	int player_z = getZ(getLocation(it));
  48  	int gate_z = getZ(getLocation(gate));
  49  	int gate_height = getHeight(gate);
  50  	int gate_max_z = gate_z + gate_height;
  51  	if ((player_z < gate_z) || (player_z > gate_max_z)) {
  52  		return(0x00);
  53  	}
  54  	return(0x01);
  55  }
  56  
  57  function int handle_gate_enter(obj gate, obj Q68S) {
  58  	if (!can_player_use_gate(gate, player)) {
  59  		return(0x01);
  60  	}
  61  	reveal_and_notify(player);
  62  	int result;
  63  	if (exits_justice_region(gate, player)) {
  64  		prompt_moongate_confirmation(gate, player);
  65  		result = teleport(player, getLocation(gate));
  66  		return(0x00);
  67  	} else {
  68  		result = teleport_player_to_dest(gate, player);
  69  	}
  70  	return(0x00);
  71  }
  72  
  73  trigger enterrange(0x00) {
  74  	return(handle_gate_enter(this, target));
  75  }
  76  
  77  trigger use {
  78  	if (getLocation(this) == getLocation(user)) {
  79  		int Q527 = handle_gate_enter(this, user);
  80  	}
  81  	return(0x00);
  82  }
  83  
  84  trigger typeselected(0x2C) {
  85  	if (listindex == 0x00) {
  86  		return(0x00);
  87  	}
  88  	if (objtype != 0x00) {
  89  		return(0x00);
  90  	}
  91  	if (!can_player_use_gate(this, user)) {
  92  		return(0x00);
  93  	}
  94  	int Q527 = teleport_player_to_dest(this, user);
  95  	return(0x00);
  96  }
  97  
  98  trigger callback(0x79) {
  99  	loc Q4FZ = getLocation(this);
 100  	int okay = 0x01;
 101  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "sourceGate")) {
 102  		deleteObject(this);
 103  	}
 104  	if (isAnyMultiAt(Q4FZ) != NULL()) {
 105  		okay = 0x00;
 106  	}
 107  	if (has_gate_at_loc(Q4FZ, this)) {
 108  		okay = 0x00;
 109  	}
 110  	list Q5QZ;
 111  	appendToList(Q5QZ, okay);
 112  	obj Q5UE = getObjVar(this, "sourceGate");
 113  	appendToList(Q5QZ, this);
 114  	multimessage(Q5UE, "gatestatus", Q5QZ);
 115  	Q5FU = okay;
 116  	if (!okay) {
 117  		deleteObject(this);
 118  	}
 119  	return(0x01);
 120  }
 121  
 122  trigger message("gatestatus") {
 123  	int i = args[0x00];
 124  	if (i) {
 125  		Q5FU = 0x01;
 126  	} else {
 127  		deleteObject(this);
 128  	}
 129  	return(0x01);
 130  }
 131
#69 oracle.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4FN string → pending_message_text
Source — oracle.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  forward void addMessage(list );
   4  
   5  forward void display_oracle_messages();
   6  
   7  forward int find_oracle_message_index(string );
   8  
   9  member string Q4FN;
  10  
  11  trigger creation {
  12  	list Q58D;
  13  	setObjVar(this, "oracleMessages", Q58D);
  14  	return(0x00);
  15  }
  16  
  17  function void addMessage(list Q58D) {
  18  	list Q45T;
  19  	getObjListVar(Q45T, this, "oracleMessages");
  20  	appendToList(Q45T, Q58D);
  21  	setObjVar(this, "oracleMessages", Q45T);
  22  	bark(this, "Message added.");
  23  	return();
  24  }
  25  
  26  function void display_oracle_messages() {
  27  	list oracle_messages;
  28  	getObjListVar(oracle_messages, this, "oracleMessages");
  29  	if (numInList(oracle_messages) < 0x01) {
  30  		bark(this, "No messages are set.");
  31  		return();
  32  	}
  33  	string message_keyword;
  34  	string t;
  35  	list current_message_record;
  36  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(oracle_messages); i++) {
  37  		copyList(current_message_record, oracle_messages[i]);
  38  		message_keyword = current_message_record[0x00];
  39  		t = current_message_record[0x01];
  40  		bark(this, "'" + t + "', Keyword: '" + message_keyword + "'.'");
  41  	}
  42  	return();
  43  }
  44  
  45  function int find_oracle_message_index(string Q51K) {
  46  	int message_index;
  47  	list a;
  48  	getObjListVar(a, this, "oracleMessages");
  49  	list current_message_record;
  50  	string record_keyword;
  51  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(a); i++) {
  52  		copyList(current_message_record, a[i]);
  53  		record_keyword = current_message_record[0x00];
  54  		if (target_message_keyword == record_keyword) {
  55  			return(message_index);
  56  		}
  57  	}
  58  	return(0x00 - 0x01);
  59  }
  60  
  61  trigger textentry(0x22) {
  62  	Q4FN = text;
  63  	bark(this, "Adding text '" + Q4FN + "'.");
  64  	systemMessage(sender, "Enter the keyword that will trigger this response.");
  65  	textEntry(this, sender, 0x24, 0x00, "");
  66  	return(0x00);
  67  }
  68  
  69  trigger textentry(0x24) {
  70  	list u = text, Q4FN;
  71  	addMessage(u);
  72  	return(0x00);
  73  }
  74  
  75  trigger textentry(0x23) {
  76  	int Q4Y2 = find_oracle_message_index(text);
  77  	if (Q4Y2 == (0x00 - 0x01)) {
  78  		systemMessage(sender, "That keyword was not found.");
  79  		return(0x00);
  80  	}
  81  	list a;
  82  	getObjListVar(a, this, "oracleMessages");
  83  	removeItem(a, Q4Y2);
  84  	systemMessage(sender, "Oracle string removed.");
  85  	setObjVar(this, "oracleMessages", a);
  86  	return(0x00);
  87  }
  88  
  89  trigger use {
  90  	int Q45V = 0x00;
  91  	if (hasObjVar(user, "allowedToEditOracle")) {
  92  		Q45V = 0x01;
  93  	}
  94  	if (isEditing(user)) {
  95  		Q45V = 0x01;
  96  	}
  97  	if (!Q45V) {
  98  		return(0x01);
  99  	}
 100  	list Q56N;
 101  	appendToList(Q56N, 0x00);
 102  	appendToList(Q56N, "View conversation strings.");
 103  	appendToList(Q56N, 0x01);
 104  	appendToList(Q56N, "Add a conversation string.");
 105  	appendToList(Q56N, 0x02);
 106  	appendToList(Q56N, "Remove a conversation string.");
 107  	appendToList(Q56N, 0x03);
 108  	appendToList(Q56N, "Clear all conversation strings.");
 109  	selectType(user, this, 0x3A, "ORACLE CONTROL MENU", Q56N);
 110  	return(0x00);
 111  }
 112  
 113  trigger typeselected(0x3A) {
 114  	if (listindex == 0x00) {
 115  		return(0x00);
 116  	}
 117  	switch(objtype) {
 118  	case 0x00
 119  		display_oracle_messages();
 120  		break;
 121  	case 0x01
 122  		systemMessage(user, "Enter the text of the oracle message:");
 123  		textEntry(this, user, 0x22, 0x00, "");
 124  		break;
 125  	case 0x02
 126  		systemMessage(user, "Enter the keyword of the message to remove:");
 127  		textEntry(this, user, 0x23, 0x00, "");
 128  		break;
 129  	case 0x03
 130  		list Q48F;
 131  		setObjVar(this, "oracleMessages", Q48F);
 132  		systemMessage(user, "All oracle messages cleared.");
 133  		break;
 134  	default
 135  		return(0x00);
 136  		break;
 137  	}
 138  	return(0x00);
 139  }
 140  
 141  function int find_first_matching_message_index(list w) {
 142  	list a;
 143  	getObjListVar(a, this, "oracleMessages");
 144  	string target_message_keyword;
 145  	string input_keyword;
 146  	list current_message_record;
 147  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(w); i++) {
 148  		input_keyword = w[i];
 149  		for (int board_index = 0x00; board_index < numInList(a); board_index++) {
 150  			copyList(current_message_record, a[board_index]);
 151  			target_message_keyword = current_message_record[0x00];
 152  			if (target_message_keyword == input_keyword) {
 153  				return(board_index);
 154  			}
 155  		}
 156  	}
 157  	return(0xFF);
 158  }
 159  
 160  function string get_oracle_message_text(int Q4XT) {
 161  	list current_message_record;
 162  	list a;
 163  	getObjListVar(a, this, "oracleMessages");
 164  	copyList(current_message_record, a[message_record_index]);
 165  	string message_text = current_message_record[0x01];
 166  	return(message_text);
 167  }
 168  
 169  trigger speech("*") {
 170  	if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(this), getLocation(speaker)) > 0x04) {
 171  		return(0x01);
 172  	}
 173  	list Q69B;
 174  	split(Q69B, arg);
 175  	int Q4QI = find_first_matching_message_index(Q69B);
 176  	if (Q4QI != 0xFF) {
 177  		bark(this, get_oracle_message_text(Q4QI));
 178  		return(0x00);
 179  	}
 180  	return(0x01);
 181  }
 182
#70 orderchaos.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5YH obj → recruit_candidate
Q4YU int → is_order_faction
Source — orderchaos.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member obj Q5YH;
   4  
   5  member int Q4YU;
   6  
   7  function int has_order_sigil(obj Q68S) {
   8  	if (hasObjType(target_player, 0x1BC3) || hasObjTypeInBank(target_player, 0x1BC3)) {
   9  		return(0x01);
  10  	}
  11  	return(0x00);
  12  }
  13  
  14  function int has_chaos_sigil(obj Q68S) {
  15  	if (hasObjType(target_player, 0x1BC4) || hasObjTypeInBank(target_player, 0x1BC4) || hasObjType(target_player, 0x1BC5) || hasObjTypeInBank(target_player, 0x1BC5)) {
  16  		return(0x01);
  17  	}
  18  	return(0x00);
  19  }
  20  
  21  function int has_faction_sigil(obj Q68S) {
  22  	if (Q4YU) {
  23  		return(has_order_sigil(player));
  24  	}
  25  	return(has_chaos_sigil(player));
  26  }
  27  
  28  function int has_rival_sigil(obj Q68S) {
  29  	if (Q4YU) {
  30  		return(has_chaos_sigil(player));
  31  	}
  32  	return(has_order_sigil(player));
  33  }
  34  
  35  function int handle_virtue_guard_speech(obj speaker, obj this) {
  36  	list responses;
  37  	string response;
  38  	if (has_faction_sigil(speaker)) {
  39  		responses = "Hail and well met!", "Greetings, fellow guard.", "In the name of our liege, greetings!", "Greetings, my friend.", "Hail, my friend.", "Yes, thou'rt a virtue guard.", "Hmm? Yes, I am one. So art thou.", "Yes, as thou knowest, it is a great thing to be one!", "Isn't it wonderful being a virtue guard?", "Why dost thou ask about virtue guards when thou art one?";
  40  		response = responses[random(0x00, numInList(responses) - 0x01)];
  41  		bark(this, response);
  42  		return(0x00);
  43  	}
  44  	if (has_rival_sigil(speaker)) {
  45  		responses = "Stay away, lest our rivalry develop into something worse!", "Thou'rt not of my brotherhood! Away with thee!", "Whilst I grant respect to thy lord, I mislike thy emblem.", "Art thou here to harass me?", "Tch tch... thou wearest the wrong emblem!", "'Tis a pity that thou art in the wrong camp!", "There is a rivalry between thy group and mine--be careful.", "Is not thy emblem a sign that thou art a member of our rival guards?";
  46  		response = responses[random(0x00, numInList(responses) - 0x01)];
  47  		bark(this, response);
  48  		return(0x00);
  49  	}
  50  	if (getNotoriety(speaker) < 0x7F) {
  51  		responses = "Thou art not worthy of being a member of our fraternity.", "The guards will not accept thee until thy reputation improves.", "Thou hast not the unblemished record we expect from our members.", "Thy record is not good enough to join the guards.", "Only those of utmost probity are accepted into the guards.", "Only the very best of citizens may join the guards.", "Thou dost not qualify for the virtue guards; thy record is not good enough.";
  52  		response = responses[random(0x00, numInList(responses) - 0x01)];
  53  		if (getNotorietyLevel(speaker) > 0x04) {
  54  			response = response + " Thou'rt extremely close, however.";
  55  		} else {
  56  			if (getNotorietyLevel(speaker) < 0x00) {
  57  				response = response + " Do not dishonor us by asking again, scum.";
  58  			}
  59  		}
  60  		bark(this, response);
  61  		return(0x00);
  62  	}
  63  	if (Q4YU) {
  64  		responses = "Thou hast the look of a likely candidate for joining Lord Blackthorn's guards.", "Wouldst thou be interested in joining Blackthorn's guard?", "Blackthorn's guard hath been looking for folk like thee.", "Thou'rt a good and honest person. Care to join Lord Blackthorn's guard?", "If thou art interested in joining Lord Blackthorn's guard, a place can be found for thee.";
  65  		response = responses[random(0x00, numInList(responses) - 0x01)];
  66  		response = response + " Say 'yea' if thou art interested.";
  67  		bark(this, response);
  68  	} else {
  69  		responses = "Thou hast the look of a likely candidate for joining Lord British's guards.", "Wouldst thou be interested in joining British's guard?", "British's guard hath been looking for folk like thee.", "Thou'rt a good and honest person. Care to join Lord British's guard?", "If thou art interested in joining Lord British's guard, a place can be found for thee.";
  70  		response = responses[random(0x00, numInList(responses) - 0x01)];
  71  		response = response + " Say 'yea' if thou art interested.";
  72  		bark(this, response);
  73  	}
  74  	Q5YH = speaker;
  75  	return(0x00);
  76  }
  77  
  78  trigger speech("virtue*guard") {
  79  	if (getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
  80  		return(0x01);
  81  	}
  82  	int Q4Q1 = handle_virtue_guard_speech(speaker, this);
  83  	return(0x00);
  84  }
  85  
  86  function int isChaosGuard(obj speaker) {
  87  	return(hasScript(speaker, "chaosguild"));
  88  }
  89  
  90  function int isOrderGuard(obj speaker) {
  91  	return(hasScript(speaker, "orderguild"));
  92  }
  93  
  94  function int is_speaker_same_faction(obj speaker) {
  95  	if (Q4YU) {
  96  		return(isOrderGuard(speaker));
  97  	}
  98  	return(isChaosGuard(speaker));
  99  }
 100  
 101  function int is_speaker_rival_faction(obj speaker) {
 102  	if (Q4YU) {
 103  		return(isChaosGuard(speaker));
 104  	}
 105  	return(isOrderGuard(speaker));
 106  }
 107  
 108  function void handle_shield_speech(obj speaker) {
 109  	list responses;
 110  	string response;
 111  	if (is_speaker_rival_faction(speaker)) {
 112  		responses = "Hail and well met!", "Greetings, fellow guard.", "In the name of our liege, greetings!", "Greetings, my friend.", "Hail, my friend.", "Yes, thou'rt a virtue guard.", "Hmm? Yes, I am one. So art thou.", "Yes, as thou knowest, it is a great thing to be one!", "Isn't it wonderful being a virtue guard?";
 113  		response = responses[random(0x00, numInList(responses) - 0x01)];
 114  		if (!has_faction_sigil(speaker)) {
 115  			response = response + "  I see you are in need of our shield.  Here you go.";
 116  			obj sigil;
 117  			if (Q4YU) {
 118  				sigil = requestCreateObjectIn(0x1BC3, getBackpack(speaker));
 119  			} else {
 120  				sigil = requestCreateObjectIn(0x1BC4, getBackpack(speaker));
 121  			}
 122  		}
 123  		bark(this, response);
 124  		return();
 125  	}
 126  	if (is_speaker_same_faction(speaker)) {
 127  		responses = "Stay away, lest our rivalry develop into something worse!", "Thou'rt not of my brotherhood! Away with thee!", "Whilst I grant respect to thy lord, I mislike thy emblem.", "Art thou here to harass me?", "Tch tch... thou wearest the wrong emblem!", "'Tis a pity that thou art in the wrong camp!", "There is a rivalry between thy group and mine--be careful.", "Is not thy emblem a sign that thou art a member of our rival guards?";
 128  		response = responses[random(0x00, numInList(responses) - 0x01)];
 129  		bark(this, response);
 130  		return();
 131  	}
 132  	if (isMurderer(speaker) || (getFameLevel(speaker) < 0x03)) {
 133  		responses = "Thou art not worthy of being a member of our fraternity.", "The guards will not accept thee until thy reputation improves.", "Thou hast not the unblemished record we expect from our members.", "Thy record is not good enough to join the guards.", "Only those of utmost probity are accepted into the guards.", "Only the very best of citizens may join the guards.", "Thou dost not qualify for the virtue guards; thy record is not good enough.";
 134  		response = responses[random(0x00, numInList(responses) - 0x01)];
 135  		bark(this, response);
 136  		return();
 137  	}
 138  	if (Q4YU) {
 139  		responses = "Thou hast the look of a likely candidate for joining Lord Blackthorn's guards.", "Wouldst thou be interested in joining Blackthorn's guard?", "Blackthorn's guard hath been looking for folk like thee.", "Thou'rt a good and honest person. Care to join Lord Blackthorn's guard?", "If thou art interested in joining Lord Blackthorn's guard, a place can be found for thee.";
 140  		response = responses[random(0x00, numInList(responses) - 0x01)];
 141  		response = response + " Sign up with a guild of chaos if thou art interested.";
 142  		bark(this, response);
 143  	} else {
 144  		responses = "Thou hast the look of a likely candidate for joining Lord British's guards.", "Wouldst thou be interested in joining British's guard?", "British's guard hath been looking for folk like thee.", "Thou'rt a good and honest person. Care to join Lord British's guard?", "If thou art interested in joining Lord British's guard, a place can be found for thee.";
 145  		response = responses[random(0x00, numInList(responses) - 0x01)];
 146  		response = response + " Sign up with a guild of order if thou art interested.";
 147  		bark(this, response);
 148  	}
 149  	return();
 150  }
 151  
 152  trigger speech("*order*shield*") {
 153  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
 154  		return(0x01);
 155  	}
 156  	handle_shield_speech(speaker);
 157  	return(0x00);
 158  }
 159  
 160  trigger speech("*chaos*shield*") {
 161  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
 162  		return(0x01);
 163  	}
 164  	handle_shield_speech(speaker);
 165  	return(0x00);
 166  }
 167  
 168  function int handle_yea_response(obj speaker) {
 169  	if (speaker != Q5YH) {
 170  		return(0x01);
 171  	}
 172  	if ((getNotoriety(speaker) < 0x7F) || has_chaos_sigil(speaker) || has_order_sigil(speaker)) {
 173  		Q5YH = NULL();
 174  		return(0x00);
 175  	}
 176  	obj sigil;
 177  	if (Q4YU) {
 178  		sigil = requestCreateObjectIn(0x1BC3, getBackpack(speaker));
 179  	} else {
 180  		sigil = requestCreateObjectIn(0x1BC4, getBackpack(speaker));
 181  	}
 182  	if (sigil == NULL()) {
 183  		bark(this, "I'm sorry, the ranks of the knights are currently full.");
 184  		return(0x00);
 185  	}
 186  	setObjVar(sigil, "owner", speaker);
 187  	list responses = "Excellent! Welcome to our ranks!", "Welcome to our ranks!", "Excellent!", "'Tis a good choice.", "Congratulations!", "I congratulate thee!";
 188  	string msg = responses[random(0x00, numInList(responses) - 0x01)];
 189  	msg = msg + " Thy shield is in thy backpack. Be sure that thou dost not lose thy reputation, or else thou shalt lose thy life with it.";
 190  	bark(this, msg);
 191  	Q5YH = NULL();
 192  	return(0x00);
 193  }
 194  
 195  function int handle_nay_response(obj speaker) {
 196  	if (speaker != Q5YH) {
 197  		return(0x01);
 198  	}
 199  	bark(this, "A pity.");
 200  	Q5YH = NULL();
 201  	return(0x00);
 202  }
 203  
 204  trigger speech("yes") {
 205  	return(handle_yea_response(speaker));
 206  }
 207  
 208  trigger speech("yea") {
 209  	return(handle_yea_response(speaker));
 210  }
 211  
 212  trigger speech("no") {
 213  	return(handle_nay_response(speaker));
 214  }
 215  
 216  trigger speech("nay") {
 217  	return(handle_nay_response(speaker));
 218  }
