  81  member int Q54C;
  82  
  83  function void play_special_attack_animation() {
  84  	if (getObjType(this) < 0xC8) {
  85  		animateMobile(this, 0x11, 0x05, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
  86  	} else {
  87  		animateMobile(this, 0x09, 0x05, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
  88  	}
  89  	return();
  90  }
  91  
  92  function void play_heavy_attack_animation() {
  93  	if (getObjType(this) < 0xC8) {
  94  		animateMobile(this, 0x12, 0x05, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
  95  	} else {
  96  		animateMobile(this, 0x0A, 0x03, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
  97  	}
  98  	return();
  99  }
 100  
 101  function void play_attack_animation() {
 102  	if (getObjType(this) < 0xC8) {
 103  		animateMobile(this, 0x0B, 0x05, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
 104  	} else {
 105  		animateMobile(this, 0x03, 0x05, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00);
 106  	}
 107  	return();
 108  }
 109  
 110  function int isPet(obj this) {
 111  	return((hasObjVar(this, "isPet")));
 112  }
 113  
 114  function int get_loyalty_value() {
 115  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "myLoyalty")) {
 116  		return(0x00);
 117  	}
 118  	int myLoyalty = getObjVar(this, "myLoyalty");
 119  	if (myLoyalty > 0x64) {
 120  		myLoyalty = 0x64;
 121  		setObjVar(this, "myLoyalty", myLoyalty);
 122  	}
 123  	return(myLoyalty);
 124  }
 125  
 126  function string format_boss_names_string() {
 127  	string formatted_names_string;
 128  	list myBoss;
 129  	int total_boss_count;
 130  	if (!hasObjListVar(this, "myBoss")) {
 131  		return("myself");
 132  	}
 133  	getObjListVar(myBoss, this, "myBoss");
 134  	total_boss_count = numInList(myBoss);
 135  	for (int i = 0x00; i < total_boss_count; i++) {
 136  		concat(formatted_names_string, getName(myBoss[i]));
 137  		if (i < (total_boss_count - 0x02)) {
 138  			concat(formatted_names_string, ", ");
 139  		} else {
 140  			if (i == (total_boss_count - 0x02)) {
 141  				if (total_boss_count == 0x02) {
 142  					concat(formatted_names_string, " and ");
 143  				} else {
 144  					concat(formatted_names_string, " and ");
 145  				}
 146  			}
 147  		}
 148  	}
 149  	return(formatted_names_string);
 150  }
 151  
 152  function int init_pet_sounds() {
 153  
 154  member int petAckSfx = 0x00;
 155  
 156  member int petRefuseSfx = 0x00;
 157  	if (hasObjVar(this, "petAckSfx")) {
 158  		petAckSfx = getObjVar(this, "petAckSfx");
 159  	}
 160  	if (hasObjVar(this, "petRefuseSfx")) {
 161  		petRefuseSfx = getObjVar(this, "petRefuseSfx");
 162  	}
 163  	return((petAckSfx + petRefuseSfx));
 164  }
 165  
 166  function int isOwnedPet(obj it) {
 167  	if (hasObjListVar(this, "myBoss")) {
 168  		list Q4TN;
 169  		getObjListVar(Q4TN, this, "myBoss");
 170  		if (numInList(Q4TN) > 0x00) {
 171  			return(0x01);
 172  		}
 173  	}
 174  	return(0x00);
 175  }
 176  
 177  trigger message("armageddon") {
 178  	int Q52T = args[0x00];
 179  	if (isOwnedPet(this)) {
 180  		if (Q52T >= 0x01) {
 181  			return(0x00);
 182  		}
 183  	}
 184  	return(0x01);
 185  }
 186  
 187  trigger creation {
 188  	string Q498;
 189  	if (0x00) {
 190  		bark(this, "Debug mode activated on pet/hireling script.");
 191  	}
 192  	if (!init_pet_sounds()) {
 193  		Q498 = "Failed to attach sounds to a pet/hireling named: " + getName(this);
 194  		debugMessage(Q498);
 195  		return(0x01);
 196  	}
 197  	if (0x00) {
 198  		if (!hasObjListVar(this, "myBoss")) {
 199  			bark(this, "Failed to find myBoss list var");
 200  		}
 201  	}
 202  	if (hasObjListVar(this, "myBoss")) {
 203  		disable_pet_behaviors(this);
 204  		list Q4TN;
 205  		getObjListVar(Q4TN, this, "myBoss");
 206  		obj blah = Q4TN[0x00];
 207  		if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
 208  			setNotoriety(this, getNotoriety(blah));
 209  		}
 210  		if (0x00) {
 211  			Q498 = "Successfully found boss " + format_boss_names_string() + ".";
 212  			bark(this, Q498);
 213  		}
 214  	}
 215  	return(0x01);
 216  }
 217  
 218  function void play_ack_response(obj pet) {
 219  	if (isPet(pet)) {
 220  		play_heavy_attack_animation();
 221  		sfx(getLocation(pet), petAckSfx, 0x00);
 222  	} else {
 223  		bark(pet, "Very well.");
 224  	}
 225  	return;
 226  }
 227  
 228  function void play_refuse_response(obj pet) {
 229  	if (isPet(pet)) {
 230  		play_special_attack_animation();
 231  		sfx(getLocation(pet), petRefuseSfx, 0x00);
 232  	} else {
 233  		bark(pet, "Sorry, but no.");
 234  	}
 235  	return;
 236  }
 237  
 238  function void play_confused_response(obj pet) {
 239  	if (isPet(pet)) {
 240  		play_special_attack_animation();
 241  		sfx(getLocation(pet), petRefuseSfx, 0x00);
 242  	} else {
 243  		bark(pet, "I do not understand.");
 244  	}
 245  	return;
 246  }
 247  
 248  function void abandon_owner(obj this) {
 249  	string msg;
 250  	obj container = getTopmostContainer(this);
 251  	if (container != NULL()) {
 252  		int ok = teleport(this, getLocation(container));
 253  		obj mount_item = getItemAtSlot(container, 0x19);
 254  		if (mount_item != NULL()) {
 255  			deleteObject(mount_item);
 256  		}
 257  	}
 258  	setObjVar(this, "defensive", 0x01);
 259  	setObjVar(this, "controllerTimeout", 0x02 * 0x3C * 0x04);
 260  	callbackAdvanced(this, 0x02 * 0x3C * 0x04, 0x14, 0x00);
 261  	if (!isPet(this)) {
 262  		bark(this, "I quit.");
 263  	} else {
 264  		play_refuse_response(this);
 265  		msg = getName(this) + " appears to have decided that it is better off without a master!";
 266  		toUpper(msg, 0x00, 0x01);
 267  		bark(this, msg);
 268  	}
 269  	if (hasObjListVar(this, "myBoss")) {
 270  		removeObjVar(this, "myBoss");
 271  	}
 272  	if (hasObjVar(this, "myLoyalty")) {
 273  		removeObjVar(this, "myLoyalty");
 274  	}
 275  	if (hasObjVar(this, "petWhoFollow")) {
 276  		removeObjVar(this, "petWhoFollow");
 277  	}
 278  	stopFollowing(this);
 279  	clear_all_guard_protections(this);
 280  	enableBehaviors(this);
 281  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
 282  		setNotoriety(this, 0x00);
 283  	}
 284  	if (isPet(this)) {
 285  		detachScript(this, "pet");
 286  	}
 287  	return;
 288  }
 289  
 290  trigger lookedat {
 291  	if (isPet(this)) {
 292  		barkTo(this, looker, "(tame)");
 293  	}
 294  	return(0x01);
 295  }
 296  
 297  function int check_loyalty(obj this, int Q57Y) {
 298  	int myLoyalty;
 299  	string debug;
 300  	myLoyalty = get_loyalty_value();
 301  	if (0x00) {
 302  		debug = myLoyalty;
 303  		bark(this, debug);
 304  	}
 305  	if ((random(0x00, 0x64) + difficulty) > myLoyalty) {
 306  		play_refuse_response(this);
 307  		if (myLoyalty < 0x00) {
 308  			abandon_owner(this);
 309  		}
 310  		return(0x00);
 311  	}
 312  	myLoyalty = myLoyalty + 0x01;
 313  	setObjVar(this, "myLoyalty", myLoyalty);
 314  	play_ack_response(this);
 315  	return(0x01);
 316  }
 317  
 318  trigger speech("*") {
 319  	if (!pet_has_boss(this, speaker)) {
 320  		return(0x01);
 321  	}
 322  	faceHere(this, getDirectionInternal(getLocation(this), getLocation(speaker)));
 323  	if (isPet(this)) {
 324  		play_special_attack_animation();
 325  	}
 326  	if (parse_and_route_command(this, speaker, arg)) {
 327  		return(0x00);
 328  	}
 329  	return(0x01);
 330  }
 331  
 332  function int find_name_index_in_list(list text, obj this) {
 333  	string current_word;
 334  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(text); i++) {
 335  		current_word = text[i];
 336  		if (current_word == getName(this)) {
 337  			return(i + 0x01);
 338  		}
 339  	}
 340  	return(0xFF);
 341  }
 342  
 343  function int check_next_word_is_me(int Q618, list text) {
 344  	int next_index;
 345  	string next_word;
 346  	int is_me;
 347  	is_me = 0x00;
 348  	next_index = name_index + 0x01;
 349  	if (next_index < numInList(text)) {
 350  		next_word = text[next_index];
 351  		if (next_word == "me") {
 352  			is_me = 0x01;
 353  		}
 354  	}
 355  	return(is_me);
 356  }
 357  
 358  function int parse_and_route_command(obj this, obj speaker, string arg) {
 359  	list text;
 360  	int unused = 0x00;
 361  	int name_idx = 0x00;
 362  	int unused2;
 363  	int is_me;
 364  	string cmd;
 365  	if (0x00) {
 366  		bark(this, "Parsing a command.");
 367  	}
 368  	split(text, arg);
 369  	name_idx = find_name_index_in_list(text, this);
 370  	if (name_idx == 0xFF) {
 371  		if (0x00) {
 372  			bark(this, "Name not found.");
 373  		}
 374  		return(0x00);
 375  	}
 376  	if (name_idx >= numInList(text)) {
 377  		if (0x00) {
 378  			bark(this, "Name only thing found.");
 379  		}
 380  		return(0x00);
 381  	}
 382  	if (get_loyalty_value() < 0x01) {
 383  		return(0x00);
 384  	}
 385  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
 386  		setNotoriety(this, getNotoriety(speaker));
 387  	}
 388  	cmd = text[name_idx];
 389  	is_me = check_next_word_is_me(name_idx, text);
 390  	if (handle_guard_command(this, cmd, speaker, is_me)) {
 391  		return(0x01);
 392  	}
 393  	if (isDead(speaker)) {
 394  		return(0x01);
 395  	}
 396  	if (0x00) {
 397  		bark(this, "Passed the dead check.");
 398  	}
 399  	if (handle_attack_command(this, cmd, speaker)) {
 400  		return(0x01);
 401  	}
 402  	if (handle_friend_command(this, cmd, speaker)) {
 403  		return(0x01);
 404  	}
 405  	if (handle_patrol_command(this, cmd, speaker)) {
 406  		return(0x01);
 407  	}
 408  	if (handle_stay_command(this, cmd, speaker)) {
 409  		return(0x01);
 410  	}
 411  	if (handle_follow_command(this, cmd, speaker, is_me)) {
 412  		return(0x01);
 413  	}
 414  	if (handle_fetch_command(this, cmd, speaker)) {
 415  		return(0x01);
 416  	}
 417  	if (handle_come_command(this, cmd, speaker)) {
 418  		return(0x01);
 419  	}
 420  	if (handle_drop_command(this, cmd, speaker)) {
 421  		return(0x01);
 422  	}
 423  	if (handle_report_command(this, cmd, speaker)) {
 424  		return(0x01);
 425  	}
 426  	if (handle_release_command(this, cmd, speaker)) {
 427  		return(0x01);
 428  	}
 429  	if (handle_stop_command(this, cmd, speaker)) {
 430  		return(0x01);
 431  	}
 432  	if (handle_transfer_command(this, cmd, speaker)) {
 433  		return(0x01);
 434  	}
 435  	play_confused_response(this);
 436  	return(0x00);
 437  }
 438  
 439  function int handle_attack_command(obj this, string Q698, obj speaker) {
 440  	if ((command_string != "attack") && (command_string != "kill")) {
 441  		return(0x00);
 442  	}
 443  	if (0x00) {
 444  		bark(this, "Got order to attack.");
 445  	}
 446  	setObjVar(this, "petAttack", 0x01);
 447  	if (!isPet(this)) {
 448  		bark(this, "Who should I attack?");
 449  	} else {
 450  		systemMessage(speaker, "Select the victim.");
 451  	}
 452  	targetObj(speaker, this);
 453  	return(0x01);
 454  }
 455  
 456  function int handle_guard_command(obj this, string Q698, obj speaker, int Q4V9) {
 457  	if (cmd != "guard") {
 458  		return(0x00);
 459  	}
 460  	if (0x00) {
 461  		bark(this, "Got order to guard.");
 462  	}
 463  	if (is_me) {
 464  		if (get_loyalty_value() > 0x00) {
 465  			copyControllerInfo(this, speaker);
 466  			add_guard_protection(speaker, this);
 467  			play_ack_response(this);
 468  			return(0x01);
 469  		}
 470  	}
 471  	setObjVar(this, "petGuard", 0x01);
 472  	if (!isPet(this)) {
 473  		bark(this, "Tell me what to guard.");
 474  	} else {
 475  		systemMessage(speaker, "Click on the object, person, or place to guard.");
 476  	}
 477  	targetLoc(speaker, this);
 478  	return(0x01);
 479  }
 480  
 481  function int handle_friend_command(obj this, string Q698, obj speaker) {
 482  	if (command_string != "friend") {
 483  		return(0x00);
 484  	}
 485  	if (0x00) {
 486  		bark(this, "Got order to befriend.");
 487  	}
 488  	setObjVar(this, "petFriend", 0x01);
 489  	if (!isPet(this)) {
 490  		bark(this, "I shall obey this person's orders as if they were your own.");
 491  	} else {
 492  		systemMessage(speaker, "Click on the player whom you wish to make a co-owner.");
 493  	}
 494  	targetObj(speaker, this);
 495  	return(0x01);
 496  }
 497  
 498  function int handle_patrol_command(obj this, string Q698, obj speaker) {
 499  	int is_patrolling = 0x00;
 500  	if (cmd != "patrol") {
 501  		return(0x00);
 502  	}
 503  	if (0x00) {
 504  		bark(this, "Got order to patrol.");
 505  	}
 506  	if (hasObjVar(this, "continuePatrol")) {
 507  		is_patrolling = getObjVar(this, "continuePatrol");
 508  	}
 509  	if (!is_patrolling) {
 510  		setObjVar(this, "continuePatrol", 0x01);
 511  		if (!isPet(this)) {
 512  			bark(this, "Patrolling.");
 513  		} else {
 514  			play_ack_response(this);
 515  			barkTo(this, speaker, "Your pet begins to patrol.");
 516  		}
 517  		do_patrol_step(this);
 518  	} else {
 519  		setObjVar(this, "continuePatrol", 0x00);
 520  		if (!isPet(this)) {
 521  			bark(this, "Stopping patrol.");
 522  		} else {
 523  			play_ack_response(this);
 524  			barkTo(this, speaker, "Your pet stops patrolling.");
 525  		}
 526  	}
 527  	return(0x01);
 528  }
 529  
 530  function int handle_stay_command(obj this, string Q698, obj speaker) {
 531  	if (cmd != "stay") {
 532  		return(0x00);
 533  	}
 534  	if (!check_loyalty(this, 0x00)) {
 535  		return(0x01);
 536  	}
 537  	removeObjVar(this, "petWhoFollow");
 538  	stopFollowing(this);
 539  	disable_pet_behaviors(this);
 540  	return(0x01);
 541  }
 542  
 543  function int handle_follow_command(obj this, string Q698, obj speaker, int Q4V9) {
 544  	if (cmd != "follow") {
 545  		return(0x00);
 546  	}
 547  	if (is_me) {
 548  		if (pet_has_boss(this, speaker)) {
 549  			if (get_loyalty_value() > 0x00) {
 550  				play_ack_response(this);
 551  			}
 552  			setObjVar(this, "petWhoFollow", speaker);
 553  			followNpc(this, speaker, 0x00);
 554  		}
 555  		return(0x01);
 556  	}
 557  	setObjVar(this, "petFollow", 0x01);
 558  	if (!isPet(this)) {
 559  		bark(this, "Who shall I follow?");
 560  	} else {
 561  		systemMessage(speaker, "Click on the person to follow.");
 562  	}
 563  	targetObj(speaker, this);
 564  	return(0x01);
 565  }
 566  
 567  function int handle_fetch_command(obj this, string Q698, obj speaker) {
 568  	if ((command_string != "fetch") && (command_string != "get") && (command_string != "bring")) {
 569  		return(0x00);
 570  	}
 571  	if (getWeight(this) > 0x64) {
 572  		if (!isPet(this)) {
 573  			bark(this, "I am already carrying too much.");
 574  		} else {
 575  			systemMessage(speaker, "Your pet couldn't possibly carry any more.");
 576  		}
 577  		return(0x00);
 578  	}
 579  	setObjVar(this, "petFetch", 0x01);
 580  	if (!isPet(this)) {
 581  		bark(this, "What shall I get for you?");
 582  	} else {
 583  		systemMessage(speaker, "Click on the object to fetch.");
 584  	}
 585  	targetObj(speaker, this);
 586  	return(0x01);
 587  }
 588  
 589  function int handle_come_command(obj this, string Q698, obj speaker) {
 590  	if (cmd != "come") {
 591  		return(0x00);
 592  	}
 593  	if (0x00) {
 594  		bark(this, "Got order to come.");
 595  	}
 596  	if ((pet_has_boss(this, speaker)) && (check_loyalty(this, 0x00))) {
 597  		walkTo(this, getLocation(speaker), 0x0A);
 598  	}
 599  	return(0x01);
 600  }
 601  
 602  function int handle_drop_command(obj this, string Q698, obj speaker) {
 603  	if (cmd != "drop") {
 604  		return(0x00);
 605  	}
 606  	if (0x00) {
 607  		bark(this, "Got order to drop.");
 608  	}
 609  	list contents;
 610  	obj item;
 611  	getContents(contents, this);
 612  	play_ack_response(this);
 613  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(contents); i++) {
 614  		item = contents[i];
 615  		int result = teleport(item, getLocation(this));
 616  	}
 617  	return(0x01);
 618  }
 619  
 620  function int handle_report_command(obj this, string Q698, obj speaker) {
 621  	if (cmd != "report") {
 622  		return(0x00);
 623  	}
 624  	if (isPet(this)) {
 625  		return(0x00);
 626  	}
 627  	callBack(this, 0x01, 0x1A);
 628  	bark(this, "I currently accept orders from " + format_boss_names_string() + ".");
 629  	bark(this, "I am " + get_loyalty_description() + " about my job.");
 630  	if (hasObjVar(this, "petWhoFollow")) {
 631  		obj follow_target = getObjVar(this, "petWhoFollow");
 632  		bark(this, "I am following " + getName(follow_target) + ".");
 633  	}
 634  	return(0x01);
 635  }
 636  
 637  function int handle_release_command(obj this, string Q698, obj speaker) {
 638  	if (cmd != "release") {
 639  		return(0x00);
 640  	}
 641  	if (isPet(this)) {
 642  		play_ack_response(this);
 643  	} else {
 644  		bark(this, "I thank thee for thy kindness!");
 645  	}
 646  	shortcallback(this, 0x08, 0x08);
 647  	if (isPet(this)) {
 648  		setObjVar(this, "petCanTame", 0x00);
 649  	}
 650  	abandon_owner(this);
 651  	return(0x01);
 652  }
 653  
 654  function int handle_stop_command(obj this, string Q698, obj speaker) {
 655  	if (cmd != "stop") {
 656  		return(0x00);
 657  	}
 658  	if (isPet(this)) {
 659  		play_ack_response(this);
 660  	} else {
 661  		bark(this, "Very well, I am no longer guarding or following.");
 662  	}
 663  	clear_all_guard_protections(this);
 664  	stopFollowing(this);
 665  	return(0x01);
 666  }
 667  
 668  function int handle_transfer_command(obj this, string Q698, obj speaker) {
 669  	if (command_string != "transfer") {
 670  		return(0x00);
 671  	}
 672  	setObjVar(this, "petTransfer", 0x01);
 673  	if (!isPet(this)) {
 674  		bark(this, "Whom do you wish me to work for?");
 675  	} else {
 676  		systemMessage(speaker, "Click on the person to transfer ownership to.");
 677  	}
 678  	targetObj(speaker, this);
 679  	return(0x01);
 680  }
 681  
 682  function string get_loyalty_description() {
 683  	string mood_str;
 684  	int loyalty_tier = get_loyalty_value() / 0x0A;
 685  	switch(loyalty_tier) {
 686  	default
 687  		mood_str = "confused";
 688  		break;
 689  	case 0x01
 690  		mood_str = "extremely unhappy";
 691  		break;
 692  	case 0x02
 693  		mood_str = "rather unhappy";
 694  		break;
 695  	case 0x03
 696  		mood_str = "unhappy";
 697  		break;
 698  	case 0x04
 699  		mood_str = "content, I suppose,";
 700  		break;
 701  	case 0x05
 702  		mood_str = "content";
 703  		break;
 704  	case 0x06
 705  		mood_str = "happy";
 706  		break;
 707  	case 0x07
 708  		mood_str = "rather happy";
 709  		break;
 710  	case 0x08
 711  		mood_str = "very happy";
 712  		break;
 713  	case 0x09
 714  		mood_str = "extremely happy";
 715  		break;
 716  	case 0x0A
 717  		mood_str = "wonderfully happy";
 718  		break;
 719  	}
 720  	return(mood_str);
 721  }
 722  
 723  trigger callback(0x43) {
 724  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "askedMyLoyalty")) {
 725  		return(0x01);
 726  	}
 727  	obj Q46Z = getObjVar(this, "askedMyLoyalty");
 728  	removeObjVar(this, "askedMyLoyalty");
 729  	barkTo(Q46Z, Q46Z, "Your pet looks " + get_loyalty_description() + ".");
 730  	return(0x01);
 731  }
 732  
 733  trigger targetloc {
 734  	if (!isInMap(place)) {
 735  		return(0x00);
 736  	}
 737  	if (hasObjVar(this, "petGuard")) {
 738  		if (check_loyalty(this, 0x00)) {
 739  			guard_location(place, this);
 740  		}
 741  		removeObjVar(this, "petGuard");
 742  		return(0x00);
 743  	}
 744  	return(0x01);
 745  }
 746  
 747  trigger targetobj {
 748  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
 749  		removeObjVar(this, "petAttack");
 750  		removeObjVar(this, "petGuard");
 751  		removeObjVar(this, "petFollow");
 752  		removeObjVar(this, "petFetch");
 753  		removeObjVar(this, "petFriend");
 754  		removeObjVar(this, "petTransfer");
 755  		return(0x00);
 756  	}
 757  	if (hasObjVar(this, "petAttack")) {
 758  		execute_attack_command(this, usedon, user);
 759  		return(0x00);
 760  	}
 761  	if (hasObjVar(this, "petGuard")) {
 762  		execute_guard_command(this, usedon, user);
 763  		return(0x00);
 764  	}
 765  	if (hasObjVar(this, "petFollow")) {
 766  		execute_follow_command(this, usedon, user);
 767  		return(0x00);
 768  	}
 769  	if (hasObjVar(this, "petFetch")) {
 770  		execute_fetch_command(this, usedon, user);
 771  		return(0x00);
 772  	}
 773  	if (hasObjVar(this, "petFriend")) {
 774  		execute_friend_command(this, usedon, user);
 775  		return(0x00);
 776  	}
 777  	if (hasObjVar(this, "petTransfer")) {
 778  		execute_transfer_command(this, usedon, user);
 779  		return(0x00);
 780  	}
 781  	return(0x01);
 782  }
 783  
 784  function void add_pet_boss(obj pet, obj Q5CJ) {
 785  	list myBoss;
 786  	if (!hasObjListVar(pet, "myBoss")) {
 787  		setObjVar(pet, "myBoss", myBoss);
 788  	}
 789  	getObjListVar(myBoss, pet, "myBoss");
 790  	if (!isInList(myBoss, boss_obj)) {
 791  		appendToList(myBoss, boss_obj);
 792  	}
 793  	setObjVar(pet, "myBoss", myBoss);
 794  	return();
 795  }
 796  
 797  function void execute_friend_command(obj this, obj usedon, obj user) {
 798  	debugMessage("I are here");
 799  	if (check_loyalty(this, 0x00)) {
 800  		string msg;
 801  		if (hasObjVar(this, "isPet")) {
 802  			msg = "I shall obey the orders given me by " + getName(usedon) + " and treat " + getHimHer(usedon) + " as a friend.";
 803  			bark(this, msg);
 804  		} else {
 805  			msg = getName(this) + " will not guard against " + getName(usedon) + " and will obey " + getHisHer(usedon) + " orders as if they were your own.";
 806  			systemMessage(user, msg);
 807  			if (isPlayer(usedon)) {
 808  				msg = getName(user) + " has granted you the ability to give orders to " + getHisHer(user) + " pet " + getName(this) + ". This creature will now consider you a friend.";
 809  				systemMessage(usedon, msg);
 810  			}
 811  		}
 812  		debugMessage("I are here2");
 813  		receiveHelpfulActionFrom(usedon, user);
 814  		add_pet_boss(this, usedon);
 815  	}
 816  	return();
 817  }
 818  
 819  function void execute_fetch_command(obj this, obj usedon, obj user) {
 820  	if (check_loyalty(this, 0x00)) {
 821  		loc place = getLocation(usedon);
 822  		walkTo(this, place, 0x0B);
 823  
 824  member obj fetch_target = usedon;
 825  
 826  member obj fetch_recipient = user;
 827  	}
 828  	removeObjVar(this, "petFetch");
 829  	return();
 830  }
 831  
 832  function void execute_follow_command(obj this, obj usedon, obj user) {
 833  	if (pet_has_boss(this, usedon)) {
 834  		play_ack_response(this);
 835  	} else {
 836  		if (!check_loyalty(this, 0x00)) {
 837  			return();
 838  		}
 839  	}
 840  	if (usedon == this) {
 841  		removeObjVar(this, "petWhoFollow");
 842  		stopFollowing(this);
 843  	} else {
 844  		setObjVar(this, "petWhoFollow", usedon);
 845  		followNpc(this, usedon, 0x00);
 846  	}
 847  	removeObjVar(this, "petFollow");
 848  	return();
 849  }
 850  
 851  function void execute_guard_command(obj this, obj usedon, obj user) {
 852  	if (pet_has_boss(this, usedon)) {
 853  		copyControllerInfo(this, user);
 854  		add_guard_protection(usedon, this);
 855  	} else {
 856  		if (check_loyalty(this, 0x00)) {
 857  			obj target_multi = isAnyMultiBelow(getLocation(usedon));
 858  			if (!check_mobile_has_house_key(target_multi, user)) {
 859  				bark(this, "Items in other people's houses or ships cannot be guarded.");
 860  				play_refuse_response(this);
 861  				return();
 862  			}
 863  			if (isInContainer(usedon)) {
 864  				bark(this, "Items in containers cannot be guarded.");
 865  				play_refuse_response(this);
 866  				return();
 867  			}
 868  			if (thinksItsAtHome(usedon)) {
 869  				bark(this, "Other people's items cannot be guarded.");
 870  				play_refuse_response(this);
 871  				return();
 872  			}
 873  			if (isMobile(usedon)) {
 874  				if (!isPlayer(usedon)) {
 875  					if (!pet_has_boss(usedon, user)) {
 876  						bark(this, "Living things other than pets cannot be guarded.");
 877  						play_refuse_response(this);
 878  						return();
 879  					}
 880  				}
 881  			}
 882  			copyControllerInfo(this, user);
 883  			add_guard_protection(usedon, this);
 884  		}
 885  	}
 886  	if (0x00) {
 887  		bark(this, "done any guarding I'd do, returning.");
 888  	}
 889  	removeObjVar(this, "petGuard");
 890  	return();
 891  }
 892  
 893  function void execute_attack_command(obj this, obj usedon, obj user) {
 894  	int difficulty;
 895  	difficulty = getStrength(usedon) + getDexterity(usedon) + getSkillLevel(usedon, 0x05) + getSkillLevel(usedon, 0x1B);
 896  	difficulty = difficulty - (getStrength(this) + getDexterity(this) + getSkillLevel(this, 0x05) + getSkillLevel(this, 0x1B));
 897  	difficulty = difficulty / 0x0A;
 898  	if ((isHuman(usedon)) && (isNPC(usedon)) && (isHuman(this))) {
 899  		bark(this, "I am no murderer!");
 900  		return();
 901  	}
 902  	if (check_loyalty(this, difficulty)) {
 903  		if (0x00) {
 904  			bark(this, "Attacking!");
 905  		}
 906  		copyControllerInfo(this, user);
 907  		clear_all_guard_protections(this);
 908  		setObjVar(this, "controllerTimeout", 0x02 * 0x3C * 0x04);
 909  		callbackAdvanced(this, 0x02 * 0x3C * 0x04, 0x14, 0x00);
 910  		setObjVar(this, "victim", usedon);
 911  		setObjVar(this, "user", user);
 912  		walkTo(this, getLocation(usedon), 0x10);
 913  		attack(this, usedon);
 914  		if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
 915  			criminalAct(user, usedon, 0x01, 0x0A);
 916  			callGuards(user, getLocation(user), 0x02);
 917  		}
 918  	}
 919  	removeObjVar(this, "petAttack");
 920  	return();
 921  }
 922  
 923  function void execute_transfer_command(obj this, obj usedon, obj user) {
 924  	if (!isPlayer(usedon)) {
 925  		if (isPet(this)) {
 926  			play_refuse_response(this);
 927  		} else {
 928  			bark(this, "Uhh... Sure. If you say so. Uh-huh. No problem. Soon as it gives an order, I'll obey...");
 929  		}
 930  		removeObjVar(this, "petTransfer");
 931  		return();
 932  	}
 933  	removeObjVar(this, "myBoss");
 934  	add_pet_boss(this, usedon);
 935  	receiveHelpfulActionFrom(usedon, user);
 936  	removeObjVar(this, "petTransfer");
 937  	if (isPet(this)) {
 938  		play_ack_response(this);
 939  	} else {
 940  		bark(this, "Very well, I transfer my allegiance.");
 941  	}
 942  	if (hasObjVar(this, "petWhoFollow")) {
 943  		removeObjVar(this, "petWhoFollow");
 944  	}
 945  	stopFollowing(this);
 946  	clear_all_guard_protections(this);
 947  	return();
 948  }
 949  
 950  trigger pathnotfound(0x0A) {
 951  	if (isPet(this)) {
 952  		play_confused_response(this);
 953  		return(0x00);
 954  	}
 955  	bark(this, "I see no way to reach thee!");
 956  	return(0x00);
 957  }
 958  
 959  trigger pathfound(0x0B) {
 960  	if (!isMoveable(Q5F7, this)) {
 961  		play_refuse_response(this);
 962  		return(0x00);
 963  	}
 964  	if (containedBy(Q5F7) != NULL()) {
 965  		play_refuse_response(this);
 966  		return(0x00);
 967  	}
 968  	if (isAtHome(Q5F7)) {
 969  		play_refuse_response(this);
 970  		return(0x00);
 971  	}
 972  	if (getWeight(Q5F7) > (getStrength(this) / 0x02)) {
 973  		play_refuse_response(this);
 974  		return(0x00);
 975  	}
 976  	if (!putObjContainer(Q5F7, this)) {
 977  		play_refuse_response(this);
 978  		return(0x00);
 979  	}
 980  	loc place = getLocation(Q5HZ);
 981  	walkTo(this, place, 0x0C);
 982  	return(0x00);
 983  }
 984  
 985  trigger pathfound(0x0C) {
 986  	if (!canHold(Q5HZ, Q5F7)) {
 987  		if (!isPet(this)) {
 988  			bark(this, "I can't give you " + getName(Q5F7));
 989  		} else {
 990  			play_refuse_response(this);
 991  		}
 992  		return(0x00);
 993  	}
 994  	if (giveItem(Q5HZ, Q5F7) == NULL()) {
 995  		if (!isPet(this)) {
 996  			bark(this, "I can't give you " + getName(Q5F7));
 997  		} else {
 998  			play_refuse_response(this);
 999  		}
1000  	}
1001  	play_ack_response(this);
1002  	return(0x00);
1003  }
1004  
1005  trigger pathnotfound(0x0C) {
1006  	if (isPet(this)) {
1007  		play_confused_response(this);
1008  		return(0x00);
1009  	}
1010  	bark(this, "I see no way to reach you!");
1011  	return(0x00);
1012  }
1013  
1014  trigger pathnotfound(0x10) {
1015  	obj victim = getObjVar(this, "victim");
1016  	obj user = getObjVar(this, "user");
1017  	removeObjVar(this, "victim");
1018  	removeObjVar(this, "user");
1019  	attack(this, victim);
1020  	return(0x00);
1021  }
1022  
1023  trigger pathfound(0x10) {
1024  	obj victim = getObjVar(this, "victim");
1025  	obj user = getObjVar(this, "user");
1026  	removeObjVar(this, "victim");
1027  	removeObjVar(this, "user");
1028  	attack(this, victim);
1029  	return(0x00);
1030  }
1031  
1032  function int check_hiring_keywords(string arg, obj speaker, obj this) {
1033  	list text;
1034  	split(text, arg);
1035  	int unused_variable = 0x00;
1036  	int word_separator = 0x00;
1037  	string command_string;
1038  	list hiring_keywords_list = "hire", "hireling", "hiring", "mercenary", "servant", "work";
1039  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(text); i++) {
1040  		command_string = text[i];
1041  		if (isInList(hiring_keywords_list, command_string)) {
1042  			return(0x01);
1043  		}
1044  	}
1045  	return(0x00);
1046  }
1047  
1048  trigger speech("*") {
1049  	if (hasObjListVar(this, "myBoss") && (get_loyalty_value() > 0x00)) {
1050  		return(0x01);
1051  	}
1052  	if (!isHuman(this)) {
1053  		return(0x01);
1054  	}
1055  	if (!check_hiring_keywords(arg, speaker, this)) {
1056  		return(0x01);
1057  	}
1058  	string Q44O = "I am available for hire for ";
1059  	int Q4PT = getObjVar(this, "hirelingWages");
1060  	Q4PT = Q4PT * 0x0A;
1061  	string Q444 = Q4PT;
1062  	concat(Q44O, Q444);
1063  	concat(Q44O, " gold coins a day. If thou dost give me gold, I will work for thee.");
1064  	bark(this, Q44O);
1065  	add_pet_boss(this, speaker);
1066  	setObjVar(this, "myLoyalty", 0x00);
1067  	return(0x00);
1068  }
1069  
1070  function void disable_pet_behaviors(obj pet) {
1071  	disableBehaviors(pet);
1072  	clearBehavior(pet, 0x02);
1073  	clearBehavior(pet, 0x40);
1074  	return();
1075  }
1076  
1077  function int has_matching_resource(obj this, obj givenobj) {
1078  	int i;
1079  	int board_index;
1080  	string pet_resource_name;
1081  	string given_resource_name;
1082  	list pet_resources_list;
1083  	list given_resources_list;
1084  	if (!getResourcesOnObj(givenobj, 0x03, given_resources_list)) {
1085  		return(0x00);
1086  	}
1087  	if (!getResourcesOnObj(this, 0x00, pet_resources_list)) {
1088  		return(0x00);
1089  	}
1090  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(pet_resources_list); i++) {
1091  		for (board_index = 0x00; board_index < numInList(given_resources_list); board_index++) {
1092  			pet_resource_name = pet_resources_list[i];
1093  			given_resource_name = given_resources_list[board_index];
1094  			if (pet_resource_name == given_resource_name) {
1095  				return(0x01);
1096  			}
1097  		}
1098  	}
1099  	return(0x00);
1100  }
1101  
1102  trigger give {
1103  	int Q4QI;
1104  	int Q45Y;
1105  	int Q57Y;
1106  	int myLoyalty;
1107  	string Q47P;
1108  	string Q58D;
1109  	string Q5J5 = "s";
1110  	if (!pet_has_boss(this, giver)) {
1111  		return(0x01);
1112  	}
1113  	if (isPet(this)) {
1114  		if (!has_matching_resource(this, givenobj)) {
1115  			return(0x01);
1116  		}
1117  		setObjVar(this, "myLoyalty", 0x64);
1118  		int Q4TW = eatObject(this, givenobj);
1119  		play_attack_animation();
1120  		deleteObject(givenobj);
1121  		barkTo(this, giver, "Your pet looks happier.");
1122  		disable_pet_behaviors(this);
1123  		return(0x00);
1124  	}
1125  	if (getObjType(givenobj) != 0x0EED) {
1126  		return(0x01);
1127  	}
1128  	Q4QI = getResource(Q45Y, givenobj, "gold", 0x03, 0x02);
1129  	if (!Q4QI) {
1130  		bark(this, "This is counterfeit gold!");
1131  		return(0x00);
1132  	}
1133  	if (hasObjVar(this, "hirelingWages")) {
1134  		Q57Y = getObjVar(this, "hirelingWages");
1135  		Q57Y = Q57Y * 0x0A;
1136  		Q45Y = Q45Y / Q57Y;
1137  	}
1138  	if (Q45Y < 0x01) {
1139  		bark(this, "Thou must pay me more than this!");
1140  		return(0x00);
1141  	}
1142  	int Q4G0 = get_loyalty_value();
1143  	if (Q4G0 < 0x4B) {
1144  		Q4G0 = 0x4B + Q45Y;
1145  	} else {
1146  		Q4G0 = Q4G0 + Q45Y;
1147  	}
1148  	myLoyalty = Q4G0;
1149  	setObjVar(this, "myLoyalty", myLoyalty);
1150  	myLoyalty = myLoyalty - 0x4B;
1151  	Q47P = myLoyalty;
1152  	if (myLoyalty < 0x02) {
1153  		Q5J5 = "";
1154  	}
1155  	Q58D = "I thank thee for paying me. I will work for thee for the next " + Q47P + " day" + Q5J5 + ".";
1156  	bark(this, Q58D);
1157  	disable_pet_behaviors(this);
1158  	deleteObject(givenobj);
1159  	return(0x00);
1160  }
1161  
1162  trigger time("hour:**") {
1163  	string Q60K;
1164  	if (Q54C < 0x03) {
1165  		Q54C++;
1166  		return(0x01);
1167  	}
1168  	Q54C = 0x00;
1169  	if (hasObjVar(this, "isInStables")) {
1170  		return(0x01);
1171  	}
1172  	if (get_loyalty_value() > 0x0A) {
1173  		return(0x01);
1174  	}
1175  	if (!isPet(this)) {
1176  		list Q5N8 = "I am considering quitting.", "This job doth not pay enough.", "'Tis time to be thinking about a new master.", "Should I not be paid soon?", "I think more gold is required to keep me around much longer.", "If my master wisheth me near, payment would be needed!", "Soon I shall be free of this employment.", "My loyalty hath eroded, for lack of pay.", "My term of service is ending, unless I be paid more.", "'Tis crass of me, but I want gold.", "Methinks I shall quit my job soon.";
1177  		Q60K = Q5N8[random(0x00, (numInList(Q5N8) - 0x01))];
1178  		bark(this, Q60K);
1179  		return(0x01);
1180  	}
1181  	list Q4Q0;
1182  	getPlayersInRange(Q4Q0, getLocation(this), 0x10);
1183  	for (int Q53X = 0x00; Q53X < numInList(Q4Q0); Q53X++) {
1184  		obj Q46F = Q4Q0[Q53X];
1185  		if (pet_has_boss(this, Q46F)) {
1186  			barkTo(this, Q46F, "Your pet looks rather unhappy.");
1187  			play_refuse_response(this);
1188  		}
1189  	}
1190  	return(0x01);
1191  }
1192  
1193  trigger time("hour:12") {
1194  	int myLoyalty;
1195  	if (!hasObjListVar(this, "myBoss")) {
1196  		return(0x01);
1197  	}
1198  	if (hasObjVar(this, "isInStables")) {
1199  		return(0x01);
1200  	}
1201  	myLoyalty = get_loyalty_value();
1202  	myLoyalty = myLoyalty - 0x01;
1203  	if (myLoyalty == 0x00) {
1204  		abandon_owner(this);
1205  		return(0x01);
1206  	}
1207  	setObjVar(this, "myLoyalty", myLoyalty);
1208  	return(0x01);
1209  }
1210  
1211  trigger seekfood {
1212  	if (hasObjListVar(this, "myBoss") && (get_loyalty_value() < 0x01)) {
1213  		return(0x00);
1214  	}
1215  	return(0x01);
1216  }
1217  
1218  trigger seekdesire {
1219  	if (hasObjListVar(this, "myBoss") && (get_loyalty_value() < 0x01)) {
1220  		return(0x00);
1221  	}
1222  	return(0x01);
1223  }
1224  
1225  trigger seekshelter {
1226  	if (hasObjListVar(this, "myBoss") && (get_loyalty_value() < 0x01)) {
1227  		return(0x00);
1228  	}
1229  	return(0x01);
1230  }
1231  
1232  trigger death {
1233  	list Q4O3;
1234  	obj Q61K;
1235  	getEquipment(Q4O3, this);
1236  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q4O3); i++) {
1237  		Q61K = Q4O3[i];
1238  		deleteObject(Q61K);
1239  	}
1240  	return(0x01);
1241  }

#72 platemail.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4HY int → dex_modifier
Source — platemail.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q4HY;
   4  
   5  function void initialize_plate_mail_cost() {
   6  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "plateMailCost")) {
   7  		Q4HY = (0x00 - 0x05);
   8  	} else {
   9  		Q4HY = getObjVar(this, "plateMailCost");
  10  		Q4HY = (0x00 - Q4HY);
  11  	}
  12  	if (hasObjVar(this, "pmf")) {
  13  		removeObjVar(this, "pmf");
  14  	}
  15  	return();
  16  }
  17  
  18  trigger creation {
  19  	initialize_plate_mail_cost();
  20  	return(0x01);
  21  }
  22  
  23  trigger objectloaded {
  24  	initialize_plate_mail_cost();
  25  	return(0x01);
  26  }
  27  
  28  trigger equip {
  29  	modify_character_stat(equippedon, 0x01, Q4HY);
  30  	return(0x01);
  31  }
  32  
  33  trigger unequip {
  34  	int Q463 = 0x00 - Q4HY;
  35  	modify_character_stat(unequippedfrom, 0x01, Q463);
  36  	return(0x01);
  37  }

#73 poisoned.m 4 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4R0 int → callback_delay
Q5JF int → ticks_remaining
Q42Y int → damage_per_tick
Q4FG int → current_hp
Source — poisoned.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q4R0;
   4  
   5  member int Q5JF;
   6  
   7  member int strength;
   8  
   9  member int Q42Y;
  10  
  11  member int Q4FG;
  12  
  13  function void apply_poison_damage_by_strength(obj victim, int strength) {
  14  	Q4FG = getCurHP(victim);
  15  	switch(strength) {
  16  	case 0x01
  17  		actionBark(victim, 0x21, "* You feel a bit nauseous... *", "* " + getName(victim) + " looks ill. *");
  18  		Q42Y = Q4FG / 0x14;
  19  		break;
  20  	case 0x02
  21  		actionBark(victim, 0x21, "* You feel disoriented and nauseous! *", "* " + getName(victim) + " looks extremely ill. *");
  22  		Q42Y = Q4FG / 0x0F;
  23  		Q4R0 = 0x0A;
  24  		break;
  25  	case 0x03
  26  		actionBark(victim, 0x21, "* You begin to feel pain throughout your body! *", "* " + getName(victim) + " stumbles around in confusion and pain. *");
  27  		Q42Y = Q4FG / 0x08;
  28  		Q4R0 = 0x0A;
  29  		break;
  30  	case 0x04
  31  		actionBark(victim, 0x21, "* You feel extremely weak and are in severe pain! *", "* " + getName(victim) + " is wracked with extreme pain. *");
  32  		Q42Y = Q4FG / 0x04;
  33  		Q4R0 = 0x05;
  34  		break;
  35  	case 0x05
  36  		actionBark(victim, 0x21, "* You are in extreme pain, and require immediate aid! *", "* " + getName(victim) + " begins to spasm uncontrollably. *");
  37  		Q42Y = Q4FG / 0x02;
  38  		Q4R0 = 0x05;
  39  		break;
  40  	}
  41  	return();
  42  }
  43  
  44  function int is_poison_active(obj victim) {
  45  	if (isDead(this)) {
  46  		return(0x00);
  47  	}
  48  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "poison_strength")) {
  49  		setObjVar(this, "poison_strength", 0x01);
  50  		return(0x01);
  51  	}
  52  	if (getCurHP(this) < 0x00) {
  53  		return(0x00);
  54  	}
  55  	return(0x01);
  56  }
  57  
  58  trigger creation {
  59  	if (!is_poison_active(this)) {
  60  		cure_poison_effect(this);
  61  		return(0x00);
  62  	}
  63  	strength = getObjVar(this, "poison_strength");
  64  	setPoisoned(this, 0x01);
  65  	Q4R0 = 0x0F;
  66  	apply_poison_damage_by_strength(this, strength);
  67  	Q5JF = (random(0x0A, 0x14) * strength);
  68  	callBack(this, Q4R0, 0x53);
  69  	return(0x01);
  70  }
  71  
  72  trigger callback(0x53) {
  73  	if (!is_poison_active(this)) {
  74  		cure_poison_effect(this);
  75  		return(0x00);
  76  	}
  77  	Q5JF--;
  78  	if (Q5JF < 0x01) {
  79  		systemMessage(this, "The poison seems to have worn off.");
  80  		cure_poison_effect(this);
  81  		return(0x00);
  82  	}
  83  	doDamageType(NULL(), this, (Q42Y + 0x02), 0x08);
  84  	if (!is_poison_active(this)) {
  85  		cure_poison_effect(this);
  86  		return(0x00);
  87  	} else {
  88  		if (!random(0x00, 0x02)) {
  89  			strength = getObjVar(this, "poison_strength");
  90  			apply_poison_damage_by_strength(this, strength);
  91  		}
  92  		callBack(this, Q4R0, 0x53);
  93  		return(0x00);
  94  	}
  95  	cure_poison_effect(this);
  96  	return(0x00);
  97  }
  98  
  99  trigger ishealthy {
 100  	return(0x00);
 101  }
 102
#74 polychec.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4MY int → restore_done
Source — polychec.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q4MY;
   4  
   5  trigger callback(0x71) {
   6  	detachScript(this, "polychec");
   7  	return(0x01);
   8  }
   9  
  10  function void restore_polymorphed_character(obj it) {
  11  	if (Q4MY) {
  12  		return();
  13  	}
  14  	int equip_result;
  15  	list items_to_reequip;
  16  	string Q53Y;
  17  	int item_count;
  18  	int objSlot;
  19  	if (hasObjVar(it, "oldBodyType")) {
  20  		setType(it, getObjVar(it, "oldBodyType"));
  21  		removeObjVar(it, "oldBodyType");
  22  	}
  23  	if (hasObjVar(it, "oldHue")) {
  24  		setHue(it, getObjVar(it, "oldHue"));
  25  		removeObjVar(it, "oldHue");
  26  	}
  27  	if (hasObjListVar(it, "notMyItems")) {
  28  		getObjListVar(items_to_reequip, it, "notMyItems");
  29  		removeObjVar(it, "notMyItems");
  30  	}
  31  	item_count = numInList(items_to_reequip);
  32  	for (int x = 0x00; x < item_count; x++) {
  33  		objSlot = getObjVar(items_to_reequip[x], "objSlot");
  34  		removeObjVar(items_to_reequip[x], "objSlot");
  35  		equip_result = equipObj(items_to_reequip[x], it, objSlot);
  36  	}
  37  	shortcallback(it, 0x01, 0x71);
  38  	Q4MY = 0x01;
  39  	return();
  40  }
  41  
  42  trigger death {
  43  	restore_polymorphed_character(this);
  44  	return(0x01);
  45  }
  46  
  47  trigger callback(0x14) {
  48  	restore_polymorphed_character(this);
  49  	return(0x00);
  50  }
  51
#75 polymrph.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q59T int → new_body_type
Source — polymrph.m 
   1  inherits polymrphbase;
   2  
   3  member int Q59T;
   4  
   5  trigger use {
   6  	if (!hasObjVar(user, "oldBodyType")) {
   7  		initiate_creature_selection(user);
   8  	} else {
   9  		display_spell_fizzle_effect(user);
  10  	}
  11  	return(0x00);
  12  }
  13  
  14  function void cast_polymorph(obj user, int newType) {
  15  	Q59T = newType;
  16  	begin_spell_cast(this, user);
  17  	return();
  18  }
  19  
  20  trigger message("castspell") {
  21  	obj user = extract_user_from_container(this, args);
  22  	if (!isValid(user)) {
  23  		return(0x00);
  24  	}
  25  	if (hasObjVar(user, "oldBodyType")) {
  26  		display_spell_fizzle_effect(user);
  27  		return(0x00);
  28  	}
  29  	if (!check_and_consume_reagents(user, this)) {
  30  		return(0x00);
  31  	}
  32  	if ((!(hasObjVar(user, "oldBodyType"))) && (try_cast_spell(user, getLocation(user), this))) {
  33  		apply_polymorph(user, Q59T);
  34  	} else {
  35  		display_spell_fizzle_effect(user);
  36  	}
  37  	return(0x00);
  38  }
  39  
  40  trigger creation {
  41  	return(0x00);
  42  }
  43
#76 polymrphbase.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q62D obj → target
Source — polymrphbase.m 
   1  inherits sumdaem;
   2  
   3  member int picking;
   4  
   5  member obj Q62D;
   6  
   7  forward void prepare_polymorph_transformation(obj user, int Q4NC);
   8  
   9  function int apply_polymorph(obj user, int newType) {
  10  	int success = 0x00;
  11  	if (is_valid_spell_target(user)) {
  12  		if (newType >= 0x00) {
  13  			if (isRiding(user)) {
  14  				int unride_result = unRide(user);
  15  			}
  16  			if (!(hasObjVar(Q62D, "oldBodyType"))) {
  17  				setObjVar(Q62D, "oldBodyType", getObjType(Q62D));
  18  			}
  19  			if (!(hasObjVar(Q62D, "oldHue"))) {
  20  				setObjVar(Q62D, "oldHue", getHue(Q62D));
  21  			}
  22  			setType(user, newType);
  23  			setHue(user, 0x00);
  24  			int duration = (getSkillLevel(user, 0x19) / 0x05) * 0x05;
  25  			if (isScroll()) {
  26  				duration = 0x3C;
  27  			}
  28  			prepare_polymorph_transformation(user, duration);
  29  			success = 0x01;
  30  		}
  31  	}
  32  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  33  	return(success);
  34  }
  35  
  36  function void cast_polymorph(obj user, int newType) {
  37  	apply_polymorph(user, newType);
  38  	return();
  39  }
  40  
  41  trigger typeselected(0x1B) {
  42  	if (picking == 0x00) {
  43  		return(0x00);
  44  	}
  45  	picking = 0x00;
  46  	if (listindex == 0x00) {
  47  		return(0x00);
  48  	}
  49  	int newType = 0x00 - 0x01;
  50  	switch(objtype) {
  51  	case 0x20D8
  52  		newType = 0x12;
  53  		break;
  54  	case 0x20F5
  55  		newType = 0x1D;
  56  		break;
  57  	case 0x20DE
  58  		newType = 0x23;
  59  		break;
  60  	case 0x20DF
  61  		newType = 0x01;
  62  		break;
  63  	case 0x20E9
  64  		newType = 0x37;
  65  		break;
  66  	case 0x20CD
  67  		newType = 0x0190;
  68  		break;
  69  	case 0x20CE
  70  		newType = 0x0191;
  71  		break;
  72  	case 0x20CF
  73  		newType = 0xD3;
  74  		break;
  75  	case 0x20DB
  76  		newType = 0xD4;
  77  		break;
  78  	case 0x20E1
  79  		newType = 0xD5;
  80  		break;
  81  	case 0x20D1
  82  		newType = 0xD0;
  83  		break;
  84  	case 0x20D3
  85  		newType = 0x09;
  86  		break;
  87  	case 0x20D5
  88  		newType = 0xD9;
  89  		break;
  90  	case 0x20D9
  91  		newType = 0x04;
  92  		break;
  93  	case 0x20E0
  94  		newType = 0x11;
  95  		break;
  96  	case 0x20E8
  97  		newType = 0x33;
  98  		break;
  99  	case 0x20EA
 100  		newType = 0xE1;
 101  		break;
 102  	case 0x2119
 103  		newType = 0xD6;
 104  		break;
 105  	default
 106  		systemMessage(user, "Unknown body type");
 107  		break;
 108  	}
 109  	cast_polymorph(Q62D, newType);
 110  	return(0x00);
 111  }
 112  
 113  function void initiate_creature_selection(obj user) {
 114  	list monsters = 0x20CF, "Bear, Black", 0x20DB, "Bear, Grizzly", 0x20E1, "Bear, Polar", 0x20D1, "Chicken", 0x20D3, "Daemon", 0x20D5, "Dog", 0x20D8, "Ettin", 0x20D9, "Gargoyle", 0x20F5, "Gorilla", 0x20CD, "Human, Male", 0x20CE, "Human, Female", 0x20DE, "Lizard Man", 0x20DF, "Ogre", 0x20E0, "Orc", 0x2119, "Panther", 0x20E8, "Slime", 0x20E9, "Troll", 0x20EA, "Wolf";
 115  	Q62D = user;
 116  	picking = 0x01;
 117  	selectType(user, this, 0x1B, "Choose a Creature", monsters);
 118  	return();
 119  }
 120  
 121  function void prepare_polymorph_transformation(obj user, int Q4NC) {
 122  	obj equipped_item;
 123  	obj Q69F;
 124  	list removed_items_list;
 125  	int equip_result;
 126  	if (hasScript(Q62D, "remincognito")) {
 127  		list undoincognito_args;
 128  		message(Q62D, "undoincognito", undoincognito_args);
 129  	}
 130  	for (int x = 0x01; x < 0x11; x++) {
 131  		equipped_item = getItemAtSlot(Q62D, x);
 132  		if (isValid(equipped_item)) {
 133  			debugMessage("removing items");
 134  			equip_result = putObjContainer(equipped_item, Q62D);
 135  			appendToList(removed_items_list, equipped_item);
 136  			setObjVar(equipped_item, "objSlot", x);
 137  			if (!equip_result) {
 138  				debugMessage("item stacker error");
 139  			}
 140  		}
 141  	}
 142  	setObjVar(user, "notMyItems", removed_items_list);
 143  	attachScript(user, "polychec");
 144  	callback(user, Q4NC, 0x14)return();
 145  }
 146
#77 potion.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5VX int → stat_type
Source — potion.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int delay_ticks;
   4  
   5  member int Q5VX;
   6  
   7  member int gold_amount_str;
   8  
   9  trigger creation {
  10  	if (delay_ticks == 0x00) {
  11  		delay_ticks = 0x1E;
  12  	}
  13  	if (gold_amount_str == 0x00) {
  14  		gold_amount_str = 0x0F;
  15  	}
  16  	return(0x01);
  17  }
  18  
  19  function int consume_potion(obj user) {
  20  	if (!getFreeHandSlot(user)) {
  21  		systemMessage(user, "You must have a free hand to drink a potion.");
  22  		return(0x00);
  23  	}
  24  	if (random(0x00, 0x01) == 0x01) {
  25  		sfx(getLocation(user), 0x30, 0x00);
  26  	} else {
  27  		sfx(getLocation(user), 0x31, 0x00);
  28  	}
  29  	animateMobile(user, 0x21, 0x02, 0x01, 0x00, 0x01);
  30  	return(0x01);
  31  }
  32  
  33  trigger use {
  34  	int Q53K = gold_amount_str;
  35  	if (hasObjVar(this, "power")) {
  36  		Q53K = getObjVar(this, "power");
  37  	}
  38  	if (!consume_potion(user)) {
  39  		return(0x00);
  40  	}
  41  	setInvisible(user, 0x00);
  42  	if (!apply_stat_effect_if_absent(user, Q5VX, Q53K, delay_ticks)) {
  43  		systemMessage(user, "You are already under a similar effect.");
  44  	} else {
  45  		doMobAnimation(user, 0x375A, 0x0A, 0x0F, 0x00, 0x00);
  46  		sfx(getLocation(user), get_stat_effect_sfx_id(Q5VX, Q53K), 0x00);
  47  		obj Q4NN = createGlobalObjectOn(this, 0x0F0E);
  48  		deleteObject(this);
  49  	}
  50  	return(0x00);
  51  }
  52
#78 recallbase.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5G6 loc → origin_loc
Source — recallbase.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member loc Q5G6;
   4  
   5  member obj caster;
   6  
   7  function int validate_recall_target(obj user, obj usedon) {
   8  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
   9  		return(0x00);
  10  	}
  11  	if ((containedBy(usedon) == NULL()) && (canSeeObj(user, usedon) != 0x01)) {
  12  		bark(user, "I cannot see that object.");
  13  		return(0x00);
  14  	}
  15  	if (isMobile(usedon)) {
  16  		bark(user, "I cannot recall from that object.");
  17  		return(0x00);
  18  	}
  19  	if (!hasObjVar(usedon, "markLoc")) {
  20  		bark(user, "I cannot recall from that object.");
  21  		return(0x00);
  22  	}
  23  	return(0x01);
  24  }
  25  
  26  function int execute_recall(obj user, obj usedon) {
  27  	int success = 0x00;
  28  	if (validate_recall_target(user, usedon)) {
  29  		loc mark_loc = getObjVar(usedon, "markLoc");
  30  		Q5G6 = getLocation(user);
  31  		caster = user;
  32  		sfx(mark_loc, 0x01FC, 0x00);
  33  		int blocked = 0x00;
  34  		if (getEncumbrance(caster) > 0x64) {
  35  			systemMessage(caster, "Thou art too encumbered to move.");
  36  			blocked = 0x01;
  37  		}
  38  		if (!blocked && (!is_teleport_source_allowed(Q5G6) || !is_teleport_destination_allowed(mark_loc))) {
  39  			systemMessage(caster, "You can not teleport into that area.");
  40  			blocked = 0x01;
  41  		}
  42  		if (!blocked) {
  43  			trigger_teleport_object(user, mark_loc);
  44  			success = 0x01;
  45  		}
  46  	}
  47  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  48  	return(success);
  49  }
  50
#79 sawtrap.m 4 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5XS int → is_active
Q5OF int → obj_type
Q68C loc → blade_east_loc
Q5DE loc → blade_south_loc
Source — sawtrap.m 
   1  inherits sndfx;
   2  
   3  member int Q5XS;
   4  
   5  member int Q5OF;
   6  
   7  member loc Q68C;
   8  
   9  member loc Q5DE;
  10  
  11  trigger creation {
  12  	setObjVar(this, "isTrapped", 0x01);
  13  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
  14  	int x = getX(Q4VS);
  15  	int y = getY(Q4VS);
  16  	Q5OF = getObjType(this);
  17  	switch(Q5OF) {
  18  	case 0x1116
  19  		Q68C = Q4VS;
  20  		setX(Q68C, getX(Q4VS) + 0x01);
  21  		x = getX(Q68C);
  22  		y = getY(Q68C);
  23  		break;
  24  	case 0x1103
  25  		Q5DE = Q4VS;
  26  		setY(Q5DE, getY(Q4VS) + 0x01);
  27  		break;
  28  	}
  29  	return(0x00);
  30  }
  31  
  32  trigger message("activate") {
  33  	Q5OF = getObjType(this);
  34  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
  35  	Q5XS = 0x01;
  36  	if (hasObjVar(this, "disarmed")) {
  37  		switch(Q5OF) {
  38  		case 0x1117
  39  			setType(this, 0x1116);
  40  			break;
  41  		case 0x1104
  42  			setType(this, 0x1103);
  43  			break;
  44  		case 0x11AD
  45  			setType(this, 0x11AC);
  46  			break;
  47  		case 0x11B2
  48  			setType(this, 0x11B1);
  49  			break;
  50  		default
  51  			break;
  52  		}
  53  		callback(this, 0x64, 0x2F);
  54  	} else {
  55  		switch(Q5OF) {
  56  		case 0x1103
  57  			doLocAnimation(Q4VS, 0x1104, 0x03, 0x06, 0x00, 0x00);
  58  			break;
  59  		case 0x1116
  60  			doLocAnimation(Q4VS, 0x1117, 0x03, 0x06, 0x00, 0x00);
  61  			break;
  62  		case 0x11AC
  63  			doLocAnimation(Q4VS, 0x11AD, 0x03, 0x06, 0x00, 0x00);
  64  			break;
  65  		case 0x11B1
  66  			doLocAnimation(Q4VS, 0x11B2, 0x03, 0x06, 0x00, 0x00);
  67  			break;
  68  		default
  69  			break;
  70  		}
  71  		sfx(Q4VS, 0x021C, 0x00);
  72  		shortcallback(this, 0x02, 0x23);
  73  	}
  74  	return(0x00);
  75  }
  76  
  77  trigger message("deactivate") {
  78  	Q5OF = getObjType(this);
  79  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
  80  	Q5XS = 0x00;
  81  	switch(Q5OF) {
  82  	case 0x1107
  83  		setType(this, 0x1103);
  84  		doLocAnimation(Q4VS, 0x1106, 0x03, 0x05, 0x00, 0x00);
  85  		break;
  86  	case 0x111A
  87  		setType(this, 0x1116);
  88  		doLocAnimation(Q4VS, 0x1119, 0x03, 0x05, 0x00, 0x00);
  89  		break;
  90  	case 0x11B0
  91  		setType(this, 0x11AC);
  92  		doLocAnimation(Q4VS, 0x11AF, 0x03, 0x05, 0x00, 0x00);
  93  		break;
  94  	case 0x11B5
  95  		setType(this, 0x11B1);
  96  		doLocAnimation(Q4VS, 0x11B4, 0x03, 0x05, 0x00, 0x00);
  97  		break;
  98  	default
  99  		break;
 100  	}
 101  	return(0x00);
 102  }
 103  
 104  trigger enterrange(0x01) {
 105  	list Q67M;
 106  	int i;
 107  	Q5OF = getObjType(this);
 108  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
 109  	if (hasObjVar(this, "disarmed")) {
 110  		callback(this, 0x64, 0x2F);
 111  	} else {
 112  		switch(Q5OF) {
 113  		case 0x1116
 114  			getMobsAt(Q67M, Q68C);
 115  			int Q5E1 = numInList(Q67M);
 116  			if (numInList(Q67M) > 0x00) {
 117  				setType(this, 0x1117);
 118  				for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q67M); i++) {
 119  					loseHP(Q67M[i], dice(0x02, 0x14));
 120  				}
 121  				sfx(Q4VS, 0x021C, 0x00);
 122  				shortcallback(this, 0x02, 0x24);
 123  			}
 124  			break;
 125  		case 0x1103
 126  			getMobsAt(Q67M, Q5DE);
 127  			if (numInList(Q67M) > 0x00) {
 128  				setType(this, 0x1102);
 129  				for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q67M); i++) {
 130  					loseHP(Q67M[i], dice(0x02, 0x14));
 131  				}
 132  				sfx(Q4VS, 0x021C, 0x00);
 133  				shortcallback(this, 0x02, 0x24);
 134  			}
 135  			break;
 136  		case 0x11AC
 137  			break;
 138  		case 0x11B2
 139  			break;
 140  		default
 141  			break;
 142  		}
 143  	}
 144  	return(0x01);
 145  }
 146  
 147  trigger enterrange(0x00) {
 148  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
 149  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "disarmed")) {
 150  		switch(Q5OF) {
 151  		case 0x1116
 152  			break;
 153  		case 0x1103
 154  			break;
 155  		case 0x11AC
 156  			setType(this, 0x11AD);
 157  			loseHP(target, dice(0x02, 0x14));
 158  			sfx(Q4VS, 0x021C, 0x00);
 159  			shortcallback(this, 0x02, 0x24);
 160  			break;
 161  		case 0x11B2
 162  			setType(this, 0x11B3);
 163  			loseHP(target, dice(0x02, 0x14));
 164  			sfx(Q4VS, 0x021C, 0x00);
 165  			shortcallback(this, 0x02, 0x24);
 166  			break;
 167  		default
 168  			break;
 169  		}
 170  	} else {
 171  		callback(this, 0x64, 0x2F);
 172  	}
 173  	return(0x01);
 174  }
 175  
 176  trigger callback(0x23) {
 177  	Q5OF = getObjType(this);
 178  	switch(Q5OF) {
 179  	case 0x1103
 180  		setType(this, 0x1107);
 181  		break;
 182  	case 0x1116
 183  		setType(this, 0x111A);
 184  		break;
 185  	case 0x11AC
 186  		setType(this, 0x11B0);
 187  		break;
 188  	case 0x11B1
 189  		setType(this, 0x11B5);
 190  		break;
 191  	default
 192  		break;
 193  	}
 194  	callback(this, 0x05, 0x24);
 195  	return(0x00);
 196  }
 197  
 198  trigger callback(0x24) {
 199  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
 200  	list Q67G;
 201  	switch(Q5OF) {
 202  	case 0x1117
 203  		getMobsAt(Q67G, Q4VS);
 204  		break;
 205  	case 0x1104
 206  		getMobsAt(Q67G, Q4VS);
 207  		break;
 208  	case 0x11AD
 209  		getMobsAt(Q67G, Q4VS);
 210  		break;
 211  	case 0x11B2
 212  		getMobsAt(Q67G, Q4VS);
 213  		break;
 214  	default
 215  		break;
 216  	}
 217  	if (numInList(Q67G) > 0x00) {
 218  		for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q67G); i++) {
 219  			if (!hasObjVar(this, "disarmed")) {
 220  				loseHP(Q67G[i], dice(0x02, 0x14));
 221  			}
 222  		}
 223  		shortcallback(this, 0x02, 0x24);
 224  		return(0x00);
 225  	}
 226  	if ((Q5XS == 0x00) || (numInList(Q67G) == 0x00)) {
 227  		list args;
 228  		message(this, "deactivate", args);
 229  		return(0x00);
 230  	}
 231  	sfx(getLocation(this), 0x021C, 0x00);
 232  	return(0x00);
 233  }
 234  
 235  trigger callback(0x2F) {
 236  	removeObjVar(this, "disarmed");
 237  	return(0x00);
 238  }
 239
#80 sha_boulder.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q59J int → move_dir
Source — sha_boulder.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member int Q59J;
   4  
   5  trigger creation {
   6  	setType(this, 0x11B6);
   7  	Q59J = 0x01;
   8  	callback(this, 0x01, 0x24);
   9  	return(0x00);
  10  }
  11  
  12  trigger objectloaded {
  13  	callback(this, 0x01, 0x24);
  14  	return(0x00);
  15  }
  16  
  17  trigger callback(0x24) {
  18  	loc Q59R = getLocation(this);
  19  	int Q5A4 = getX(Q59R);
  20  	int Q5A5 = getY(Q59R);
  21  	int Q5A6 = getZ(Q59R);
  22  	int Q5CE;
  23  	loc toLocation;
  24  	if ((Q59J == 0x01) && (Q5A4 < 0x1596)) {
  25  		Q5CE = Q5A4 + 0x01;
  26  	}
  27  	if (Q5A4 == 0x1596) {
  28  		Q59J = 0x00;
  29  	}
  30  	if ((Q59J == 0x00) && (Q5A4 > 0x1593)) {
  31  		Q5CE = Q5A4 - 0x01;
  32  	}
  33  	if (Q5A4 == 0x1593) {
  34  		Q59J = 0x01;
  35  	}
  36  	toLocation = Q5CE, Q5A5, Q5A6;
  37  	int Q4Q2 = teleport(this, toLocation);
  38  	callback(this, 0x01, 0x24);
  39  	return(0x00);
  40  }
  41

#82 sha_door_one_switch_one.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4N2 loc → door_loc
Q5DQ list → msg_args
Source — sha_door_one_switch_one.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member loc Q4N2;
   4  
   5  member list Q5DQ;
   6  
   7  trigger creation {
   8  	Q4N2 = 0x15C2, 0xC6, 0x00;
   9  	return(0x00);
  10  }
  11  
  12  trigger use {
  13  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "doorSwitchWorking")) {
  14  		setObjVar(this, "doorSwitchWorking", 0x01);
  15  		messageToRange(Q4N2, 0x01, "unlock", Q5DQ);
  16  		callback(this, 0x1E, 0x26);
  17  		return(0x01);
  18  	}
  19  	return(0x00);
  20  }
  21  
  22  trigger callback(0x26) {
  23  	if (hasObjVar(this, "doorSwitchWorking")) {
  24  		removeObjVar(this, "doorSwitchWorking");
  25  		messageToRange(Q4N2, 0x01, "lockup", Q5DQ);
  26  	}
  27  	return(0x00);
  28  }

#83 sha_gas_switch_one.m 1 member

   1  inherits globals;

   4  
   5  member list Q5DQ;

   7  trigger creation {
   8  	trapLocation = 0x15DE, 0x3F, 0x00;
   9  	return(0x00);
  10  }
  11  
  12  trigger use {
  13  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "switchWorking")) {
  14  		setObjVar(this, "switchWorking", Q5DQ);
  15  		messageToRange(trapLocation, 0x05, "disarm", Q5DQ);
  16  		callback(this, 0xF0, 0x26);
  17  		return(0x01);
  18  	}
  19  	return(0x00);

#84 shepherdscrook.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q46A int → animal_selected
Source — shepherdscrook.m 
   1  inherits sk_table;
   2  
   3  member int Q46A;
   4  
   5  member obj animal;
   6  
   7  trigger use {
   8  	systemMessage(user, "Target the animal you wish to herd.");
   9  	Q46A = 0x00;
  10  	targetObj(user, this);
  11  	return(0x00);
  12  }
  13  
  14  trigger targetobj {
  15  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
  16  		return(0x00);
  17  	}
  18  	if (!canSeeObj(user, usedon)) {
  19  		systemMessage(user, "Target can not be seen.");
  20  		return(0x00);
  21  	}
  22  	if (hasScript(usedon, "beingtamed")) {
  23  		ebarkTo(usedon, user, "Someone else is already taming this.");
  24  		return(0x00);
  25  	}
  26  	if (hasObjListVar(usedon, "myBoss")) {
  27  		ebarkTo(usedon, user, "That animal looks tame already.");
  28  		return(0x00);
  29  	}
  30  	if (isMobile(usedon)) {
  31  		if (!hasObjVar(usedon, "petCanTame")) {
  32  			ebarkTo(usedon, user, "That being can not be tamed.");
  33  		}
  34  		int Q4AD = getObjVar(usedon, "petCanTame");
  35  		int success = testAndLearnSkill(user, 0x14, 0x08 * Q4AD, 0x32);
  36  		if (success >= 0x03E8) {
  37  			ebarkTo(usedon, user, "That wasn't even challenging.");
  38  		}
  39  		if (success < 0x00) {
  40  			systemMessage(user, "You don't seem to be able to persuade that to move.");
  41  			return(0x00);
  42  		}
  43  		if (Q46A) {
  44  			if (usedon == user) {
  45  				systemMessage(user, "The animal begins to follow you.");
  46  				Q46A = 0x00;
  47  				followNpc(animal, usedon, 0x00);
  48  			}
  49  		} else {
  50  			if (!isHuman(usedon) && (hasObjVar(usedon, "petCanTame"))) {
  51  				Q46A = 0x01;
  52  				animal = usedon;
  53  				targetLoc(user, this);
  54  				systemMessage(user, "Click whom you wish the animal to follow, or where you wish it to go.");
  55  				return(0x00);
  56  				break;
  57  			}
  58  			systemMessage(user, "That is not a herdable animal.");
  59  		}
  60  	}
  61  	return(0x00);
  62  }
  63  
  64  trigger targetloc {
  65  	if (!isInMap(place)) {
  66  		return(0x00);
  67  	}
  68  	if (!canSeeLoc(user, place)) {
  69  		systemMessage(user, "Target can not be seen.");
  70  		return(0x00);
  71  	}
  72  	if (Q46A) {
  73  		stopFollowing(animal);
  74  		Q46A = 0x00;
  75  		systemMessage(user, "The animal walks where it was instructed to.");
  76  		walkTo(animal, place, 0x00);
  77  	}
  78  	return(0x00);
  79  }
  80  
  81  trigger pathfound(0x00) {
  82  	attachScript(this, "herdedanimal");
  83  	callback(this, 0x64, 0x3F);
  84  	return(0x00);
  85  }

   7  function void register_plank_to_ship(obj Q5IP) {
   8  	obj parent_ship = getMultiSlaveId(plank_object);
   9  	list Q5Z5;
  10  	if (hasObjVar(parent_ship, "myhousedoors")) {
  11  		getObjListVar(Q5Z5, parent_ship, "myhousedoors");
  12  	}
  13  	appendToList(Q5Z5, plank_object);
  14  	setObjVar(parent_ship, "myhousedoors", Q5Z5);
  15  	return;
  16  }
  17  
  18  trigger creation {
  19  	int Q5NC = set_random_lock_level(this, 0x0100, 0x0100);
  20  	apply_lock(this);
  21  	Q49K = NULL();
  22  	Q49L = 0x00;
  23  	register_plank_to_ship(this);
  24  	return(0x01);
  25  }
  26  
  27  function int validate_plank_graphic_match(int Q5T4, int Q65M) {
  28  	switch(plank_type) {
  29  	case 0x00
  30  		switch(item_type_id) {
  31  		case 0x3EB2
  32  		case 0x3E85
  33  		case 0x3EB1
  34  		case 0x3E8A
  35  			return(0x01);
  36  		}
  37  		break;
  38  	case 0x01
  39  		switch(item_type_id) {
  40  		case 0x3EB1
  41  		case 0x3E8A
  42  		case 0x3EB2
  43  		case 0x3E85
  44  			return(0x01);
  45  		}
  46  		break;
  47  	case 0x01
  48  		break;
  49  	}
  50  	return(0x00);
  51  }
  52  
  53  function int is_valid_plank_combination(int Q5T4, int Q65M) {
  54  	switch(plank_type) {
  55  	case 0x00
  56  		switch(item_type_id) {
  57  		case 0x3ED4
  58  		case 0x3E84
  59  		case 0x3ED5
  60  		case 0x3E89
  61  			return(0x01);
  62  		}
  63  		break;
  64  	case 0x01
  65  		switch(item_type_id) {
  66  		case 0x3ED5
  67  		case 0x3E89
  68  		case 0x3ED4
  69  		case 0x3E84
  70  			return(0x01);
  71  		}
  72  		break;
  73  	}
  74  	return(0x00);
  75  }
  76  
  77  function int rotate_plank_graphic(int Q5T4, int Q65M) {
  78  	switch(plank_type) {
  79  	case 0x00
  80  		switch(item_type_id) {
  81  		case 0x3ED4
  82  			return(0x3EB2);
  83  		case 0x3E84
  84  			return(0x3E85);
  85  		case 0x3ED5
  86  			return(0x3EB1);
  87  		case 0x3E89
  88  			return(0x3E8A);
  89  		case 0x3EB2
  90  			return(0x3ED4);
  91  		case 0x3E85
  92  			return(0x3E84);
  93  		case 0x3EB1
  94  			return(0x3ED5);
  95  		case 0x3E8A
  96  			return(0x3E89);
  97  		}
  98  		break;
  99  	case 0x01
 100  		switch(item_type_id) {
 101  		case 0x3ED5
 102  			return(0x3EB1);
 103  		case 0x3E89
 104  			return(0x3E8A);
 105  		case 0x3ED4
 106  			return(0x3EB2);
 107  		case 0x3E84
 108  			return(0x3E85);
 109  		case 0x3EB1
 110  			return(0x3ED5);
 111  		case 0x3E8A
 112  			return(0x3E89);
 113  		case 0x3EB2
 114  			return(0x3ED4);
 115  		case 0x3E85
 116  			return(0x3E84);
 117  		}
 118  		break;
 119  	}
 120  	return(item_type_id);
 121  }
 122  
 123  function void update_plank_state(int Q5T4, obj Q5IB) {
 124  	setType(plank, rotate_plank_graphic(plank_type, getObjType(plank)));
 125  	int not_lockable = hasObjVar(plank, "notLockable");
 126  	int is_open = is_valid_plank_combination(plank_type, getObjType(plank));
 127  	if ((is_open) && (!not_lockable)) {
 128  		int lock_value = 0x01;
 129  		setObjVar(plank, "notLockable", lock_value);
 130  	}
 131  	if ((!is_open) && (not_lockable)) {
 132  		removeObjVar(plank, "notLockable");
 133  	}
 134  	return;
 135  }
 136  
 137  function void toggle_plank_and_schedule_close(int Q5T4, obj Q5IB, int Q50S) {
 138  	update_plank_state(plank_type, plank);
 139  	if ((is_locked) && (Q49K == NULL())) {
 140  		Q49L = plank_type;
 141  		Q49K = plank;
 142  		callback(plank, 0x03, 0x55);
 143  	}
 144  	return;
 145  }
 146  
 147  function int handle_plank_use(int Q5T4, obj Q5IB, obj user) {
 148  	try_refresh_decay_on_use(plank, user, "ship");
 149  	remove_invis_and_hidesk(user, 0x00);
 150  	int on_ship = isOnMulti(user, getMultiSlaveId(plank));
 151  	int is_locked = hasObjVar(plank, "isLocked");
 152  	int is_editing = isEditing(user);
 153  	if (is_editing && is_locked && !on_ship) {
 154  		barkTo(user, user, "That is locked, but you open it with your godly powers.");
 155  	} else {
 156  		if (is_locked && !on_ship) {
 157  			barkTo(user, user, "That is locked.");
 158  			return(0x00);
 159  		}
 160  	}
 161  	if (is_valid_plank_combination(plank_type, getObjType(plank))) {
 162  		loc plank_loc = getLocation(plank);
 163  		if (getDistanceInTiles(plank_loc, getLocation(user)) > 0x09) {
 164  			return(0x00);
 165  		}
 166  		loc board_loc = getLocation(plank);
 167  		setZ(board_loc, getZ(board_loc) + getSurfaceHeight(plank));
 168  		if ((!on_ship) && (getDistanceInTiles(plank_loc, getLocation(user)) > 0x01) && canSeeLoc(user, board_loc)) {
 169  			int tele_result = teleport(user, board_loc);
 170  			return(0x00 - 0x01);
 171  		}
 172  		if (areObjectsOn(plank)) {
 173  			return(0x00);
 174  		}
 175  	}
 176  	toggle_plank_and_schedule_close(plank_type, plank, is_locked);
 177  	return(0x01);
 178  }
 179  
 180  function void update_plank_on_recycle(int Q5T4, obj Q5IB, int oldtype) {
 181  	if (is_valid_plank_combination(plank_type, oldtype)) {
 182  		update_plank_state(plank_type, plank);
 183  	}
 184  	return;
 185  }
 186  
 187  function int teleport_off_plank(obj Q4XN, loc place, int Q4ID, int num) {
 188  	int result;
 189  	loc candidate_loc = place;
 190  	setZ(candidate_loc, getZ(candidate_loc) + 0x0F);
 191  	for (int i = 0x00; i < num; i++) {
 192  		if (canSeeLoc(mobile, candidate_loc)) {
 193  			obj multi = get_multi_at_location(candidate_loc);
 194  			if ((multi == NULL()) && (dropCheck(candidate_loc, mobile, getHeight(mobile)))) {
 195  				if (i == 0x00) {
 196  					int z_delta = getZ(candidate_loc) - getZ(place);
 197  					if (z_delta < 0x00) {
 198  						z_delta = z_delta * (0x00 - 0x01);
 199  					}
 200  					if (z_delta <= 0x03) {
 201  						return(0x00);
 202  					}
 203  				}
 204  				return(teleport(mobile, candidate_loc));
 205  			}
 206  		}
 207  		moveDir(candidate_loc, dir);
 208  	}
 209  	return(0x00);
 210  }
 211  
 212  function int handle_plank_enter(int Q5T4, obj Q5IP, obj Q5HY) {
 213  	obj ship = getMultiSlaveId(plank);
 214  	int ship_dir = getObjVar(ship, "myshipdir");
 215  	ship_dir = ship_dir * 0x02;
 216  	int mobile_facing = getFacing(mobile);
 217  	int dir_delta = ship_dir - mobile_facing;
 218  	if (dir_delta < 0x00) {
 219  		dir_delta = 0x08 + dir_delta;
 220  	}
 221  	int eject_threshold = 0x06;
 222  	if (plank_type == 0x01) {
 223  		eject_threshold = 0x02;
 224  	}
 225  	if (dir_delta == eject_threshold) {
 226  		loc exit_loc = getLocation(mobile);
 227  		moveDir(exit_loc, mobile_facing);
 228  		moveDir(exit_loc, mobile_facing);
 229  		return(!teleport_off_plank(mobile, exit_loc, mobile_facing, 0x09));
 230  	} else {
 231  		if (isNPC(mobile)) {
 232  			if (!isOwnedPet(mobile)) {
 233  				return(0x00);
 234  			}
 235  		}
 236  	}
 237  	return(0x01);
 238  }
 239  
 240  function int set_plank_state_var(obj Q5IP, int Q5T4, string Q677) {
 241  	obj ship = getMultiSlaveId(plank);
 242  	if (is_valid_plank_combination(plank_type, getObjType(plank))) {
 243  		setObjVar(ship, var_name, 0x01);
 244  		return(0x01);
 245  	} else {
 246  		setObjVar(ship, var_name, 0x00);
 247  		return(0x00);
 248  	}
 249  	return(0x00);
 250  }
 251  
 252  function void play_music_to_ship_occupants(obj ship) {
 253  	loc ship_location = getLocation(ship);
 254  	list nearby_mobs;
 255  	getPlayersInRange(nearby_mobs, ship_location, 0x07);
 256  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(nearby_mobs); i++) {
 257  		obj current_player = nearby_mobs[i];
 258  		if (isOnMulti(current_player, ship)) {
 259  			musicTo(current_player, 0x20);
 260  		}
 261  	}
 262  	return;
 263  }
 264  
 265  trigger callback(0x55) {
 266  	int Q5T4 = Q49L;
 267  	obj Q5IB = Q49K;
 268  	if (Q49K != NULL()) {
 269  		if (is_valid_plank_combination(Q5T4, getObjType(Q5IB))) {
 270  			if (areObjectsOn(Q5IB)) {
 271  				callback(Q5IB, 0x03, 0x55);
 272  				return(0x01);
 273  			}
 274  			update_plank_state(Q5T4, Q5IB);
 275  			string Q677 = "shiprightplank";
 276  			if (Q5T4) {
 277  				Q677 = "shipleftplank";
 278  			}
 279  			int Q527 = set_plank_state_var(this, Q5T4, Q677);
 280  		}
 281  		Q49K = NULL();
 282  		Q49L = 0x00;
 283  	}
 284  	return(0x01);
 285  }
 286  
 287  function void handle_ghost_plank_use(int Q5T4, obj Q5IB, obj user) {
 288  	if (isDead(user) && isManifesting(user)) {
 289  		int is_open = is_valid_plank_combination(plank_type, getObjType(plank));
 290  		if (!is_open) {
 291  			int on_ship = isOnMulti(user, getMultiSlaveId(plank));
 292  			int is_locked = hasObjVar(plank, "isLocked");
 293  			if ((!on_ship) && (is_locked)) {
 294  				barkTo(user, user, "That is locked.");
 295  			} else {
 296  				toggle_plank_and_schedule_close(plank_type, plank, is_locked);
 297  			}
 298  		}
 299  	}
 300  	return();
 301  }

✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride

  11  trigger creation {
  12  	if (!Q58A) {
  13  		Q43W = 0x03;
  14  		Q58A = 0x01;

  16  	return(0x01);

  18  
  19  function void attach_ship_hack_to_occupants(obj ship) {
  20  	list nearby_players;
  21  	getPlayersOnMulti(nearby_players, ship);
  22  	int num = numInList(nearby_players);
  23  	for (int door_index = 0x00; door_index < num; door_index++) {
  24  		obj player = nearby_players[door_index];
  25  		attachScript(player, "shipnakedhack");
  26  	}
  27  	return();
  28  }
  29  
  30  function int try_move_direction_with_fallback(obj Q5AK, int Q4IE, int Q58B) {
  31  	loc location;
  32  	int has_crystal_var;
  33  	location = getLocation(parent_ship);
  34  	for (int remaining_moves = move_distance; remaining_moves > 0x00; remaining_moves--) {
  35  		moveDir(location, primary_direction);
  36  	}
  37  	has_crystal_var = moveMultiCheck(parent_ship, location, Q43W);
  38  	if (has_crystal_var <= 0x00) {
  39  		int fallback_direction = (primary_direction + 0x04) % 0x08;
  40  		while ((has_crystal_var <= 0x00) && (move_distance > 0x01)) {
  41  			move_distance--;
  42  			moveDir(location, fallback_direction);
  43  			has_crystal_var = moveMultiCheck(parent_ship, location, Q43W);
  44  		}
  45  	}
  46  	return(has_crystal_var);
  47  }
  48  
  49  function int calculate_relative_plank_direction(obj ship, int Q5M5) {
  50  	int ship_direction = getObjVar(ship, "myshipdir");
  51  	return((((ship_direction * 0x02) + direction_offset) % 0x08));
  52  }
  53  
  54  function int move_ship_relative(obj Q5AK, int Q4IE, int Q58B) {
  55  	return(try_move_direction_with_fallback(ship, calculate_relative_plank_direction(ship, direction_offset), move_distance));
  56  }
  57  
  58  function int calculate_multi_index(int myshiptype, int Q4IE) {
  59  	return(0x00 + (myshiptype * 0x04) + (primary_direction * 0x01));
  60  }
  61  
  62  function int rotate_ship_multi(obj Q5AK, int Q4IE, int Q4AG) {
  63  	string threat_message;
  64  	int myshiptype = getObjVar(parent_ship, "myshiptype");
  65  	int multi_check_index = 0x00 + (myshiptype * 0x04) + (primary_direction * 0x01);
  66  	int has_crystal_var = recycleMultiCheckRotate(parent_ship, multi_check_index, Q43W, rotation_angle);
  67  	if (has_crystal_var > 0x00) {
  68  		setObjVar(parent_ship, "myshipdir", primary_direction);
  69  	}
  70  	return(has_crystal_var);
  71  }
  72  
  73  function obj create_multi_with_collision_check(int Q5SR, int Q4ID, loc place) {
  74  	Q5NG = (0x00 - 0x06);
  75  	int z_coordinate = 0x00;
  76  	z_coordinate--;
  77  	int multi_type_offset = 0x00 + (ship_size * 0x04) + (compass_direction * 0x01);
  78  	obj parent_ship = NULL();
  79  	if (areMobilesInMultiArea(multi_type_offset, place)) {
  80  		Q5NG = (0x00 - 0x09);
  81  		return(NULL());
  82  	}
  83  	parent_ship = makeMultiInstCheck(place, multi_type_offset, Q43W, 0x00, Q5NG, 0x00, z_coordinate, z_coordinate);
  84  	return(parent_ship);
  85  }
  86  
  87  function obj create_ship_at(int Q5SR, loc place) {
  88  	obj ship;
  89  	int initial_dir = 0x05;
  90  	ship = create_multi_with_collision_check(ship_type, 0x00, place);
  91  	if (ship != NULL()) {
  92  		initial_dir = 0x00;
  93  	}
  94  	if (initial_dir != 0x05) {
  95  		setObjVar(ship, "myshipdir", initial_dir);
  96  		setObjVar(ship, "myshiptype", ship_type);
  97  		string creation_time;
  98  		getCurrentTimeStr(creation_time);
  99  		setObjVar(ship, "creationtime", creation_time);
 100  	}
 101  	return(ship);
 102  }
 103  
 104  function int has_ship_command(obj Q62O) {
 105  	return(hasObjVar(target_object, "shipcommand"));
 106  }
 107  
 108  function int is_ship_moving(obj ship) {
 109  	obj tillerman = getObjVar(ship, "myshiptillerman");
 110  	if (tillerman == NULL()) {
 111  		return(0x00);
 112  	}
 113  	return(has_ship_command(tillerman));
 114  }
 115  
 116  function int move_ship_or_map_switch(obj ship, int Q5M5, obj Q62O) {
 117  	int direction = calculate_relative_plank_direction(ship, direction_offset);
 118  	int multi_type = getMultiType(ship);
 119  	loc min_bounds;
 120  	loc max_bounds;
 121  	int extents_result = getMultiExtents(multi_type, min_bounds, max_bounds);
 122  	int width = getX(max_bounds) - getX(min_bounds) + 0x01;
 123  	int height = getY(max_bounds) - getY(min_bounds) + 0x01;
 124  	loc dest = getLocation(ship);
 125  	int x_steps = 0x00;
 126  	int y_steps = 0x00;
 127  	switch(direction) {
 128  	case 0x00
 129  	case 0x04
 130  		y_steps = height;
 131  		break;
 132  	case 0x01
 133  	case 0x03
 134  	case 0x05
 135  	case 0x07
 136  		x_steps = width;
 137  		y_steps = height;
 138  		break;
 139  	case 0x02
 140  	case 0x06
 141  		x_steps = width;
 142  		break;
 143  	default
 144  		x_steps = width;
 145  		y_steps = height;
 146  		break;
 147  	}
 148  	int x_dir = 0x00;
 149  	int y_dir = 0x00;
 150  	switch(direction) {
 151  	case 0x00
 152  		y_dir = 0x00;
 153  		break;
 154  	case 0x01
 155  		x_dir = 0x02;
 156  		y_dir = 0x00;
 157  		break;
 158  	case 0x02
 159  		x_dir = 0x02;
 160  		break;
 161  	case 0x03
 162  		x_dir = 0x02;
 163  		y_dir = 0x04;
 164  		break;
 165  	case 0x04
 166  		y_dir = 0x04;
 167  		break;
 168  	case 0x05
 169  		x_dir = 0x06;
 170  		y_dir = 0x04;
 171  		break;
 172  	case 0x06
 173  		x_dir = 0x06;
 174  		break;
 175  	case 0x07
 176  		x_dir = 0x06;
 177  		y_dir = 0x00;
 178  		break;
 179  	default
 180  		break;
 181  	}
 182  	for (; x_steps > 0x00; x_steps--) {
 183  		moveDir(dest, x_dir);
 184  	}
 185  	for (; y_steps > 0x00; y_steps--) {
 186  		moveDir(dest, y_dir);
 187  	}
 188  	if (isInMap(dest)) {
 189  		if (hasObjVar(tillerman, "oldshipcommand")) {
 190  			removeObjVar(tillerman, "oldshipcommand");
 191  		}
 192  		int move_result = moveMultiCheck(ship, dest, Q43W);
 193  		Q65T = 0x01;
 194  		return(move_result);
 195  	}
 196  	attach_ship_hack_to_occupants(ship);
 197  	return(moveMultiMapSwitch(ship, dest, Q43W));
 198  }
 199  
 200  function int calculate_component_cost(int Q65M) {
 201  	int multi_type_offset = 0x00 + (item_type_id * 0x04);
 202  	return(getNumInMultiType(multi_type_offset) * 0xDC);
 203  }
