  23  function int can_player_unlock_ship(obj house, obj Q5HY) {
  24  	if (!hasObjVar(house, "myhousedoors")) {
  25  		return(0x00);
  26  	}
  27  	list doors;
  28  	getObjListVar(doors, house, "myhousedoors");
  29  	if (numInList(doors) < 0x01) {
  30  		return(0x00);
  31  	}
  32  	obj house_door_object = doors[0x00];
  33  	obj has_crystal_var = mobileHasObjWithListObjOfObj(target_player, "whatIUnlock", house_door_object);
  34  	if (has_crystal_var == NULL()) {
  35  		return(0x00);
  36  	}
  37  	return(0x01);
  38  }
  39  
  40  function int check_ship_plank_deployed(obj ship) {
  41  	int has_crystal_var = getObjVar(ship, "shiprightplank");
  42  	if (has_crystal_var == 0x01) {
  43  		return(0x01);
  44  	}
  45  	has_crystal_var = getObjVar(ship, "shipleftplank");
  46  	if (has_crystal_var == 0x01) {
  47  		return(0x01);
  48  	}
  49  	return(0x00);
  50  }
  51  
  52  function void clear_queued_ship_command(obj Q62O) {
  53  	if (hasObjVar(target_object, "shipqueuedcommand")) {
  54  		removeObjVar(target_object, "shipqueuedcommand");
  55  	}
  56  	return;
  57  }
  58  
  59  function int normalize_direction_difference(int Q5B7, int Q5SG) {
  60  	int has_crystal_var = current_direction - target_direction;
  61  	if (has_crystal_var > 0x04) {
  62  		has_crystal_var = has_crystal_var + (0x00 - 0x08);
  63  	} else {
  64  		if (has_crystal_var < (0x00 - 0x04)) {
  65  			has_crystal_var = has_crystal_var + 0x08;
  66  		}
  67  	}
  68  	return(has_crystal_var);
  69  }
  70  
  71  function void initialize_ship_dimensions(obj ship) {
  72  	int ship_multi_type = getMultiType(ship);
  73  	loc multi_min_bounds;
  74  	loc multi_max_bounds;
  75  	int has_crystal_var = getMultiExtents(ship_multi_type, multi_min_bounds, multi_max_bounds);
  76  	Q5ST = getX(multi_max_bounds) - getX(multi_min_bounds) + 0x01;
  77  	Q5SI = getY(multi_max_bounds) - getY(multi_min_bounds) + 0x01;
  78  	Q5SC = Q5ST;
  79  	if (Q5SI > Q5SC) {
  80  		Q5SC = Q5SI;
  81  	}
  82  	return;
  83  }
  84  
  85  trigger creation {
  86  	Q464 = 0x01;
  87  	Q4V5 = 0x00;
  88  	obj ship = getMultiSlaveId(this);
  89  	if (ship == NULL()) {
  90  		bark(this, "Ar, I have no ship!");
  91  		return(0x01);
  92  	}
  93  	setObjVar(ship, "myshiptillerman", this);
  94  	set_global_ship_id((0x00 - 0x01));
  95  	Q55D = NULL();
  96  	initialize_ship_dimensions(ship);
  97  	return(0x01);
  98  }
  99  
 100  function int get_and_clear_ship_command(obj Q62O) {
 101  	if (hasObjVar(target_object, "shipcommand")) {
 102  		int current_ship_command = getObjVar(target_object, "shipcommand");
 103  		removeObjVar(target_object, "shipcommand");
 104  		return(current_ship_command);
 105  	}
 106  	return((0x00 - 0x01));
 107  }
 108  
 109  function void save_current_ship_command(obj Q62O) {
 110  	if (hasObjVar(target_object, "shipcommand")) {
 111  		setObjVar(target_object, "oldshipcommand", getobjvar_int(target_object, "shipcommand"));
 112  	}
 113  	return;
 114  }
 115  
 116  function void set_ship_command(obj Q62O, int Q4DW) {
 117  	if ((command >= 0x08) && (command <= 0x0A)) {
 118  		if (hasObjVar(tillerman, "shipcommand")) {
 119  			int prev_command = getObjVar(tillerman, "shipcommand");
 120  			if (((prev_command <= 0x07) || (prev_command >= 0x0B)) && (prev_command != 0x1B) && (prev_command != 0x1C)) {
 121  				setObjVar(tillerman, "shipqueuedcommand", prev_command);
 122  			}
 123  		}
 124  	}
 125  	int cleared_command = get_and_clear_ship_command(tillerman);
 126  	setObjVar(tillerman, "shipcommand", command);
 127  	if (Q4V5 == 0x00) {
 128  		Q4V5 = 0x01;
 129  		shortCallback(this, 0x02, 0x31);
 130  	}
 131  	return;
 132  }
 133  
 134  trigger serverswitch {
 135  	if (containedBy(this) != NULL()) {
 136  		return(0x01);
 137  	}
 138  	if (hasObjVar(this, "oldshipcommand")) {
 139  		int Q4DW = getobjvar_int(this, "oldshipcommand");
 140  		removeObjVar(this, "oldshipcommand");
 141  		set_ship_command(this, Q4DW);
 142  	}
 143  	return(0x01);
 144  }
 145  
 146  function int rotate_ship(obj ship, int Q4ID) {
 147  	int new_dir = getObjVar(ship, "myshipdir");
 148  	int rotation_angle = 0x00;
 149  	new_dir = new_dir + 0x04;
 150  	if (rotation_type == 0x01) {
 151  		new_dir = new_dir + 0x01;
 152  		rotation_angle = 0x02;
 153  	}
 154  	if (rotation_type == 0x02) {
 155  		new_dir = new_dir - 0x01;
 156  		rotation_angle = 0x06;
 157  	}
 158  	if (rotation_type == 0x03) {
 159  		new_dir = new_dir - 0x02;
 160  		rotation_angle = 0x04;
 161  	}
 162  	if (new_dir > 0x03) {
 163  		new_dir = new_dir - 0x04;
 164  	}
 165  	if (new_dir > 0x03) {
 166  		new_dir = new_dir - 0x04;
 167  	}
 168  	int result = rotate_ship_multi(ship, new_dir, rotation_angle);
 169  	initialize_ship_dimensions(ship);
 170  	return(result);
 171  }
 172  
 173  function int Q62R(obj Q62O, int Q5WD) {
 174  	string Q5N7;
 175  	string Q63B;
 176  	obj ship = getMultiSlaveId(Q62O);
 177  	if (ship == NULL()) {
 178  		bark(Q62O, "Blimey, I have no ship!");
 179  		return(0x00);
 180  	}
 181  	if ((!isValid(Q55D)) || (!isMap(Q55D))) {
 182  		bark(Q62O, "I have seen no map, sir.");
 183  		Q55D = NULL();
 184  		return(0x00);
 185  	}
 186  	if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(Q55D), getLocation(Q62O)) > 0x0F) {
 187  		bark(Q62O, "The map is too far away from me, sir.");
 188  		Q55D = NULL();
 189  		return(0x00);
 190  	}
 191  	loc Q5B8;
 192  	if (!getMapPoint(Q5B8, Q55D, Q5BA)) {
 193  		Q5N7 = "Nav point ";
 194  		Q63B = Q5BA + 0x01;
 195  		concat(Q5N7, Q63B);
 196  		concat(Q5N7, " is invalid, sir.");
 197  		bark(Q62O, Q5N7);
 198  		Q5BA = (0x00 - 0x01);
 199  		return(0x00);
 200  	}
 201  	loc Q5SL = getLocation(ship);
 202  	if (getDistanceInTiles(Q5SL, Q5B8) <= Q5SC) {
 203  		if (Q5WD) {
 204  			Q5N7 = "We have arrived at nav ";
 205  			Q63B = Q5BA + 0x01;
 206  			concat(Q5N7, Q63B);
 207  			concat(Q5N7, ", sir.");
 208  			bark(Q62O, Q5N7);
 209  			Q5BA++;
 210  			int Q5FV = get_and_clear_ship_command(Q62O);
 211  			return(0x00);
 212  		}
 213  		Q5BA++;
 214  		if (!getMapPoint(Q5B8, Q55D, Q5BA)) {
 215  			Q5BA = (0x00 - 0x01);
 216  			bark(Q62O, "The course is completed, sir.");
 217  			Q5FV = get_and_clear_ship_command(Q62O);
 218  			return(0x00);
 219  		}
 220  		Q5N7 = "Heading to nav point ";
 221  		Q63B = Q5BA + 0x01;
 222  		concat(Q5N7, Q63B);
 223  		concat(Q5N7, ", sir.");
 224  		bark(Q62O, Q5N7);
 225  	}
 226  	int Q5B7 = getDirectionInternal(Q5SL, Q5B8);
 227  	int Q5SG = getObjVar(ship, "myshipdir");
 228  	Q5SG = Q5SG * 0x02;
 229  	int Q4IA = normalize_direction_difference(Q5B7, Q5SG);
 230  	int Q4DW = 0x00;
 231  	if ((Q4IA > 0x01) || (Q4IA < (0x00 - 0x01))) {
 232  		if (Q4IA < 0x00) {
 233  			Q4DW = 0x09;
 234  		} else {
 235  			Q4DW = 0x08;
 236  		}
 237  	} else {
 238  		if (Q4IA == 0x01) {
 239  			Q4DW = 0x01;
 240  		} else {
 241  			if (Q4IA == (0x00 - 0x01)) {
 242  				Q4DW = 0x07;
 243  			} else {
 244  				Q4DW = 0x00;
 245  			}
 246  		}
 247  	}
 248  	return(Q62Q(Q62O, Q4DW, 0x01));
 249  }
 250  
 251  function int Q62Q(obj Q62O, int Q4DW, int Q478) {
 252  	int Q5NC;
 253  	obj ship = getMultiSlaveId(this);
 254  	if (ship == NULL()) {
 255  		int Q5FV = get_and_clear_ship_command(Q62O);
 256  		bark(this, "Ar, I have no ship!");
 257  		return(0x00);
 258  	}
 259  	if (Q464 == 0x01) {
 260  		bark(this, "Ar, the anchor is down sir!");
 261  		return(0x00);
 262  	}
 263  	if ((Q4DW >= 0x08) && (Q4DW <= 0x0A)) {
 264  		int Q4ID = Q4DW - 0x07;
 265  		Q5NC = rotate_ship(ship, Q4ID);
 266  		if (Q5NC > 0x00) {
 267  			if (!Q478) {
 268  				bark(Q62O, "Yes, sir.");
 269  			}
 270  		} else {
 271  			if (Q5NC < 0x00) {
 272  				bark(Q62O, "Arr, the water is too turbulent to turn sir!");
 273  			} else {
 274  				bark(Q62O, "Ar, can't turn sir.");
 275  			}
 276  			Q5FV = get_and_clear_ship_command(Q62O);
 277  			return(0x00);
 278  		}
 279  		if (!Q478) {
 280  			Q5FV = get_and_clear_ship_command(Q62O);
 281  			return(0x00);
 282  		}
 283  		return(0x01);
 284  	}
 285  	if (((Q4DW >= 0x00) && (Q4DW <= 0x07)) || ((Q4DW >= 0x0B) && (Q4DW <= 0x1A)) || ((Q4DW >= 0x1D) && (Q4DW <= 0x24))) {
 286  		int Q58B = 0x01;
 287  		int Q5CK = 0x00;
 288  		if ((Q4DW >= 0x00) && (Q4DW <= 0x07)) {
 289  			Q5CK = Q4DW;
 290  			if ((Q4DW == 0x00) || (Q4DW == 0x01) || (Q4DW == 0x07)) {
 291  				Q58B = 0x03;
 292  			}
 293  		}
 294  		if ((Q4DW >= 0x0B) && (Q4DW <= 0x12)) {
 295  			Q5CK = Q4DW - 0x0B;
 296  		}
 297  		if ((Q4DW >= 0x13) && (Q4DW <= 0x1A)) {
 298  			Q5CK = Q4DW - 0x13;
 299  			if ((Q5CK == 0x00) || (Q5CK == 0x01) || (Q5CK == 0x07)) {
 300  				Q58B = 0x03;
 301  			}
 302  		}
 303  		if ((Q4DW >= 0x1D) && (Q4DW <= 0x24)) {
 304  			Q5CK = Q4DW - 0x1D;
 305  		}
 306  		Q5NC = move_ship_relative(ship, Q5CK, Q58B);
 307  		if (Q5NC == 0x00) {
 308  			bark(Q62O, "Ar, we've stopped sir.")Q5FV = get_and_clear_ship_command(Q62O);
 309  			clear_queued_ship_command(Q62O);
 310  			return(0x00);
 311  		} else {
 312  			if (Q5NC < 0x00) {
 313  				bark(Q62O, "Ar, turbulent water!")save_current_ship_command(Q62O);
 314  				Q5NC = move_ship_or_map_switch(ship, Q5CK, Q62O);
 315  				if (!Q478) {
 316  					if (!Q65T) {
 317  						Q5FV = get_and_clear_ship_command(Q62O);
 318  					} else {
 319  						Q65T = 0x00;
 320  					}
 321  				}
 322  				return(0x00);
 323  			} else {
 324  				if (((Q4DW >= 0x13) && (Q4DW <= 0x1A)) || ((Q4DW >= 0x1D) && (Q4DW <= 0x24))) {
 325  					if (!Q478) {
 326  						Q5FV = get_and_clear_ship_command(Q62O);
 327  					}
 328  				}
 329  			}
 330  		}
 331  		return(0x01);
 332  	}
 333  	if (Q4DW == 0x1B) {
 334  		return(Q62R(Q62O, 0x00));
 335  	}
 336  	if (Q4DW == 0x1C) {
 337  		return(Q62R(Q62O, 0x01));
 338  	}
 339  	if (Q4DW >= 0x25) {
 340  		bark(this, "Ar, I don't know how to do that, sir.");
 341  		Q5FV = get_and_clear_ship_command(Q62O);
 342  		return(0x00);
 343  	}
 344  	return(0x00);
 345  }
 346  
 347  trigger callback(0x31) {
 348  	Q4V5 = 0x00;
 349  	if (containedBy(this) != NULL()) {
 350  		return(0x01);
 351  	}
 352  	if (hasObjVar(this, "shipcommand")) {
 353  		int Q4DW = getObjVar(this, "shipcommand");
 354  		if (Q62Q(this, Q4DW, 0x00)) {
 355  			shortCallback(this, 0x02, 0x31);
 356  			Q4V5 = 0x01;
 357  			return(0x01);
 358  		}
 359  		if (hasObjVar(this, "shipqueuedcommand")) {
 360  			int Q5CK = getObjVar(this, "shipqueuedcommand");
 361  			removeObjVar(this, "shipqueuedcommand");
 362  			set_ship_command(this, Q5CK);
 363  		}
 364  	}
 365  	return(0x01);
 366  }
 367  
 368  trigger speech("*") {
 369  	if (containedBy(this) != NULL()) {
 370  		return(0x01);
 371  	}
 372  	obj Q5AK = getMultiSlaveId(this);
 373  	if (isDead(speaker) && (!isManifesting(speaker))) {
 374  		return(0x01);
 375  	}
 376  	if (!isOnMulti(speaker, Q5AK)) {
 377  		return(0x01);
 378  	}
 379  	if ((!can_player_unlock_ship(Q5AK, speaker)) && (!isEditing(speaker))) {
 380  		obj Q4DK = getClosestVisibleOnlinePlayer(getLocation(this), 0x0F);
 381  		if ((Q4DK == NULL()) || ((Q4DK != speaker))) {
 382  			return(0x01);
 383  		}
 384  		list Q5J1;
 385  		getPlayersOnMulti(Q5J1, Q5AK);
 386  		int Q5EW = numInList(Q5J1);
 387  		int Q5J3;
 388  		for (Q5J3 = 0x00; Q5J3 < Q5EW; Q5J3++) {
 389  			obj Q5J2 = Q5J1[Q5J3];
 390  			if (can_player_unlock_ship(Q5AK, Q5J2)) {
 391  				return(0x01);
 392  			}
 393  		}
 394  	}
 395  	list args;
 396  	split(args, arg);
 397  	string Q5N7;
 398  	string Q44J;
 399  	string Q44K;
 400  	string Q44L;
 401  	int num = numInList(args);
 402  	if (num > 0x02) {
 403  		Q44J = args[0x00];
 404  		Q44K = args[0x01];
 405  		if ((Q44J == "set") && (Q44K == "name")) {
 406  			string Q5B6;
 407  			string Q4G2;
 408  			for (int Q4EJ = 0x02; Q4EJ < num; Q4EJ++) {
 409  				if (Q4EJ != 0x02) {
 410  					concat(Q5B6, " ");
 411  				}
 412  				Q4G2 = args[Q4EJ];
 413  				concat(Q5B6, Q4G2);
 414  			}
 415  			Q5N7 = "This ship is now called the ";
 416  			concat(Q5N7, Q5B6);
 417  			concat(Q5N7, ".");
 418  			set_custom_multi_name(Q5AK, Q5B6);
 419  			barkTo(this, speaker, Q5N7);
 420  			return(0x01);
 421  		}
 422  	}
 423  	if (num == 0x01) {
 424  		Q44J = args[0x00];
 425  		if (Q44J == "name") {
 426  			if (has_custom_multi_name(Q5AK)) {
 427  				Q5N7 = "This is the ";
 428  				concat(Q5N7, get_custom_multi_name(Q5AK));
 429  				concat(Q5N7, ".");
 430  				bark(this, Q5N7);
 431  			} else {
 432  				bark(this, "Ar, this ship has no name.");
 433  			}
 434  			return(0x01);
 435  		}
 436  		if (Q44J == "forward") {
 437  			set_ship_command(this, 0x00);
 438  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 439  			return(0x01);
 440  		}
 441  		if ((Q44J == "backwards") || (Q44J == "backward") || (Q44J == "back")) {
 442  			set_ship_command(this, 0x04);
 443  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 444  			return(0x01);
 445  		}
 446  		if (Q44J == "left") {
 447  			set_ship_command(this, 0x06);
 448  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 449  			return(0x01);
 450  		}
 451  		if (Q44J == "right") {
 452  			set_ship_command(this, 0x02);
 453  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 454  			return(0x01);
 455  		}
 456  		if (Q44J == "stop") {
 457  			int Q5FV = get_and_clear_ship_command(this);
 458  			bark(this, "Yes, sir.");
 459  			return(0x01);
 460  		}
 461  		if (Q44J == "starboard") {
 462  			set_ship_command(this, 0x08);
 463  			return(0x01);
 464  		}
 465  		if (Q44J == "port") {
 466  			set_ship_command(this, 0x09);
 467  			return(0x01);
 468  		}
 469  		if (Q44J == "nav") {
 470  			int Q5B9 = get_nav_point_index();
 471  			string Q5AI;
 472  			if (Q5B9 < 0x00) {
 473  				concat(Q5AI, "I have no current nav point.");
 474  			} else {
 475  				concat(Q5AI, "My current destination navpoint is nav ");
 476  				Q5AI = Q5AI + (Q5B9 + 0x01);
 477  				concat(Q5AI, ".");
 478  			}
 479  			bark(this, Q5AI);
 480  			return(0x01);
 481  		}
 482  		if (Q44J == "start") {
 483  			set_global_ship_id(0x00);
 484  			set_ship_command(this, 0x1B);
 485  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 486  			return(0x01);
 487  		}
 488  		if (Q44J == "continue") {
 489  			set_ship_command(this, 0x1B);
 490  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 491  			return(0x01);
 492  		}
 493  		return(0x01);
 494  	}
 495  	if (num == 0x02) {
 496  		Q44J = args[0x00];
 497  		Q44K = args[0x01];
 498  		if ((Q44J == "remove") && (Q44K == "name")) {
 499  			if (has_custom_multi_name(Q5AK)) {
 500  				remove_custom_multi_name(Q5AK);
 501  				bark(this, "This ship now has no name.");
 502  			} else {
 503  				bark(this, "This ship has no name.");
 504  			}
 505  			return(0x01);
 506  		}
 507  		if ((Q44J == "unfurl") && (Q44K == "sail")) {
 508  			set_ship_command(this, 0x00);
 509  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 510  			return(0x01);
 511  		}
 512  		if ((Q44J == "furl") && (Q44K == "sail")) {
 513  			Q5FV = get_and_clear_ship_command(this);
 514  			if (Q5FV >= 0x00) {
 515  				bark(this, "Yes sir.");
 516  			} else {
 517  				bark(this, "Er, the ship is not moving sir.");
 518  			}
 519  			return(0x01);
 520  		}
 521  		if (((Q44J == "drop") && (Q44K == "anchor")) || ((Q44J == "lower") && (Q44K == "anchor"))) {
 522  			if (Q464 != 0x01) {
 523  				Q464 = 0x01;
 524  				bark(this, "Ar, anchor dropped sir.");
 525  				Q5FV = get_and_clear_ship_command(this);
 526  			} else {
 527  				bark(this, "Ar, the anchor was already dropped sir.");
 528  			}
 529  			return(0x01);
 530  		}
 531  		if (((Q44J == "raise") && (Q44K == "anchor")) || ((Q44J == "lift") && (Q44K == "anchor")) || ((Q44J == "hoist") && (Q44K == "anchor"))) {
 532  			if (Q464 != 0x00) {
 533  				Q464 = 0x00;
 534  				bark(this, "Ar, anchor raised sir.");
 535  			} else {
 536  				bark(this, "Ar, the anchor has not been dropped sir.");
 537  			}
 538  			return(0x01);
 539  		}
 540  		if ((Q44J == "forward") && (Q44K == "left")) {
 541  			set_ship_command(this, 0x07);
 542  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 543  			return(0x01);
 544  		}
 545  		if ((Q44J == "forward") && (Q44K == "right")) {
 546  			set_ship_command(this, 0x01);
 547  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 548  			return(0x01);
 549  		}
 550  		if (((Q44J == "backward") && (Q44K == "left")) || ((Q44J == "backwards") && (Q44K == "left")) || ((Q44J == "back") && (Q44K == "left"))) {
 551  			set_ship_command(this, 0x05);
 552  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 553  			return(0x01);
 554  		}
 555  		if (((Q44J == "backward") && (Q44K == "right")) || ((Q44J == "backwards") && (Q44K == "right")) || ((Q44J == "back") && (Q44K == "right"))) {
 556  			set_ship_command(this, 0x03);
 557  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 558  			return(0x01);
 559  		}
 560  		if ((Q44J == "turn") && (Q44K == "right")) {
 561  			set_ship_command(this, 0x08);
 562  			return(0x01);
 563  		}
 564  		if ((Q44J == "turn") && (Q44K == "left")) {
 565  			set_ship_command(this, 0x09);
 566  			return(0x01);
 567  		}
 568  		if ((Q44J == "turn") && (Q44K == "around")) {
 569  			set_ship_command(this, 0x0A);
 570  			return(0x01);
 571  		}
 572  		if ((Q44J == "come") && (Q44K == "about")) {
 573  			set_ship_command(this, 0x0A);
 574  			return(0x01);
 575  		}
 576  		if ((Q44J == "drift") && (Q44K == "left")) {
 577  			set_ship_command(this, 0x06);
 578  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 579  			return(0x01);
 580  		}
 581  		if ((Q44J == "drift") && (Q44K == "right")) {
 582  			set_ship_command(this, 0x02);
 583  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 584  			return(0x01);
 585  		}
 586  		if (Q44J == "slow") {
 587  			if (Q44K == "left") {
 588  				set_ship_command(this, 0x11);
 589  				bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 590  				return(0x01);
 591  			}
 592  			if (Q44K == "right") {
 593  				set_ship_command(this, 0x0D);
 594  				bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 595  				return(0x01);
 596  			}
 597  			if (Q44K == "forward") {
 598  				set_ship_command(this, 0x0B);
 599  				bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 600  				return(0x01);
 601  			}
 602  			if ((Q44K == "back") || (Q44K == "backward") || (Q44K == "backwards")) {
 603  				set_ship_command(this, 0x0F);
 604  				bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 605  				return(0x01);
 606  			}
 607  		}
 608  		if (Q44J == "one") {
 609  			if (Q44K == "left") {
 610  				set_ship_command(this, 0x23);
 611  				bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 612  				return(0x01);
 613  			}
 614  			if (Q44K == "right") {
 615  				set_ship_command(this, 0x1F);
 616  				bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 617  				return(0x01);
 618  			}
 619  			if (Q44K == "forward") {
 620  				set_ship_command(this, 0x1D);
 621  				bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 622  				return(0x01);
 623  			}
 624  			if ((Q44K == "back") || (Q44K == "backward") || (Q44K == "backwards")) {
 625  				set_ship_command(this, 0x21);
 626  				bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 627  				return(0x01);
 628  			}
 629  		}
 630  		if (Q44K == "one") {
 631  			if (Q44J == "left") {
 632  				set_ship_command(this, 0x23);
 633  				bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 634  				return(0x01);
 635  			}
 636  			if (Q44J == "right") {
 637  				set_ship_command(this, 0x1F);
 638  				bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 639  				return(0x01);
 640  			}
 641  			if (Q44J == "forward") {
 642  				set_ship_command(this, 0x1D);
 643  				bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 644  				return(0x01);
 645  			}
 646  			if ((Q44J == "back") || (Q44J == "backward") || (Q44J == "backwards")) {
 647  				set_ship_command(this, 0x21);
 648  				bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 649  				return(0x01);
 650  			}
 651  		}
 652  		if (Q44J == "goto") {
 653  			set_global_ship_id(strtoi(Q44K) - 0x01);
 654  			set_ship_command(this, 0x1B);
 655  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 656  			return(0x01);
 657  		}
 658  		if (Q44J == "single") {
 659  			set_global_ship_id(strtoi(Q44K) - 0x01);
 660  			set_ship_command(this, 0x1C);
 661  			bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 662  			return(0x01);
 663  		}
 664  		return(0x01);
 665  	}
 666  	if (num == 0x03) {
 667  		Q44J = args[0x00];
 668  		Q44K = args[0x01];
 669  		Q44L = args[0x02];
 670  		if (Q44J == "slow") {
 671  			if (Q44K == "forward") {
 672  				if (Q44L == "left") {
 673  					set_ship_command(this, 0x12);
 674  					bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 675  					return(0x01);
 676  				}
 677  				if (Q44L == "right") {
 678  					set_ship_command(this, 0x0C);
 679  					bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 680  					return(0x01);
 681  				}
 682  			}
 683  			if ((Q44K == "back") || (Q44K == "backward") || (Q44K == "backwards")) {
 684  				if (Q44L == "left") {
 685  					set_ship_command(this, 0x10);
 686  					bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 687  					return(0x01);
 688  				}
 689  				if (Q44L == "right") {
 690  					set_ship_command(this, 0x0E);
 691  					bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 692  					return(0x01);
 693  				}
 694  			}
 695  		}
 696  		if (Q44J == "one") {
 697  			if (Q44K == "forward") {
 698  				if (Q44L == "left") {
 699  					set_ship_command(this, 0x24);
 700  					bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 701  					return(0x01);
 702  				}
 703  				if (Q44L == "right") {
 704  					set_ship_command(this, 0x1E);
 705  					bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 706  					return(0x01);
 707  				}
 708  			}
 709  			if ((Q44K == "back") || (Q44K == "backward") || (Q44K == "backwards")) {
 710  				if (Q44L == "left") {
 711  					set_ship_command(this, 0x22);
 712  					bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 713  					return(0x01);
 714  				}
 715  				if (Q44L == "right") {
 716  					set_ship_command(this, 0x20);
 717  					bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 718  					return(0x01);
 719  				}
 720  			}
 721  		}
 722  		if (Q44L == "one") {
 723  			if (Q44J == "forward") {
 724  				if (Q44K == "left") {
 725  					set_ship_command(this, 0x24);
 726  					bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 727  					return(0x01);
 728  				}
 729  				if (Q44K == "right") {
 730  					set_ship_command(this, 0x1E);
 731  					bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");
 732  					return(0x01);
 733  				}
 734  			}
 735  			if ((Q44J == "back") || (Q44J == "backward") || (Q44J == "backwards")) {

 737  					set_ship_command(this, 0x22);
 738  					bark(this, "Aye aye sir.");

 745  				}

 747  		}
 748  	}
 749  	return(0x01);

 751  
 752  trigger give {
 753  	int Q5NC;
 754  	if (isMap(givenobj)) {
 755  		if (!isValidMap(givenobj)) {
 756  			bark(this, "Ar, that is not a map, tis but a blank piece of paper!");
 757  		} else {
 758  			loc Q5AH;
 759  			if (!getMapPoint(Q5AH, givenobj, 0x00)) {
 760  				bark(this, "Arrrr, this map has no course on it!");
 761  			} else {
 762  				bark(this, "A map!");
 763  				Q55D = givenobj;
 764  			}
 765  		}
 766  	} else {
 767  		bark(this, "Rrrrr, I don't want that!  Show me a map!");
 768  	}
 769  	return(0x00);
 770  }
 771  
 772  function void set_global_ship_id(int Q5J7) {
 773  	Q5BA = ship_id;
 774  	return;
 775  }
 776  
 777  function int get_nav_point_index() {
 778  	return(Q5BA);
 779  }
 780  
 781  trigger objectloaded {
 782  	if (containedBy(this) == NULL()) {
 783  		int Q5FV = get_and_clear_ship_command(this);
 784  	}
 785  	return(0x01);
 786  }
 787  
 788  trigger lookedat {
 789  	obj Q5AK = getMultiSlaveId(this);
 790  	if (has_custom_multi_name(Q5AK)) {
 791  		string Q5CQ = "the tillerman of the ";
 792  		concat(Q5CQ, get_custom_multi_name(Q5AK));
 793  		barkTo(this, looker, Q5CQ);
 794  		bark_decay_status(this, looker, "ship");
 795  		return(0x00);
 796  	}
 797  	bark_decay_status(this, looker, "ship");
 798  	return(0x01);
 799  }
 800  
 801  trigger use {
 802  	obj Q5AK = getMultiSlaveId(this);
 803  	if (mobile_has_house_key(Q5AK, user)) {
 804  		systemMessage(user, "What dost thou wish to name thy ship?");
 805  		textEntry(this, user, 0x18, 0x00, "");
 806  	} else {
 807  		string Q4R5;
 808  		int num = random(0x00, 0x0F);
 809  		switch(num) {
 810  		case 0x00
 811  		case 0x01
 812  		case 0x02
 813  			Q4R5 = "Arr, don't do that!";
 814  			break;
 815  		case 0x03
 816  		case 0x04
 817  		case 0x05
 818  			Q4R5 = "Arr, leave me alone!";
 819  			break;
 820  		case 0x06
 821  		case 0x07
 822  		case 0x08
 823  			Q4R5 = "Arr, watch what thou'rt doing, matey!";
 824  			break;
 825  		case 0x09
 826  		case 0x0A
 827  			Q4R5 = "Arr!  Do that again and I'll throw ye overboard!";
 828  			break;
 829  		case 0x0B
 830  		case 0x0C
 831  		case 0x0D
 832  		case 0x0E
 833  		case 0x0F
 834  			default
 835  			Q4R5 = "Arr!  Only the owner of the ship may change its name!";
 836  			break;
 837  		}
 838  		bark(this, Q4R5);
 839  	}
 840  	return(0x00);
 841  }
 842  
 843  trigger textentry(0x18) {
 844  	if (button == 0x00) {
 845  		return(0x00);
 846  	}
 847  	obj Q5AK = getMultiSlaveId(this);
 848  	if (mobile_has_house_key(Q5AK, sender)) {
 849  		if (text == "") {
 850  			if (has_custom_multi_name(Q5AK)) {
 851  				remove_custom_multi_name(Q5AK);
 852  				barkTo(this, sender, "This ship now has no name.");
 853  			}
 854  		} else {
 855  			string Q5N7 = "This ship is now called the ";
 856  			concat(Q5N7, text);
 857  			concat(Q5N7, ".");
 858  			barkTo(this, sender, Q5N7);
 859  			set_custom_multi_name(Q5AK, text);
 860  		}
 861  	}
 862  	return(0x00);
 863  }
 864
#88 shrine.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5T1 int → is_chaos_shrine
Source — shrine.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q5T1;
   4  
   5  function int try_resurrect_target(obj target, int Q5XG) {
   6  	loc shrine_loc = getLocation(this);
   7  	int shrine_z = getZ(shrine_loc);
   8  	loc target_loc = getLocation(target);
   9  	int target_z = getZ(target_loc);
  10  	int z_diff = shrine_z - target_z;
  11  	string z_diff_str = z_diff;
  12  	if ((z_diff > 0x0A) || (z_diff < (0x00 - 0x0A))) {
  13  		return(0x00);
  14  	}
  15  	if (isDead(target)) {
  16  		if (findGoodZ(target_loc, getZ(target_loc), getZ(target_loc), getHeight(target), 0x01) == (0x00 - 0x80)) {
  17  			return(0x00);
  18  		}
  19  		if (!is_chaos) {
  20  			if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
  21  				if (getNotorietyLevel(target) < (0x00 - 0x02)) {
  22  					bark(this, "Thy deeds are those of a scoundrel; thou shalt not be resurrected here.");
  23  					return(0x00);
  24  				}
  25  			} else {
  26  				if (isMurderer(target)) {
  27  					bark(this, "Thy deeds are those of a scoundrel; thou shalt not be resurrected here.");
  28  					return(0x00);
  29  				}
  30  			}
  31  		}
  32  		string prompt;
  33  		if (is_chaos) {
  34  			prompt = "It is possible for you to be resurrected here at the Chaos Shrine. Do you wish to try?";
  35  		} else {
  36  			prompt = "It is possible for you to be resurrected at this Shrine to the Virtues. Do you wish to try?";
  37  		}
  38  		setup_resurrection(this, target, 0x01, prompt)return(0x01);
  39  	}
  40  	return(0x00);
  41  }
  42  
  43  trigger enterrange(0x01) {
  44  	int Q527 = try_resurrect_target(target, Q5T1);
  45  	return(!Q527);
  46  }
  47  
  48  trigger use {
  49  	if (hasScript(user, "poisoned")) {
  50  		cure_poison_effect(user);
  51  		barkTo(this, user, "Thy poison has been cured.");
  52  	}
  53  	return(0x00);
  54  	if (isDead(user)) {
  55  		int Q528 = try_resurrect_target(user, Q5T1);
  56  		return(0x00);
  57  	}
  58  	int Q5DG;
  59  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
  60  		if (Q5T1) {
  61  			if (getNotoriety(user) < 0x00) {
  62  				Q5DG = 0x01;
  63  				barkTo(this, user, "Thy efforts for the resistance are rewarded.");
  64  			}
  65  		} else {
  66  			if (getNotoriety(user) >= 0x00) {
  67  				Q5DG = 0x01;
  68  				barkTo(this, user, "Strive to continue on the path of benevolence.");
  69  			}
  70  		}
  71  	} else {
  72  		if (Q5T1) {
  73  			if (getKarmaLevel(user) < 0x00) {
  74  				Q5DG = 0x01;
  75  				barkTo(this, user, "Thy efforts for the resistance are rewarded.");
  76  			}
  77  		} else {
  78  			if (getKarmaLevel(user) >= 0x00) {
  79  				Q5DG = 0x01;
  80  				barkTo(this, user, "Strive to continue on the path of benevolence.");
  81  			}
  82  		}
  83  	}
  84  	if (Q5DG) {
  85  		doMobAnimation(user, 0x376A, 0x0A, 0x0F, 0x00, 0x00);
  86  		restoreHP(user);
  87  	} else {
  88  		if (Q5T1) {
  89  			int Q4FG = getCurHP(user);
  90  			barkTo(this, user, "The weak deserve their fate.");
  91  			doMobAnimation(user, 0x374A, 0x0A, 0x0F, 0x00, 0x00);
  92  			setCurHP(user, Q4FG / 0x02 + 0x01);
  93  		} else {
  94  			int Q562 = getMaxHP(user);
  95  			int Q4WA = getHPLevel(user);
  96  			if (Q4WA < 0x32) {
  97  				setCurHP(user, Q562 / 0x02);
  98  				doMobAnimation(user, 0x376A, 0x0A, 0x0F, 0x00, 0x00);
  99  				barkTo(this, user, "Do more to help others.");
 100  			} else {
 101  				barkTo(this, user, "I can not help thee.");
 102  			}
 103  		}
 104  	}
 105  	return(0x01);
 106  }

  46  
  47  function int calculate_percentage_value(int maxValue, int Q5HW) {
  48  	return((maxValue * percentage) / 0x64);
  49  }
  50  
  51  function int calculate_magic_resistance_difficulty() {
  52  	Q55A = 0x00;
  53  	Q52U = 0x00;
  54  	if (Q559 < 0x4E) {
  55  		Q55A++;
  56  	}
  57  	if (Q559 < 0x1A) {
  58  		Q55A++;
  59  	}
  60  	if (Q559 < 0x10) {
  61  		Q55A++;
  62  	}
  63  	if (Q559 < 0x0A) {
  64  		Q55A++;
  65  	}
  66  	if (Q559 < 0x06) {
  67  		Q55A++;
  68  	}
  69  	if (Q4AP < 0x08) {
  70  		Q52U++;
  71  	}
  72  	if (Q4AP < 0x06) {
  73  		Q52U++;
  74  	}
  75  	if (Q4AP < 0x05) {
  76  		Q52U++;
  77  	}
  78  	if (Q4AP < 0x04) {
  79  		Q52U++;
  80  	}
  81  	if (Q4AP < 0x03) {
  82  		Q52U++;
  83  	}
  84  	if (Q55A < Q52U) {
  85  		Q48D = Q52U;
  86  	} else {
  87  		Q48D = Q55A;
  88  	}
  89  	string magery_difficulty_string = Q55A;
  90  	string attack_difficulty_string = Q52U;
  91  	string b = Q48D;
  92  	return(Q48D);
  93  }
  94  
  95  function int calculate_combat_difficulty_level() {
  96  	Q55A = 0x00;
  97  	Q52U = 0x00;
  98  	if (Q559 < 0x4E) {
  99  		Q55A++;
 100  	}
 101  	if (Q559 < 0x1A) {
 102  		Q55A++;
 103  	}
 104  	if (Q559 < 0x10) {
 105  		Q55A++;
 106  	}
 107  	if (Q559 < 0x0A) {
 108  		Q55A++;
 109  	}
 110  	if (Q559 < 0x06) {
 111  		Q55A++;
 112  	}
 113  	if (Q559 < 0x04) {
 114  		Q55A++;
 115  	}
 116  	if (Q4AP < 0x07) {
 117  		Q52U++;
 118  	}
 119  	if (Q4AP < 0x06) {
 120  		Q52U++;
 121  		Q52U++;
 122  	}
 123  	if (Q4AP < 0x05) {
 124  		Q52U++;
 125  	}
 126  	if (Q4AP < 0x04) {
 127  		Q52U++;
 128  	}
 129  	if (Q4AP < 0x03) {
 130  		Q52U++;
 131  	}
 132  	if (Q4AP < 0x02) {
 133  		Q52U++;
 134  	}
 135  	if (Q55A < Q52U) {
 136  		Q48D = Q52U;
 137  	} else {
 138  		Q48D = Q55A;
 139  	}
 140  	string magery_difficulty_string = Q55A;
 141  	string attack_difficulty_string = Q52U;
 142  	string b = Q48D;
 143  	return(Q48D);
 144  }
 145  
 146  function int calculate_enhanced_difficulty_level() {
 147  	Q55A = 0x00;
 148  	Q52U = 0x00;
 149  	if (Q559 < 0x34) {
 150  		Q55A++;
 151  	}
 152  	if (Q559 < 0x10) {
 153  		Q55A++;
 154  	}
 155  	if (Q4AP < 0x07) {
 156  		Q52U++;
 157  	}
 158  	if (Q4AP < 0x05) {
 159  		Q52U++;
 160  	}
 161  	if (Q55A < Q52U) {
 162  		Q48D = Q52U;
 163  	} else {
 164  		Q48D = Q55A;
 165  	}
 166  	string magery_difficulty_string = Q55A;
 167  	string attack_difficulty_string = Q52U;
 168  	string b = Q48D;
 169  	return(Q48D);
 170  }
 171  
 172  function int calculate_simple_difficulty_level() {
 173  	Q55A = 0x00;
 174  	Q52U = 0x00;
 175  	if (Q559 < 0x06) {
 176  		Q55A++;
 177  	}
 178  	if (Q4AP < 0x04) {
 179  		Q52U++;
 180  	}
 181  	if (Q55A < Q52U) {
 182  		Q48D = Q52U;
 183  	} else {
 184  		Q48D = Q55A;
 185  	}
 186  	string magery_difficulty_string = Q55A;
 187  	string attack_difficulty_string = Q52U;
 188  	string b = Q48D;
 189  	return(Q48D);
 190  }
 191  
 192  function int pick_offensive_spell_level() {
 193  	Q453 = 0x00;
 194  	if (random(0x00, 0x01) == 0x01) {
 195  		Q63S = calculate_combat_difficulty_level();
 196  		Q453 = Q453 + 0x08;
 197  	} else {
 198  		if (Q559 < 0x06) {
 199  			if (random(0x00, 0x01) == 0x00) {
 200  				Q453 = Q453 + 0x08;
 201  			}
 202  		}
 203  		Q63S = calculate_magic_resistance_difficulty();
 204  	}
 205  	Q453 = Q453 + random(Q63S, 0x07);
 206  	Q5XJ = get_adjusted_spell_level(Q453);
 207  	if (Q5XJ == 0x00) {
 208  		return(Q453);
 209  	}
 210  	return(Q5XJ);
 211  }
 212  
 213  function int pick_combat_spell_level() {
 214  	Q453 = 0x08;
 215  	Q63S = calculate_combat_difficulty_level();
 216  	Q453 = Q453 + random(Q63S, 0x07);
 217  	Q5XJ = get_adjusted_spell_level(Q453);
 218  	if (Q5XJ == 0x00) {
 219  		return(Q453);
 220  	}
 221  	return(Q5XJ);
 222  }
 223  
 224  function int pick_neutral_spell_level() {
 225  	Q453 = 0x10;
 226  	if (Q559 < 0x0A) {
 227  		Q453 = 0x0F;
 228  	} else {
 229  		Q63S = calculate_enhanced_difficulty_level();
 230  		Q453 = Q453 + random(Q63S, 0x02);
 231  	}
 232  	if (Q4AP < 0x04) {
 233  		return(0x00 - 0x10);
 234  	}
 235  	Q5XJ = get_adjusted_spell_level(Q453);
 236  	if (Q5XJ == 0x00) {
 237  		return(Q453);
 238  	}
 239  	return(Q5XJ);
 240  }
 241  
 242  function int pick_good_spell_level() {
 243  	Q453 = 0x13;
 244  	if (Q559 < 0x04) {
 245  		Q453 = 0x0F;
 246  	} else {
 247  		Q63S = calculate_simple_difficulty_level();
 248  		Q453 = Q453 + random(Q63S, 0x04);
 249  	}
 250  	if (Q4AP < 0x02) {
 251  		return(0x00 - 0x13);
 252  	}
 253  	Q5XJ = get_adjusted_spell_level(Q453);
 254  	if (Q5XJ == 0x00) {
 255  		return(Q453);
 256  	}
 257  	return(Q5XJ);
 258  }
 259  
 260  function int pick_heal_spell_level() {
 261  	Q453 = 0x18;
 262  	Q42W = calculate_percentage_value(Q564, 0x32);
 263  	if (Q559 < 0x0C) {
 264  		Q453 = 0x19;
 265  	}
 266  	if (Q42W < Q59M) {
 267  		Q453 = 0x19;
 268  	}
 269  	string spell_level_str = Q453;
 270  	return(Q453);
 271  }
 272  
 273  function int get_spell_power_threshold() {
 274  	string spell_id_string = Q453;
 275  	if (Q4AP < 0x06) {
 276  		return(0x00);
 277  	}
 278  	return(0x1A);
 279  }
 280  
 281  trigger creation {
 282  	Q59M = getCurHP(this);
 283  	Q564 = getMaxHP(this);
 284  	Q42X = calculate_percentage_value(Q564, 0x4B);
 285  	Q42V = calculate_percentage_value(Q564, 0x19);
 286  	Q42U = calculate_percentage_value(Q564, 0x0A);
 287  	Q59X = Q59M;
 288  	return(0x01);
 289  }
 290  
 291  function void Q5UO(obj Q5DM) {
 292  	obj target = getFirstVisableTargetInRange(Q5DM, 0x09);
 293  	if (target == NULL()) {
 294  		return();
 295  	}
 296  	loc there = getLocation(target);
 297  	int Q4WB = getCurHP(Q5DM);
 298  	Q559 = getCurMana(Q5DM);
 299  	int intelligence = getIntelligence(Q5DM);
 300  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "spellCastersLevel")) {
 301  		return();
 302  	}
 303  	Q4AP = getObjVar(Q5DM, "spellCastersLevel");
 304  	int Q4Y4;
 305  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
 306  		Q4Y4 = getNotoriety(Q5DM);
 307  	} else {
 308  		Q4Y4 = getKarmaLevel(Q5DM);
 309  	}
 310  	int Q5UN;
 311  	int Q5X7;
 312  	int Q4OE;
 313  	int Q4AY;
 314  	int targetType;
 315  	int Q5MQ;
 316  	int Q4GM;
 317  	int neutral;
 318  	int good;
 319  	int heal;
 320  	if (Q42X <= Q4WB) {
 321  		Q5X7 = 0x01;
 322  	}
 323  	if (Q42V <= Q4WB) {
 324  		if (Q4WB < Q42X) {
 325  			Q5X7 = 0x02;
 326  		}
 327  	}
 328  	if (Q42U <= Q4WB) {
 329  		if (Q4WB < Q42V) {
 330  			Q5X7 = 0x03;
 331  		}
 332  	} else {
 333  		Q5X7 = 0x04;
 334  	}
 335  	string Q4XE = Q42X;
 336  	string Q4XD = Q42V;
 337  	string Q4XC = Q42U;
 338  	string Q4UO = Q4WB;
 339  	string Q5VH = Q5X7;
 340  	Q4OE = 0x00;
 341  	switch(Q5X7) {
 342  	case 0x01
 343  		Q4GM = 0x00;
 344  		break;
 345  	case 0x02
 346  		Q4GM = 0x37;
 347  		neutral = 0x28;
 348  		good = 0x1C;
 349  		heal = 0x03;
 350  		break;
 351  	case 0x03
 352  		Q4GM = 0x50;
 353  		neutral = 0x46;
 354  		good = 0x3C;
 355  		heal = 0x0F;
 356  		break;
 357  	case 0x04
 358  		Q4GM = 0x5F;
 359  		neutral = 0x5A;
 360  		good = 0x55;
 361  		heal = 0x0F;
 362  		break;
 363  	case 0x05
 364  		Q4GM = 0x64;
 365  		neutral = 0x64;
 366  		good = 0x55;
 367  		heal = 0x0F;
 368  		break;
 369  	default
 370  		break;
 371  	}
 372  	list Q4OC = 0x1F4A, 0x03, 0x0A, 0x1F5A, 0x02, 0x1A, 0x1F3E, 0x03, 0x06, 0x1F47, 0x03, 0x0A, 0x1F40, 0x03, 0x06, 0x1F2E, 0x03, 0x02, 0x1F30, 0x03, 0x02, 0x1F34, 0x03, 0x02;
 373  	list Q4GL = 0x1F5F, 0x03, 0x34, 0x1F57, 0x03, 0x1A, 0x1F56, 0x03, 0x1A, 0x1F52, 0x03, 0x10, 0x1F4A, 0x03, 0x0A, 0x1F3E, 0x03, 0x06, 0x1F38, 0x03, 0x04, 0x1F32, 0x03, 0x02;
 374  	list Q5BK = 0x1F61, 0x03, 0x34, 0x1F50, 0x01, 0x10, 0x1F4B, 0x02, 0x0A;
 375  	list Q4U0 = 0x1F3D, 0x01, 0x06, 0x1F3B, 0x01, 0x04, 0x1F3C, 0x01, 0x04, 0x1F36, 0x01, 0x04, 0x1F35, 0x01, 0x04;
 376  	list Q4VN = 0x1F49, 0x01, 0x0A, 0x1F31, 0x01, 0x02;
 377  	list Q4O6 = 0x1F58, 0x01, 0x1A;
 378  	string Q47Q = Q559;
 379  	if (Q559 < 0x02) {
 380  		int Q4AZ = random(0x01, 0x64);
 381  		if (Q4AZ < 0x23) {
 382  			attack(this, target);
 383  			return();
 384  		} else {
 385  			return();
 386  		}
 387  	}
 388  	Q4AY = random(0x00, 0x64);
 389  	if (Q4GM <= Q4AY) {
 390  		if (Q4Y4 < 0x00) {
 391  			Q4OE = pick_offensive_spell_level();
 392  			if (Q4OE < 0x08) {
 393  				Q5UX = Q4OC[Q4OE * 0x03];
 394  				targetType = Q4OC[(Q4OE * 0x03) + 0x01];
 395  				Q5MQ = Q4OC[(Q4OE * 0x03) + 0x02];
 396  			} else {
 397  				Q4OE = (Q4OE - 0x08);
 398  				Q5UX = Q4GL[Q4OE * 0x03];
 399  				targetType = Q4GL[(Q4OE * 0x03) + 0x01];
 400  				Q5MQ = Q4GL[(Q4OE * 0x03) + 0x02];
 401  			}
 402  		} else {
 403  			Q4OE = (pick_combat_spell_level() - 0x08);
 404  			Q5UX = Q4GL[Q4OE * 0x03];
 405  			targetType = Q4GL[(Q4OE * 0x03) + 0x01];
 406  			Q5MQ = Q4GL[(Q4OE * 0x03) + 0x02];
 407  		}
 408  	}
 409  	if (neutral <= Q4AY) {
 410  		if (Q4AY < Q4GM) {
 411  			Q4OE = (pick_neutral_spell_level() - 0x10);
 412  			if (Q4OE == (0x00 - 0x10)) {
 413  				Q5UO(this);
 414  				return();
 415  			}
 416  			Q5UX = Q5BK[Q4OE * 0x03];
 417  			targetType = Q5BK[(Q4OE * 0x03) + 0x01];
 418  			Q5MQ = Q5BK[(Q4OE * 0x03) + 0x02];
 419  		}
 420  	}
 421  	if (good <= Q4AY) {
 422  		if (Q4AY < neutral) {
 423  			Q4OE = (pick_good_spell_level() - 0x13);
 424  			if (Q4OE == (0x00 - 0x13)) {
 425  				Q5UO(this);
 426  				return();
 427  			}
 428  			Q5UX = Q4U0[Q4OE * 0x03];
 429  			targetType = Q4U0[(Q4OE * 0x03) + 0x01];
 430  			Q5MQ = Q4U0[(Q4OE * 0x03) + 0x02];
 431  		}
 432  	}
 433  	if (heal <= Q4AY) {
 434  		if (Q4AY < good) {
 435  			Q4OE = (pick_heal_spell_level() - 0x18);
 436  			Q5UX = Q4VN[Q4OE * 0x03];
 437  			targetType = Q4VN[(Q4OE * 0x03) + 0x01];
 438  			Q5MQ = Q4VN[(Q4OE * 0x03) + 0x02];
 439  		}
 440  	} else {
 441  		Q4OE = (get_spell_power_threshold() - 0x1A);
 442  		if (Q4OE == (0x00 - 0x1A)) {
 443  			Q5UO(this);
 444  			return();
 445  		}
 446  		Q5UX = Q4O6[Q4OE * 0x03];
 447  		targetType = Q4O6[(Q4OE * 0x03) + 0x01];
 448  		Q5MQ = Q4O6[(Q4OE * 0x03) + 0x02];
 449  	}
 450  	obj scroll = createGlobalObjectIn(Q5UX, Q5DM);
 451  	if (scroll == NULL()) {
 452  		return();
 453  	}
 454  	obj Q4GD;
 455  	loc Q4GE;
 456  	if (consume_mana_if_available(Q5DM, Q5MQ) == 0x00) {
 457  		deleteObject(scroll);
 458  		list Q5DR;
 459  		shortcallback(this, 0x01, 0x48);
 460  		return();
 461  	}
 462  	setObjVar(scroll, "user", Q5DM);
 463  	string Q65H = targetType;
 464  	switch(targetType) {
 465  	case 0x01
 466  		Q4GD = Q5DM;
 467  		setObjVar(scroll, "target", Q4GD);
 468  		break;
 469  	case 0x02
 470  		Q4GD = target;
 471  		setObjVar(scroll, "target", Q4GD);
 472  		break;
 473  	case 0x03
 474  		Q4GD = target;
 475  		setObjVar(scroll, "target", Q4GD);
 476  		break;
 477  	default
 478  	}
 479  	shortcallback(scroll, 0x00, 0x49);
 480  	callback(Q5DM, 0x03, 0x48);
 481  	return();
 482  }
 483  
 484  function void Q4O9(obj Q5DM) {
 485  	if (getNumTargets(Q5DM) <= 0x00) {
 486  		return();
 487  	}
 488  	Q5UO(Q5DM);
 489  	return();
 490  }
 491  
 492  function int on_attacked(obj me, obj attacker) {
 493  	int unused;
 494  	Q63K = Q59X - getCurHP(me);
 495  	Q59X = getCurHP(me);
 496  	schedule_random_callback(this, 0x2D, 0x06, 0x0C);
 497  	return(0x00);
 498  }
 499  
 500  trigger gotattacked {
 501  	return(on_attacked(this, attacker));
 502  }
 503  
 504  trigger washit {
 505  	return(on_attacked(this, attacker));
 506  }
 507  
 508  function int consume_mana_if_available(obj user, int Q55B) {
 509  	if (mana_cost > (getCurMana(this))) {
 510  		return(0x00);
 511  	}
 512  	loseMana(this, mana_cost);
 513  	return(0x01);
 514  	return(0x00);
 515  }
 516  
 517  function int get_adjusted_spell_level(int Q453) {
 518  	obj target = getFirstVisableTargetInRange(this, 0x09);
 519  	if (target == NULL()) {
 520  		return(spell_level);
 521  	}
 522  	int adjusted_level;
 523  	switch(spell_level) {
 524  	case 0x04
 525  		if (hasScript(target, "poisoned")) {
 526  			adjusted_level = 0x0D;
 527  		}
 528  		break;
 529  	case 0x05
 530  		if (hasScript(target, "dexdown")) {
 531  			adjusted_level = 0x0F;
 532  		}
 533  		break;
 534  	case 0x06
 535  		if (hasScript(target, "intdown")) {
 536  			adjusted_level = 0x0F;
 537  		}
 538  		break;
 539  	case 0x07
 540  		if (hasScript(target, "strdown")) {
 541  			adjusted_level = 0x0F;
 542  		}
 543  		break;
 544  	case 0x0B
 545  		if (hasScript(target, "rempara")) {
 546  			adjusted_level = 0x0C;
 547  		}
 548  		break;
 549  	case 0x11
 550  		if (hasScript(this, "reflctor")) {
 551  			adjusted_level = 0x12;
 552  		}
 553  		break;
 554  	case 0x14
 555  		if (hasScript(this, "remprtct")) {
 556  			adjusted_level = 0x19;
 557  		}
 558  		break;
 559  	case 0x15
 560  		if (hasScript(this, "strup")) {
 561  			adjusted_level = 0x19;
 562  		}
 563  		break;
 564  	case 0x16
 565  		if (hasScript(this, "intup")) {
 566  			adjusted_level = 0x19;
 567  		}
 568  		break;
 569  	case 0x17
 570  		if (hasScript(this, "dexup")) {
 571  			adjusted_level = 0x19;
 572  		}
 573  		break;
 574  	default
 575  		adjusted_level = 0x00;
 576  	}
 577  	return(adjusted_level);
 578  }
 579  
 580  trigger callback(0x48) {
 581  	schedule_random_callback(this, 0x2D, 0x06, 0x0C);
 582  	return(0x01);
 583  }
 584  
 585  trigger callback(0x2D) {
 586  	Q4O9(this);
 587  	return(0x01);
 588  }

#90 spiketrap.m 4 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5XS int → is_active
Q5V3 int → obj_type
Q68C loc → east_hit_loc
Q5DE loc → south_hit_loc
Source — spiketrap.m 
   1  inherits sndfx;
   2  
   3  member int Q5XS;
   4  
   5  member int Q5V3;
   6  
   7  member loc Q68C;
   8  
   9  member loc Q5DE;
  10  
  11  member loc user_loc;
  12  
  13  trigger creation {
  14  	setObjVar(this, "isTrapped", 0x01);
  15  	user_loc = getLocation(this);
  16  	Q5V3 = getObjType(this);
  17  	switch(Q5V3) {
  18  	case 0x1108
  19  		Q68C = user_loc;
  20  		setX(Q68C, getX(user_loc) + 0x01);
  21  		break;
  22  	case 0x111B
  23  		Q5DE = user_loc;
  24  		setY(Q5DE, getY(user_loc) + 0x01);
  25  		break;
  26  	}
  27  	return(0x00);
  28  }
  29  
  30  trigger message("activate") {
  31  	Q5V3 = getObjType(this);
  32  	Q5XS = 0x01;
  33  	if (hasObjVar(this, "disarmed")) {
  34  		switch(Q5V3) {
  35  		case 0x1109
  36  			setType(this, 0x1108);
  37  			break;
  38  		case 0x111C
  39  			setType(this, 0x111B);
  40  			break;
  41  		case 0x11A1
  42  			setType(this, 0x11A0);
  43  			break;
  44  		case 0x119B
  45  			setType(this, 0x119A);
  46  			break;
  47  		default
  48  			break;
  49  		}
  50  		callback(this, 0x64, 0x2F);
  51  	} else {
  52  		switch(Q5V3) {
  53  		case 0x1108
  54  			doLocAnimation(user_loc, 0x1109, 0x06, 0x0C, 0x00, 0x00);
  55  			break;
  56  		case 0x111B
  57  			doLocAnimation(user_loc, 0x111C, 0x06, 0x0C, 0x00, 0x00);
  58  			break;
  59  		case 0x11A0
  60  			doLocAnimation(user_loc, 0x11A1, 0x06, 0x0C, 0x00, 0x00);
  61  			break;
  62  		case 0x119A
  63  			doLocAnimation(user_loc, 0x119B, 0x06, 0x0C, 0x00, 0x00);
  64  			break;
  65  		default
  66  			break;
  67  		}
  68  		sfx(user_loc, 0x022C, 0x00);
  69  		list Q64R;
  70  		getMobsInRange(Q64R, user_loc, 0x01);
  71  		int Q5E4 = numInList(Q64R);
  72  		for (int i = 0x00; i < Q5E4; i++) {
  73  			obj victim = Q64R[i];
  74  			loseHP(victim, dice(0x01, 0x06) * 0x06);
  75  		}
  76  		shortcallback(this, 0x04, 0x23);
  77  	}
  78  	return(0x00);
  79  }
  80  
  81  trigger message("deactivate") {
  82  	Q5V3 = getObjType(this);
  83  	Q5XS = 0x00;
  84  	switch(Q5V3) {
  85  	case 0x1109
  86  		setType(this, 0x1108);
  87  		break;
  88  	case 0x110E
  89  		setType(this, 0x1108);
  90  		break;
  91  	case 0x111C
  92  		setType(this, 0x111B);
  93  		break;
  94  	case 0x1121
  95  		setType(this, 0x111B);
  96  		break;
  97  	case 0x11A1
  98  		setType(this, 0x11A0);
  99  		break;
 100  	case 0x11A5
 101  		setType(this, 0x11A0);
 102  		break;
 103  	case 0x119B
 104  		setType(this, 0x119A);
 105  		break;
 106  	case 0x119F
 107  		setType(this, 0x119A);
 108  		break;
 109  	default
 110  		break;
 111  	}
 112  	return(0x00);
 113  }
 114  
 115  trigger enterrange(0x00) {
 116  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "disarmed")) {
 117  		list args;
 118  		message(this, "activate", args);
 119  	} else {
 120  		callback(this, 0x64, 0x2F);
 121  	}
 122  	return(0x01);
 123  }
 124  
 125  trigger callback(0x23) {
 126  	Q5V3 = getObjType(this);
 127  	switch(Q5V3) {
 128  	case 0x1108
 129  	case 0x1109
 130  		setType(this, 0x110E);
 131  		break;
 132  	case 0x111B
 133  	case 0x111C
 134  		setType(this, 0x1121);
 135  		break;
 136  	case 0x11A0
 137  	case 0x11A1
 138  		setType(this, 0x11A5);
 139  		break;
 140  	case 0x119A
 141  	case 0x119B
 142  		setType(this, 0x119F);
 143  		break;
 144  	default
 145  		break;
 146  	}
 147  	setObjVar(this, "disarmed", 0x01);
 148  	callback(this, 0x05, 0x24);
 149  	return(0x00);
 150  }
 151  
 152  trigger callback(0x24) {
 153  	Q5V3 = getObjType(this);
 154  	switch(Q5V3) {
 155  	case 0x110E
 156  		setType(this, 0x1108);
 157  		doLocAnimation(user_loc, 0x110D, 0x05, 0x09, 0x01, 0x00);
 158  		break;
 159  	case 0x1121
 160  		setType(this, 0x111B);
 161  		doLocAnimation(user_loc, 0x1120, 0x05, 0x09, 0x01, 0x00);
 162  		break;
 163  	case 0x11A5
 164  		setType(this, 0x11A0);
 165  		doLocAnimation(user_loc, 0x11A4, 0x05, 0x09, 0x01, 0x00);
 166  		break;
 167  	case 0x119F
 168  		setType(this, 0x119A);
 169  		doLocAnimation(user_loc, 0x119E, 0x05, 0x09, 0x01, 0x00);
 170  		break;
 171  	default
 172  		break;
 173  	}
 174  	removeObjVar(this, "disarmed");
 175  	return(0x00);
 176  }
 177  
 178  trigger callback(0x2F) {
 179  	if (hasObjVar(this, "disarmed")) {
 180  		removeObjVar(this, "disarmed");
 181  	}
 182  	return(0x00);
 183  }

#91 spiritual.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5Z3 obj → teleport_target
Source — spiritual.m 
   1  inherits sndfx;
   2  
   3  member obj Q5Z3;
   4  
   5  trigger speech("Om Om Om") {
   6  	list Q5HT;
   7  	setObjVar(speaker, "spokeMantra", 0x01);
   8  	getMobsAt(Q5HT, getLocation(this));
   9  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5HT); i++) {
  10  		if (hasObjVar(Q5HT[i], "spokeMantra")) {
  11  			removeObjVar(Q5HT[i], "spokeMantra");
  12  			Q5Z3 = Q5HT[i];
  13  			callback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
  14  		}
  15  	}
  16  	if (isValid(speaker)) {
  17  		removeObjVar(speaker, "spokeMantra");
  18  	}
  19  	return(0x00);
  20  }
  21  
  22  trigger speech("om om om") {
  23  	list Q5HT;
  24  	setObjVar(speaker, "spokeMantra", 0x01);
  25  	getMobsAt(Q5HT, getLocation(this));
  26  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5HT); i++) {
  27  		if (hasObjVar(Q5HT[i], "spokeMantra")) {
  28  			removeObjVar(Q5HT[i], "spokeMantra");
  29  			Q5Z3 = Q5HT[i];
  30  			callback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
  31  		}
  32  	}
  33  	if (isValid(speaker)) {
  34  		removeObjVar(speaker, "spokeMantra");
  35  	}
  36  	return(0x00);
  37  }
  38  
  39  trigger speech("OM OM OM") {
  40  	list Q5HT;
  41  	setObjVar(speaker, "spokeMantra", 0x01);
  42  	getMobsAt(Q5HT, getLocation(this));
  43  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5HT); i++) {
  44  		if (hasObjVar(Q5HT[i], "spokeMantra")) {
  45  			removeObjVar(Q5HT[i], "spokeMantra");
  46  			Q5Z3 = Q5HT[i];
  47  			callback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
  48  		}
  49  	}
  50  	if (isValid(speaker)) {
  51  		removeObjVar(speaker, "spokeMantra");
  52  	}
  53  	return(0x00);
  54  }
  55  
  56  trigger callback(0x2F) {
  57  	loc destination = getObjVar(this, "dest");
  58  	if (teleport(Q5Z3, destination)) {
  59  		doLocAnimation(getLocation(this), 0x3728, 0x0A, 0x0A, 0x00, 0x00);
  60  		doLocAnimation(destination, 0x3728, 0x0A, 0x0A, 0x00, 0x00);
  61  		sfx(destination, 0x01FE, 0x00);
  62  	} else {
  63  		bark(Q5Z3, "The spirits are not intune to your desires as of yet.");
  64  	}
  65  	return(0x00);
  66  }
  67
#92 tailor.m 7 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q62D obj → crafter
Q5UC obj → material_obj
Q5C5 int → garment_type
Q55M int → material_amount
Q55S int → material_cost
Q55N int → is_cloth_bolt
Q5UA int → material_hue
Source — tailor.m 
   1  inherits itemmanip;
   2  
   3  forward void attempt_tailoring();
   4  
   5  forward void create_garment();
   6  
   7  forward void handle_tailoring_failure();
   8  
   9  member obj Q62D;
  10  
  11  member obj Q5UC;
  12  
  13  member int Q5C5;
  14  
  15  member int Q55M;
  16  
  17  member int Q55S;
  18  
  19  member int Q55N;
  20  
  21  member int Q5UA;
  22  
  23  trigger use {
  24  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
  25  		systemMessage(user, "Someone else is using that.");
  26  		return(0x00);
  27  	} else {
  28  		setObjVar(this, "inUse", 0x00);
  29  		callback(this, 0x3C, 0x1B);
  30  	}
  31  	systemMessage(user, "What cloth shall I use this sewing kit on?");
  32  	targetObj(user, this);
  33  	return(0x01);
  34  }
  35  
  36  trigger targetobj {
  37  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
  38  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
  39  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
  40  		}
  41  		return(0x00);
  42  	}
  43  	Q62D = user;
  44  	Q5UC = usedon;
  45  	int Q4Q1;
  46  	int Q66S = getObjType(usedon);
  47  	switch(Q66S) {
  48  	case 0x0F95
  49  	case 0x0F96
  50  	case 0x0F97
  51  	case 0x0F98
  52  	case 0x0F99
  53  	case 0x0F9A
  54  	case 0x0F9B
  55  	case 0x0F9C
  56  		if (isAtHome(usedon)) {
  57  			systemMessage(user, "That cloth belongs to someone else.");
  58  			if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
  59  				removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
  60  			}
  61  			return(0x00);
  62  		}
  63  		if (hasObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse")) {
  64  			systemMessage(user, "Someone else is using that cloth.");
  65  			if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
  66  				removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
  67  			}
  68  			return(0x00);
  69  		} else {
  70  			setObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse", 0x01);
  71  			attachscript(Q5UC, "removeinuse");
  72  			callback(Q5UC, 0x3C, 0x1B);
  73  		}
  74  		Q4Q1 = getResource(Q55M, Q5UC, "cloth", 0x03, 0x02);
  75  		if (Q55M > 0x00) {
  76  			Q55N = 0x01;
  77  			Q5UA = getHue(Q5UC);
  78  			list Q4DM = 0x1517, "shirts", 0x1539, "pants", 0x153D, "misc";
  79  			selectType(Q62D, this, 0x11, "Choose a category.", Q4DM);
  80  		} else {
  81  			bark(user, "There's no cloth on that");
  82  			if (hasObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse")) {
  83  				removeObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse");
  84  			}
  85  			if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
  86  				removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
  87  			}
  88  			return(0x00);
  89  		}
  90  		break;
  91  	case 0x175D
  92  	case 0x175E
  93  	case 0x175F
  94  	case 0x1760
  95  	case 0x1761
  96  	case 0x1762
  97  	case 0x1763
  98  	case 0x1764
  99  	case 0x1765
 100  	case 0x1766
 101  	case 0x1767
 102  	case 0x1768
 103  		if (isAtHome(usedon)) {
 104  			systemMessage(user, "That cloth belongs to someone else.");
 105  			if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 106  				removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 107  			}
 108  			return(0x00);
 109  		}
 110  		if (hasObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse")) {
 111  			systemMessage(user, "Someone else is using that cloth.");
 112  			if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 113  				removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 114  			}
 115  			return(0x00);
 116  		} else {
 117  			setObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse", 0x01);
 118  			attachscript(Q5UC, "removeinuse");
 119  			callback(Q5UC, 0x3C, 0x1B);
 120  		}
 121  		Q4Q1 = getResource(Q55M, Q5UC, "cloth", 0x03, 0x02);
 122  		if (Q55M > 0x00) {
 123  			Q55N = 0x01;
 124  			Q5UA = getHue(Q5UC);
 125  			list cloth = 0x1517, "shirts", 0x1539, "pants", 0x153D, "misc", 0x0F95, "bolt of cloth";
 126  			selectType(Q62D, this, 0x11, "Choose a category.", cloth);
 127  		} else {
 128  			bark(user, "There's no cloth on that");
 129  			if (hasObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse")) {
 130  				removeObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse");
 131  			}
 132  			if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 133  				removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 134  			}
 135  			return(0x00);
 136  		}
 137  		break;
 138  	case 0x1067
 139  	case 0x1068
 140  	case 0x1081
 141  	case 0x1082
 142  	case 0x1078
 143  	case 0x1079
 144  		if (isAtHome(usedon)) {
 145  			systemMessage(user, "That leather belongs to someone else.");
 146  			if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 147  				removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 148  			}
 149  			return(0x00);
 150  		}
 151  		if (hasObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse")) {
 152  			systemMessage(user, "Someone else is using that leather.");
 153  			if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 154  				removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 155  			}
 156  			return(0x00);
 157  		} else {
 158  			setObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse", 0x01);
 159  			attachscript(Q5UC, "removeinuse");
 160  			callback(Q5UC, 0x3C, 0x1B);
 161  		}
 162  		Q4Q1 = getResource(Q55M, Q5UC, "leather", 0x03, 0x02);
 163  		if (Q55M > 0x00) {
 164  			Q55N = 0x00;
 165  			list leather = 0x1710, "footwear", 0x13CC, "leather armor", 0x13DB, "studded armor", 0x1C02, "female armor";
 166  			selectType(Q62D, this, 0x12, "Choose a category.", leather);
 167  		} else {
 168  			bark(user, "There's no leather on that");
 169  			if (hasObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse")) {
 170  				removeObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse");
 171  			}
 172  			if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 173  				removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 174  			}
 175  			return(0x00);
 176  		}
 177  		break;
 178  	default
 179  		systemMessage(user, "Can't use a sewing kit on that.");
 180  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 181  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 182  		}
 183  		break;
 184  	}
 185  	return(0x00);
 186  }

 219  trigger typeselected(0x13) {
 220  	Q5C5 = objtype;
 221  	switch(objtype) {
 222  	case 0x1517
 223  	case 0x1EFD
 224  		Q55S = 0x08;
 225  		break;
 226  	case 0x1F01
 227  		Q55S = 0x0A;
 228  		break;
 229  	case 0x1EFF
 230  		Q55S = 0x0C;
 231  		break;
 232  	case 0x1515
 233  		Q55S = 0x0E;
 234  		break;
 235  	case 0x1F03
 236  		Q55S = 0x10;
 237  		break;
 238  	default
 239  		if (hasObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse")) {
 240  			removeObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse");
 241  		}
 242  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 243  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 244  		}
 245  		return(0x00);
 246  		break;
 247  	}
 248  	int Q4Q1 = getResource(Q55M, Q5UC, "cloth", 0x03, 0x02);
 249  	if (Q55S > Q55M) {
 250  		barkTo(Q5UC, Q62D, "There's not enough material to make this.");
 251  		if (hasObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse")) {
 252  			removeObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse");
 253  		}
 254  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 255  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 256  		}
 257  		return(0x00);
 258  	}
 259  	attempt_tailoring();
 260  	if (hasObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse")) {
 261  		removeObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse");
 262  	}
 263  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 264  		removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 265  	}
 266  	return(0x00);
 267  }

 484  		break;

 486  		Q55S = 0x0A;
 487  		break;
 488  	case 0x13CC
 489  		Q55S = 0x0C;
 490  		break;
 491  	default
 492  		if (hasObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse")) {
 493  			removeObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse");
 494  		}
 495  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 496  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 497  		}
 498  		return(0x00);
 499  		break;
 500  	}
 501  	int Q4Q1 = getResource(Q55M, Q5UC, "leather", 0x03, 0x02);
 502  	if (Q55S > Q55M) {
 503  		barkTo(Q5UC, Q62D, "There's not enough material to make this.");
 504  		if (hasObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse")) {
 505  			removeObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse");
 506  		}
 507  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 508  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 509  		}
 510  		return(0x00);
 511  	}
 512  	attempt_tailoring();
 513  	if (hasObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse")) {
 514  		removeObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse");
 515  	}
 516  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 517  		removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 518  	}
 519  	return(0x00);
 520  }

 618  
 619  function void create_garment() {
 620  	obj garment;
 621  	int cloth_remainder = 0x32 - Q55S;
 622  	obj leftover_cloth;
 623  	list temp_list;
 624  	int material_remaining = Q55M - Q55S;
 625  	int result;
 626  	obj backpack = getBackpack(Q62D);
 627  	loc location = getLocation(Q62D);
 628  	string name = getNameByType(Q5C5);
 629  	if (Q55N) {
 630  		Q55N = 0x00;
 631  		switch(getObjType(Q5UC)) {
 632  		case 0x0F95
 633  		case 0x0F96
 634  		case 0x0F97
 635  		case 0x0F98
 636  		case 0x0F99
 637  		case 0x0F9A
 638  		case 0x0F9B
 639  		case 0x0F9C
 640  			leftover_cloth = createNoResObjectAt(0x1766, getLocation(Q62D));
 641  			garment = createNoResObjectAt(Q5C5, getLocation(Q62D));
 642  			sfx(location, 0x0248, 0x00);
 643  			transferResources(leftover_cloth, Q5UC, 0x32, "cloth");
 644  			transferResources(garment, leftover_cloth, Q55S, "cloth");
 645  			setHue(leftover_cloth, Q5UA);
 646  			setHue(garment, Q5UA);
 647  			if (canHold(backpack, leftover_cloth)) {
 648  				int put_result = putObjContainer(leftover_cloth, backpack);
 649  				systemMessage(Q62D, "You place the left-over cloth pieces into your backpack");
 650  			} else {
 651  				systemMessage(Q62D, "You place the left over cloth pieces at your feet.");
 652  			}
 653  			int src_cloth_amt;
 654  			int leftover_cloth_amt;
 655  			result = getResource(leftover_cloth_amt, leftover_cloth, "cloth", 0x03, 0x02);
 656  			result = getResource(src_cloth_amt, Q5UC, "cloth", 0x03, 0x02);
 657  			if ((getQuantity(Q5UC) == 0x01) && (src_cloth_amt < 0x32)) {
 658  				deleteObject(Q5UC);
 659  			}
 660  			if ((getQuantity(leftover_cloth) == 0x01) && (leftover_cloth_amt < 0x01)) {
 661  				deleteObject(leftover_cloth);
 662  			}
 663  			break;
 664  		default
 665  			garment = createNoResObjectAt(Q5C5, getLocation(Q62D));
 666  			sfx(location, 0x0248, 0x00);
 667  			transferResources(garment, Q5UC, Q55S, "cloth");
 668  			setHue(garment, Q5UA);
 669  			if ((getQuantity(Q5UC) == 0x01) && (material_remaining < 0x01)) {
 670  				deleteObject(Q5UC);
 671  			}
 672  			break;
 673  		}
 674  	} else {
 675  		garment = createNoResObjectAt(Q5C5, getLocation(Q62D));
 676  		sfx(location, 0x0248, 0x00);
 677  		transferResources(garment, Q5UC, Q55S, "leather");
 678  		if ((getQuantity(Q5UC) == 0x01) && (material_remaining < 0x01)) {
 679  			deleteObject(Q5UC);
 680  		}
 681  	}
 682  	if (canHold(backpack, garment)) {
 683  		put_result = putObjContainer(garment, backpack);
 684  		systemMessage(Q62D, "You create the " + name + " and put it in your backpack.");
 685  	} else {
 686  		systemMessage(Q62D, "You create the " + name + " and put it at your feet.");
 687  	}
 688  	if (hasObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse")) {
 689  		removeObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse");
 690  	}
 691  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 692  		removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 693  	}
 694  	if (consume_item_durability(Q62D, this)) {
 695  		deleteObject(this);
 696  	}
 697  	return();
 698  }
 699  
 700  function void handle_tailoring_failure() {
 701  	obj created_cloth_item;
 702  	int skill_tier_level;
 703  	int damage_multiplier;
 704  	int material_loss_amount;
 705  	int transfer_amount;
 706  	list unused_resource_list;
 707  	int Q55R = Q55M - Q55S;
 708  	int Q4Q1;
 709  	obj user_backpack = getBackpack(Q62D);
 710  	loc location = getLocation(Q62D);
 711  	string resource_type;
 712  	resource_type = "cloth";
 713  	skill_tier_level = (getSkillLevelReal(Q62D, 0x22) / 0x64);
 714  	switch(skill_tier_level) {
 715  	case 0x0A
 716  	case 0x09
 717  	case 0x08
 718  		damage_multiplier = 0x04;
 719  		break;
 720  	case 0x07
 721  	case 0x06
 722  	case 0x05
 723  	case 0x04
 724  		damage_multiplier = 0x02;
 725  		break;
 726  	default
 727  		damage_multiplier = 0x01;
 728  		break;
 729  	}
 730  	material_loss_amount = (Q55S / damage_multiplier) - (random(0x00, (Q55S / damage_multiplier)));
 731  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 732  		removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 733  	}
 734  	switch(getObjType(Q5UC)) {
 735  	case 0x0F95
 736  	case 0x0F96
 737  	case 0x0F97
 738  	case 0x0F98
 739  	case 0x0F99
 740  	case 0x0F9A
 741  	case 0x0F9B
 742  	case 0x0F9C
 743  		transfer_amount = 0x32 - material_loss_amount;
 744  		created_cloth_item = createNoResObjectAt(0x1766, getLocation(Q62D));
 745  		transferResources(created_cloth_item, Q5UC, transfer_amount, "cloth");
 746  		setHue(created_cloth_item, Q5UA);
 747  		if (canHold(user_backpack, created_cloth_item)) {
 748  			int container_insert_result = putObjContainer(created_cloth_item, user_backpack);
 749  			systemMessage(Q62D, "You place the left-over cloth pieces into your backpack");
 750  		} else {
 751  			systemMessage(Q62D, "You place the left over cloth pieces at your feet.");
 752  		}
 753  		systemMessage(Q62D, "Tailoring failed. Some of the cloth is ruined.");
 754  		int extracted_resource_amount;
 755  		Q4Q1 = getResource(extracted_resource_amount, Q5UC, "cloth", 0x03, 0x02);
 756  		if ((getQuantity(Q5UC) == 0x01) && (extracted_resource_amount < 0x32)) {
 757  			deleteObject(Q5UC);
 758  		}
 759  		break;
 760  	case 0x175D
 761  	case 0x175E
 762  	case 0x175F
 763  	case 0x1760
 764  	case 0x1761
 765  	case 0x1762
 766  	case 0x1763
 767  	case 0x1764
 768  	case 0x1765
 769  	case 0x1766
 770  	case 0x1767
 771  	case 0x1768
 772  		systemMessage(Q62D, "Tailoring failed. Some of the cloth is ruined.");
 773  		returnResourcesToBank(Q5UC, material_loss_amount, "cloth");
 774  		break;
 775  	case 0x1067
 776  	case 0x1068
 777  	case 0x1081
 778  	case 0x1082
 779  	case 0x1078
 780  	case 0x1079
 781  		systemMessage(Q62D, "Tailoring failed. Some of the leather is ruined.");
 782  		returnResourcesToBank(Q5UC, material_loss_amount, "leather");
 783  		break;
 784  	}
 785  	Q4Q1 = getResource(extracted_resource_amount, Q5UC, resource_type, 0x03, 0x02);
 786  	if ((getQuantity(Q5UC) == 0x01) && (extracted_resource_amount < 0x01)) {
 787  		deleteObject(Q5UC);
 788  	}
 789  	return();
 790  }
 791  
 792  function void attempt_tailoring() {
 793  	int skill_check = testSkillReal(Q62D, 0x22);
 794  	if (skill_check < 0x01) {
 795  		handle_tailoring_failure();
 796  	} else {
 797  		create_garment();
 798  	}
 799  	return();
 800  }
 801  
 802  trigger callback(0x1B) {
 803  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 804  		removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 805  	}
 806  	return(0x00);
 807  }
