#93 tailorbase.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4H8 int → is_useless
Source — tailorbase.m 
   1  inherits itemmanip;
   2  
   3  member int Q4H8;
   4  
   5  function string get_container_resource_string(obj item) {
   6  	int Q4Q1;
   7  	int bar;
   8  	string resource_count_string;
   9  	int cloth_amount;
  10  	int leather_amount;
  11  	string resource_description;
  12  	Q4Q1 = getResource(cloth_amount, item, "cloth", 0x03, 0x02);
  13  	bar = getResource(leather_amount, item, "leather", 0x03, 0x02);
  14  	if (cloth_amount > 0x00) {
  15  		resource_count_string = cloth_amount;
  16  		if (cloth_amount > 0x01) {
  17  			resource_description = resource_count_string + " yards of cloth";
  18  		} else {
  19  			resource_description = resource_count_string + " yard of cloth";
  20  		}
  21  		return(resource_description);
  22  	}
  23  	if (leather_amount > 0x00) {
  24  		resource_count_string = leather_amount;
  25  		if (leather_amount > 0x01) {
  26  			resource_description = resource_count_string + " yards of leather";
  27  		} else {
  28  			resource_description = resource_count_string + " yard of leather";
  29  		}
  30  		return(resource_description);
  31  	}
  32  	resource_description = "useless scraps";
  33  	Q4H8 = 0x01;
  34  	return(resource_description);
  35  }
  36  
  37  function string get_resource_description(obj item, int Q5KY) {
  38  	string item_description;
  39  	int object_type_id = getObjType(item);
  40  	switch(object_type_id) {
  41  	case 0x0F95
  42  	case 0x0F96
  43  	case 0x0F97
  44  	case 0x0F98
  45  	case 0x0F99
  46  	case 0x0F9A
  47  	case 0x0F9B
  48  	case 0x0F9C
  49  		if (use_plural == 0x01) {
  50  			item_description = "bolts of cloth";
  51  		} else {
  52  			item_description = "a bolt of cloth";
  53  		}
  54  		break;
  55  	case 0x175D
  56  	case 0x175E
  57  	case 0x175F
  58  	case 0x1760
  59  	case 0x1761
  60  	case 0x1762
  61  	case 0x1763
  62  	case 0x1764
  63  		if (use_plural == 0x01) {
  64  			item_description = "piles of folded cloth";
  65  		} else {
  66  			item_description = "a pile of folded cloth";
  67  		}
  68  		break;
  69  	case 0x1765
  70  	case 0x1766
  71  	case 0x1767
  72  	case 0x1768
  73  		if (use_plural == 0x01) {
  74  			item_description = "pieces of cloth";
  75  		} else {
  76  			item_description = "a piece of cloth";
  77  		}
  78  		break;
  79  	case 0x1067
  80  	case 0x1068
  81  	case 0x1081
  82  	case 0x1082
  83  		if (use_plural == 0x01) {
  84  			item_description = "pieces of leather";
  85  		} else {
  86  			item_description = "a piece of leather";
  87  		}
  88  		break;
  89  	case 0x1078
  90  	case 0x1079
  91  		if (use_plural == 0x01) {
  92  			item_description = "piles of hides";
  93  		} else {
  94  			item_description = "a pile of hides";
  95  		}
  96  		break;
  97  	}
  98  	return(item_description);
  99  }
 100  
 101  trigger lookedat {
 102  	string Q53V;
 103  	string Q45Z;
 104  	string Q55J;
 105  	Q4H8 = 0x00;
 106  	int Q460 = getQuantity(this);
 107  	string Q461 = Q460;
 108  	Q45Z = get_container_resource_string(this);
 109  	if (Q460 > 0x01) {
 110  		Q55J = get_resource_description(this, 0x01);
 111  		Q53V = Q461 + " " + Q55J + " (" + Q45Z + ") ";
 112  	} else {
 113  		Q55J = get_resource_description(this, 0x00);
 114  		Q53V = Q55J + " (" + Q45Z + ") ";
 115  	}
 116  	barkTo(this, looker, Q53V);
 117  	if (Q4H8 == 0x01) {
 118  		systemMessage(looker, "You throw the useless pieces away.");
 119  		Q4H8 = 0x00;
 120  		deleteObject(this);
 121  	}
 122  	return(0x00);
 123  }
 124
#94 tame.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q487 obj → tame_target
Q5YI int → tame_attempt_count
Source — tame.m 
   1  inherits sk_table;
   2  
   3  member obj Q487;
   4  
   5  member int Q5YI;
   6  
   7  trigger message("canUseSkill") {
   8  	return(0x00);
   9  }
  10  
  11  trigger message("useSkill") {
  12  	callback(this, 0x0A, 0x5C);
  13  	systemMessage(this, "Tame which animal?");
  14  	targetObj(this, this);
  15  	return(0x00);
  16  }
  17  
  18  trigger callback(0x5C) {
  19  	if (Q5YI == 0x00) {
  20  		detachScript(this, "tame");
  21  	}
  22  	return(0x00);
  23  }
  24  
  25  function void bark_encouragement_to_animal(obj animal) {
  26  	string name = getName(animal);
  27  	removePrefix(name, "a ");
  28  	removePrefix(name, "an ");
  29  	switch(random(0x00, 0x09)) {
  30  	case 0x00
  31  	case 0x01
  32  		bark(this, "Here " + name + ".");
  33  		break;
  34  	case 0x02
  35  	case 0x03
  36  		bark(this, "Nice " + name + ".");
  37  		break;
  38  	case 0x04
  39  	case 0x05
  40  		bark(this, "Good " + name + ".");
  41  		break;
  42  	case 0x06
  43  		bark(this, "Will you be my friend?");
  44  		break;
  45  	case 0x07
  46  		bark(this, "I've always wanted a pet like you.");
  47  		break;
  48  	case 0x08
  49  		bark(this, "Don't be afraid.");
  50  		break;
  51  	case 0x09
  52  		bark(this, "I won't hurt you.");
  53  		break;
  54  	}
  55  	return();
  56  }
  57  
  58  trigger callback(0x5D) {
  59  	if (!hasScript(Q487, "beingtamed")) {
  60  		ebarkTo(Q487, this, "The animal is too angry to continue taming.");
  61  		detachScript(this, "tame");
  62  		return(0x00);
  63  	}
  64  	if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(this), getLocation(Q487)) > 0x07) {
  65  		ebarkTo(Q487, this, "You are too far away to continue taming.");
  66  		callback(Q487, 0x00, 0x5C);
  67  		detachScript(this, "tame");
  68  		return(0x00);
  69  	}
  70  	Q5YI++;
  71  	if (Q5YI < 0x05) {
  72  		if (random(0x00, 0x01) == 0x00) {
  73  			bark_encouragement_to_animal(Q487);
  74  		}
  75  		shortCallback(this, 0x08, 0x5D);
  76  		return(0x00);
  77  	}
  78  	callback(Q487, 0x00, 0x5C);
  79  	int success = testAndLearnSkill(this, 0x23, 0x0C * getObjVar(Q487, "petCanTame"), 0x32);
  80  	if (success >= 0x03E8) {
  81  		ebarkTo(Q487, this, "That wasn't even challenging.");
  82  	}
  83  	if (success < 0x00) {
  84  		ebarkTo(Q487, this, "You fail to tame the creature.");
  85  		detachScript(this, "tame");
  86  		return(0x00);
  87  	}
  88  	if (success > 0x0384) {
  89  		success = 0x0384;
  90  	}
  91  	list myBoss = this;
  92  	setObjVar(Q487, "myBoss", myBoss);
  93  	setObjVar(Q487, "myLoyalty", success / 0x0A + 0x0A);
  94  	setObjVar(Q487, "isPet", 0x01);
  95  	makeBeelineFailPathfind(Q487, 0x01);
  96  	disableBehaviors(Q487);
  97  	attachScript(Q487, "pet");
  98  	ebarkTo(Q487, this, "It seems to accept you as master.");
  99  	detachScript(this, "tame");
 100  	return(0x00);
 101  }
 102  
 103  trigger targetobj {
 104  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
 105  		detachScript(this, "tame");
 106  		return(0x00);
 107  	}
 108  	if (!canSeeObj(this, usedon)) {
 109  		ebarkTo(usedon, this, "You can't see that.");
 110  		detachScript(this, "tame");
 111  		return(0x00);
 112  	}
 113  	if ((!isMobile(usedon)) || (!hasObjVar(usedon, "petCanTame"))) {
 114  		ebarkTo(usedon, this, "You can't tame that!");
 115  		detachScript(this, "tame");
 116  		return(0x00);
 117  	}
 118  	if (hasScript(usedon, "beingtamed")) {
 119  		ebarkTo(usedon, this, "Someone else is already taming this.");
 120  		detachScript(this, "tame");
 121  		return(0x00);
 122  	}
 123  	if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(this), getLocation(usedon)) > 0x03) {
 124  		ebarkTo(usedon, this, "It's too far away.");
 125  		detachScript(this, "tame");
 126  		return(0x00);
 127  	}
 128  	if (hasObjListVar(usedon, "myBoss")) {
 129  		ebarkTo(usedon, this, "That animal looks tame already.");
 130  		detachScript(this, "tame");
 131  		return(0x00);
 132  	}
 133  	int Q46B = getObjType(usedon);
 134  	if ((Q46B == 0x0C) || (Q46B == 0x3B) || (Q46B == 0x3C) || (Q46B == 0x3D)) {
 135  		int Q4AY = random(0x01, 0x0A);
 136  		if (Q4AY != 0x01) {
 137  			ebarkTo(usedon, this, "You seem to anger the beast!");
 138  			attack(usedon, this);
 139  			detachScript(this, "tame");
 140  			return(0x00);
 141  		}
 142  	}
 143  	int success = getSkillSuccessChance(this, 0x23, 0x0C * getObjVar(usedon, "petCanTame"), 0x32);
 144  	if (success <= 0x00) {
 145  		ebarkTo(usedon, this, "You have no chance of taming this creature.");
 146  		detachScript(this, "tame");
 147  		return(0x00);
 148  	}
 149  	Q487 = usedon;
 150  	actionBark(this, 0x59, "*You start to tame " + getName(Q487) + ".*", "*" + getName(this) + " starts to tame " + getName(Q487) + ".*");
 151  	attachScript(Q487, "beingtamed");
 152  	Q5YI = 0x00;
 153  	shortCallback(this, 0x08, 0x5D);
 154  	return(0x00);
 155  }
 156
#95 telecheck.m 3 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q68D obj → requester
Q4VQ int → check_width
Q58C int → check_height
Source — telecheck.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member obj Q68D;
   4  
   5  member loc where;
   6  
   7  member int Q4VQ;
   8  
   9  member int Q58C;
  10  
  11  trigger message("telecheck") {
  12  	Q68D = args[0x00];
  13  	where = args[0x01];
  14  	Q4VQ = args[0x02];
  15  	Q58C = args[0x03];
  16  	callback(this, 0x00, 0x86);
  17  	int Q527 = teleport(this, where);
  18  	return(0x01);
  19  }
  20  
  21  trigger callback(0x86) {
  22  	int success = 0x00;
  23  	if (getLocation(this) == where) {
  24  		if (canExistAt(where, Q4VQ, Q58C) == 0x07) {
  25  			success = 0x01;
  26  		}
  27  	}
  28  	list Q5MM;
  29  	if (success) {
  30  		appendToList(Q5MM, 0x01);
  31  	} else {
  32  		appendToList(Q5MM, 0x00);
  33  	}
  34  	appendToList(Q5MM, where);
  35  	multimessage(Q68D, "telereply", Q5MM);
  36  	deleteObject(this);
  37  	return(0x01);
  38  }
  39
#96 tinker.m 10 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q62D obj → crafter
Q5UC obj → material_obj
Q65Q int → material_type
Q5C5 int → item_type
Q55M int → material_amount
Q55S int → material_cost
Q55O int → is_metal
Q512 int → craft_ready
Q4YZ int → trap_mode
Q68R int → trap_type
Source — tinker.m 
   1  inherits housestuff;
   2  
   3  member obj Q62D;
   4  
   5  member obj Q5UC;
   6  
   7  member int Q65Q;
   8  
   9  member int Q5C5;
  10  
  11  member int Q55M;
  12  
  13  member int Q55S;
  14  
  15  member int Q55O;
  16  
  17  member int Q512;
  18  
  19  member int Q4YZ;
  20  
  21  member int Q68R;
  22  
  23  forward void craft_item();
  24  
  25  function int decrement_item_durability(obj user, obj Q66L) {
  26  	if (hasObjVar(target_item, "lifeRemaining")) {
  27  		int lifeRemaining = getObjVar(target_item, "lifeRemaining");
  28  		if (lifeRemaining > 0x01) {
  29  			setObjVar(target_item, "lifeRemaining", (lifeRemaining - 0x01));
  30  		} else {
  31  			string name = getNameByType(getObjType(this));
  32  			systemMessage(user, "You destroyed the " + name + ".");
  33  			return(0x01);
  34  		}
  35  	} else {
  36  		setObjVar(target_item, "lifeRemaining", 0x32);
  37  	}
  38  	return(0x00);
  39  }
  40  
  41  function void place_item_with_message(obj Q68S, obj item, string Q56O) {
  42  	obj player_backpack = getBackpack(target_player);
  43  	string delivery_message = item_message_text;
  44  	if (isValid(player_backpack) && canHold(player_backpack, item)) {
  45  		concat(delivery_message, " in your backpack.");
  46  		int put_result = putObjContainer(item, player_backpack);
  47  	} else {
  48  		concat(delivery_message, " at your feet.");
  49  	}
  50  	systemMessage(target_player, delivery_message);
  51  	return();
  52  }
  53  
  54  trigger creation {
  55  	Q4YZ = 0x00;
  56  	Q68R = 0x00;
  57  	return(0x00);
  58  }
  59  
  60  trigger use {
  61  	int Q62A = getObjType(this);
  62  	if (Q62A != 0x1EBC) {
  63  		if (isAtHome(this)) {
  64  			systemMessage(user, "You can't use that, it belongs to someone else.");
  65  			return(0x00);
  66  		}
  67  	}
  68  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
  69  		systemMessage(user, "Someone else is using that");
  70  		return(0x00);
  71  	} else {
  72  		setObjVar(this, "inUse", 0x00);
  73  		callback(this, 0x1E, 0x1B);
  74  	}
  75  	loc Q61U = getLocation(this);
  76  	obj Q5NB;
  77  	int Q5L6;
  78  	switch(Q62A) {
  79  	case 0x1059
  80  	case 0x105A
  81  		Q5L6 = random(0x00, 0x01) + 0x1057;
  82  		Q5NB = createNoResObjectAt(Q5L6, getLocation(user));
  83  		place_item_with_message(user, Q5NB, "You assemble the parts, and put the sextant");
  84  		destroyOne(this);
  85  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
  86  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
  87  		}
  88  		return(0x00);
  89  		break;
  90  	case 0x1053
  91  	case 0x1054
  92  		systemMessage(user, "Use that on an axle to make an axle with gears.");
  93  		break;
  94  	case 0x105D
  95  	case 0x105E
  96  		systemMessage(user, "Use that on an axle with gears to make clock parts.");
  97  		break;
  98  	case 0x1055
  99  	case 0x1056
 100  		systemMessage(user, "Use that on an axle with gears to make sextant parts.");
 101  		break;
 102  	case 0x105B
 103  	case 0x105C
 104  		systemMessage(user, "Use that on gears to make an axle with gears.");
 105  		break;
 106  	case 0x104D
 107  	case 0x104E
 108  		systemMessage(user, "Use that on clock parts to make a clock.");
 109  		break;
 110  	case 0x1051
 111  	case 0x1052
 112  		systemMessage(user, "Use that on springs to make clock parts, or a hinge to make sextant parts.");
 113  		break;
 114  	case 0x104F
 115  	case 0x1050
 116  		systemMessage(user, "Use that on a clock frame to make a clock.");
 117  		break;
 118  	}
 119  	targetObj(user, this);
 120  	return(0x01);
 121  }
 122  
 123  trigger targetobj {
 124  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
 125  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 126  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 127  		}
 128  		return(0x00);
 129  	}
 130  	if (!isFreelyUsable(usedon, user)) {
 131  		systemMessage(user, "That is inacessable.");
 132  		return(0x00);
 133  	}
 134  	if (Q4YZ) {
 135  		Q4YZ = 0x00;
 136  		if (Q68R == 0x00) {
 137  			systemMessage(user, "BUG!");
 138  			return(0x00);
 139  		}
 140  		if (hasObjVar(usedon, "isLocked")) {
 141  			int lock = getObjVar(usedon, "isLocked");
 142  			if (lock) {
 143  				systemMessage(user, "You can only trap an unlocked object.");
 144  				return(0x00);
 145  			}
 146  		}
 147  		if (hasObjVar(usedon, "trapLevel")) {
 148  			systemMessage(user, "You can only place one trap on an object at a time.");
 149  			return(0x00);
 150  		}
 151  		int targetType = getObjType(usedon);
 152  		if (isAtHome(usedon)) {
 153  			systemMessage(user, "That belongs to someone else.");
 154  			return(0x00);
 155  		}
 156  		switch(targetType) {
 157  		case 0x0E7C
 158  		case 0x09AB
 159  		case 0x0E40
 160  		case 0x0E41
 161  		case 0x0E42
 162  		case 0x0E43
 163  		case 0x09AA
 164  		case 0x0E7D
 165  		case 0x0E80
 166  		case 0x09A8
 167  			int Q52T = getSkillLevelRealStat(user, 0x25);
 168  			Q52T = Q52T / 0x64;
 169  			int Q5E3 = getGeneric(user, 0x1BF2);
 170  			if (Q5E3 < 0x01) {
 171  				systemMessage(user, "You need an ingot to make a trap.");
 172  				break;
 173  			}
 174  			switch(Q68R) {
 175  			case 0x01
 176  				int Q5DY = getGeneric(user, 0x1BFB);
 177  				if (Q5DY < 0x01) {
 178  					systemMessage(user, "You need a crossbow bolt to make that trap!");
 179  					break;
 180  				}
 181  				destroyGeneric(user, 0x1BFB, 0x01);
 182  				destroyGeneric(user, 0x1BF2, 0x01);
 183  				attachScript(usedon, "trap_dart");
 184  				systemMessage(user, "You carefully place a dart trap on " + getName(usedon) + ".");
 185  				break;
 186  			case 0x02
 187  				obj Q5KW = mobileContainsObjType(user, 0x0F0D);
 188  				if (Q5KW == NULL()) {
 189  					systemMessage(user, "You need a purple potion to make that trap!");
 190  					break;
 191  				}
 192  				deleteObject(Q5KW);
 193  				destroyGeneric(user, 0x1BF2, 0x01);
 194  				attachScript(usedon, "trap_explosion");
 195  				systemMessage(user, "You carefully place an explosion trap on " + getName(usedon) + ".");
 196  				break;
 197  			case 0x03
 198  				obj Q4UC = mobileContainsObjType(user, 0x0F0A);
 199  				if (Q4UC == NULL()) {
 200  					systemMessage(user, "You need a green potion to make that trap!");
 201  					break;
 202  				}
 203  				deleteObject(Q4UC);
 204  				destroyGeneric(user, 0x1BF2, 0x01);
 205  				attachScript(usedon, "trap_poison");
 206  				systemMessage(user, "You carefully place a poison trap on " + getName(usedon) + ".");
 207  				break;
 208  			}
 209  			setObjVar(usedon, "trapLevel", Q52T);
 210  			obj Q58H = isAnyMultiBelow(getLocation(usedon));
 211  			int Q5H5 = 0x00;
 212  			if (Q58H != NULL()) {
 213  				if (check_mobile_has_house_key(Q58H, user)) {
 214  					Q5H5 = 0x01;
 215  				}
 216  			}
 217  			if (!Q5H5) {
 218  				copyControllerInfo(usedon, user);
 219  			}
 220  			break;
 221  		default
 222  			systemMessage(user, "You cannot place a trap on that.");
 223  		}
 224  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 225  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 226  		}
 227  		return(0x00);
 228  	}
 229  	Q512 = 0x00;
 230  	Q62D = user;
 231  	Q5UC = usedon;
 232  	Q65Q = getObjType(usedon);
 233  	int Q62A = getObjType(this);
 234  	int Q4Q1;
 235  	int Q5L6 = 0x00;
 236  	loc Q66N = getLocation(usedon);
 237  	obj Q5NB;
 238  	string description;
 239  	switch(Q62A) {
 240  	case 0x1053
 241  	case 0x1054
 242  		switch(Q65Q) {
 243  		case 0x105B
 244  		case 0x105C
 245  			Q5L6 = 0x1051;
 246  			description = "an axle with gears and put it";
 247  		}
 248  		break;
 249  	case 0x105D
 250  	case 0x105E
 251  		switch(Q65Q) {
 252  		case 0x1051
 253  		case 0x1052
 254  			Q5L6 = 0x104F;
 255  			description = "some clock parts and put them";
 256  		}
 257  		break;
 258  	case 0x1055
 259  	case 0x1056
 260  		switch(Q65Q) {
 261  		case 0x1051
 262  		case 0x1052
 263  			Q5L6 = 0x1059;
 264  			description = "some sextant parts and put them";
 265  		}
 266  		break;
 267  	case 0x105B
 268  	case 0x105C
 269  		switch(Q65Q) {
 270  		case 0x1053
 271  		case 0x1054
 272  			Q5L6 = 0x1051;
 273  			description = "an axle with gears and put it";
 274  		}
 275  		break;
 276  	case 0x104D
 277  	case 0x104E
 278  		switch(Q65Q) {
 279  		case 0x104F
 280  		case 0x1050
 281  			Q5L6 = random(0x00, 0x01) + 0x104B;
 282  			description = "a clock and put it";
 283  		}
 284  		break;
 285  	case 0x1051
 286  	case 0x1052
 287  		switch(Q65Q) {
 288  		case 0x1055
 289  		case 0x1056
 290  			Q5L6 = 0x1059;
 291  			description = "some sextant parts and put them";
 292  			break;
 293  		case 0x105D
 294  		case 0x105E
 295  			Q5L6 = 0x104F;
 296  			description = "some clock parts and put them";
 297  			break;
 298  		}
 299  		break;
 300  	case 0x104F
 301  	case 0x1050
 302  		switch(Q65Q) {
 303  		case 0x104D
 304  		case 0x104E
 305  			Q5L6 = random(0x00, 0x01) + 0x104B;
 306  			description = "a clock and put it";
 307  		}
 308  		break;
 309  	case 0x1EBC
 310  		switch(Q65Q) {
 311  		case 0x1BEF
 312  		case 0x1BF0
 313  		case 0x1BF1
 314  		case 0x1BF2
 315  		case 0x1BF3
 316  		case 0x1BF4
 317  			if (isAtHome(usedon)) {
 318  				systemMessage(user, "That metal belongs to someone else.");
 319  				if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 320  					removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 321  				}
 322  				return(0x00);
 323  			}
 324  			if (hasObjVar(Q5UC, "inUse")) {
 325  				barkTo(this, user, "Someone is using that metal.");
 326  				return(0x00);
 327  			}
 328  			if (testSkill(user, 0x25)) {
 329  				Q55O = 0x01;
 330  				Q4Q1 = getResource(Q55M, usedon, "metal", 0x03, 0x02);
 331  				list Q574 = 0x112D, "Dart Trap", 0x10F8, "Explosion Trap", 0x1148, "Poison Trap", 0x0F9D, 0x1053, 0x105D, 0x1055, 0x10E4, 0x10E5, 0x10E6, 0x10E7, 0x13F6, 0x0F9E, 0x0FBC, 0x1028, 0x1034, 0x102A, 0x13E4, 0x0FB5, 0x0F3A;
 332  				selectType(Q62D, this, 0x18, "Choose an item.", Q574);
 333  			} else {
 334  				systemMessage(user, "Tinkering failed.");
 335  				if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 336  					removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 337  				}
 338  				return(0x00);
 339  			}
 340  			break;
 341  		case 0x1BD7
 342  		case 0x1BD8
 343  		case 0x1BD9
 344  		case 0x1BDA
 345  		case 0x1BDB
 346  		case 0x1BDC
 347  		case 0x1BDD
 348  		case 0x1BDE
 349  		case 0x1BDF
 350  		case 0x1BE0
 351  		case 0x1BE1
 352  		case 0x1BE2
 353  			if (isAtHome(usedon)) {
 354  				systemMessage(user, "That wood belongs to someone else.");
 355  				if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 356  					removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 357  				}
 358  				return(0x00);
 359  			}
 360  			if (testSkill(user, 0x25)) {
 361  				Q4Q1 = getResource(Q55M, usedon, "wood", 0x03, 0x02);
 362  				list wood = 0x105B, 0x102C, 0x1032, 0x1030, 0x104D;
 363  				selectType(Q62D, this, 0x19, "Choose an item.", wood);
 364  			} else {
 365  				systemMessage(user, "Tinkering failed.");
 366  				if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 367  					removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 368  				}
 369  				return(0x00);
 370  			}
 371  			break;
 372  		default
 373  			systemMessage(user, "Use raw material.");
 374  			if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 375  				removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 376  			}
 377  			break;
 378  		}
 379  	}
 380  	if (Q5L6 != 0x00) {
 381  		destroyOne(usedon);
 382  		if (hasObjVar(usedon, "inUse")) {
 383  			removeObjVar(usedon, "inUse");
 384  		}
 385  		Q5NB = requestCreateObjectAt(Q5L6, getLocation(user));
 386  		place_item_with_message(user, Q5NB, "You create " + description);
 387  		destroyOne(this);
 388  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 389  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 390  		}
 391  		return(0x00);
 392  	}
 393  	return(0x00);
 394  }
 395  
 396  trigger typeselected(0x18) {
 397  	Q5C5 = objtype;
 398  	switch(objtype) {
 399  	case 0x112D
 400  	case 0x10F8
 401  	case 0x1148
 402  		systemMessage(Q62D, "What would you like to set a trap on?");
 403  		Q4YZ = 0x01;
 404  		Q68R = listindex;
 405  		targetObj(Q62D, this);
 406  		return(0x00);
 407  		break;
 408  	case 0x0F9D
 409  	case 0x1053
 410  	case 0x105D
 411  	case 0x1055
 412  	case 0x10E4
 413  	case 0x10E5
 414  	case 0x10E6
 415  	case 0x10E7
 416  	case 0x13F6
 417  		Q55S = 0x02;
 418  		break;
 419  	case 0x0F9E
 420  	case 0x0FBC
 421  	case 0x1028
 422  	case 0x1034
 423  	case 0x102A
 424  	case 0x13E4
 425  	case 0x0FB5
 426  	case 0x0F3A
 427  		Q55S = 0x04;
 428  		break;
 429  	default
 430  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 431  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 432  		}
 433  		return(0x00);
 434  		break;
 435  	}
 436  	if (!isFreelyUsable(Q5UC, Q62D)) {
 437  		barkTo(Q5UC, Q62D, "You can no longer access the metal.");
 438  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 439  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 440  		}
 441  		return(0x00);
 442  	}
 443  	int Q4Q1 = getResource(Q55M, Q5UC, "metal", 0x03, 0x02);
 444  	if (Q55S > Q55M) {
 445  		barkTo(Q5UC, Q62D, "There's not enough metal to make this.");
 446  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 447  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 448  		}
 449  		return(0x00);
 450  	}
 451  	Q512 = 0x01;
 452  	if (objtype != 0x00) {
 453  		craft_item();
 454  	}
 455  	return(0x00);
 456  }
 457  
 458  trigger typeselected(0x19) {
 459  	Q5C5 = objtype;
 460  	switch(objtype) {
 461  	case 0x105B
 462  		Q55S = 0x02;
 463  		break;
 464  	case 0x102C
 465  	case 0x1032
 466  	case 0x1030
 467  		Q55S = 0x04;
 468  		break;
 469  	case 0x104D
 470  		Q55S = 0x06;
 471  		break;
 472  	default
 473  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 474  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 475  		}
 476  		return(0x00);
 477  		break;
 478  	}
 479  	if (!isFreelyUsable(Q5UC, Q62D)) {
 480  		barkTo(Q5UC, Q62D, "You can no longer access the wood.");
 481  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 482  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 483  		}
 484  		return(0x00);
 485  	}
 486  	int Q4Q1 = getResource(Q55M, Q5UC, "wood", 0x03, 0x02);
 487  	if (Q55S > Q55M) {
 488  		barkTo(Q5UC, Q62D, "There's not enough wood to make this.");
 489  		if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 490  			removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 491  		}
 492  		return(0x00);
 493  	}
 494  	Q512 = 0x01;
 495  	if (objtype != 0x00) {
 496  		craft_item();
 497  	}
 498  	return(0x00);
 499  }
 500  
 501  function void craft_item() {
 502  	Q512 = 0x00;
 503  	obj new_item;
 504  	list resource_list;
 505  	int remaining;
 506  	int count;
 507  	int resource_result;
 508  	obj backpack = getBackpack(Q62D);
 509  	string name;
 510  	string item_pronoun = "it";
 511  	if (Q55O) {
 512  		Q55O = 0x00;
 513  		new_item = createNoResObjectAt(Q5C5, getLocation(Q62D));
 514  		transferResources(new_item, Q5UC, Q55S, "metal");
 515  		name = getName(new_item);
 516  		switch(Q5C5) {
 517  		case 0x1053
 518  		case 0x105D
 519  		case 0x0F9E
 520  		case 0x0FBC
 521  			item_pronoun = "them";
 522  			break;
 523  		default
 524  			break;
 525  		}
 526  		place_item_with_message(Q62D, new_item, "You create " + name + " and put " + item_pronoun);
 527  		resource_result = getResource(remaining, Q5UC, "metal", 0x03, 0x02);
 528  	} else {
 529  		new_item = createNoResObjectAt(Q5C5, getLocation(Q62D));
 530  		transferResources(new_item, Q5UC, Q55S, "wood");
 531  		name = getName(new_item);
 532  		place_item_with_message(Q62D, new_item, "You create " + name + " and put it");
 533  		resource_result = getResource(remaining, Q5UC, "wood", 0x03, 0x02);
 534  	}
 535  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 536  		removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 537  	}
 538  	if (remaining < 0x01) {
 539  		deleteObject(Q5UC);
 540  	}
 541  	if (decrement_item_durability(Q62D, this)) {
 542  		deleteObject(this);
 543  	}
 544  	return();
 545  }
 546  
 547  trigger callback(0x1B) {
 548  	if (hasObjVar(this, "inUse")) {
 549  		removeObjVar(this, "inUse");
 550  	}
 551  	return(0x00);
 552  }
 553
#97 towncrier.m 2 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q4F4 obj → crier_obj
Q63X list → message_list
Source — towncrier.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member obj gm;
   4  
   5  member obj Q4F4;
   6  
   7  member list Q63X;
   8  
   9  trigger 0x0190 enterrange(0x05) {
  10  	if (numInList(Q63X) < 0x01) {
  11  		return(0x01);
  12  	}
  13  	string Q65L = Q63X[random(0x00, numInList(Q63X) - 0x01)];
  14  	faceHere(this, getDirectionInternal(getLocation(this), getLocation(target)));
  15  	bark(this, "Hear ye! Hear ye!");
  16  	bark(this, Q65L);
  17  	return(0x01);
  18  }
  19  
  20  trigger speech("news") {
  21  	if (numInList(Q63X) < 0x01) {
  22  		bark(this, "I have no news for thee at this time.");
  23  		return(0x01);
  24  	}
  25  	string Q65L = Q63X[random(0x00, numInList(Q63X) - 0x01)];
  26  	faceHere(this, getDirectionInternal(getLocation(this), getLocation(speaker)));
  27  	bark(this, "Some of the latest news!");
  28  	bark(this, Q65L);
  29  	return(0x01);
  30  }
  31  
  32  function void display_crier_messages() {
  33  	string crier_msg;
  34  	string message_index;
  35  	systemMessage(gm, "TOWN CRIER MESSAGES");
  36  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q63X); i++) {
  37  		message_index = i;
  38  		crier_msg = Q63X[i];
  39  		systemMessage(gm, message_index + ": " + crier_msg);
  40  	}
  41  	return;
  42  }
  43  
  44  trigger textentry(0x26) {
  45  	if (sender != gm) {
  46  		return(0x00);
  47  	}
  48  	if (button == 0x00) {
  49  		systemMessage(gm, "Message entry cancelled.");
  50  		return(0x00);
  51  	}
  52  	string Q58D = "The text '" + text + "' has been added to this town crier.";
  53  	systemMessage(gm, Q58D);
  54  	appendToList(Q63X, text);
  55  	return(0x00);
  56  }
  57  
  58  function loc get_town_center_location() {
  59  	return(getMasterObjLoc(0x02));
  60  }
  61  
  62  trigger textentry(0x25) {
  63  	if (sender != gm) {
  64  		return(0x00);
  65  	}
  66  	if (button == 0x00) {
  67  		systemMessage(gm, "Message entry cancelled.");
  68  		return(0x00);
  69  	}
  70  	string Q58D = "The text '" + text + "' has been added to town criers.";
  71  	systemMessage(gm, Q58D);
  72  	list Q638;
  73  	appendToList(Q638, text);
  74  	multiMessageToLoc(get_town_center_location(), "towncrieraddmessage", Q638);
  75  	return(0x00);
  76  }
  77  
  78  trigger textentry(0x27) {
  79  	if (sender != gm) {
  80  		return(0x00);
  81  	}
  82  	if (button == 0x00) {
  83  		systemMessage(gm, "Message removal cancelled.");
  84  		return(0x00);
  85  	}
  86  	int Q4Y2 = text;
  87  	if ((Q4Y2 < 0x00) || (Q4Y2 > numInList(Q63X) - 0x01)) {
  88  		systemMessage(gm, "You have entered an invalid index number.");
  89  	}
  90  	string Q58D = Q63X[Q4Y2];
  91  	string Q61F = "Removing index #" + text + ", message text reading '" + Q58D + "' from all town criers.");
  92  	systemMessage(gm, Q61F);
  93  	list args;
  94  	appendToList(args, Q58D);
  95  	multiMessageToLoc(get_town_center_location(), "towncrierremovemessage", args);
  96  	return(0x00);
  97  }
  98  
  99  trigger message("towncrieraddmessage") {
 100  	string text = args[0x00];
 101  	appendToList(Q63X, text);
 102  	return(0x00);
 103  }
 104  
 105  trigger message("towncrierremovemessage") {
 106  	string text = args[0x00];
 107  	removeSpecificItem(Q63X, text);
 108  	return(0x00);
 109  }
 110  
 111  trigger use {
 112  	if (!isEditing(user)) {
 113  		return(0x01);
 114  	}
 115  	Q4F4 = this;
 116  	gm = user;
 117  	list Q56N;
 118  	appendToList(Q56N, 0x00);
 119  	appendToList(Q56N, "View current town crier messages.");
 120  	appendToList(Q56N, 0x01);
 121  	appendToList(Q56N, "Add a message to the town criers.");
 122  	appendToList(Q56N, 0x02);
 123  	appendToList(Q56N, "Delete a message from the town criers.");
 124  	appendToList(Q56N, 0x03);
 125  	appendToList(Q56N, "Add a message to this town crier ONLY.");
 126  	selectType(gm, Q4F4, 0x3C, "TOWN CRIER CONTROL MENU", Q56N);
 127  	return(0x00);
 128  }
 129  
 130  trigger typeselected(0x3C) {
 131  	if (user != gm) {
 132  		return(0x00);
 133  	}
 134  	if (listindex == 0x00) {
 135  		barkTo(gm, gm, "Town crier update cancelled.");
 136  		return(0x01);
 137  	}
 138  	switch(objtype) {
 139  	case 0x00
 140  		display_crier_messages();
 141  		break;
 142  	case 0x01
 143  		systemMessage(gm, "Type in the message you wish to add: ");
 144  		textEntry(Q4F4, gm, 0x25, 0x00, "");
 145  		return(0x00);
 146  		break;
 147  	case 0x02
 148  		systemMessage(gm, "Enter the number of the message you wish to remove: ");
 149  		textEntry(Q4F4, gm, 0x27, 0x00, "");
 150  		return(0x00);
 151  		break;
 152  	case 0x03
 153  		systemMessage(gm, "Type in the message you wish to add: ");
 154  		textEntry(Q4F4, gm, 0x26, 0x00, "");
 155  		return(0x00);
 156  		break;
 157  	default
 158  		break;
 159  	}
 160  	return(0x01);
 161  }
 162  
 163  function void broadcast_crier_add(obj it) {
 164  	list msg_args;
 165  	appendToList(msg_args, it);
 166  	multiMessageToLoc(get_town_center_location(), "towncrieradd", msg_args);
 167  	return();
 168  }
 169  
 170  function void broadcast_crier_remove(obj it) {
 171  	list msg_args;
 172  	appendToList(msg_args, it);
 173  	multiMessageToLoc(get_town_center_location(), "towncrierremove", msg_args);
 174  	return();
 175  }
 176  
 177  trigger creation {
 178  	broadcast_crier_add(this);
 179  	return(0x01);
 180  }
 181  
 182  trigger objectloaded {
 183  	broadcast_crier_add(this);
 184  	return(0x01);
 185  }
 186  
 187  trigger destroyed {
 188  	broadcast_crier_remove(this);
 189  	return(0x01);
 190  }
 191
#98 tracking.m 1 member

   1  inherits sk_table;
   2  
   3  member list Q5FB;
   4  
   5  forward void cleanup();
   6  
   7  forward void append_direction_to_description(string , loc , loc );
   8  
   9  trigger message("canUseSkill") {
  10  	return(0x00);
  11  }
  12  
  13  trigger callback(0x4D) {
  14  	detachScript(this, "tracking");
  15  	return(0x00);
  16  }
  17  
  18  trigger message("useSkill") {
  19  	clearList(Q5FB);
  20  	callback(this, 0x0A, 0x4D);
  21  	int Q4Q1;
  22  	Q4Q1 = testSkill(this, 0x26);
  23  	int Q5TE = getSkillLevel(this, 0x26);
  24  	if (Q5TE == 0x00) {
  25  		systemMessage(this, "Tracking failed.");
  26  		return(0x00);
  27  	}
  28  	loc Q66U = getLocation(this);
  29  	loc Q469;
  30  	list Q57U;
  31  	int Q61W;
  32  	list Q643 = 0x2122, "Animals", 0x20D8, "Creatures", 0x2106, "People";
  33  	selectType(this, this, 0x25, "What do you wish to track?", Q643);
  34  	cleanup();
  35  	return(0x00);
  36  }
  37  
  38  trigger typeselected(0x25) {
  39  	trackingTypeSelected(Q5FB, this, listindex, objtype, getLocation(this));
  40  	return(0x00);
  41  }
  42  
  43  trigger typeselected(0x29) {
  44  	if (listindex == 0x00) {
  45  		debugMessage("Selecttype aborted");
  46  		cleanup();
  47  		return(0x00);
  48  	}
  49  	if (0x00) {
  50  		printList(Q5FB);
  51  		obj Q4XN;
  52  		string Q5WR;
  53  		for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q5FB); i++) {
  54  			Q4XN = Q5FB[i];
  55  			Q5WR = objToStr(Q4XN);
  56  			debugMessage("" + Q5WR + " " + getObjType(Q4XN) + " " + getName(Q4XN));
  57  		}
  58  		debugMessage("listindex = " + (listindex - 0x01));
  59  		debugMessage("yes, I put it up after adding the clearlist");
  60  	}
  61  	obj trackee = Q5FB[listindex - 0x01];
  62  	attachscript(this, "useristracking");
  63  	setObjVar(this, "trackee", trackee);
  64  	callback(this, 0x01, 0x50);
  65  	callback(this, 0x96, 0x51);
  66  	return(0x00);
  67  }
  68  
  69  function void cleanup() {
  70  	clearList(Q5FB);
  71  	if (hasScript(this, "useristracking")) {
  72  		shortCallback(this, 0x01, 0x51);
  73  	}
  74  	return();
  75  }
  76  
  77  function void append_direction_to_description(string description, loc Q4VS, loc there) {
  78  	int dir = getDirectionInternal(Q4VS, there);
  79  	switch(dir) {
  80  	case 0x00
  81  		description = description + "to the North.";
  82  		break;
  83  	case 0x01
  84  		description = description + "to the Northeast.";
  85  		break;
  86  	case 0x02
  87  		description = description + "to the East.";
  88  		break;
  89  	case 0x03
  90  		description = description + "to the Southeast.";
  91  		break;
  92  	case 0x04
  93  		description = description + "to the South.";
  94  		break;
  95  	case 0x05
  96  		description = description + "to the Southwest.";
  97  		break;
  98  	case 0x06
  99  		description = description + "to the West.";
 100  		break;
 101  	case 0x07
 102  		description = description + "to the Northwest.";
 103  		break;
 104  	default
 105  		debugMessage("getDirection: invalid direction returned.");
 106  		description = description + " in some direction.";
 107  		break;
 108  	}
 109  	return();
 110  }
 111
#99 trap_statue.m 1 member

Q5W8 int → original_tile_type
Source — trap_statue.m 
   1  inherits globals;
   2  
   3  member int Q5W8;
   4  
   5  trigger creation {
   6  	Q5W8 = getObjType(this);
   7  	setObjVar(this, "statueTileNumberFlag", Q5W8);
   8  	return(0x00);
   9  }
  10  
  11  trigger leaverange(0x01) {
  12  	if (isDead(target)) {
  13  		return(0x01);
  14  	}
  15  	int Q4B7 = 0x00;
  16  	int damage;
  17  	list Q67G;
  18  	if (getObjType(this) == 0x1508) {
  19  		setType(this, 0x1509);
  20  		Q4B7 = 0x01;
  21  	}
  22  	if (getObjType(this) == 0x1512) {
  23  		setType(this, 0x1513);
  24  		Q4B7 = 0x01;
  25  	}
  26  	if (getObjType(this) == 0x151A) {
  27  		setType(this, 0x151B)Q4B7 = 0x01;
  28  	}
  29  	if (getObjType(this) == 0x151C) {
  30  		setType(this, 0x151D);
  31  		Q4B7 = 0x01;
  32  	}
  33  	if (Q4B7 == 0x01) {
  34  		getMobsInRange(Q67G, getLocation(this), 0x00);
  35  		if (!numInList(Q67G) == 0x00) {
  36  			damage = dice(0x0A, 0x0A);
  37  			for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q67G); i++) {
  38  				if (random(0x00, 0x64) > getDexterity(Q67G[i])) {
  39  					damage = damage * 0x02;
  40  				}
  41  				loseHP(Q67G[i], damage);
  42  			}
  43  		}
  44  		if (!hasObjVar(this, "statueDown")) {
  45  			setObjVar(this, "statueDown", 0x01);
  46  			callback(this, 0x05, 0x24);
  47  		}
  48  		loseHP(this, damage);
  49  	}
  50  	return(0x01);
  51  }
  52  
  53  trigger callback(0x24) {
  54  	list Q67G;
  55  	getPlayersInRange(Q67G, getLocation(this), 0x1E);
  56  	if (!numInList(Q67G) == 0x00) {
  57  		callback(this, 0x05, 0x24);
  58  	} else {
  59  		int Q62M = getObjVar(this, "statueTileNumberFlag");
  60  		setType(this, Q62M);
  61  	}
  62  	return(0x00);
  63  }
  64
#100 trap_wall_face.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q64Q obj → range_intruder
Source — trap_wall_face.m 
   1  inherits sndfx;
   2  
   3  member obj Q64Q;
   4  
   5  trigger enterrange(0x00) {
   6  	if (isDead(target)) {
   7  		return(0x01);
   8  	}
   9  	Q64Q = target;
  10  	list args;
  11  	message(this, "activate", args);
  12  	return(0x01);
  13  }
  14  
  15  trigger message("activate") {
  16  	int Q62A = getObjType(this);
  17  	loc Q61U = getLocation(this);
  18  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "disarmed")) {
  19  		switch(Q62A) {
  20  		case 0x10F5
  21  			doLocAnimation(Q61U, 0x10F6, 0x09, 0x10, 0x00, 0x00);
  22  			break;
  23  		case 0x10FC
  24  			doLocAnimation(Q61U, 0x10FD, 0x09, 0x10, 0x00, 0x00);
  25  			break;
  26  		case 0x110F
  27  			doLocAnimation(Q61U, 0x1110, 0x09, 0x10, 0x00, 0x00);
  28  			break;
  29  		default
  30  			break;
  31  		}
  32  		sfx(Q61U, 0x54, 0x05);
  33  		shortCallback(this, 0x02, 0x2F);
  34  	}
  35  	return(0x01);
  36  }
  37  
  38  trigger callback(0x2F) {
  39  	loc Q61U = getLocation(this);
  40  	list Q64R;
  41  	getMobsInRange(Q64R, Q61U, 0x01);
  42  	int Q5E4 = numInList(Q64R);
  43  	for (int i = 0x00; i < Q5E4; i++) {
  44  		int Q4GH = dice(0x03, 0x0F);
  45  		obj victim = Q64R[i];
  46  		sfx(Q61U, 0x42, 0x05);
  47  		loseHP(victim, Q4GH);
  48  	}
  49  	return(0x00);
  50  }

#101 vortexai.m 6 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q67L list → target_list
Q67K list → target_scores
Q5CD list → nearby_mobs
Q5CC list → nearby_scores
Q67S obj → self_obj
Q4G9 int → prev_target_count
Source — vortexai.m 
   1  inherits nrgyvrtxbase;
   2  
   3  member list Q67L;
   4  
   5  member list Q67K;
   6  
   7  member list Q5CD;
   8  
   9  member list Q5CC;
  10  
  11  member obj Q67S;
  12  
  13  member int Q4G9;
  14  
  15  member obj trackee;
  16  
  17  forward void select_and_pursue_target();
  18  
  19  forward void pursue_and_strike(obj victim);
  20  
  21  forward void strike_target(obj victim, int damage);
  22  
  23  forward void Q5GP();
  24  
  25  forward void remove_shields_by_type(int Q68Q);
  26  
  27  forward void remove_dual_weapons();
  28  
  29  trigger creation {
  30  	if (random(0x00, 0x01F4) == 0x2A) {
  31  		setType(this, 0xDC);
  32  	}
  33  	Q67S = this;
  34  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(Q67S);
  35  	setMaxFatigue(Q67S, 0x03E7);
  36  	setCurFatigue(Q67S, 0x03E7);
  37  	enableBehaviors(Q67S);
  38  	getMobsInRange(Q67L, Q4VS, 0x06);
  39  	for (int Q5GY; Q5GY < numInList(Q67L); Q5GY++) {
  40  		setItem(Q67K, 0x01, Q5GY);
  41  	}
  42  	remove_dual_weapons();
  43  	int Q68Q = 0x00;
  44  	remove_shields_by_type(Q68Q);
  45  	if (0x00 < numInList(Q67L)) {
  46  		callback(Q67S, 0x05, 0x2F);
  47  		select_and_pursue_target();
  48  	} else {
  49  		callback(Q67S, 0x05, 0x2F);
  50  		shortcallback(Q67S, 0x01, 0x35);
  51  	}
  52  	return(0x00);
  53  }
  54  
  55  function void remove_shields_by_type(int Q68Q) {
  56  	if (use_secondary_list == 0x00) {
  57  		if (0x00 < numInList(Q67L)) {
  58  			for (int item_index = 0x00; item_index < numInList(Q67L); item_index++) {
  59  				int checked_item_type_id = getObjType(Q67L[item_index]);
  60  				if (checked_item_type_id == 0x0335) {
  61  					removeItem(Q67L, item_index);
  62  					removeItem(Q67K, item_index);
  63  				}
  64  			}
  65  		}
  66  	} else {
  67  		if (0x00 < numInList(Q5CD)) {
  68  			for (item_index = 0x00; item_index < numInList(Q5CD); item_index++) {
  69  				checked_item_type_id = getObjType(Q5CD[item_index]);
  70  				if (checked_item_type_id == 0x0335) {
  71  					removeItem(Q5CD, item_index);
  72  					removeItem(Q5CC, item_index);
  73  				}
  74  			}
  75  		}
  76  	}
  77  	return();
  78  }
  79  
  80  function void select_and_pursue_target() {
  81  	loc self_loc = getLocation(Q67S);
  82  	int dist;
  83  	loc there;
  84  	remove_dual_weapons();
  85  	if (0x00 == numInList(Q67L)) {
  86  		shortcallback(Q67S, 0x01, 0x35);
  87  	}
  88  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q67L); i++) {
  89  		if (isValid(Q67L[i])) {
  90  			there = getLocation(Q67L[i]);
  91  			dist = getDistanceInTiles(self_loc, there);
  92  			if (dist == 0x00) {
  93  				dist = 0x01;
  94  			}
  95  			int intelligence = getIntelligence(Q67L[i]);
  96  			int skill = getSkillLevel(Q67L[i], 0x19);
  97  			int priority = (intelligence + skill) / dist;
  98  			setItem(Q67K, priority, i);
  99  		} else {
 100  			removeItem(Q67K, i);
 101  			removeItem(Q67L, i);
 102  		}
 103  	}
 104  	obj tmp_obj_a;
 105  	int tmp_score_a;
 106  	int unused_score;
 107  	int unused_obj;
 108  	obj tmp_obj_b;
 109  	int tmp_score_b;
 110  	int unused;
 111  	int count = numInList(Q67K);
 112  	string count_str = count;
 113  	for (int outer; outer < numInList(Q67K); outer++) {
 114  		for (int inner = 0x00; inner < count; inner++) {
 115  			if (outer < inner) {
 116  				if ((Q67K[outer]) < (Q67K[inner])) {
 117  					if (isValid(Q67L[outer])) {
 118  						tmp_score_a = Q67K[outer];
 119  						tmp_obj_a = Q67L[outer];
 120  						tmp_score_b = Q67K[inner];
 121  						tmp_obj_b = Q67L[inner];
 122  						setItem(Q67K, tmp_score_b, outer);
 123  						setItem(Q67L, tmp_obj_b, outer);
 124  						setItem(Q67K, tmp_score_a, inner);
 125  						setItem(Q67L, tmp_obj_a, inner);
 126  					}
 127  				}
 128  				if ((Q67K[outer]) == (Q67K[inner])) {
 129  					if (isValid(Q67L[outer])) {
 130  						loc loc_a = getLocation(Q67L[outer]);
 131  						loc loc_b = getLocation(Q67L[inner]);
 132  						int dist_a = getDistance(self_loc, loc_a);
 133  						int dist_b = getDistance(self_loc, loc_b);
 134  						if (dist_a > dist_b) {
 135  							tmp_score_a = Q67K[outer];
 136  							tmp_obj_a = Q67L[outer];
 137  							tmp_score_b = Q67K[inner];
 138  							tmp_obj_b = Q67L[inner];
 139  							setItem(Q67K, tmp_score_b, outer);
 140  							setItem(Q67L, tmp_obj_b, outer);
 141  							setItem(Q67K, tmp_score_a, inner);
 142  							setItem(Q67L, tmp_obj_a, inner);
 143  						}
 144  					}
 145  				}
 146  			}
 147  		}
 148  	}
 149  	Q4G9 = numInList(Q67L);
 150  	obj best_target = Q67L[0x00];
 151  	pursue_and_strike(best_target);
 152  	return();
 153  }
 154  
 155  function void pursue_and_strike(obj victim) {
 156  	loc self_loc = getLocation(Q67S);
 157  	loc there = getLocation(victim);
 158  	trackee = victim;
 159  	int dist = getDistanceInTiles(self_loc, there);
 160  	if (dist < 0x01) {
 161  		dist = 0x01;
 162  		strike_target(victim, 0x1E);
 163  	} else {
 164  		walkTo(Q67S, there, 0x0E);
 165  		shortcallback(Q67S, dist, 0x34);
 166  	}
 167  	return();
 168  }
 169  
 170  function void strike_target(obj victim, int damage) {
 171  	loc self_loc = getLocation(Q67S);
 172  	sfx(self_loc, 0x28, 0x00);
 173  	if (!is_valid_spell_target(victim)) {
 174  		return();
 175  	}
 176  	doDamageType(Q67S, victim, damage, 0x02);
 177  	int stat_delta = 0x00 - 0x0A;
 178  	int duration = 0xB4;
 179  	for (int s = 0x00; s < 0x03; s++) {
 180  		int effect_applied = apply_stat_effect_if_absent(victim, s, stat_delta, duration);
 181  	}
 182  	return();
 183  }
 184  
 185  function void remove_dual_weapons() {
 186  	for (int item_index = 0x00; item_index < numInList(Q67L); item_index++) {
 187  		int item_type_id = getObjType(Q67L[item_index]);
 188  		if ((item_type_id == 0x0192) || (item_type_id == 0x0193)) {
 189  			removeItem(Q67L, item_index);
 190  			removeItem(Q67K, item_index);
 191  		}
 192  	}
 193  	return();
 194  }
 195  
 196  trigger callback(0x34) {
 197  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(Q67S);
 198  	loc there = getLocation(trackee);
 199  	int Q5R6 = getDistanceInTiles(Q4VS, there);
 200  	if (Q5R6 <= 0x01) {
 201  		strike_target(trackee, 0x0C);
 202  		select_and_pursue_target();
 203  	} else {
 204  		getMobsInRange(Q5CD, Q4VS, 0x06);
 205  		for (int Q5GY; Q5GY < numInList(Q5CD); Q5GY++) {
 206  			setItem(Q5CC, 0x01, Q5GY);
 207  		}
 208  		int Q68Q = 0x01;
 209  		remove_shields_by_type(Q68Q);
 210  		if (0x00 < numInList(Q5CD)) {
 211  			for (int Q5CI; Q5CI < numInList(Q5CD); Q5CI++) {
 212  				int Q4XM = getObjType(Q5CD[Q5CI]);
 213  				if ((Q4XM == 0x0192) || (Q4XM == 0x0193)) {
 214  					removeItem(Q5CD, Q5CI);
 215  					removeItem(Q5CC, Q5CI);
 216  					return(0x00);
 217  				}
 218  				obj Q5C9 = Q5CD[Q5CI];
 219  				if (isInList(Q67L, Q5C9)) {
 220  					removeItem(Q5CD, Q5CI);
 221  					removeItem(Q5CC, Q5CI);
 222  				} else {
 223  					appendToList(Q67L, Q5C9);
 224  					appendToList(Q67K, 0x01);
 225  				}
 226  			}
 227  		}
 228  		if (Q4G9 == numInList(Q67L)) {
 229  			walkTo(Q67S, there, 0x0E);
 230  			shortcallback(Q67S, Q5R6, 0x34);
 231  			return(0x00);
 232  		}
 233  		if (numInList(Q67L) < 0x01) {
 234  			shortcallback(Q67S, Q5R6, 0x35);
 235  			return(0x00);
 236  		}
 237  		select_and_pursue_target();
 238  	}
 239  	return(0x00);
 240  }
 241  
 242  trigger callback(0x35) {
 243  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(Q67S);
 244  	getMobsInRange(Q5CD, Q4VS, 0x06);
 245  	for (int Q5GY; Q5GY < numInList(Q5CD); Q5GY++) {
 246  		setItem(Q5CC, 0x01, Q5GY);
 247  	}
 248  	int Q68Q = 0x01;
 249  	remove_shields_by_type(Q68Q);
 250  	if (0x00 < numInList(Q5CD)) {
 251  		for (int Q5CI; Q5CI < numInList(Q5CD); Q5CI++) {
 252  			int Q4XM = getObjType(Q5CD[Q5CI]);
 253  			if ((Q4XM == 0x0192) || (Q4XM == 0x0193)) {
 254  				removeItem(Q5CD, Q5CI);
 255  				removeItem(Q5CC, Q5CI);
 256  				return(0x00);
 257  			}
 258  			obj Q5C9 = Q5CD[Q5CI];
 259  			if (isInList(Q67L, Q5C9)) {
 260  				removeItem(Q5CD, Q5CI);
 261  				removeItem(Q5CC, Q5CI);
 262  			} else {
 263  				appendToList(Q67L, Q5C9);
 264  				appendToList(Q67K, 0x01);
 265  			}
 266  		}
 267  		select_and_pursue_target();
 268  	} else {
 269  		callback(Q67S, 0x02, 0x35);
 270  	}
 271  	return(0x00);
 272  }
 273  
 274  trigger enterrange(0x04) {
 275  	if (!(isInList(Q67L, target))) {
 276  		appendToList(Q67L, target);
 277  		appendToList(Q67K, 0x00);
 278  	}
 279  	select_and_pursue_target();
 280  	return(0x01);
 281  }
 282  
 283  trigger enterrange(0x00) {
 284  	strike_target(target, 0x1E);
 285  	select_and_pursue_target();
 286  	return(0x01);
 287  }
 288  
 289  trigger callback(0x2F) {
 290  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(Q67S);
 291  	sfx(Q4VS, 0x15, 0x00);
 292  	shortcallback(Q67S, 0x03, 0x2F);
 293  	return(0x00);
 294  }

#102 wearlight.m 1 member
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5FY int → saved_light_val
Source — wearlight.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q5FY;
   4  
   5  trigger creation {
   6  	shortcallback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
   7  	return(0x01);
   8  }
   9  
  10  trigger callback(0x2F) {
  11  	int Q54U;
  12  	int Q4Q1 = getResource(Q54U, this, "magic", 0x03, 0x02);
  13  	int charges = Q54U / 0x03;
  14  	setObjVar(this, "charges", charges);
  15  	return(0x01);
  16  }
  17  
  18  function int consume_charge() {
  19  	int charges = getObjVar(this, "charges");
  20  	returnResourcesToBank(this, 0x03, "magic");
  21  	if (charges <= 0x00) {
  22  		removeObjVar(this, "charges");
  23  	} else {
  24  		setObjVar(this, "charges", charges - 0x01);
  25  	}
  26  	return(charges);
  27  }
  28  
  29  trigger equip {
  30  	if (consume_charge()) {
  31  		Q5FY = getLightVal(equippedon);
  32  		setLight(equippedon, 0x0F, 0x01);
  33  	} else {
  34  		setLight(equippedon, Q5FY, 0x01);
  35  		detachScript(this, "wearlight");
  36  	}
  37  	return(0x01);
  38  }
  39  
  40  trigger unequip {
  41  	setLight(unequippedfrom, Q5FY, 0x01);
  42  	return(0x01);
  43  }
  44  
  45  trigger time("min:*0") {
  46  	if (isEquipped(this)) {
  47  		if (!consume_charge()) {
  48  			setLight(containedBy(this), Q5FY, 0x01);
  49  			detachScript(this, "wearlight");
  50  		}
  51  	}
  52  	return(0x01);
  53  }
  54
#103 wearstat.m 3 members
✕ Q-nameType ProposedOverride
Q5X6 int → str_mod
Q4HZ int → dex_mod
Q4YI int → int_mod
Source — wearstat.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int Q5X6;
   4  
   5  member int Q4HZ;
   6  
   7  member int Q4YI;
   8  
   9  trigger creation {
  10  	shortcallback(this, 0x01, 0x2F);
  11  	return(0x01);
  12  }
  13  
  14  trigger callback(0x2F) {
  15  	int Q54U;
  16  	int Q4Q1 = getResource(Q54U, this, "magic", 0x03, 0x02);
  17  	int charges = Q54U / 0x03;
  18  	setObjVar(this, "charges", charges);
  19  	return(0x01);
  20  }
  21  
  22  function void detach_wear_enchantment_script(obj it) {
  23  	debugMessage("Error!  womfunc meant as pure virtual called!");
  24  	return();
  25  }
  26  
  27  function int consume_charge() {
  28  	int charges = 0x00;
  29  	if (hasObjVar(this, "charges")) {
  30  		charges = getObjVar(this, "charges");
  31  	}
  32  	if (charges <= 0x00) {
  33  		removeObjVar(this, "charges");
  34  	} else {
  35  		setObjVar(this, "charges", charges - 0x01);
  36  		returnResourcesToBank(this, 0x03, "magic");
  37  	}
  38  	return(charges);
  39  }
  40  
  41  function void apply_stat_modifiers(obj it, int add) {
  42  	int str_mod = Q5X6;
  43  	int da = Q4HZ;
  44  	int int_mod = Q4YI;
  45  	if (!add) {
  46  		str_mod = 0x00 - Q5X6;
  47  		da = 0x00 - Q4HZ;
  48  		int_mod = 0x00 - Q4YI;
  49  	}
  50  	modify_character_stat(it, 0x00, str_mod);
  51  	modify_character_stat(it, 0x01, da);
  52  	modify_character_stat(it, 0x02, int_mod);
  53  	return();
  54  }
  55  
  56  trigger equip {
  57  	if (consume_charge()) {
  58  		apply_stat_modifiers(equippedon, 0x01);
  59  	} else {
  60  		detach_wear_enchantment_script(this);
  61  	}
  62  	return(0x01);
  63  }
  64  
  65  trigger unequip {
  66  	apply_stat_modifiers(unequippedfrom, 0x00);
  67  	return(0x01);
  68  }
  69  
  70  trigger time("min:*0") {
  71  	if (isEquipped(this)) {
  72  		obj it = containedBy(this);
  73  		if (!consume_charge()) {
  74  			apply_stat_modifiers(it, 0x00);
  75  			detach_wear_enchantment_script(this);
  76  		}
  77  	}
  78  	return(0x01);
  79  }
  80
#104 wpnspeed.m 1 member

Q5VX int → stat_index
Source — wpnspeed.m 
   1  inherits spelskil;
   2  
   3  member int gold_amount_str;
   4  
   5  member int Q5VX;
   6  
   7  trigger creation {
   8  	Q5VX = 0x01;
   9  	gold_amount_str = 0x0A;
  10  	return(0x01);
  11  }
  12  
  13  trigger equip {
  14  	modify_character_stat(equippedon, Q5VX, gold_amount_str);
  15  	return(0x01);
  16  }
  17  
  18  trigger unequip {
  19  	modify_character_stat(unequippedfrom, Q5VX, 0x00 - gold_amount_str);
  20  	return(0x01);
  21  }
